**_27 MILLION DOLLARS_**

_**Democrats just reserved more than 27 million dollars worth of attack ads against me this fall**_.

It’s clearer than ever that _**my candidacy scares the Democrat powerbrokers in D.C**_. If I’m going to have a real shot at winning this race, I’m going to need every conservative donor in the country to get involved.
[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION ->** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ee420b23fb9f4edfb5ad166d0a8bca06&_e=BrYpYbmyqLWBcfSI7nAfqJ410w-Y8tt4v8MIvIUuPsiYdubiQQga68P6TGry9_h8rPvuHESrWCVxkVmFu18ipHTNamVZJOhmti81XMw_ooXC-lwIqz8zquASTMCIOnV16Zu15_p-1WLw0hl2MbzR7iLiex7ti0tk23tUhS-Up4lg3g7NCGlKEMoRtR4mx_uwK52EMp5nsTcX-fLsortUYZHcAYlBfV99rJ5OkeuOqhRoZVUhyMfEj4_aQLzp8fkyF01UCV5aIdRdRNYMZz5SehB0NTJYdEeoqVHytgQBM6JbxH9QQ67W1K3b9iOsn9LCOpwrpSj71tSZ1dEXYVVvdfv64Ehuk3xJWlQK6tqsqcdDU7Q5o33UNym-nPnoVQ1XxDIvkpPJyUQexYhNViSZ-ywJbgUxa4BLEnAiqJBtzfQ%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

I’ve been saying since I got into this race that it would likely be one of - if not the - most expensive Senate matchup in 2024. This week, Washington Democrats announced they will spend - AT LEAST - **$27 million attacking me on TV in Montana this fall**.

It turns out my instinct was right. My Democrat opponent hasn’t been in danger of losing his seat since he was elected in 2006. Now, with me in the race, Democrats are afraid there is a real risk of losing this critical Senate seat. **They said they’d spend heavily to defeat me, and now we know that when it comes to the Montana Senate race, Democrats mean what they say**.

[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION ->** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ee420b23fb9f4edfb5ad166d0a8bca06&_e=BrYpYbmyqLWBcfSI7nAfqJ410w-Y8tt4v8MIvIUuPsiYdubiQQga68P6TGry9_h8rPvuHESrWCVxkVmFu18ipHTNamVZJOhmti81XMw_ooXC-lwIqz8zquASTMCIOnV16Zu15_p-1WLw0hl2MbzR7iLiex7ti0tk23tUhS-Up4lg3g7NCGlKEMoRtR4mx_uwK52EMp5nsTcX-fLsortUYZHcAYlBfV99rJ5OkeuOqhRoZVUhyMfEj4_aQLzp8fkyF01UCV5aIdRdRNYMZz5Sek4vLmu_vy6LWeh_KI5xI8tdyPn25EN6lfiu9I2Edee3vP30HoXzsOC84jm9EqMgxBU6EdxdrbIr8dpsEi6QydRdZKRqBGaUJ3NlpxMMpl1xDEP5HU1A_cDFmgWfcN38qZvKeLZl4cTS6xXqntibnX4%3D)

Here is where things stand:
1. Democrats have already spent more than **11 million dollars** to blunt my momentum and have earmarked an additional 27 million for the fall. But trust me, this is just the beginning.

2. Last quarter, my opponent raised 5.5 million dollars - a record - and his quarterly fundraising totals will only increase with each quarter that passes.

[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ee420b23fb9f4edfb5ad166d0a8bca06&_e=BrYpYbmyqLWBcfSI7nAfqJ410w-Y8tt4v8MIvIUuPsiYdubiQQga68P6TGry9_h8rPvuHESrWCVxkVmFu18ipHTNamVZJOhmti81XMw_ooXC-lwIqz8zquASTMCIOnV16Zu15_p-1WLw0hl2MbzR7iLiex7ti0tk23tUhS-Up4lg3g7NCGlKEMoRtR4mx_uwK52EMp5nsTcX-fLsortUYZHcAYlBfV99rJ5OkeuOqhRoZVUhyMfEj4_aQLzp8fkyF01UCV5aIdRdRNYMZz5SegWJOBX5fPtvvHj7LALbFOYtAhLvrMzNPqPrbW1je9QtI1zbVXX2_77wQ4Duz8vNFkQsuQEg_pWC5ufx7woW9gNTmKo-Nqq-OA0DDUlWyncSQrR1fFLch5CPkLkudb6HrkE7x7qFZKr10wunZML7qO0%3D)
[**MAKE AN EMERGENCY CONTRIBUTION ->** ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ee420b23fb9f4edfb5ad166d0a8bca06&_e=BrYpYbmyqLWBcfSI7nAfqJ410w-Y8tt4v8MIvIUuPsiYdubiQQga68P6TGry9_h8rPvuHESrWCVxkVmFu18ipHTNamVZJOhmti81XMw_ooXC-lwIqz8zquASTMCIOnV16Zu15_p-1WLw0hl2MbzR7iLiex7ti0tk23tUhS-Up4lg3g7NCGlKEMoRtR4mx_uwK52EMp5nsTcX-fLsortUYZHcAYlBfV99rJ5OkeuOqhRoZVUhyMfEj4_aQLzp8fkyF01UCV5aIdRdRNYMZz5SelVUwpQAZmRmsWxW3iUSO_YtXcqh1iu52rcpfNj5yUKMP1z6umLxZ3wnyFBAN-Lmnel3yne_TpCbygu05oYsB4RVtEMunI-MPQPyQxN4Gxnj7sMt791tsBY6Z-FQhWXinwwlIW5XJjaaIMDEQm6mAbQ%3D)

Fellow Conservative, without your support, there is no way I will win this race. My opponent will spend and do whatever it takes to win another term - **even if that means destroying me, my family, and my business with his lies**.

I need to raise $10,000 by the end of the day today, or else I may never get ahead. If you’ve previously contributed to my campaign, I’m asking you to double your investment. **[If you’ve not yet contributed to my campaign, there is no better time than the present](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ee420b23fb9f4edfb5ad166d0a8bca06&_e=BrYpYbmyqLWBcfSI7nAfqJ410w-Y8tt4v8MIvIUuPsiYdubiQQga68P6TGry9_h8rPvuHESrWCVxkVmFu18ipHTNamVZJOhmti81XMw_ooXC-lwIqz8zquASTMCIOnV16Zu15_p-1WLw0hl2MbzR7iLiex7ti0tk23tUhS-Up4lg3g7NCGlKEMoRtR4mx_uwK52EMp5nsTcX-fLsortUYZHcAYlBfV99rJ5OkeuOqhRoZVUhyMfEj4_aQLzp8fkyF01UCV5aIdRdRNYMZz5Set3BJ01e30h1z6qNrFt2y2gRWm9rZgXTarhCej4lKHatt185t_gB9dxn4L2Mdvf3OJi9K46ZY2IKUiKDmeoD3IBZlk62PANPyd5v771UQrVWxcTWMvXFG_3djVljOOwYOlz3t4NIfm9c7g02O3lXYFY%3D)**.

This race is far too important for any single conservative to sit on the sidelines and watch. **[We need you on the field](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ee420b23fb9f4edfb5ad166d0a8bca06&_e=BrYpYbmyqLWBcfSI7nAfqJ410w-Y8tt4v8MIvIUuPsiYdubiQQga68P6TGry9_h8rPvuHESrWCVxkVmFu18ipHTNamVZJOhmti81XMw_ooXC-lwIqz8zquASTMCIOnV16Zu15_p-1WLw0hl2MbzR7iLiex7ti0tk23tUhS-Up4lg3g7NCGlKEMoRtR4mx_uwK52EMp5nsTcX-fLsortUYZHcAYlBfV99rJ5OkeuOqhRoZVUhyMfEj4_aQLzp8fkyF01UCV5aIdRdRNYMZz5SemdjPDOnNHlxt8AvavyvQgdEP7AX_PNul98J3TMZKagxyEhZmdXvmBBA-VL9SCPe9f-l0EmIM7hu4hD57w0yqewATM9WU8ubAfMg9sJxulEjJJe-f6DrA4EypAbf_IC-ApagJusAEzTUFLPA5cC-UKc%3D)**.

If you can’t donate today, that’s OK, but please don’t delete these messages or unsubscribe from my supporters list. In the coming months, you’ll hear more about this race with every passing day; it might not seem like a priority to you today, but when you realize that flipping the Senate depends on victory in Montana, perhaps you’ll **[consider sending us a contribution.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ee420b23fb9f4edfb5ad166d0a8bca06&_e=BrYpYbmyqLWBcfSI7nAfqJ410w-Y8tt4v8MIvIUuPsiYdubiQQga68P6TGry9_h8rPvuHESrWCVxkVmFu18ipHTNamVZJOhmti81XMw_ooXC-lwIqz8zquASTMCIOnV16Zu15_p-1WLw0hl2MbzR7iLiex7ti0tk23tUhS-Up4lg3g7NCGlKEMoRtR4mx_uwK52EMp5nsTcX-fLsortUYZHcAYlBfV99rJ5OkeuOqhRoZVUhyMfEj4_aQLzp8fkyF01UCV5aIdRdRNYMZz5Sehne3yxCxwXGuqz4a45O-yVQ7uNV7c6U8IT4d93T8RMqckPJZhgM9XUi53lrgtXYSBY6FCOuexhVMuLFoQmSCcsZFa7Xv3Y7lkTAjmbt08LpFvdmCpcg17d8lueKUhZABCltugey8ylmOIh5VHNuQBQ%3D)**

For America's Future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

body:

[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=502ea590a69b443cb77d7363722c4ae4&_e=JIFOBc8JSdnk0d0WSmAakisTb7fcbfPGswS8EkFTnhDxM3nCgEDY95jWu6T1gwOeexl3cSXQ_gZZtSgkIA6RFsF6auYV4a67IUfFL9a2_fHXbGWrlErPZf-hBSRiiJ0wnhiqQEepAzBMRhbF9jMbY-zDqn520P_VZcX-QGi4KDwg6j05fW-pG7U-douaZTKvfDHDkmsbROq8RP_o3mRNU7HR4gwuY7-u6mSjq-VB8jh9i53jM4JjZ7CMMCzA2pqD-74ImmsFkcFdg0uL1jVM_WbLPoBLop1YMAHwU3sdHXskB77Z2nKWM-pvPOKKkFINunfDcIcs-4Tio4JP2VK_Sg%3D%3D)
Friend, President Joe Biden is waging a war on American energy production.

Governor Abbott is fighting to stop the federal government's war on American energy and keep Texas a global energy leader. Can we count on you to help him FIGHT BACK against President Biden's anti-energy policies?
**[Sign your name today to help Governor Abbott send a CLEAR message to President Biden: TEXAS WILL NOT BACK DOWN!->](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=502ea590a69b443cb77d7363722c4ae4&_e=JIFOBc8JSdnk0d0WSmAakisTb7fcbfPGswS8EkFTnhDxM3nCgEDY95jWu6T1gwOeexl3cSXQ_gZZtSgkIA6RFsF6auYV4a67IUfFL9a2_fHXbGWrlErPZf-hBSRiiJ0wnhiqQEepAzBMRhbF9jMbY-zDqn520P_VZcX-QGi4KDwg6j05fW-pG7U-douaZTKvVh-DKsfoi2LarkfFv0dXGFKHWywoqdmJ05IfBXXuPMpRlIW4q_mF0ynfOiAyCBTijejtWlAMH1Aujkit1I4Dv0ohyw4G7HOeFyY3vv-THIzDvORDtTeWeQUv8SToekNPfPMs4e8h6WM7UdTeok8uBQ%3D%3D)** [>> PROTECT TEXAS ENERGY <<](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=502ea590a69b443cb77d7363722c4ae4&_e=JIFOBc8JSdnk0d0WSmAakisTb7fcbfPGswS8EkFTnhDxM3nCgEDY95jWu6T1gwOeexl3cSXQ_gZZtSgkIA6RFsF6auYV4a67IUfFL9a2_fHXbGWrlErPZf-hBSRiiJ0wnhiqQEepAzBMRhbF9jMbY-zDqn520P_VZcX-QGi4KDwg6j05fW-pG7U-douaZTKvfU7DaI4gXJ_E1-Yc1Lfx0v2NHqITzXT9GlF5sZelZX-_Lk79P4C-73OP3IQEcnnYTiRaZ9S4QRtw3M41dOT44nRfIBVrSu2HnP5OR_kiw0CLdytJUSjm5PMWJXgqyNdlz27TB0u7Ydvl_2c69OByZg%3D%3D)
Texas is a pro-energy state - indeed, we are THE #1 energy state in the nation. But since President Biden took office, he has pushed an anti-energy agenda that threatens to weaken our state's energy agenda.

**The men and women who work in the energy industry help power our lives, and they are vital to our booming Texas economy. Governor Abbott won 't stand idly by as the Biden Administration pushes strict regulations that jeopardize affordable energy prices and the livelihoods of hardworking Texans. **

By joining Governor Abbott today and **[voicing your support](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=502ea590a69b443cb77d7363722c4ae4&_e=JIFOBc8JSdnk0d0WSmAakisTb7fcbfPGswS8EkFTnhDxM3nCgEDY95jWu6T1gwOeexl3cSXQ_gZZtSgkIA6RFsF6auYV4a67IUfFL9a2_fHXbGWrlErPZf-hBSRiiJ0wnhiqQEepAzBMRhbF9jMbY-zDqn520P_VZcX-QGi4KDwg6j05fW-pG7U-douaZTKvH1DSRTIoDlpYGQ4dFWWOgOJSdzTQLLFBIfl8K5df2GTzpqS2fGDH9ymZbGxGIwslDXACygx9hqYyjdhOGMQompbMlal6jnPO9g0tHML7qiust39rNSmIFC64m0WlczHJS4ZS_tVwAbk6Wc3OapsPPQ%3D%3D)** to protect Texas' energy industry from Biden's overreach, you will play a pivotal role in keeping our state the #1 energy producer for years to come!

Thank you in advance for your support.

\- Team Abbott

[JOIN THE FIGHT TO KEEP TEXAS ENERGY STRONG ->](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=502ea590a69b443cb77d7363722c4ae4&_e=JIFOBc8JSdnk0d0WSmAakisTb7fcbfPGswS8EkFTnhDxM3nCgEDY95jWu6T1gwOeexl3cSXQ_gZZtSgkIA6RFsF6auYV4a67IUfFL9a2_fHXbGWrlErPZf-hBSRiiJ0wnhiqQEepAzBMRhbF9jMbY-zDqn520P_VZcX-QGi4KDwg6j05fW-pG7U-douaZTKv6uAA1tcDfrva5YywqjInBZ3i7jjukJzEqy2Wq5DMKZ0wK-DUMShNh8lkTXrlg_BsEPPrVOHO5HqToNDUo0w35D4AdFSTzrdIDIM8N79BfJ5K_8cJ-U7PHgA75MGj28UAnvP-fAgcATXEAmTEmnZ-nw%3D%3D)

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Our government has spent more on weapons and war than any other country on earth.
body:
Sign the petition to urge the Biden Administration to cut the Pentagon budget in the 2025 federal budget and instead focus on investing in our communities.
#
Peter,
President Biden is putting the final touches on next year’s federal budget right now, and with global tensions on a razor’s edge, “security” is certain to be a top priority. **But for decades, the U.S. government has spent more on weapons and war than any other country on earth — _and it didn’t make anyone, anywhere, any safer._**
We're witnessing the catastrophic fallout of a military-first approach: endless wars, global instability, and blatant neglect of pressing domestic issues. It’s time to rethink this broken approach.
This year, we could pour even more bombs and bullets into a world where violence is increasing by the second — _unless activists like you speak up to demand something different._
**[Will you sign our petition right now urging President Biden to cut the Pentagon budget and instead focus on investing in our communities?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140345?t=1&akid=33183%2E1203867%2EofKaBS)**
This moment marks the start of a legislative marathon to press the White House and Congress to reject the misguided notion that BILLIONS for weapons and war are the only way to keep us safe and help us thrive.
**The President’s 2025 budget proposal is due in the weeks ahead, and that means the clock is ticking.** To influence policymakers in the White House and make a real impact, the time to act is NOW.
**[Budgets are moral documents that should reflect our values and priorities. Can you call on President Biden to invest in human needs and cut the Pentagon budget now?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140345?t=2&akid=33183%2E1203867%2EofKaBS)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140345?t=3&akid=33183%2E1203867%2EofKaBS)**
More weapons and war aren’t the way. Let’s raise our voices and make that loud and clear to the Biden Administration.
— Justice Democrats

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240205-33183-footer&t=4&refcode2=33183_1203867_ofKaBS&akid=33183%2E1203867%2EofKaBS)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=5&akid=33183%2E1203867%2EofKaBS)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=33183%2E1203867%2EofKaBS)

clean_body: Can you believe this? | | | | | According to one of Tom Kean, Jr.’s Radical Democrat Activist challengers—if you’re a supporter of his, that also makes you a “RIGHT-WING EXTREMIST. ” | | | | | | This Radical Leftist may need to revisit the definition of extremist , and start by taking a good look in the mirror. 👀 Friend, this is nothing more than a page torn right out of the Radial Left’s playbook. Rather than stand for something they believe in (like the safety and security of Americans in the midst of a national border crisis) they generalize their opposition to become a distraction from reality. Tom ran his campaign on putting New Jerseyans first, and we’re proud to report that he has delivered on that promise by... Demanding Biden Secure Our Border Passing legislation advocating for Veteran-Owned Small Businesses Passing legislation to improving commuter rail transportation Passing legislation to affirm strong US support for our ally, Ukraine Passing legislation supporting mental health for school children This is NOT Radical—it’s RATIONAL. | | | | Please know: THIS IS JUST THE BEGINNING OF WHAT THE RADICAL LEFT HAS COMING AT US! And we say US , because it’s not just about Tom. It’s about what they want to take away from YOU too. – Team Kean | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Kean for Congress Inc Copyright © 2024 Kean for Congress Our mailing address is:** Kean for Congress Inc PO Box 999 Edison, NJ 08818 Click to mail your donation. **About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

body:
2024 could come down to this

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78469721/453491009/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2EyY2FlYS04NmM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nKFtmSkYBhPymczXIpOxYaXfb1TGr4pbrUmDraKjhvU=&emci=b0e98d69-58c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=03a2caea-86c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=43402272) | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78469722/453491010/1005860198?&refcode=E6873-20240205-NY03Split-Image-SpecialElection&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2EyY2FlYS04NmM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nKFtmSkYBhPymczXIpOxYaXfb1TGr4pbrUmDraKjhvU=) **Peter, Jake Tapper just laid out the stakes of the NY-03 special election on February 13, and they couldn’t be higher! name: Wes Moore
subject: I am supporting the Reproductive Freedom Referendum
body:
Friend, I have said it before, and I’ll say it again: I will always support reproductive freedom and access in Maryland.

In the wake of Roe v. Wade being overturned, I supported the effort to protect abortion rights in Maryland, and I will not rest until that right is enshrined in our constitution. Maryland will be a safe haven for abortion access.

This year, Maryland voters will weigh in on the Reproductive Freedom Referendum, which will amend the state constitution to ratify the right to abortion and birth control.

We can and must do more to support reproductive access across our state. Our rights are constantly attacked, and with the news of the Supreme Court taking on a case on access to birth control, we must stand up to these attacks.

Organizers across the state are spreading the word on the referendum, and encouraging voters to vote YES come November.

To support their work, I’m asking if you’ll make a donation directly to the VOTE YES campaign to protect abortion access and reproductive rights. 100% of your contribution will go directly to the Maryland organizers to fully fund their outreach strategy to pass this campaign in November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/011624_web?refcode=moore-em20240205]

Make a donation » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/011624_web?refcode=moore-em20240205]

Thank you for joining the fight.

Elevate,

Wes Moore

---

We’re already preparing for our next big fight – state Democrats are facing nearly a dozen special elections in the next few months. President Obama is calling out the importance of Democratic leadership in the states – it’s up to grassroots supporters like you to listen to him and help elect state Democrats now. **By renewing your 2024 DLCC membership _today_ you can help pave a path for Democratic wins this year and beyond. **
**As an official member, you’ll be at the forefront of the fight against state Republicans’ extremist agenda, helping elect Democrats who will work to secure a progressive future for states like yours. So, can we count you in?**

name: Bob Casey
subject: I said I would send a note
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1910%2E552475%2EjL5ETn)
Peter, my Finance Director, Taylor, reached out to give me an update. Take a look:
| | | | | | | | | | |
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---
Senator, since our opponent outraised us, we’ve been working hard to see how we can close the gap heading into 2024. I’ve crunched the numbers with the team and if we can hit our goal for February, it’ll make a big difference. Could you reach out to some of our top supporters with a personal ask to help? Every dollar counts right now. Thank you! Taylor
Thanks for the update, Taylor. I’ll send a note today. Bob
Peter, with the Senate majority hinging on Pennsylvania, we’re going to need resources to fight back — but my opponent, Mitch McConnell, and GOP super PACs are doing everything in their power to defeat me, and a recent poll shows this race tightening. That’s why I’m asking for your support today.
[**Will you chip in $5 right now to help me continue fighting for Pennsylvania? As Taylor said, any amount goes a long way in a race this competitive.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240205-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240205-2&refcode2=1910_552475_jL5ETn&akid=1910%2E552475%2EjL5ETn)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240205-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240205-2-el&refcode2=1910_552475_jL5ETn&akid=1910%2E552475%2EjL5ETn) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240205-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240205-2-el&refcode2=1910_552475_jL5ETn&akid=1910%2E552475%2EjL5ETn) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240205-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240205-2-el&refcode2=1910_552475_jL5ETn&akid=1910%2E552475%2EjL5ETn) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240205-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240205-2-el&refcode2=1910_552475_jL5ETn&akid=1910%2E552475%2EjL5ETn) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240205-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240205-2-el&refcode2=1910_552475_jL5ETn&akid=1910%2E552475%2EjL5ETn) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240205-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240205-2&refcode2=1910_552475_jL5ETn&akid=1910%2E552475%2EjL5ETn)

With gratitude,
Bob Casey

Bob Casey for Senate

Philadelphia, PA 19102

name: Rick Scott
subject: The White House isn't enough...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,

By now, I’m sure you’re all in on helping President Trump take back the White House.

**_But I’m here to tell you that that’s not enough._**

**If we’re going to TRULY make America great again, we need to make sure President Trump has a Majority in the Senate that will have his back.**

Make no mistake - without a Republican Senate majority, Chuck Schumer and Bernie Sanders will shut down a Republican White House at every turn.

They’ll be sure to keep every Biden failure in place, including keeping our border wide open.

**[I’m helping President Trump rebuild his Senate majority, and we want YOU on our team. Can you pitch in now?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=07cf605574c74c30a0fea7f953389aa2&_e=P7NTc1HHJrShl0Gs3ndmJcaB-LX42AFCg1HgoS30t7_elIbXS70Z0n9tC_8jsKIJQat28HPbwlUHrSijGCkw_AXAys1r1nV0lprWhwk1SE01JoqEb4ELoOOd95SN6vM5haMbv1JfYofSUIvnT7oQHZOkc3sFyGy9gJPX8F6EeIplnCuh8o879zlE9gDM5cSkLKCnWZEpo3okGBIv831qi99GAFcVp_7aCMYHYUa9OExHJp2vADi4zN2wCSTB2KyDI9YMEYMnpoO7LU703U7C77Uh0X9Z12kwdfvfkO43gdVYG68aNZZhfVDJJ6fZPwigbb-3rQWX-6BzGvBSMXm6fa8QyZo03l5Z30cTvFk5SL4syKGRDGKqWoO2PsP7B8x6)**

The Colorado Supreme Court recently disqualified Donald Trump from being on the 2024 ballot, citing Section 3 of the 14th Amendment.
**Section 3 of the 14th Amendment** _“No person shall ... hold any office, civil or military, under the United States ... who, having previously taken an oath ... as an officer of the United States ... to support the Constitution of the United States,**shall have engaged in insurrection or rebellion** against the same, or given aid or comfort to the enemies thereof.”_

In the Court’s eyes, Donald Trump’s actions on Jan. 6 violated the 14th Amendment, after he incited a mob to march on the Capitol in a plot to overturn the election.
This decision has sparked a nationwide debate and the Supreme Court is now reviewing the case this month.

It looks like your name is still missing from my petition. Would you please take a moment to complete the very brief questionnaire now?

**Democrats are doing everything they can to keep President Trump out of the 2024 Presidential election** ...from begging the courts to kick him off the ballot to pushing “gag orders” to try to silence him.

They are pulling out ALL the stops.

But clearly, it’s not working. **New polls show President Trump is ahead in 5 out of 6 swing states.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=caaa45d1ab6d4f26b1b09c90cfcd339e&_e=zdUI6q_s4nU0B30UZ-Vv5RenDfa0OWVFidYmTrP9uhk1n56jprTzQVdlMv8nEWjeZGDj3wKI3w38B1H8FwMfEeFEMjJOwvJhmol6PWG_kU7hgbph2kzfzZC5dfFm0reNKcOjM_FNLpI4bAxA3rt_fmvEIIe879KGu16u-ezzNnGQS4ZmkinZQ7_16PGxVmmU-WBvevOS1tDLcAo4vou9Q1Kd226nDu7IscvCn5-4bZuMicIeBJTRf4P7S6KYbgKM922AbZzeGCm9KtkDHhJBVaPhZx-BRckZEJjg-DpWroefQ7yEPIIXJWac3D-LRWLlRznakmkP9Y71o01R8xAvC4UPKMWNcPpqwqKenVTNa9oPYkpbUI4mmBth-TaYeV-L0QXvp_pPBdWAXrAhRvcu2j1IPtIMgcUra7iDSx8o6pszuYWxlj39lafVXVBpxAMHgZzVs1D-StJ6i8EBqKtqGbjuEGuBqFhL98c0HQ_RYqLAuyvy253z_SUiwwAglQh4tYJUR3F-uG6HMx_cPuwPnQ%3D%3D)
**I’ve been 100% behind President Trump since day one** , and I love how everyday Americans EMBRACE him each time the Washington swamp pushes him away. We need Conservatives from across the country to rally together and back President Trump NOW.

**I’ve set a goal of identifying 1,776 conservatives in the next 30 minutes who stand ready and willing to help put President Trump back in office.[Will you join our coalition today by signing your name?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=caaa45d1ab6d4f26b1b09c90cfcd339e&_e=zdUI6q_s4nU0B30UZ-Vv5RenDfa0OWVFidYmTrP9uhk1n56jprTzQVdlMv8nEWjeZGDj3wKI3w38B1H8FwMfEeFEMjJOwvJhmol6PWG_kU7hgbph2kzfzZC5dfFm0reNKcOjM_FNLpI4bAxA3rt_fmvEIIe879KGu16u-ezzNnGQS4ZmkinZQ7_16PGxVmmU-WBvevOS1tDLcAo4vou9Q1Kd226nDu7IscvCn5-4bZuMicIeBJTRf4P7S6KYbgKM922AbZzeGCm9KtkDHhJBVaPhZx-BRckZEJjg-DpWroefQ7yEPIIXJWac3D-LRWLlRznakmkP9Y71o01R8xAvC4UPKMWNcPpqwqKenVTNa9oPYkpbUI4mmBth-TaYeV-L0Evf2T3EPDpKA9xkvvFxD4_4Im9oC3tDtNML7dPwOUxQFQ8Z3l0dNW4c0We17uexZtL_phyLt2KGrSpezAnbTNFn-mweDN1sxEE3WB_X1V_A9CoHqtFZo0PyzHZzhpVLQSfXxtqwG-wk5nYPMVe5Ew%3D%3D)**

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

Friend, I'm furious. Just last month, Florida activists secured hundreds of thousands of signatures to put codifying reproductive rights on the ballot this November.

**But now, far-right extremists are SUING to remove this question from the ballot.**
Unfortunately, this is just the latest example of out-of-touch extremists trying to silence Florida voters. From abortion rights to voting rights, whether in the state house in Tallahassee or on the Senate floor in Washington, our leaders are forcing their extreme agenda on Florida families.
**Ya no más — enough is enough. I refuse to stand for it. That’s why I'm running for Senate to defeat Rick Scott, restore abortion rights nationwide, and give Florida the leadership that we deserve.[_And now, with all eyes on our state, I'm counting on you to stand with me: Please, will you donate $5 or more before midnight tonight to help me flip Florida blue and fight for families?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78471132/453514296/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk759-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDg2MTcwNWItOTFjNC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=uTXY1UDofuGasNe21hTxHKunbcvEGLAztx-0ZwISoWA=)**

I will always fight to protect reproductive freedom.

Debbie

name: Team Mazie
subject: The countdown continues
body:
|
#
Peter, It feels like it was just yesterday that Mazie reached out to remind us how quickly Election Day is approaching. Time is flying by. And now, we’re just **9 months** out from one of the most critical elections of our lifetimes. You might be asking yourself if it’s too early to make a difference in November’s elections. Perhaps you’d rather wait, because you think your donation will make the greatest impact right before voters head to the polls. **The truth is, there is no “perfect moment.” The best time to get involved is _right now._** As Mazie said last month, Democrats’ historic victories in 2022 weren’t a fluke. They were thanks to early and consistent grassroots support, including from so many folks on this grassroots team. **[**If you're ready to take the leap, will you chip in $9 — $1 for every month left until Election Day? Peter, when you donate, you’re joining countless folks on this team who are stepping up to the plate, and your support helps us grow our grassroots momentum one person at a time.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78471148/453514343/240141381?amount=9&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmNiMzYwZS05MmM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-7MXUrvqOKNrfQim8AzKBL9yZroX3yFdushZnGGldPw=)** | | [DONATE $9](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78471149/453514344/240141381?amount=9&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmNiMzYwZS05MmM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-7MXUrvqOKNrfQim8AzKBL9yZroX3yFdushZnGGldPw=)

Team Mazie
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Mazie Hirono** <info@mazieforhawaii.com>
Date: Jan 5, 2024
Subject: It's really happening!
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78471151/453514346/240141381?amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmNiMzYwZS05MmM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-7MXUrvqOKNrfQim8AzKBL9yZroX3yFdushZnGGldPw=)
Aloha Peter,
It may be hard to believe, but it’s true. The election year has begun. In fact, Election Day is just _10 months from today!_
If that thought makes you nervous, I get it. With everything that’s on the line this November — from abortion rights to all of our progress to address the climate crisis — it’s easy to look away and make it tomorrow’s problem.
**So here’s a little perspective.** In 2022, Democrats beat enormous odds — defending _and_ expanding our Senate majority as voters across the country defiantly turned out in support of reproductive freedom. Pundits and election analysts were absolutely stunned, but I wasn’t surprised. _Why?_
**Because I saw this grassroots team put in the work all year long.** Countless folks chipped in what they could and helped us mobilize voters in battleground states across the country — month after month, week after week, day after day.
We _can_ secure our razor-thin Senate majority, win back the House, and re-elect President Biden — but that won’t happen overnight. It has to start now, and it’s going to take good old-fashioned teamwork to do it.
**[**So please, Peter, will you chip in $10 — $1 for every month left until Election Day — to help us beat the odds once again? Every dollar will support Democrats up and down the ballot and power my fight for our working families, our planet, and our future.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78471152/453514347/240141381?amount=10&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmNiMzYwZS05MmM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-7MXUrvqOKNrfQim8AzKBL9yZroX3yFdushZnGGldPw=)**

They were thanks to early and consistent grassroots support, including from so many folks on this grassroots team. = | | = | = Thank you, Team Mazie \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Mazie Hirono <info@mazieforhawaii.com> Date: Jan 5, 2024 Subject: It's really happening! If that thought makes you nervous, I get it. With everything that’s on the line this November — from abortion rights to all of our progress to address the climate crisis — it’s easy to look away and make it tomorrow’s problem. So here’s a little perspective. In 2022, Democrats beat enormous odds — defending and expanding our Senate majority as voters across the country defiantly turned out in support of reproductive freedom. Pundits and election analysts were absolutely stunned, but I wasn’t surprised. Why? Because I saw this grassroots team put in the work all year long. Countless folks chipped in what they could and helped us mobilize voters in battleground states across the country — month after month, week after week, day after day. We can secure our razor-thin Senate majority, win back the House, and re-elect President Biden — but that won’t happen overnight. It has to start now, and it’s going to take good old-fashioned teamwork to do it. = | | ****=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** ** Thank you, Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Map: California’s media markets and who is running ads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Take a look at where Adam Schiff is running ads vs. where we are ⬇️
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37328%2E3422442%2EKJo7P2)
Derek, we’re currently being outspent 5:1 on TV ads across California. Take a look at where Adam Schiff is running ads vs. where we are ⬇️
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240205-2?refcode=em20240205-37328&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37328_3422442_KJo7P2&akid=37328%2E3422442%2EKJo7P2)
There are whole counties we aren’t able to run ads in because we just don’t have enough in the bank. And even in the areas where we’re both running ads, voters are seeing more of Adam than they are of Katie.
**With about 20% of voters still undecided, the outcome of this election could come down to whether or not we’re able to afford to expand our TV ads.**
Katie is the only candidate in this race who has never taken a dime of corporate PAC money, so we’re really counting on folks chipping in what they can.
**[Derek, will you make a contribution of $5 to help us run ads across California in this final month before the primary election?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240205-2?refcode=em20240205-37328&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37328_3422442_KJo7P2&akid=37328%2E3422442%2EKJo7P2)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240205-2?refcode=em20240205-37328&refcode2=37328_3422442_KJo7P2&akid=37328%2E3422442%2EKJo7P2)
So much is at stake–we can’t lose Katie’s voice in Congress.
As always: thank you!
-Team Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240205-37328&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=37328_3422442_KJo7P2&akid=37328%2E3422442%2EKJo7P2)**

We wanted to update you on the state of the U.S. Senate race in New Mexico, folks: Martin has **four** Republican challengers, but Mitch McConnell and his allies have already set their sights on his multi-millionaire, hedge fund executive opponent — who the National Republican Senatorial Committee endorsed as a **“strong candidate to flip this seat.”** We’ve got to admit that this early support is ringing some alarm bells. Already, McConnell’s hand-picked challenger has thrown $500,000 of her own dollars into this race and started running ads attacking Martin. Meanwhile, she’s publicly shared more about her Wall Street career than her agenda for New Mexico. Our Democratic Senate Majority is hanging by a thread. Now that West Virginia’s seat is almost assured to flip red, _Mitch McConnell only needs to win one more seat_ to take back the Senate — and **national Republicans clearly think New Mexico is up for grabs.** **[Will you help us stop Republicans from buying this seat and keep New Mexico rooted in our shared values? The first $6,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $3,300/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $3,300/$5,000 for the general election. The next $41,300/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting contact@joebiden.com. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Biden Victory Fund does not accept contributions from corporations or their PACs, unions, federal contractors, national banks, those registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA, SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies, or foreign nationals.

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Donald Trump DID NOT Endorse James Lankford In Our Primary Matchup
body:
Just to clarify: There is a LIE going around on social media and news outlets saying that President Donald Trump endorsed James Lankford. During the
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2229.1.5ad1f55b136aaf9c9d4f0f3434dc2fe9) |
---
Just to clarify: There is a LIE going around on social media and news outlets saying that **President Donald Trump** endorsed [James Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2230.1.ab7c399b9b55d740b22b30185487cee2). During the **Lahmeyer vs Lankford** matchup for the US Senate, there was NO endorsement to myself or Lankford. This lack of endorsement enraged Lankford and now Lankford is getting back at Trump through this terrible open borders bill. It is true however that after the Primary battle that Trump sent an endorsement to Lankford in September 2022 to make sure he did not lose to the Democrat challenger. If you want to know why Trump did not endorse me you can watch it here: [https://youtu.be/T9RkHsF71i8?si=bKHkjgWlVj-os4mX](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2231.1.b3da818fd889b8d1d414032d02862ff3)
---
---
## Lankford MUST RESIGN
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2232.1.5552f695911778a92c979e5da4b917cd)
---
Last night, _Pseudo-Republican_ [James Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2233.1.ef82860b494983ace73f697d09855796) released the contents of the highly anticipated "**Border Bill**." **It is worse than what many thought it would be.** Currently, [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2234.1.c7484e6bfb497a2223d3b0c3dd6a24d1) is trending on X (aka Twitter) for all the wrong reasons... being dismantled by **Speaker Mike Johnson** , **Matt Gaetz** , **Donald Trump Jr** and so many others. This "Bill" is nothing more than an **open borders bill** which **increases green cards by 50,000/year** , **gives immediate work permits to every illegal released from custody** and also **sends another $60,000,000,000.00 to Ukraine**... It does not surprise me that [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2235.1.104f8aa72c6a1a8a14db50bcee1667b9) is carrying the water for the Democratic Party. In 2022, I tried to sound the alarm in Oklahoma about the [www.realJamesLankford.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2236.1.3e4b4669432af53c4d7c5691a0512758) with the help of **General Michael Flynn** , **Roger Stone** , **Mayor Rudy Giuliani** and **nearly 100,000 Oklahoma Republicans**. Our effort was _unsuccessful_ at the time. However, people are seeing the [www.realJamesLakford.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2237.1.ad41e772d9671221884425a5ad49c86b) right now. Today, President Trump BLASTED the Border Bill and Lankford.
---
|
---
It is clear that [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2238.1.fa38035b3eba0b00a865e009d77d2f5a) is doing his very best to try and keep **Donald Trump** from winning in 2024.
[Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2239.1.84ee913a5c7a49bb3647369c1dc8196b) has been and is a NEVER-TRUMPER.
What is sad is the fact that before the bill was released, [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2240.1.4fb1a6ee539d5bb793b006941d4b72e5) did a national and local blitz on news stations lying about the contents of the bill...
|
---
|
---
Now that the bill has been released it is clear [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2241.1.a2a8ccda65fa15f8863fe3a0fc58d563) lied over and over.
**The question then becomes why?**
I believe the answer is two-fold:
1\. [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2242.1.1c213598e1f44ef4ef926792911f4fb5) does not want a Trump Presidency because he knows his political career will be in jeopardy.
1. | [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2243.1.96859feb754346e0188b5c8515e55309) does not want a Trump Presidency because he knows his political career will be in jeopardy.
---|---
It is an open secret in Oklahoma that in 2026, [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2244.1.ed47d32b2d471c7a65942a889b95228b) plans to run for **Governor of Oklahoma**.
Recently, **Donald Trump Jr** called out [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2245.1.383de81414e442bc1b580000aa6ad9f1) on this and said this Border Bill will not help [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2246.1.1f11faebc9075a0b9978a3d81829af49) get elected for Governor in 2026.
1\. [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2247.1.7a2c475e8c304c36328b1ab46de4a185) is owned by the Deep State.
1. | [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2248.1.e3b40a887b8197d7ff0344c04667f3fc) is owned by the Deep State.
---|---
The blackmail on [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2249.1.f1b92533c3dedd7b300ee1676bc4ec6b) appears to be substantial.
The story covered by the AP about [Lankford](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2250.1.38ddea2eacdddc9c5afaa6bfb604c726) believing a 13 year old can consent to sex to coverup crimes under his watch at Falls Creek is just the tip of the iceberg.
It is clear: [JAMES LANKFORD MUST RESIGN.](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2251.1.c0a44fd9e363f10bed827717201cdca6)
|
---
| | [ James Lankford ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=6269562.2252.1.a83b87975ab0525638f85ec63b151feb)
---
---
---

As the world struggles with the economic and [geopolitical chaos produced by the ongoing military conflicts in the Middle East](https://substack.com/redirect/958dc770-b9b0-47b3-875d-d6179099fb9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and Europe, [persistent inflationary pressures from supply chain disruptions](https://substack.com/redirect/b9c7d766-1fdb-46ad-87d1-842be318810b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), accelerating artificial intelligence with potential existential risks, and the [increasingly obvious breakdown of global multilateralism](https://substack.com/redirect/73dc6181-042b-446e-b0ee-7f438c2c5431?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), there's another source of uncertainty we must now also consider: election risk. And no, I'm not just talking about the US election, although that's definitely part of the story.
2024 is set to be the biggest election year in human history. More than four billion people spread across 76 countries will reset or confirm their political leadership at the ballot box. These countries will be holding regional, legislative, and presidential elections. Of the ten most populous nations on the planet, only Nigeria and China don't have elections this year; the eight other nations (India, the United States, Indonesia, Pakistan, Brazil, Bangladesh, Russia, and Mexico) representing almost 3 billion people will be holding elections. This doesn't necessarily mean change is forthcoming, for as noted by _The Economist_ ,
> [In half of these, elections are neither free nor fair and many other prerequisites of democracy, such as freedom of speech and association, are absent. Elections in Bangladesh, Mexico, Pakistan (all hybrid regimes, which combine elements of democracy and authoritarianism) and Russia (an authoritarian one) are almost certain not to bring regime change.](https://substack.com/redirect/e9b7cdca-87af-4d01-863b-e389ad762c4e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
While it's clearly beyond the scope of this piece to review every election taking place this year, I wanted to highlight a few upcoming elections on which I'm focused.

## _**Pakistan (This week!)**_
Pakistan has been in a state of political uncertainty for months following the April 2022 removal of famed cricket player and former Prime Minister Imran Khan from office. Since then, the country has been run by a caretaker government. Khan was subsequently arrested in May 2023 when he became the target of a corruption case, something he and his supporters deny and say is politically motivated. In the month following Khan's arrest, [more than 5000 supporters and members of his political party (Pakistan Tehreek-e-Insaf (PTI)) were arrested](https://substack.com/redirect/99895050-255e-4839-b387-0d38899f1a6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Khan has since been sentenced to jail in numerous cases](https://substack.com/redirect/315edf2b-f627-468d-ba5c-557f4fc38d72?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). While this has been occurring, former Prime Minister Nawaz Sharif, who had been convicted on corruption charges, [returned to Pakistan and the courts overturned his prior convictions](https://substack.com/redirect/99895050-255e-4839-b387-0d38899f1a6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Analysts note these actions as evidence he's the establishment and military's preferred candidate.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8cd98c75-f8ed-45ca-ab97-665a04eb54e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [https://www.aljazeera.com/news/2024/2/5/pakistan-elections-2024-by-the-numbers](https://substack.com/redirect/e0b7c656-b62b-4d8b-896c-a05a5dd80b7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Rasul Bahksh Rais, a Professor at the Lahore University of Management Science (LUMS), has noted that there is a growing impression among Pakistani voters that the elections will be rigged in favor of the establishment parties. He's gone on to note "Never before in Pakistan's history have we had such an impression of unfairness ...we may not see a spirited participation of the people."](https://substack.com/redirect/99895050-255e-4839-b387-0d38899f1a6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
#### _Why I 'm watching Pakistan_
Pakistan is a country of more than 240 million people and in a geopolitically sensitive part of the world. [The country is also in the midst of an economic meltdown, with inflation running around 30% and the currency plunging by around 50% against the dollar.](https://substack.com/redirect/e0b7c656-b62b-4d8b-896c-a05a5dd80b7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Claims of election interference are widespread.
[The military remains the country's most influential institution](https://substack.com/redirect/7fda0f01-8032-45c5-8b2e-2c9052669cad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and the young voting population ([44% of the 128 million eligible voters are under the age of ](https://substack.com/redirect/e0b7c656-b62b-4d8b-896c-a05a5dd80b7b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)35) increasingly believes it is engineering the election to suit its objectives. For many, the election is a referendum on the multi-decade involvement of the military in political decision-making. Will Pakistani voters disengage, with participation plunging? (For reference in 2018, almost 52% of registered voters turned up to cast a ballot). Or will they turnout in larger numbers to vote against the establishment and perceived election interference?

## _**Indonesia (Next week!)**_
Even though the world's largest Muslim nation has boasted of a continuous democracy that has held free and fair elections since the Asian Financial Crisis, [elections are still heavily influenced (if not decided) by the elites from the pre-democratic era that rules in the political, military and business domains](https://substack.com/redirect/825befb4-0033-4689-a1fe-4081d96c4ad9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[The current president, Joko Widodo, was an outsider who temporarily broke the elite grip on politics, as noted by Sara Jaffray](https://substack.com/redirect/47987cce-428c-4213-82e5-5a37187217f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and secured his power from the ballot box. His attempts to stay on beyond his term limit means that Indonesia is now facing an inflection point, something that Jaffary calls the "[last battle of the titans](https://substack.com/redirect/47987cce-428c-4213-82e5-5a37187217f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
More than 200 million registered voters in the world's third largest democracy will be able to vote next week. In addition to voting for the nearly 20,000 representatives for district, provincial and national legislatures, they'll also be choosing a former general, former academic, or a career public-servant as their next president.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c381edd1-64ab-42c2-a89c-05cfbca992c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [https://foreignbrief.com/indonesia-presidential-election-campaign-period-to-open/](https://substack.com/redirect/85bf708e-63de-4314-9457-760d6d286b6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Former General Prabowo Subianto is the current defense minister and represents the nationalist right-wing Gerindra party. Interestingly, the general chose Widodo's 36-year-old son (Gibran Rakabuming Raka) as his running mate. Meanwhile, former academic and Jakarta governor Anies Baswedan chose the head of the Islamist National Awakening Party as his running mate to bolster his appeal with conservative Islamist and moderate Muslim groups. And lastly, the secular-nationalist Democratic Party of Struggle has chosen Ganger Panowo, a committed public servant and former governor of Central Java, as its candidate.
#### _Why I 'm watching Indonesia_
Controversy surrounds General Subianto and his running mate Gibran. This is the general's third run for president, having been defeated twice by Widodo, and he was allegedly involved with numerous human rights abuses and kidnappings of student protestors. [Gibran is known locally as a "nepo-baby" due to his relative inexperience](https://substack.com/redirect/1650fcff-fbe6-4e6e-b216-befb2dd89117?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and the fact that he was ineligible to run before [a court, headed by Widodo's brother in law, changed the criteria for candidates](https://substack.com/redirect/3aa20bd9-8b5f-4dc1-9eb3-92a401a5648a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). He's currently the front runner, having neutralized the ruling-party's advantage by picking Widodo's son as his running mate, a decision that critics suggest point to a Widodo political dynasty.
A surprise victory for Anies Basweden would suggest an Islamist turn in national politics, while a surprise victory for Ganger Panowo might imply a continuation of current politics. In either case, the main reason I'm watching Indonesia is to see if [the largest single-day election in the world](https://substack.com/redirect/bcdb3523-7a52-45aa-8f38-0ece7563c4ec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) can take place without claims of interference or fraud.

## _**India (April)**_
The world's largest democracy heads to the polls in April of this year when up to 900 million voters will cast votes to choose their next government over a period of weeks. Prime Minister Narendra Modi and his Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) have been in power for a decade, and appear likely to win a third straight term. [Under Modi's leadership, India has seen its overall economy grow to be larger than France or the United Kingdom and it recently hosted a G20 Summit](https://substack.com/redirect/99895050-255e-4839-b387-0d38899f1a6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Globally, India's star seems to be rising.
Domestically, however, there are brewing tensions, driven by a sputtering economy, weakening labor markets, and increasing ethnic violence. The opposition claims that Modi has undermined democracy by jailing journalists and targeting political candidates who disagree with him. [There's also a rising belief that Modi and the BJP tacitly condone and promote violence against India's Muslim minority](https://substack.com/redirect/99895050-255e-4839-b387-0d38899f1a6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Efforts to combat online disinformation have been met with rising fears of government censorship.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/119bb69c-b360-43fa-bc7b-bb82a6bbf053?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2023-10-09/modi-faces-test-in-state-polls-before-general-election-next-year](https://substack.com/redirect/d2a62bf7-5853-48db-b877-ac72311bb27b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Running against the BJP is a coalition of 28 political parties know as the Indian National Development Inclusive Alliance (INDIA) led by Rahul Gandhi's India Congress party. The coalition's success hinged on the ability to work together, but as noted by BBC, "[barely six months after its birth, India's motley opposition coalition is in disarray](https://substack.com/redirect/c69e8f17-290c-4a94-8fa9-d86901288938?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." [British newspaper ](https://substack.com/redirect/85a61856-0b1c-4188-808f-bf88342c37f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[The Guardian](https://substack.com/redirect/85a61856-0b1c-4188-808f-bf88342c37f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_[ recently suggested that a Modi and BJP win in the election is "almost an inevitability."](https://substack.com/redirect/85a61856-0b1c-4188-808f-bf88342c37f2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
#### _Why I 'm watching India_
While it's looking unlikely, a surprise loss for Prime Minister Narendra Modi's BJP would spook global markets as the uncertainty of new leadership may lead investors to question India's path in a fracturing world; it might also mean that the formerly rising Hindu nationalism that has been visible domestically is now receding.
I'm watching closely to also see how the world's largest democracy does in terms of the actual vote-casting process, the freedom of press that may or may not exist, and the treatment of opposition efforts. And of course, given India's emerging role as a counterweight to Russian and Chinese influence in economic and military matters in the region, any campaign promises made relating to India's foreign affairs will surely capture my attention.

## _**Mexico (June)**_
With a population of around 130 million people, of which slightly less than 100 million are registered to vote, Mexico is preparing for its largest ever election this June. Every Mexican state (32 of them) is voting simultaneously. [Around 20,000 positions--ranging from local offices to governorships and congressional seats all the way up to the presidency--will be filled this June](https://substack.com/redirect/99895050-255e-4839-b387-0d38899f1a6f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Under the leadership of [left-wing populist President Andres Manuel Lopez Obrador](https://substack.com/redirect/c3e3e6eb-c166-4053-af31-f6121317de0c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (AMLO), Mexico has emerged as a key economic beneficiary of the US-China war and become a preferred destination for multinational companies looking to nearshore their production close to the United States. But AMLO's time in office has also been marked by rising tensions with Washington over the US-Mexico border and trade policy, surging violence and crime, and compounding inequalities domestically. AMLO's left-wing Morena party, however, remains popular and its candidates are leading in most polls.
The three leading candidates to replace AMLO this June are Claudia Sheinbaum, former mayor of Mexico City and a scientist; Xochitl Galvez, a senator; and Jorge Alvarez Maynez, a federal deputy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f17659c8-68a9-4c72-96ff-f943307cb76b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
(L-R) Mexican candidates Claudia Sheinbaum, Xochitl Galvez, Jorge Álvarez Maynez. Source: [https://www.as-coa.org/articles/poll-tracker-mexicos-2024-presidential-vote](https://substack.com/redirect/051274a2-7309-4c2d-a118-9a4342f0f31f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Sheinbaum, the new face of the Morena Party, is AMLO's chosen successor and is currently positioned to be Mexico's first female president. A recent _Politico_ article noted "[she's expected to continue the current government's social assistance programs to help Mexico's impoverished urban communities while pursuing a similarly assertive foreign policy](https://substack.com/redirect/af0d4e5d-c0ba-4868-8c21-47f680f2db02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)." [Polls in January had Sheinbaum leading Galvez by more than 32 points](https://substack.com/redirect/051274a2-7309-4c2d-a118-9a4342f0f31f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
#### _Why I 'm watching Mexico_
Sheinbaum's stated plans to continue with AMLO's aggressive foreign policy points to continued tensions with America over the US-Mexico border. The fact that [she's actively courted Chinese investment into Mexico](https://substack.com/redirect/7b09699b-4b90-46ab-b2ed-0f2048d08b7c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) concerns me, given the broader geopolitical battle between Beijing and Washington. Further, [Sheinbaum has explicitly said that Mexico should not have a "relationship of submission" with the United States](https://substack.com/redirect/6e43ccb1-f6cf-411e-8cce-b050520cc335?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Further, given that AMLO orchestrated a change in Mexico's constitution that allows a popular referendum to remove a sitting president in the middle of their term, there is rising concern that AMLO "[could use this to control the direction of successive Morena governments, dangling the threat of removal and leveraging his popularity with Mexican voters if future presidents stray from his ideological vision](https://substack.com/redirect/af0d4e5d-c0ba-4868-8c21-47f680f2db02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
Lastly, given that border security and immigration top the list of concerns on the minds of American voters as the United States prepares to elect its next president, the interaction of an aggressive and contentious Mexican leadership with an American population that view the border situation as a crisis offers the potential for rapid and destabilizing escalation.

## _Other Elections That I 'm Monitoring_
As I mentioned earlier, there are simply too many elections going on globally this year for me to comprehensively address each one. With that said, I'm going to watch what happens in **Iran** (are there protests before, during or after the election?), **South Africa** (will the ruling ANC hold on to a majority?), the **European Parliament** (will anti-Islamic or anti-Ukrainian sentiment gain momentum?), the **United Kingdom** (if Labor wins, will the nature of US-UK relations change?), and of course, the **United States**.
**I will be addressing the US presidential election and its implications in separate writings over the course of this year** , but for now, I'll simply repost my piece endorsing Ambassador Nikki Haley and my recap of what happened during the New Hampshire primary:

## _So What?_
2024 promises to be an action-packed year for political junkies who simply can't get enough of polls and politics. And the stakes for democracy and the expression of voter sentiment have never been higher. Whether it comes to the use of state power to brazenly attack political opponents, as seems likely to have happened in Pakistan, to the subtle control of policies and a government's agenda, as seems to be the case in Mexico given the 2021 constitutional change, democracy appears at risk.
Nobel Peace Prize laureate Maria Ressa, founder of the investigative news site Rappler and author of _[How to Stand Up To A Dictator](https://substack.com/redirect/ac6357b6-926a-4abd-a790-f743d51a6552?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ spoke to a packed audience at the National Press Club and put it quite simply: "[We will know whether democracy lives or dies by the end of 2024](https://substack.com/redirect/a93e12a5-0c43-46e3-b51f-ecfc3a870ef6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of two books, _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/7bc89484-d79c-4034-b021-84d1b34b16d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/fdd39ad3-1cb9-4da8-8822-0f48136159ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

This year will be the biggest election year in human history | | | Feb 6 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- As the world struggles with the economic and and Europe, , accelerating artificial intelligence with potential existential risks, and the , there's another source of uncertainty we must now also consider: election risk. And no, I'm not just talking about the US election, although that's definitely part of the story. 2024 is set to be the biggest election year in human history. More than four billion people spread across 76 countries will reset or confirm their political leadership at the ballot box. These countries will be holding regional, legislative, and presidential elections. Of the ten most populous nations on the planet, only Nigeria and China don't have elections this year; the eight other nations (India, the United States, Indonesia, Pakistan, Brazil, Bangladesh, Russia, and Mexico) representing almost 3 billion people will be holding elections. This doesn't necessarily mean change is forthcoming, for as noted by The Economist , While it's clearly beyond the scope of this piece to review every election taking place this year, I wanted to highlight a few upcoming elections on which I'm focused. | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | Jan 7 | The first major election of the year already took place in Taiwan. The results were mixed, as I noted in the below piece, but the island nation remains near the top of my "watch list" as Chinese domestic economic weakness may lead Beijing to pursue unconventional strategies to reintegrate Taiwan into China. | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | Jan 16 | Pakistan (This week!) Pakistan has been in a state of political uncertainty for months following the April 2022 removal of famed cricket player and former Prime Minister Imran Khan from office. Since then, the country has been run by a caretaker government. Khan was subsequently arrested in May 2023 when he became the target of a corruption case, something he and his supporters deny and say is politically motivated. In the month following Khan's arrest, . . While this has been occurring, former Prime Minister Nawaz Sharif, who had been convicted on corruption charges, . Analysts note these actions as evidence he's the establishment and military's preferred candidate. | | ---|---|--- Source: Why I 'm watching Pakistan Pakistan is a country of more than 240 million people and in a geopolitically sensitive part of the world. Claims of election interference are widespread. and the young voting population () increasingly believes it is engineering the election to suit its objectives. For many, the election is a referendum on the multi-decade involvement of the military in political decision-making. Will Pakistani voters disengage, with participation plunging? (For reference in 2018, almost 52% of registered voters turned up to cast a ballot). Or will they turnout in larger numbers to vote against the establishment and perceived election interference? Indonesia (Next week!) Even though the world's largest Muslim nation has boasted of a continuous democracy that has held free and fair elections since the Asian Financial Crisis, . , and secured his power from the ballot box. His attempts to stay on beyond his term limit means that Indonesia is now facing an inflection point, something that Jaffary calls the "." More than 200 million registered voters in the world's third largest democracy will be able to vote next week. In addition to voting for the nearly 20,000 representatives for district, provincial and national legislatures, they'll also be choosing a former general, former academic, or a career public-servant as their next president. | | ---|---|--- Source: Former General Prabowo Subianto is the current defense minister and represents the nationalist right-wing Gerindra party. Interestingly, the general chose Widodo's 36-year-old son (Gibran Rakabuming Raka) as his running mate. Meanwhile, former academic and Jakarta governor Anies Baswedan chose the head of the Islamist National Awakening Party as his running mate to bolster his appeal with conservative Islamist and moderate Muslim groups. And lastly, the secular-nationalist Democratic Party of Struggle has chosen Ganger Panowo, a committed public servant and former governor of Central Java, as its candidate. Why I 'm watching Indonesia Controversy surrounds General Subianto and his running mate Gibran. This is the general's third run for president, having been defeated twice by Widodo, and he was allegedly involved with numerous human rights abuses and kidnappings of student protestors. and the fact that he was ineligible to run before . He's currently the front runner, having neutralized the ruling-party's advantage by picking Widodo's son as his running mate, a decision that critics suggest point to a Widodo political dynasty. A surprise victory for Anies Basweden would suggest an Islamist turn in national politics, while a surprise victory for Ganger Panowo might imply a continuation of current politics. In either case, the main reason I'm watching Indonesia is to see if can take place without claims of interference or fraud. India (April) The world's largest democracy heads to the polls in April of this year when up to 900 million voters will cast votes to choose their next government over a period of weeks. Prime Minister Narendra Modi and his Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) have been in power for a decade, and appear likely to win a third straight term. . Globally, India's star seems to be rising. Domestically, however, there are brewing tensions, driven by a sputtering economy, weakening labor markets, and increasing ethnic violence. The opposition claims that Modi has undermined democracy by jailing journalists and targeting political candidates who disagree with him. . Efforts to combat online disinformation have been met with rising fears of government censorship. | | ---|---|--- Source: Running against the BJP is a coalition of 28 political parties know as the Indian National Development Inclusive Alliance (INDIA) led by Rahul Gandhi's India Congress party. The coalition's success hinged on the ability to work together, but as noted by BBC, "." Why I 'm watching India While it's looking unlikely, a surprise loss for Prime Minister Narendra Modi's BJP would spook global markets as the uncertainty of new leadership may lead investors to question India's path in a fracturing world; it might also mean that the formerly rising Hindu nationalism that has been visible domestically is now receding. I'm watching closely to also see how the world's largest democracy does in terms of the actual vote-casting process, the freedom of press that may or may not exist, and the treatment of opposition efforts. And of course, given India's emerging role as a counterweight to Russian and Chinese influence in economic and military matters in the region, any campaign promises made relating to India's foreign affairs will surely capture my attention. Mexico (June) With a population of around 130 million people, of which slightly less than 100 million are registered to vote, Mexico is preparing for its largest ever election this June. Every Mexican state (32 of them) is voting simultaneously. . Under the leadership of (AMLO), Mexico has emerged as a key economic beneficiary of the US-China war and become a preferred destination for multinational companies looking to nearshore their production close to the United States. But AMLO's time in office has also been marked by rising tensions with Washington over the US-Mexico border and trade policy, surging violence and crime, and compounding inequalities domestically. AMLO's left-wing Morena party, however, remains popular and its candidates are leading in most polls. The three leading candidates to replace AMLO this June are Claudia Sheinbaum, former mayor of Mexico City and a scientist; Xochitl Galvez, a senator; and Jorge Alvarez Maynez, a federal deputy. | | ---|---|--- (L-R) Mexican candidates Claudia Sheinbaum, Xochitl Galvez, Jorge Álvarez Maynez. Source: Sheinbaum, the new face of the Morena Party, is AMLO's chosen successor and is currently positioned to be Mexico's first female president. A recent Politico article noted "." . Why I 'm watching Mexico Sheinbaum's stated plans to continue with AMLO's aggressive foreign policy points to continued tensions with America over the US-Mexico border. The fact that concerns me, given the broader geopolitical battle between Beijing and Washington. Further, . Further, given that AMLO orchestrated a change in Mexico's constitution that allows a popular referendum to remove a sitting president in the middle of their term, there is rising concern that AMLO "." Lastly, given that border security and immigration top the list of concerns on the minds of American voters as the United States prepares to elect its next president, the interaction of an aggressive and contentious Mexican leadership with an American population that view the border situation as a crisis offers the potential for rapid and destabilizing escalation. Other Elections That I 'm Monitoring As I mentioned earlier, there are simply too many elections going on globally this year for me to comprehensively address each one. With that said, I'm going to watch what happens in Iran (are there protests before, during or after the election?), South Africa (will the ruling ANC hold on to a majority?), the European Parliament (will anti-Islamic or anti-Ukrainian sentiment gain momentum?), the United Kingdom (if Labor wins, will the nature of US-UK relations change?), and of course, the United States. I will be addressing the US presidential election and its implications in separate writings over the course of this year , but for now, I'll simply repost my piece endorsing Ambassador Nikki Haley and my recap of what happened during the New Hampshire primary: | | | | ---|---|--- | December 6, 2023 | | | | | ---|---|--- | Jan 25 | So What? 2024 promises to be an action-packed year for political junkies who simply can't get enough of polls and politics. | Hey Peter — Thank you!

I wanted to take a moment to express our heartfelt gratitude for your incredible support over the month of January. Seriously, your generosity is the backbone of our effort to take back the House.

With your help, we're standing strong against the influence of dark money and the dysfunctional GOP in Congress. Democrats are ready to fight through to November and keep being the only adults in the House.

It's up to us to raise up and not let the momentum stop here.

Your recent contributions have been a game-changer for us. But we still need a bigger boost to start off the year right. **_[Click here to help us keep the momentum going. Whether it's $8, $15, every bit of support matters more than you know, especially as the GOP dark money machine continues to raise massive sums.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78471406/453515233/1102493658?amount=15&source=EM_NBI_AB_20240205_FR_1.1_12MO_candidate_NA_NA_TY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTM4Y2EzMy05OGM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VVgd6f0UPXpclnuxRTiW9NMgllrus1uvoztEsh0_nKA=)_**

Ami Bera

clean_body: | Hey Peter — Thank you! I wanted to take a moment to express our heartfelt gratitude for your incredible support over the month of January. Seriously, your generosity is the backbone of our effort to take back the House. With your help, we're standing strong against the influence of dark money and the dysfunctional GOP in Congress. Democrats are ready to fight through to November and keep being the only adults in the House. It's up to us to raise up and not let the momentum stop here. Your recent contributions have been a game-changer for us. But we still need a bigger boost to start off the year right. = Thank you again, for believing in our work and in our vision for a brighter, more inclusive future. I’m so grateful to have you by my side. Let's keep pushing forward together, Ami Bera If you’d like to receive less email from our team If you'd like to stop receiving our emails, Paid for by Bera for Congress Bera for Congress PO Box 582496 Elk Grove, CA 95758 United States **

| $5 contributions support our organizing efforts all across California.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=5364%2E5257348%2EvrPdIT)
Derek — Early voting has begun in the Golden State.
**[Now more than ever, we need to reach as many voters as possible. Your support is what we need in this final stretch. Will you chip in $5 to my campaign to help us reach undecided voters in this primary election?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=feb2024_abs_em.AxIMQd&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240205_PM3_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=5364%2E5257348%2EvrPdIT)**

---
I don’t take corporate PAC contributions – so while $5 may seem small to many, it’s what’s kept my campaign running since we started a little over a year ago.
$5 contributions support our organizing efforts all across California.
$5 contributions help fund our response to baseless attacks from the far-right.
$5 contributions support our campaign to protect our democracy, combat the housing crisis, and strengthen our economy with good-paying jobs.
You see, your $5 contribution has helped our campaign fight back and build this movement to reach the U.S. Senate, and we need your support to keep on pushing until election day.
