subject: Write me in for Congressional 36th
body:
Write me in for Congressional 36th Ladies and gentlemen, fellow citizens, and patriots, In the tumultuous landscape of our great nation, where the
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=170145.233.1.2a509d673d9a16b2979fa5ee266cc6ac)
---
[](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5257?id=170145.234.1.5df51169383cf51b19f213e0118c6d65) |
---
# Write me in for Congressional 36th
Ladies and gentlemen, fellow citizens, and patriots, In the tumultuous landscape of our great nation, where the fog of political strife often clouds our vision, it becomes imperative for us to recognize the battles we face, even when they don't resemble the traditional wars of history. We find ourselves entrenched in what some term a soft civil war, akin to the unsettling tremors preceding a seismic shift. In these moments, we risk overlooking critical issues that demand our attention in the selection of candidates. Goodness alone does not suffice; we must be discerning in identifying candidates who will boldly champion true conservative Republican values during these trying times. Never before in our history has it been more crucial to stand united for America First principles. As we confront the looming threat of elitist liberals, it is disheartening to witness an increasing number on the far left expressing disdain for our great nation. Yet, I remain steadfast in my belief that the United States stands as the greatest country to have ever existed on this planet. We must staunchly defend everyday citizens against those who would undermine the principles that make our nation exceptional. In the 36th congressional district, regrettably, we lack a candidate strong enough to face the challenges at hand. While the endorsed candidate is undoubtedly a good person, GOP leaders have deemed it unfitting for this critical juncture. Consequently, I have been called upon to rise to the occasion, to fight the good fight, and to bridge the gap and do what needs to be done. After days of prayer, counsel, and careful consideration, pulling on the wisdom of over 50 consultants, we have forged a path forward as a write-in candidate. Our mission is clear: to bring an end to foreign wars, to sever the money tree that foreign nations exploit, and to reclaim our resources for the benefit of American citizens. We, the people, are weary of our nation's resources being drained by those who harbor animosity toward our great country. We reject the imposition of diversity, equity, and inclusion software that undermines meritocracy. Instead, we demand a focus on trade skills, rewarding hard-earned money and time invested in practical expertise. The best person should get the job, scholarship, or opportunity, and the content of character should surpass the color of skin or chosen sexuality every time. Our call is resolute: shut down the illegal border invasion, uphold the rule of law, bolster our military to maintain global supremacy, secure our elections with one-day voting, and cease the weaponization of federal agencies against American citizens. It is time to deregulate drilling and mining, reignite our workforce, eradicate the swamp, protect the sanctity of life in the womb, and safeguard our Republican platform from the infection of RHINOs and liberals. I stand before you, ready to confront the enemy, to put my head down, and plow the ground ahead. The time is now, for tomorrow is not promised. Together, we shall emerge victorious and preserve the beacon of freedom that is the United States of America. Thank you, and may God bless you all. For those in the 36th Congressional district Write me in Derrick Gates To give to my campgain
paypal.me/derrickgates
Cashapp $derrickgatesmin
Venmo @Derrick-Gates-4
---
|
---
## Vote for me also on the 66th Assembly Central Committee
---
|
---
**Vote for me also on the Member, County Central Committee, 66th Assembly District**
Dear friends and fellow Conservatives,
I am thrilled to announce that I am running for an official seat on the 66th Assembly District Central Committee. As some of you may know, I have been serving as an alternate on the committee for some time now. Over the past two years, I have also been actively involved in multiple posts within the party. I am proud to have been elected to the California Republican Assembly state board of directors as the Senate director for the 24th District, chaired the Faith Outreach committee for the CRA, and served as a delegate for the California State party. These experiences have given me a deep understanding of the values and principles that are important to our party and have prepared me to effectively represent our district on the central committee.
As a member of the central committee, I will work tirelessly to ensure that conservative values remain at the forefront of our party's agenda. I believe that my position on the LAGOP, which is the largest Republican party office in the nation, will allow me to have a greater impact on decisions that affect our party and our community. I have already been able to influence many decisions as an alternate, and I am confident that I can make an even greater impact as an elected member.
While some have urged me to run for the congressional seat of the 36th district, I believe that my calling is to bring balance to the party for the next few years. This will not only benefit the party but also other candidates and myself in the long run. Federal races can be expensive to operate, and I have learned from my previous run for Congress that it takes time to build relationships and secure the support needed to win. My goal is to help fix the foundation of the party while building relationships with those who can help me in the future.
I am asking for your prayers and support as I take this important step on my journey. Please look for me on the primary ballot on March 5, 2024. Early voting begins on February 24, 2024. Your vote for me, Derrick R. Gates, for the 66th Assembly Central Committee, will help ensure that our conservative values continue to be represented in our district and beyond.
Thank you for your support and dedication to our party.
Sincerely,
Derrick R. Gates

body:
Write in Derrick Gates for Congress 36th District!!!! A Message from my Husband Derrick Gates Ladies and gentlemen, fellow citizens, and patriots,
| |
---
|
---
# Write in Derrick Gates for Congress 36th District!!!!
---
---
|
---
# A Message from my Husband Derrick Gates
Ladies and gentlemen, fellow citizens, and patriots,
In the tumultuous landscape of our great nation, where the fog of political strife often clouds our vision, it becomes imperative for us to recognize the battles we face, even when they don't resemble the traditional wars of history. We find ourselves entrenched in what some term a soft civil war, akin to the unsettling tremors preceding a seismic shift.
In these moments, we risk overlooking critical issues that demand our attention in the selection of candidates. Goodness alone does not suffice; we must be discerning in identifying candidates who will boldly champion true conservative Republican values during these trying times. Never before in our history has it been more crucial to stand united for America First principles.
As we confront the looming threat of elitist liberals, it is disheartening to witness an increasing number on the far left expressing disdain for our great nation. Yet, I remain steadfast in my belief that the United States stands as the greatest country to have ever existed on this planet. We must staunchly defend everyday citizens against those who would undermine the principles that make our nation exceptional.
In the 36th congressional district, regrettably, we lack a candidate strong enough to face the challenges at hand. While the endorsed candidate is undoubtedly a good person, GOP leaders have deemed it unfitting for this critical juncture. Consequently, I have been called upon to rise to the occasion, to fight the good fight, and to bridge the gap and do what needs to be done.
After days of prayer, counsel, and careful consideration, pulling on the wisdom of over 50 consultants, we have forged a path forward as a write-in candidate. Our mission is clear: to bring an end to foreign wars, to sever the money tree that foreign nations exploit, and to reclaim our resources for the benefit of American citizens.
We, the people, are weary of our nation's resources being drained by those who harbor animosity toward our great country. We reject the imposition of diversity, equity, and inclusion software that undermines meritocracy. Instead, we demand a focus on trade skills, rewarding hard-earned money and time invested in practical expertise. The best person should get the job, scholarship, or opportunity, and the content of character should surpass the color of skin or chosen sexuality every time.
Our call is resolute: shut down the illegal border invasion, uphold the rule of law, bolster our military to maintain global supremacy, secure our elections with one-day voting, and cease the weaponization of federal agencies against American citizens. It is time to deregulate drilling and mining, reignite our workforce, eradicate the swamp, protect the sanctity of life in the womb, and safeguard our Republican platform from the infection of RHINOs and liberals.
I stand before you, ready to confront the enemy, to put my head down, and plow the ground ahead. The time is now, for tomorrow is not promised. Together, we shall emerge victorious and preserve the beacon of freedom that is the United States of America. Thank you, and may God bless you all.
For those in the 36th Congressional district Write me in Derrick Gates
To give to my campgain
paypal.me/derrickgates
Cashapp $derrickgatesmin
Venmo @Derrick-Gates-4

clean_body: Write in Derrick Gates for Congress 36th District!!!! A Message from my Husband Derrick Gates Ladies and gentlemen, fellow citizens, and patriots, | | | Write in Derrick Gates for Congress 36th District!!!! | A Message from my Husband Derrick Gates Ladies and gentlemen, fellow citizens, and patriots, In the tumultuous landscape of our great nation, where the fog of political strife often clouds our vision, it becomes imperative for us to recognize the battles we face, even when they don't resemble the traditional wars of history. We find ourselves entrenched in what some term a soft civil war, akin to the unsettling tremors preceding a seismic shift. In these moments, we risk overlooking critical issues that demand our attention in the selection of candidates. Goodness alone does not suffice; we must be discerning in identifying candidates who will boldly champion true conservative Republican values during these trying times. Never before in our history has it been more crucial to stand united for America First principles. As we confront the looming threat of elitist liberals, it is disheartening to witness an increasing number on the far left expressing disdain for our great nation. Yet, I remain steadfast in my belief that the United States stands as the greatest country to have ever existed on this planet. We must staunchly defend everyday citizens against those who would undermine the principles that make our nation exceptional. In the 36th congressional district, regrettably, we lack a candidate strong enough to face the challenges at hand. While the endorsed candidate is undoubtedly a good person, GOP leaders have deemed it unfitting for this critical juncture. Consequently, I have been called upon to rise to the occasion, to fight the good fight, and to bridge the gap and do what needs to be done. After days of prayer, counsel, and careful consideration, pulling on the wisdom of over 50 consultants, we have forged a path forward as a write-in candidate. Our mission is clear: to bring an end to foreign wars, to sever the money tree that foreign nations exploit, and to reclaim our resources for the benefit of American citizens. We, the people, are weary of our nation's resources being drained by those who harbor animosity toward our great country. We reject the imposition of diversity, equity, and inclusion software that undermines meritocracy. Instead, we demand a focus on trade skills, rewarding hard-earned money and time invested in practical expertise. The best person should get the job, scholarship, or opportunity, and the content of character should surpass the color of skin or chosen sexuality every time. Our call is resolute: shut down the illegal border invasion, uphold the rule of law, bolster our military to maintain global supremacy, secure our elections with one-day voting, and cease the weaponization of federal agencies against American citizens. It is time to deregulate drilling and mining, reignite our workforce, eradicate the swamp, protect the sanctity of life in the womb, and safeguard our Republican platform from the infection of RHINOs and liberals. I stand before you, ready to confront the enemy, to put my head down, and plow the ground ahead. The time is now, for tomorrow is not promised. Together, we shall emerge victorious and preserve the beacon of freedom that is the United States of America. Thank you, and may God bless you all. For those in the 36th Congressional district Write me in Derrick Gates To give to my campgain paypal.me/derrickgates Cashapp $derrickgatesmin Venmo @Derrick-Gates-4 Also Vote Derrick Gates for Central Committee | | JOIN THE SBCRA TODAY If you want to Join the fight, you can get started at this link! | | | _Rolling Stone_ reports that “Republicans Are Planning to Totally Privatize Medicare - _And Fast.”_
If they take power this November, Republicans are planning to make Medicare Advantage - a private insurance scam that profits off denying care - the default enrollment option instead of traditional Medicare.
_Rolling Stone_ explains this “would hasten the end of the traditional Medicare” and “threaten the Medicare program’s solvency.”
**We need your help to DEFEND Medicare and DEFEAT Medicare’s #1 enemy: Florida Senator Rick Scott.**
Scott made millions as CEO of a hospital corporation that committed the largest fraud against Medicare in history.
As a Senator, he proposed outright killing Medicare and Social Security.
**[Cedar Key Progress needs your help to run billboards and ads to protect Medicare and FIRE Rick Scott this November. name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: MIGOP E-Newsletter February 5, 2024
body:
We have a lot to update you on. | | | |
---
| [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/migop.org/newsletter-feb-05-2024?e=a2af77507c)
---
|
## Welcome to the MIGOP Newsletter!
Each week, the Michigan Republican Party sends important information about what is happening within the party, state, and nation and how you can get involved.
---
|
---
| | | Hello:

The presidential primary is upon us, and we must be proactive at defending our liberty. This primary season, Republicans in Michigan have unique changes to our voting process. Michigan Republicans will be awarded a total of 55 delegates to the RNC Convention in Milwaukee, WI, July 15–18. Sixteen of the 55 delegates will be awarded to presidential candidates based on the February 27 statewide primary, where members of the general public will vote. The other 39 delegates will be awarded based on the March 2 MIGOP District Convention at Huntington Place in Detroit.

I believe all of us were chosen for such a time as this, to be a part of something momentous. Without active engagement by millions of patriots—beyond merely rage typing our frustrations to the world—what hope do we have that things will change for the better? The harsh truth is that they can’t and won’t.

Therefore, I am asking each of you to get active in every way possible, TODAY:
* [Prepare for the upcoming county and district conventions](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=ecfb8e8048&e=a2af77507c).
* Sign up to be trained to work the polls for Election Day and early voting days.
* Learn how to chase ballots, talk to your neighbors, and practice the art of persuasion.
* Sign up for the [Good Neighbor Program](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=8d716624d3&e=a2af77507c).
* Become a member and [donate](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=23e756851f&e=a2af77507c) to support the infrastructure that makes all of this possible.

We cannot do what is required of us by operating out of disparate silos.

In Liberty,
Kristina Karamo
Chairwoman
Michigan Republican Party

This primary season, Republicans in Michigan have unique changes to our voting process. Michigan Republicans will be awarded a total of 55 delegates to the RNC Convention in Milwaukee, WI, July 15–18. Sixteen of the 55 delegates will be awarded to presidential candidates based on the February 27 statewide primary, where members of the general public will vote. The other 39 delegates will be awarded based on the March 2 MIGOP District Convention at Huntington Place in Detroit. I believe all of us were chosen for such a time as this, to be a part of something momentous. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: How do you uphold your religious liberty in today's climate?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683889%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OvP7rjw5EleVy1NhZtnzRw&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683880%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KGb2O%2b47J1TscJSmxTkhAw&sysid=1) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683881%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XHGplXDWB7I6hlkNVPk1kQ&sysid=1)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683882%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TDFb64YuZmiXd9qims8DGQ&sysid=1)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Watch the trailer for our newest course, “TheExodus Story”
body:
The story of how God used Moses to lead the Israelites out of slavery in Egypt

This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zp3c843bjpn1fjmfqro7qglj3qc6fj4aufusmjr0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9i6eoj5cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

The Biblical story of **Exodus** is fundamentally important to Christianity and Judaism, as well as to understanding Western Civilization.

The story of how God used Moses to lead the Israelites out of slavery in Egypt, followed by 40 years in the desert in pursuit of the promised land, reveals **a profound truth about human liberty and man 's place in God's creation.**

**These will be the main themes addressed in Hillsdale College 's latest free online course, "The Exodus Story," which will be released on February 13.**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6r2v9ed81l8cs8e1ab8lqgnh972rsgormb0dn50_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9i6eoj5cph2bs)
As you know, Hillsdale refuses to accept one penny of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. Our work is entirely dependent on the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

**Will you consider helping us meet our goal of raising $500,000 by midnight on February 13 so we can promote this new online course effectively?**

With your tax-deductible gift, we can enroll additional tens of thousands of Americans in "The Exodus Story," as well as expand Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts.

Please help us reach our **$500,000 goal**. I've included a secure link for you to make your gift below:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/exodus**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvbm0cpdrvnilie03u0m6k0qui94gierecacv5lo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9i6eoj5cph2bs)

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: ICYMI News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqa8m9psaqu8ad5dal2sr323h8khvl1hrb6cb2s8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9i6epj4sph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6hogsm0u56pk8uviol7htghklp3u03anltaps10_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9i6epj4sph2bs) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8mdttdhpv938r65gtqpjrm8it076u55i7sra7cg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9i6epj4sph2bs)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

name: Jim Marchant
subject: Republicans CAN’T TRUST Sam Brown!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Marchant for US Senate
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._kH9eg)
---
Fellow Conservative, I’m not holding back or mincing words. There’s only one proven conservative in this race – _that's me_ – and there’s far too much on the line here in Nevada and in our nation to allow a RINO to prevail in our Republican primary for U.S. Senate on June 11th.

**Sam Brown, being pushed by RINO King Mitch McConnell and his establishment campaign machine as a “frontrunner” in this race, is running for all the wrong reasons...**

**_[**_Please step up today and show your support for CONSERVATIVE VICTORY! >>>_**](http://trk.secureandprosper._4xShPSaqvpdA)_**

Sam Brown is a guy who has never held elected office, yet feels entitled to it.

He once moved to Texas, ran for a U.S. House seat, promised to never leave, and then bolted as soon as he came in with less than 5 percent of the vote.

He formed a business to collect COVID emergency assistance – with very shady books.

_He set up a PAC and raised money – also with very shady books._

Now he refuses to debate anyone, and he recently “endorsed” President Trump out of sheer desperation to derail the conservative backlash against his candidacy. **This guy spent MONTHS UPON MONTHS refusing to take a stand and support President Trump and our America First agenda!**

Let me be clear: Nothing is more precious than our freedom and personal liberty, and I will NEVER WAVER in the fight to restore and defend our great nation’s full promise.

**[Let’s defeat the sellout establishment RINOs and woke left in 2024>>>](http://trk.secureandprosper.)**

Together, I know we can prevail on November 5th and lead the charge for America’s renewal in the U.S. Senate.
Jim Marchant
Conservative Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: I want to know your thoughts
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn8kcakslqfd9bg7f9ampihhcgqm96gl67q4pj6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9h60o71chh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuo2dd8fgu2ufifr1keg1lokenrur81m9vd75nv8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9h60o71chh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk1hjc9pp5lmd7m6ru8ht7g2081lqae71he0p430_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9h60o71chh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0skcm40nsneu5dt0obr1oi4spnkqnsn9l9isam8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9h60o71chh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Can I get your thoughts on religious liberty in America?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsvlAHHitN

ACI - Religious Liberty Survey

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osvlAHHitN

Fellow
American,

There is
a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me
worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values.

After the
Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and
signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only
intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Are you
concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our
founding-Religious Liberty?

In
addition to the passing of the Respect for Marriage Act, numerous
examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v.
BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL
RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few
examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to
faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to
their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the Respect for Marriage Act,
brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal
Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and
organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex
marriage failed.

This has
the potential to only intensify legal persecution against
individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to
faith-based values.

The
American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to
preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation
for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty,
Community, and Life.

Whether
it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield
after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a
cake that violates his religious values, are you concerned as I
am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who
wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?

Please
share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning
religious liberty in America.
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62776543:svlAHHitN:m:3:2532013465:ECE1722FDCC48A821871E50B64D25AEC:r

Thank you
for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben
Carson
Founder &
Chairman American Cornerstone Institute

Your
donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and
preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our
country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods
to decrease the federal government's role in society and to
improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens.

Copyright
© 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved.

subject: CTA Feb 6: Call Your Senators to Stop Amnesty – Join Us Tonight w/ Sen. Rick Scott
body:
Join us to stop another attempt to make open borders legal
| | | |

|
---
| Patriot-

---
| Sunday night, the US Senate dropped their so-called "border security" bill, which is nothing more than a giant amnesty bill. This bill would codify into law Biden's border invasion. It would simply legalize what is currently "illegal" immigration. One of the bill's authors, Sen. Chris Murphy even says this bill **_does not_** close the border. [**Call both of your Senators now**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb979468b53ed6/1edb979468b36a10 "Call both of your Senators now")**to urge them to oppose this bill.**
Speaker Mike Johnson and all of House Leadership says the bill is dead on arrival in the House, but it would be best if we can get 41 Senators to oppose it to ensure it never leaves the Senate floor - so call now! ************
---
| | | **Also, join us tonight for a special Tele Town Hall Meeting this evening at 6:00PM ET with special guest Senator Rick Scott of Florida about this awful amnesty bill.** Don't miss this important update on how we can stop this bill.

name: Amanda Chase
subject: Chesterfield VA Tea Party Meets TONIGHT!
body:
Tuesday, February 6
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EVnF4M2wAhso_DvcENt4n_inSJY-HFR1gd4CgshsVkgsvWM1ZGu1Vnpa7JK0xky4NFn4rcX2KhDYdt2UrTXaTXm1_kWo9XXuTn4fFL7BnilE2X95WPsANKZx-iXZoskSKcr28utrOMXpBjoUCXT3V9foiSe_-zKvbWhYTqSDxBs=&c=oAX0Hg8hv2eKOlqhx_HHMeSc8jIK0FpmoEbDnWcsVxBSDTpKbvUx-A==&ch=WApt-kdSNFR-YQ4h4EYy7A9Bk7reUyvEX1WGxo14-hT2wHx84WV_pQ==)
---
| Chesterfield VA Tea Party Meets Tonight!
---
| | |
---|---
Dear Friends,

We hope to see you tonight, Tuesday,
Feb. 6, at 6:30pm, at Great American Ranch, 13995 Raised Antler Cir. Midlothian, VA 23112, for the Chesterfield VA Tea Party.

Our special guest speaker is former Senator Amanda Chase, who served in the Virginia Senate for 8 years, and has been following the 2024 Virginia General Assembly, which began Wednesday, January 10 and continues through Saturday, March 9.

Learn how to follow hot topic bills from committee to passage.

Did you know that you can call in remotely and participate and provide comment during committee meetings?

Come tonight and learn how to call in to a committee meeting and express support or opposition for a bill.

You will learn when committees meet, how to track legislation that is being heard and when it is being heard.

This will be a very informative and instructive meeting that will allow YOU to follow legislation from the comfort of your home and stay in contact with legislators.

YOU will not want to miss tonight's meeting.
See you tonight.

For God & Country,
Chesterfield VA Tea Party Board
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| |
---
|
---
| | | | | | | Friends of Amanda Chase | P.O. Box 5811, Midlothian, VA 23112

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Our newest free online course, "The Exodus Story"
body:
The story of how God used Moses to lead the Israelites out of slavery in Egypt

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6e888406370c460ca086f4fe9554af10&_e=hLCQVng9g-O6G47mGocbIY0huy16WA1_L74qmQC9_7SDvcJ2pEsGhxUc36qRFUdOBAYF2C43Zmbt_zQIcRJFUX6ylswoWumfkLb09ii-S4TxzMj6-kViiPB9zPJ8yYbsOOQmepetHQj8VC09-nFt6otmF00lZRE6fREMuLS7HHrWVNrxWsGP8pWNUAg3zw_eMskAZS6xpwhzZ_Kk9T4zlhDIaP3zOx7JHS7VktNzm8ScUE_iiLte-dEZID_fPz37CnoRHvF1Fr3PDX0cXE9zllT5EKgBgNbEcusqQltyB3NH1uYO_WVdc7JyD1oJVhIyUMbzJIra8pYlaO_lS8uHaWs4grwP_NrJBcrxybez0HE1s1LnPxDaNpP3wBfXdjx0f9cJz0AF4Iv6TGvZAFTMyg%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

The Biblical story of **Exodus** is fundamentally important to Christianity and Judaism, as well as to understanding Western Civilization.

The story of how God used Moses to lead the Israelites out of slavery in Egypt, followed by 40 years in the desert in pursuit of the promised land, reveals **a profound truth about human liberty and man 's place in God's creation.**

**These will be the main themes addressed in Hillsdale College 's latest free online course, "The Exodus Story," which will be released on February 13.**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6e888406370c460ca086f4fe9554af10&_e=hLCQVng9g-O6G47mGocbIY0huy16WA1_L74qmQC9_7SDvcJ2pEsGhxUc36qRFUdOBAYF2C43Zmbt_zQIcRJFUX6ylswoWumfkLb09ii-S4TxzMj6-kViiPB9zPJ8yYbsOOQmepetHQj8VC09-nFt6otmF00lZRE6fREMuLS7HHrWVNrxWsGP8pWNUAg3zw_eMskAZS6xpwhzZ_Kk9T4zlhDIaP3zOx7JHS7VktNzm8RNC14_5WO8hgPvH9u5m0mJ70tpjd3x9GiBVcLR1rL2VLvsuufgnKbgRAM_j_s6h1FT8-Bi1ivy0sf5ELquJM-CQEo-Cmx6ZHUCyqIJXtM_VErp2oOXXljBoFnGKYidMpq2d9oD972cKDVFOfuM6BscidAkFIh6Gj1JcUkmyffuNw%3D%3D)
As you know, Hillsdale refuses to accept one penny of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. Our work is entirely dependent on the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

**Will you consider helping us meet our goal of raising $500,000 by midnight on February 13 so we can promote this new online course effectively?**

With your tax-deductible gift, we can enroll additional tens of thousands of Americans in "The Exodus Story," as well as expand Hillsdale's other educational outreach efforts.

Please help us reach our **$500,000 goal**. I've included a secure link for you to make your gift below:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/prereg/exodus**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=6e888406370c460ca086f4fe9554af10&_e=hLCQVng9g-O6G47mGocbIY0huy16WA1_L74qmQC9_7SDvcJ2pEsGhxUc36qRFUdOBAYF2C43Zmbt_zQIcRJFUX6ylswoWumfkLb09ii-S4TxzMj6-kViiPB9zPJ8yYbsOOQmepetHQj8VC09-nFt6otmF00lZRE6fREMuLS7HHrWVNrxWsGP8pWNUAg3zw_eMskAZS6xpwhzZ_Kk9T4zlhDIaP3zOx7JHS7VktNzm8QqvwfXN95SNQ9auDaEoFBddnHnjA6_WLMjPUOQxhKzk9S_J39EQynUXu0EdyuDsgKw_fOj6gPuCpf9HaUF4MuYAX3NBz9iQbZAbU-m1AmnOrwZy9pdiNUQMstzaqk87QJADsyvxYp55WLKSfByrU0CLgWzgcZGhVqqmTxxz-oDtw%3D%3D)

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**
**

## Judge Delays Trump Trial Indefinitely
The judge overseeing Donald Trump's Washington D.C. trial has [postponed the trial indefinitely](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFurDAQheGnMZ3ReGzspXBxG7q9bUpkmdllEoMRzC7K20ekTnOqX_qk83Ef74kLr8__aaEojzqmLPymEbXX6EbXTPFBhGQbiiZAQOz7zjZzBLAhoAsmGwcUfDLZEZh8A2MyWmg4IqADBG-g813X4pSD6X2-pZtLOVnlgCaWureflVeZ6VG-65v2NtelKXEW2Q5l_ykcFA7nebZbLSyc6xUoHFY6D4XDpSgcAK_pFA55fslXWrXsr2XTsnMqekpC-io1gLG9912zx2k7uRQ-fFAOnkvi8kvLXz_8BAAA__-i_Fo9), awaiting a decision on Trump's appeal on the issue of presidential immunity. On Monday, she indicated the delay could last until late 2024. Trump's critics publicly [expressed fear that the delay](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFvszAQgOFfY2-OzHE2MHj4FrZ8a0d0MQe4NXFkLon491U7d36HV3o-rtOVUk739T_tHGQpE0VJL57AeAM4oZ7Dwgzcag5NZzuAYXCt3sLiuEO6Mdu-sZYH5zx36H3fRsKIpFMAC2jB-sY679wF5tg1g4899UiRWoWW5ySlXj5LusvGSz7Li-slll3nsIk8DtX-UzAqGGXjLeX80xSMlddnJknlrmCM5VnF3Egk86FgRMQBXGsWpnqYtZa3-eLTSH3uD5N5pWyWtG5iZs508qxg1DXMj3fKOR2-U2jXndLvS8tfKN8BAAD__7YaY6c) could carry Trump past election day in November. "I am officially now at the freakout stage," said Obama-era former U.S. Solicitor General Neal Katyal. At issue is the amount of time the federal appeals court panel is taking to decide the question of presidential immunity. Even after it rules, if he loses, Trump can appeal to the full appeals court and from there to the U.S. Supreme Court. Special Counsel Jack Smith earlier asked the Supreme Court for an expedited hearing[ and was turned down](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L9uwyAQgPGnwZut4wD_GRi6sKVrR-sC55gK2xHgWHn7qp27f9In_b5u841iivvjkza2dTlm8jW-eMa2b1HPugl2YUZWDVs5wIA4TUY1qwVlOOBk_DhKuZBawIAflrukoDXcdRMtAmpA6CWY3pgOgx_k1PuRRk2elNDAIdYjd99H3OvKS3ofL86dP7Ym2bXWZxHqQ6AT6K7r6urKj5NyiLT_NgLdWdqdryLQIaAS6AJ7gU5Jga7mc3u2NUdKbeBE79J6KlyabMPziinF0g9Cw2OjmP6e9T-AnwAAAP__rkRbjA).
## Storms Devastate Southern California
Historic storms continue to batter California with torrential rainfall, hurricane-force winds, and flash flooding throughout the southern portion of the state. [Storm damage can be seen here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLtywyAQRb9G6tCg1QNRUKRx57QpNWtYpM0g8ACxkr_POG5T3kdx5nxc1yty4Li940Gm-rSirfygFcQsYFzH1hlPBDS0ZHolFYDW09Duxmk5TRq1lLe-V3OPqG8O_Ly4ARalbMsGJIwS5NzLaZ6mDpxVvZ7tgsuIFodmlOS4ptx9Jo51Jx9-0oNyZ9PRBrPXei_N8NbApYHLeZ6dT98nYd1fl2f5SiLSWRq4hFQExo0CFVHS13OKwmJgn3JkFFiPVO47ZbYi84OyKDXlQ_iQkuO4tdm4-8khcJlVM8rtQA5_NPU_Nb8BAAD__9RjaKU) More than a million Californians are without power as floodwaters containing large rocks and other debris threaten both multimillion-dollar homes and homeless encampments in the Los Angeles area. Floods poured through the streets, [as seen here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2v4yAQAH-N3RGt-bBxQXFNulx7pbWGJd4TNghQcvfvn_LqV46mGc2fx_ZATnw9f-NJrse8oe_8ok2KWUi96TG4SCRJjeSmBRYp19Wo8XAWotEqaBvVDkqhJb0rBaDsJCOudmQnQWqQME9gZmNuMvhlWmdv0Wr0qAYNFLjnevub-eoHxfQ_v6jefD7H5I7eSxvUr0HeB3nHctG7fdQHamefaJB3j4ljrhejaD3XswnsZ27loMpeVH5RFYUvwlISCfpXKrUmJruuSwh2R2_XxetpMgGiNirA7sHYsbpQ3pwSt3kZNDxP5PSd1X969BUAAP__bANn5A) The storms have produced up to 10 inches of rain in some areas and triggered landslides, mudslides, and rockslides. [Evacuations have been ordered,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHOnDAQhJ_GdEZmwQYKijR0lzYl2rMN3pzxIuM7dG8fkfpvppiRRp--P4_lgRQpbb9x91NZeUFb6OMXkEZCt3SVm1bvwbeVn5pe9QDjqNsqTDDo52gt-rEzxjROOQRYUa-DbpQDqGgCBZ0CZRqljdY1ONs3o7EDDh1abEWnvKPCuf7LlErwa_zyx-fa8l7FKZRynKL9JWAWMF_XVdv0tPcoYL6vBcwK7tAC5tNbTk5i2fk8gs9kZaaPz5KSdPg9pQ3vnE5ZQub3FqTFSCvnRChfie2L0ib5XeTBl88Sk5NrZHZ3nRndWYeyxypP7rgoRjpNLzq17UjxP275yd2_AAAA__-xyHIX) shelters opened, and emergencies declared throughout southern California. One resident said, _" I can't believe it. It looks like a river that's been here for years. I've never seen anything like it."_
## King Charles III Diagnosed With Cancer
Britain's King Charles III, 75, has been [diagnosed with cancer](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FurDAQRb_GdCAzGIwLF6-h29emRGN7wJMYewXWovx9tKnT3OZK5-h8PNYHcuK8_8eDbN3Kir7yi1ZopxbUqppgNyKgoSHba6kBjBmHJtpBbcbNeuynYMDIzTlACnNA7R1Kpxq2IEFJkFMvx2kcOwhe92byM84KPQ5CSQpcy9l9Fs410pa-y4vOzpejSTbW-rzE8E_AImC577vz2fn3KWB5owUsEt4zCli-OO-tj3gmutrAuOdyUWhvrrH1mD2dXaxHak4bnjenxNekhZL7gZx-hfWv-p8AAAD__7N8Wos) and will be pulling back from all public events, according to Buckingham Palace. Palace officials offered no details on the type of cancer or its prognosis, except to say that it wasn't prostate cancer. The King was hospitalized last week to treat "benign prostate enlargement," and the cancer was found during that treatment. Charles has been King since September 2022, when his mother, Queen Elizabeth, died at age 96. The Palace said Charles had "[commenced a schedule ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFu5CAURb8Gd1j4gfG4cLFTuFhpdtOltJ7g2ZBgsIAZZ_4-mtRp75WOjs77bbmhDz5u_3Cnqa5pQVP9gxbgmoNaVGOnlQhINjR1gxgAxrGXjZvsgKSkvehOABo7Eggl-1FLrWQnhqHxEwhQAoTuRK_7vgVrhm7U5oIXhQYlU4Ksrym3H8nH6mgNz_Sg3Jq0N2FytR6FyT8MZgbzeZ7tXuLrYzBT5PfCYHaEoToGc6qOMoP508eNG4c5UOH3aClv6TXVTFh3ipWvKfN7LAcZv3qy3GA0lPmBAQ3xgs8XFzO_Xjv3_-vtb5Mne5w-BF_0wJTYdvThR7H-1us7AAD__3S_bWY)of regular treatments" and that he would "postpone public-facing duties."

On Monday, she indicated the delay could last until late 2024. | | | | | | TUESDAY, FEBRUARY 6, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1947, seven of the world's greatest photographers, including Robert Capa and Henri Cartier-Bresson, formed Magnum Photos to allow top photographers to own their work. () In our Takeoff section today, we're covering the rain-soaked disaster that's enveloping southern California. We're sending thoughts and prayers to all our Flyover readers in California with hope that you're finding ways to stay safe -- and dry. In case you haven't signed up for The Flyover yet, you can do that here . Is your personal data safe online? can help you with that, and they're helping us pay the bills today as our sponsor. | Judge Delays Trump Trial Indefinitely The judge overseeing Donald Trump's Washington D.C. trial has , awaiting a decision on Trump's appeal on the issue of presidential immunity. On Monday, she indicated the delay could last until late 2024. Trump's critics publicly could carry Trump past election day in November. "I am officially now at the freakout stage," said Obama-era former U.S. Solicitor General Neal Katyal. At issue is the amount of time the federal appeals court panel is taking to decide the question of presidential immunity. Even after it rules, if he loses, Trump can appeal to the full appeals court and from there to the U.S. Supreme Court. Special Counsel Jack Smith earlier asked the Supreme Court for an expedited hearing. Storms Devastate Southern California Historic storms continue to batter California with torrential rainfall, hurricane-force winds, and flash flooding throughout the southern portion of the state. More than a million Californians are without power as floodwaters containing large rocks and other debris threaten both multimillion-dollar homes and homeless encampments in the Los Angeles area. Floods poured through the streets, The storms have produced up to 10 inches of rain in some areas and triggered landslides, mudslides, and rockslides. shelters opened, and emergencies declared throughout southern California. One resident said, " I can't believe it. It looks like a river that's been here for years. I've never seen anything like it." King Charles III Diagnosed With Cancer Britain's King Charles III, 75, has been and will be pulling back from all public events, according to Buckingham Palace. Palace officials offered no details on the type of cancer or its prognosis, except to say that it wasn't prostate cancer. The King was hospitalized last week to treat "benign prostate enlargement," and the cancer was found during that treatment. Charles has been King since September 2022, when his mother, Queen Elizabeth, died at age 96. The Palace said Charles had " regular treatments" and that he would "postpone public-facing duties." | | Friend, Please join me in celebrating Ronald Reagan! On “Reagan Day,” patriots remember and cherish the life and legacy of our 40th President of the United States, who spent eight years in the White House:
* Revitalizing America’s Economy;
* Defeating Soviet Communism; and,
* Restoring the U.S.A. as “The Shining City on a Hill!”

One of the greatest presidents of all time, Ronald Reagan won the last truly dominant landslide in Presidential history, taking 49 states in 1984. And he darn-near won Minnesota despite Walter Mondale being the Democrats’ nominee. Here’s to the Gipper! Sincerely,
Brad Finstad

body:

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b9c3b105b74c4e6282aeafc25e64afe1&_e=_n8p9ieaguileJQS86J5Qk2r-x2SArfK2m-1dGrVmlq_lEcFCE9njae0ZXATMbobdUDGauNvMgBnxJNEmlK_CQrz-RrxnCpNLf_U_EYEo0wmrfIgNOSMk_-r_Q_PV1DJkCoRh6iAFIlxkZrQ34G2vbIMpRP_3-PKEYS22kyczohZbpYqK5Wtg95GN7B7-lm763v_oWRMHEyD5xqM_XlNlmCMY8BOiLKjMyLgzo_-igvPw84UbaWlPp3LaWFmwIv02svw1ZlPIsFDyR6NOPwQciFMeHVFOIe-UaeZYVtgPtshgBE6HmPtAdgecIYodVovMTAxyhDZnUq9pqKXPHdjIK4Tzbgg1K70ca4mOa6BvxtKtVLvwDG3vb_CIILzb2ZMjxBrhD-R7V-b3jrHElKJxg%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

body: 96 https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/border-bill-emai l-fundraising?utm_source=rc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2024feb5hf  Friend, The Senate border bill will not secure the southern border, but rather empower an already corrupt Secretary Mayorkas and radical bureaucracy. President Biden has had the tools to stop the invasion of our country, and yet he has turned his back for years. The bill misses the mark when it comes to fixing the asylum system and stopping Biden’s parole abuse. It will not stop the invasion at our southern border — and that invasion is the greatest threat to our national security. Here’s the simple truth: Securing our border depends on helping Republicans win in November. President Trump secured our border. He’s done it before, and he’ll do it again. We can’t give Biden four more years to make this mess even worse. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=602a54ddf67b450495b09f2c631f7ff0&_e=KV5806uOhceNvkQe3ERzIgHa23Onlv7ZUpUJEZKApUlmooOf9lPv1VUe1BD8HjC3OiQEW8B233F-45LhJIsDOAp47Jbu7Alfbzt7DyK7wO_bBhavtRr2_-gXmqwywAXmbeR5Yl5Wk7-humnb6tXbnTMd2h8296Q1m2dn4sr9CEuwvIbQR6cy0nAbQTL06nadxuPRgQeEQ78oOo8kf7MzG2y3W1-xw-BRcxJ12BYRBLjb__RWIMmGf1ZXL9yaUZGm1wiTlCpUdMDXhZOBU7L6DOUP1fgMaYsZ1Ht4s1IHMADFETOWjeRn47q8e5w-_8KCGvFtnHWmnxawR3C8UxrojYnDjT9a2C2-cip0ioasSSwuyYz_RDegDhfzhhMYBKuO3-1TwGWYPHKbGQJUalTYgQ%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=602a54ddf67b450495b09f2c631f7ff0&_e=KV5806uOhceNvkQe3ERzIgHa23Onlv7ZUpUJEZKApUlmooOf9lPv1VUe1BD8HjC3OiQEW8B233F-45LhJIsDOAp47Jbu7Alfbzt7DyK7wO_bBhavtRr2_-gXmqwywAXmbeR5Yl5Wk7-humnb6tXbnTMd2h8296Q1m2dn4sr9CEuwvIbQR6cy0nAbQTL06nadxuPRgQeEQ78oOo8kf7MzG2y3W1-xw-BRcxJ12BYRBLjb__RWIMmGf1ZXL9yaUZGmAqLR6dm0OIFvVLssPS9yzKLDVSC1sSvNMCK315GI34SychOAG0siLNzWi2VpRKG441ldoxkd1OFuWCgZrgxNuG6S9EU0bbwi7kUK3TTtK31E4wJP6Jxr1WuyfMoLebVVswZ_5mEA0aKK516XuTtE3g%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=602a54ddf67b450495b09f2c631f7ff0&_e=KV5806uOhceNvkQe3ERzIgHa23Onlv7ZUpUJEZKApUlmooOf9lPv1VUe1BD8HjC3OiQEW8B233F-45LhJIsDOAp47Jbu7Alfbzt7DyK7wO_bBhavtRr2_-gXmqwywAXmbeR5Yl5Wk7-humnb6tXbnTMd2h8296Q1m2dn4sr9CEuwvIbQR6cy0nAbQTL06nadxuPRgQeEQ78oOo8kf7MzG2y3W1-xw-BRcxJ12BYRBLjb__RWIMmGf1ZXL9yaUZGmhq6O9BBXrIy14alSogUxjk4ECMUBEpx7-SfYZiPQH8vhRoaGf9ZY5ViMBtu6p5DUP8IZb6QK27BZQAZBdx0jZ9_Jr-xhTR7h3BWHwXpyVG9_dvyX1p-Tglpp9WzZbNuc0UWNjed1AXYMcRUP-ouZNw%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Conservative Liberty Wire
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
subject: Did you know your tax dollars are funding this organization?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | [ ](http://trk.libertyledger.)
---
Fellow American,

Care, no matter what.

This is the motto of Planned Parenthood. While it sounds great on the surface, Planned Parenthood is lying to itself, to vulnerable women and young girls, and to the American people through manipulative and dangerously subtle language.

While they claim to provide healthcare services to women no matter who they are or where they live, abortion can never be healthcare. Further, while they claim to provide numerous services to women, 97.2% of Planned Parenthood’s pregnancy resolution services are devoted to abortions, the purposeful ending of an unborn baby’s life.

**[Does 97.2% of cases brought to Planned Parenthood that end in the death of an innocent child sound like “care” to you?](http://trk.libertyledger._ivOpDbJwvjGdHf_NHQSA)**

Planned Parenthood cares only about the business. It preys on the vulnerable, thrives on women’s fear, and fuels itself on greed. When a woman arrives seeking answers to an unexpected pregnancy, the clock to gain a profit starts ticking. They will do whatever they can to make a woman agree to an abortion because each abortion completed is more profit in their pockets.

At SBA Pro-Life America, we are committed to stopping the manipulation and the gruesome deaths of innocent babies. In the last 10 years, Planned Parenthood has the lifeblood of 3.4 million babies on their hands.

[We cannot be the only voice fighting for these precious children and exposing the lies of Planned Parenthood.](http://trk.libertyledger.-q5R8QtsgZCA) Would you stand with us and commit to protecting women and unborn babies from the dangers of Planned Parenthood? By signing our pledge to stop Planned Parenthood, you are helping SBA Pro-Life America fight this “ _David vs Goliath_ ” battle.

Whether you know it or not, Planned Parenthood is impacting YOUR community and YOUR family by taking your hard-earned tax dollars to fund abortions and devaluing the unborn in our country.

**The lies, manipulation, and millions of deaths must come to an end now.**

Help us fight for the vulnerable by standing up against Planned Parenthood by signing our pledge at the link below:

[SIGN YOUR NAME](http://trk.libertyledger.)
| I can’t tell you how important your commitment is today to the pro-life movement and the generations to come tomorrow.
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, SBA Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206
Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.libertyledger.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MjE2Mjk1NiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDM3LWIyMWYwMjFhNGM5ODRiZGJiNmY0MGI2MjA2YzM2NDYyIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/a-n6bT7t1sNWdU9wm2V3Dg) to unsubscribe.
---

In the last 10 years, Planned Parenthood has the lifeblood of 3.4 million babies on their hands. Would you stand with us and commit to protecting women and unborn babies from the dangers of Planned Parenthood? By signing our pledge to stop Planned Parenthood, you are helping SBA Pro-Life America fight this “ David vs Goliath ” battle. Whether you know it or not, Planned Parenthood is impacting YOUR community and YOUR family by taking your hard-earned tax dollars to fund abortions and devaluing the unborn in our country. The lies, manipulation, and millions of deaths must come to an end now. Help us fight for the vulnerable by standing up against Planned Parenthood by signing our pledge at the link below: | I can’t tell you how important your commitment is today to the pro-life movement and the generations to come tomorrow. For LIFE, Marjorie Dannenfelser President, SBA Pro-Life America Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America 2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803 Arlington, VA, 22206 Liberty Ledger P.O. Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

name: A New Direction
subject: Seeking 250 Oregonians
body:
Your response is crucial
[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlliht-dihkkhuuli-r/) This is an URGENT CALL TO ACTION, Friend.We're on the brink and we need YOU, one of the **250 Oregonians** we're desperately seeking, to step up for our 2024 legislative session priorities survey.Don't just sit back--seize this opportunity to voice your top priorities as the 2024 legislative session begins. **[Your response isn't just about you; it's a megaphone for every Oregonian in your area.](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlliht-dihkkhuuli-y/)** [TAKE THE 2024 PRIORITIES SURVEY](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlliht-dihkkhuuli-j/) This is your shot for your voice to be heard. **[Let us know, with no hesitation, the issues that are burning at your core.](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlliht-dihkkhuuli-t/)** Let's be real: without those crucial 250 responses, we're blindfolded in understanding what our state really needs. **So, once you've fired back at the survey, pass it on.** Send this email to two friends or family members and make sure their voices are echoing in this crucial moment. Time's ticking, and your impact is non-negotiable! [TAKE THE 2024 PRIORITIES SURVEY](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlliht-dihkkhuuli-i/) Thank you,A New Direction [](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlliht-dihkkhuuli-d/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlliht-dihkkhuuli-h/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlliht-dihkkhuuli-o/)[](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xdlliht-dihkkhuuli-b/) | [Preferences](https://andor.updatemyprofile.com/y-xdlliht-172B6299-dihkkhuuli-n) | [Unsubscribe](https://andor.cmail19.com/t/y-u-xdlliht-dihkkhuuli-p/)

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Help me strike out Adam Schiff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=159d7f78518243d5bcfc02a64083b4bf&_e=Tjyr-iKXuSuZqkf9is2hVWBlYZuLL_1P4U_Kj216290AyubHQEFXZ9PBeQk5fRWsAp9gT4CW8nYnfIHhf2SpUbCWNRz_YUP7i3Uf0MFZtlQ21orinNzvcBR3I11KkaPb9h5Njw7xu5t7N2h-m_aCXXjp6bW90l9LGk2BjNknpo6xPS6eIwD2K2GslH7UnYotpdVkZqKMyHod5pHVZ32Uu5w_jmp_jGNwrrjpUe3z4ujqywWft-UEjvKI9CFhxrKEtH6sWFaULNkEB73Drm5Xa0-CPO_pDYw_BFw69oa2JCmgBS2ipxRZONR12ExD646qL1iOsENd1uZF9mHpHwhwPzzuRPsgk2QUKSHQIrSC9A7Mtl56J3lDFmZJO6V0A0guiNikwSv9u0NJ5YjzGoLBog%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=159d7f78518243d5bcfc02a64083b4bf&_e=Tjyr-iKXuSuZqkf9is2hVWBlYZuLL_1P4U_Kj216290AyubHQEFXZ9PBeQk5fRWsAp9gT4CW8nYnfIHhf2SpUbCWNRz_YUP7i3Uf0MFZtlQ21orinNzvcBR3I11KkaPb9h5Njw7xu5t7N2h-m_aCXXjp6bW90l9LGk2BjNknpo6xPS6eIwD2K2GslH7UnYotpdVkZqKMyHod5pHVZ32Uu5w_jmp_jGNwrrjpUe3z4ujRxuHdQG4evSDsXM5v18Jm3h4_SnkqKydLLID-1-CvRbeIjw8iJVmA_cD-XQGWyUEsQnJZi0g7gLYey8xc1jXwZBgsC4qzgMmVc5-5W7u3ytvssu2jn1C87QwWYN_QQCjZLUsd7yySBiIBSDnMMQYhEge7IaTSPFGOUxMY-hRTeA%3D%3D)** That’s the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November.I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to “choose” between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee......and that’s being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go “three up...three down” against this lineup of liberal career politicians.That’s a bit of baseball vernacular.No surprise, right?It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning.Then, it’s your team’s turn to go on offense. Well, that’s very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country.Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years – most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I’m reaching out to you today.**[Will you step up and help strike out this “lineup of liberals” through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=159d7f78518243d5bcfc02a64083b4bf&_e=Tjyr-iKXuSuZqkf9is2hVWBlYZuLL_1P4U_Kj216290AyubHQEFXZ9PBeQk5fRWsAp9gT4CW8nYnfIHhf2SpUbCWNRz_YUP7i3Uf0MFZtlQ21orinNzvcBR3I11KkaPb9h5Njw7xu5t7N2h-m_aCXXjp6bW90l9LGk2BjNknpo6xPS6eIwD2K2GslH7UnYotpdVkZqKMyHod5pHVZ32Uu5w_jmp_jGNwrrjpUe3z4uiXafAxisTq5mhnPOov3r1qF7kLn2RPPQnNbX2saCp0DHqJkz17vVWa0tv__7qN-7yIerZ68Pl-rplDj_g88QOB4kSQs9o94YCtTUH3qGjMcWzgW3hf5l_CxXyMluW0YMcv8r4R88kOZPLfEwNIuQVp4mAPbhrNg0-sKrhEPAhVHg%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California.Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California.• Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don’t lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a “false choice” between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=159d7f78518243d5bcfc02a64083b4bf&_e=Tjyr-iKXuSuZqkf9is2hVWBlYZuLL_1P4U_Kj216290AyubHQEFXZ9PBeQk5fRWsAp9gT4CW8nYnfIHhf2SpUbCWNRz_YUP7i3Uf0MFZtlQ21orinNzvcBR3I11KkaPb9h5Njw7xu5t7N2h-m_aCXXjp6bW90l9LGk2BjNknpo6xPS6eIwD2K2GslH7UnYotpdVkZqKMyHod5pHVZ32Uu5w_jmp_jGNwrrjpUe3z4ujIyN-0R00oSef4z8ulOX8rGqTlDA_Jl_ihIUTlCogYUUCwNA9z40Dey0V1O0SShGwCPLWGJ6aOrcLh2IMqvLZUF38T5fxTn5Spa5Bp-xeMmVAcHNVhBetfsrosMLHSSYhotW2tLs1TD1eNnjq3pKV88SHdx6Loz36xH0o5F6uFPQ%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign “connecting the dots” between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That’s my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I’d consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=159d7f78518243d5bcfc02a64083b4bf&_e=Tjyr-iKXuSuZqkf9is2hVWBlYZuLL_1P4U_Kj216290AyubHQEFXZ9PBeQk5fRWsAp9gT4CW8nYnfIHhf2SpUbCWNRz_YUP7i3Uf0MFZtlQ21orinNzvcBR3I11KkaPb9h5Njw7xu5t7N2h-m_aCXXjp6bW90l9LGk2BjNknpo6xPS6eIwD2K2GslH7UnYotpdVkZqKMyHod5pHVZ32Uu5w_jmp_jGNwrrjpUe3z4ugUpLs786lnfJcF3VPf6kHXBinuIlEl12TPwnNXM46zXFJfe_CftyHy6zdtP5f1d8C1WXKcuJcv1UYNmkIwdIKa79q6ShUx48CP85C4ucfe4Lw4our5pBOGccxJvcdpdLr6rTEPnyPFoZtujFttlCTwQqyt78tT4lkHtlFNY4b_MQ%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I’m confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve GarveyRepublican for United States Senate
---
|
---
| | [**DONATE**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=159d7f78518243d5bcfc02a64083b4bf&_e=Tjyr-iKXuSuZqkf9is2hVWBlYZuLL_1P4U_Kj216290AyubHQEFXZ9PBeQk5fRWsAp9gT4CW8nYnfIHhf2SpUbCWNRz_YUP7i3Uf0MFZtlQ21orinNzvcBR3I11KkaPb9h5Njw7xu5t7N2h-m_aCXXjp6bW90l9LGk2BjNknpo6xPS6eIwD2K2GslH7UnYotpdVkZqKMyHod5pHVZ32Uu5w_jmp_jGNwrrjpUe3z4ujPVuLAoG9FXkaB_1jmg0yKxV0ZwIzkSWkvyVC0KDH9X3tA322G0GSpr30dojW089XYtMQtVLscji7rnsGo4d6Pb8HfFAX1bPt3dqo6l8iI0RHdsPN9LLsEGDDxOiUBIGHN9ORZrQ2o6xJcm8lSu5nD0PL3r9lFpYAL8Epk0BMJWg%3D%3D)
---
| | |
---
|
---
**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California.I’ve been fortunate to wear many hats in life – from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference.In baseball, it’s not about the individual; it’s about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It’s time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.
---
[**More About Me**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=159d7f78518243d5bcfc02a64083b4bf&_e=Tjyr-iKXuSuZqkf9is2hVWBlYZuLL_1P4U_Kj216290AyubHQEFXZ9PBeQk5fRWsAp9gT4CW8nYnfIHhf2SpUbCWNRz_YUP7i3Uf0MFZtlQ21orinNzvcBR3I11KkaPb9h5Njw7xu5t7N2h-m_aCXXjp6bW90l9LGk2BjNknpo6xPS6eIwD2K2GslH7UnYotpdVkZqKMyHod5pHVZ32Uu5w_jmp_jGNwrrjpUe3z4ugbk0o7PyBKj40zO8voayOhcZE8jErn9PCJwvZzL9ZMAUmgeIo-kxrulmL2HaGOkBvXaxAnOJZ-6tlmKSEKHpgL9Cz1YFuLl5flqJrQHR0GU15GhzMFLnOmrZVRIalDXTDomsJ0mVM7xiXD9IiemWg1_pZwTipplqsIaZJuFebHxA%3D%3D)
---
[**Join My Campaign**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=159d7f78518243d5bcfc02a64083b4bf&_e=Tjyr-iKXuSuZqkf9is2hVWBlYZuLL_1P4U_Kj216290AyubHQEFXZ9PBeQk5fRWsAp9gT4CW8nYnfIHhf2SpUbCWNRz_YUP7i3Uf0MFZtlQ21orinNzvcBR3I11KkaPb9h5Njw7xu5t7N2h-m_aCXXjp6bW90l9LGk2BjNknpo6xPS6eIwD2K2GslH7UnYotpdVkZqKMyHod5pHVZ32Uu5w_jmp_jGNwrrjpUe3z4uj4Zg1cjhSBWyIjv0W4Mh2p6KJB282trhkPSk14h8QSRrcvZzKcCq2-MdB0GRjgaz9NV_PFB2rGe-0Xt_uc05ehW4ozmXj0rgow5E3CJUzPF7k9GroZ9X0BhlSD1lqCAxMbI6WCzDf2a1ngm8EMWfbw1CsjQA6CylsuNUvPQQtPxA%3D%3D)

name: Hillsdale College via Conservatives Give
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b7822122f254af79ae130573b81f5da&_e=X9-EHY-jZ2G3tBH4tJgkkyFyYZSOICpC95f5WBhSGmZ9X0m72RkP-2IEULxbrfadI1DyAvvGeohB620JbZMG6r92iBOcLjI97lixtl6U_QNmP-2jESDB7QZ3Bmbi1d9YTelsTKMeyLuwCXCpgjwTMsPoq6LYFbDmSft27r3OFg9uSh1mwY8pqFjGspUEHDFpNxFCnse2ZDOmYERbxU50rWyr9ht2tCdv8tSnNpmmS683FJKPg0qj-vDPBnDufar5TfFWV7eV8JNVLiNp69cy7_XG96Muyth_Y7MiSZ4VfSSTseZ9qu9LuXMR5KtTZqk4_UkHvrgNmc8GoEo43EFOp_OvRd0YJl6hC9sVOgy4dD-A1hZnoGQIQQ09ZVxKJcp8lMs8TbfKy6aE4geuYm6lxg%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b7822122f254af79ae130573b81f5da&_e=X9-EHY-jZ2G3tBH4tJgkkyFyYZSOICpC95f5WBhSGmZ9X0m72RkP-2IEULxbrfadI1DyAvvGeohB620JbZMG6r92iBOcLjI97lixtl6U_QNmP-2jESDB7QZ3Bmbi1d9YTelsTKMeyLuwCXCpgjwTMsPoq6LYFbDmSft27r3OFg9uSh1mwY8pqFjGspUEHDFpNxFCnse2ZDOmYERbxU50rWyr9ht2tCdv8tSnNpmmS683FJKPg0qj-vDPBnDufar5xugNlyA0Vbj7ALgvmt-QVoWn3hrwRfwwcUK_A62C1uCoLglwBn-j6Dw0-TTmriYC19dgWMFHYKreviKzkIgJBf_hHcqQqLHYkOVBi8BSFLNacr9qXpx0aUoIv7Iqe0RSPBfc4QoBk3TBMV7-_4rdJg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1b7822122f254af79ae130573b81f5da&_e=X9-EHY-jZ2G3tBH4tJgkkyFyYZSOICpC95f5WBhSGmZ9X0m72RkP-2IEULxbrfadI1DyAvvGeohB620JbZMG6r92iBOcLjI97lixtl6U_QNmP-2jESDB7QZ3Bmbi1d9YTelsTKMeyLuwCXCpgjwTMsPoq6LYFbDmSft27r3OFg9uSh1mwY8pqFjGspUEHDFpNxFCnse2ZDOmYERbxU50rWyr9ht2tCdv8tSnNpmmS683FJKPg0qj-vDPBnDufar5zL6leNUZFdZZ0uzWMjK8eMHCyCTLH02iNpL76BdL-XlTp83h_CFI4QMof60skq1XAKXcITbFt0heiawUvirGHdA-USZJMAVtU6WUMFGkL9-Nh9ojJdHg7-KFKe4AQsIRbPzEVone7nuMYmn-wLr2DA%3D%3D)

name: Griffin, Press Secretary
subject: It’s not too late!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | | Friend, Just reaching out with a quick reminder that our bi-annual Congress of Counties is just around the corner, and it’s not too late to sign up! **THE DEADLINE TO REGISTER IS FEBRUARY 19TH AT 5 PM. **** **This two-day networking and training event will be held in downtown Indianapolis February 23-24 – and will be a great chance to get to know your fellow Hoosier Republicans ahead of the November general election and pick up some key insights into helping ensure Republicans win big in 2024.** ** Follow this secure link for more info and to sign up today: **[https://indiana.gop/congressofcounties](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/da0b6eea78c9e7443947229f28c3afba/37316ff6acd3ddfec3d6b838967d376c/40313)**** Space is limited, so please don’t wait to **[lock in your spot!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/da0b6eea78c9e7443947229f28c3afba/f4985aac4d92be68c3d6b838967d376c/40313) **** \- Griffin, Press Secretary

name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Suing Ellison: an Update
body:
A podcast you need to see | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/lawsuit-podcast?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

As you may know, I am suing Keith Ellison and the Minnesota Board of Medical Practice. Why am I doing this? What is the update? What may be the outcome?

I wanted to provide you an update in the form of a podcast with my attorney. I was joined by Upper Midwest Law Center's James Dickey and we discussed the precedent we're hoping to set for free speech and professionals all over the country. Listen to this [critical podcast update by clicking here for audio](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=90e8c337b8&e=9828080a05) or clicking the [video thumbnail below](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=b55b58affa&e=9828080a05) to watch on YouTube:
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=c32df24e50&e=9828080a05 "The Dr. Scott Jensen Podcast Ep 35 | Lawsuit")
---
| I've said it before and I'll say it again: we'll take these suits as far as we possibly can to increase transparency and set a new precedent for free speech.

No one should have their career and livelihood threatened by government for having political opinions that are considered "out of the mainstream." If you'd like to continue to support me in this effort, you can do so at my [GiveSendGo](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=c66290773a&e=9828080a05) account. Please be sure to [listen](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=73ae66f753&e=9828080a05) or [watch this important conversation](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=eef69f2c84&e=9828080a05).

I'm grateful for your support and your prayers.

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor
---
|
---

name: Hillsdale College via Full Mag News
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a4df02f94c9419b8a6b8086be5aca26&_e=mGMg5Kp847QNphCabATlccDdo7Kvfz7w6xe774Y0GieLiq_xiGp6GDSDT8jUjZeqWwoh3ocAu15ZJuLpDp3VD8qFUd8EoKIw2waNvpxXn-MQZWVoZzAD4RstYXDNzGR5uu4CYyNweorX9P0SIDE_n8Fehghze1FXZXp3vzkWaz7SkChzJ4gU25XfKYgEk6HdAtzx4w3EtSosp0S-eW6U9npLCk87_s1_sHLhEnZcO2YbSAvrjPkT7oS1ULkoyfSyF7n9uyndXsxaGfDGa88p1hIYTMff0DtiMn3emMIMfm8o_uG7RvM6YtlvpanP-gbl73GJU2fyHPsf4EX-ju8RpYvH6uC1PMVvsv30zfG-kWn0gE5nMeTEzSiunj6J5FibG-lBy5IHolwpvhWG3q-pEg%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a4df02f94c9419b8a6b8086be5aca26&_e=mGMg5Kp847QNphCabATlccDdo7Kvfz7w6xe774Y0GieLiq_xiGp6GDSDT8jUjZeqWwoh3ocAu15ZJuLpDp3VD8qFUd8EoKIw2waNvpxXn-MQZWVoZzAD4RstYXDNzGR5uu4CYyNweorX9P0SIDE_n8Fehghze1FXZXp3vzkWaz7SkChzJ4gU25XfKYgEk6HdAtzx4w3EtSosp0S-eW6U9npLCk87_s1_sHLhEnZcO2YbSAvrjPkT7oS1ULkoyfSyP4_3A4sKGGPxKgIPs7QBzcFk9flK2Ad0bMxMGCyOqh7wP4PBTZTA9_1Pj8bCltr-LQ1a3a_o-Mxl94tUb-_SGvG4wxGolCgNiDSXJL926v9kvtbgqjSSW_kKCITKDSsz-7s60gmKgceXLCJM-j1mwA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a4df02f94c9419b8a6b8086be5aca26&_e=mGMg5Kp847QNphCabATlccDdo7Kvfz7w6xe774Y0GieLiq_xiGp6GDSDT8jUjZeqWwoh3ocAu15ZJuLpDp3VD8qFUd8EoKIw2waNvpxXn-MQZWVoZzAD4RstYXDNzGR5uu4CYyNweorX9P0SIDE_n8Fehghze1FXZXp3vzkWaz7SkChzJ4gU25XfKYgEk6HdAtzx4w3EtSosp0S-eW6U9npLCk87_s1_sHLhEnZcO2YbSAvrjPkT7oS1ULkoyfSyuxvrYJKlebIFKD5_Heh4vKlokCKuakZ6HUMXXyd5olPtRLk4CIdGzvdIi2Pr7HB5KD2KSsTf1HweaUOwu7Ep6m7F6_vvFUvBtL0QFto1xU-nFASnGBJ8gOYGQSrWk1M0o-zux1aLmpVgKB4vMBBvYw%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
