clean_body: This initiative is not merely about economic reform. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative. What is their plan, and what does it mean for America? In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life. This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts. Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you. In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan. Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox. Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty. Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
After the Respect for Marriage Act was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law

|
---
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21fb7cf8c963493195a294389a65cd44&_e=HtZpm8X1m2bJeSJC43vEXpU9-_qh2eCj2WkSxZD6v_IoFRnh0pQmpKOn-40g_1mHlyz3kYj6M91DOQvlY3NaCbBUyEDo8NHTRmYfad3539UGTfRItDbiE7Pg08zRvQ-RHTPRKRaebSvwb-ZiacbK21h7m14OBn4Y-7jR2sgxGA13w6IeXusQci14tukrPw1_se2U78-Ucv4SbTm0WQwhp6yziXktY5o99yfLF6IRMGH2eeu-wXUvO3ztfE922CvJsBw8rxAKj8o1vIpn26H7g72h0Jh2opE6GGTYOqo_KOX0JQNxOFdTeEYPTu2iqvDTLZ1Lg8QdKymcohQTioZKBP3dLjqwgXvGoBxp3wP-LRA3AIyHaM5FmUgH3V2LX-bxCNY2WT561PYepEnLn5hov14anA59p0a_4FluPcYt27s%3D)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21fb7cf8c963493195a294389a65cd44&_e=HtZpm8X1m2bJeSJC43vEXpU9-_qh2eCj2WkSxZD6v_IoFRnh0pQmpKOn-40g_1mHlyz3kYj6M91DOQvlY3NaCbBUyEDo8NHTRmYfad3539UGTfRItDbiE7Pg08zRvQ-RHTPRKRaebSvwb-ZiacbK21h7m14OBn4Y-7jR2sgxGA13w6IeXusQci14tukrPw1_se2U78-Ucv4SbTm0WQwhp6yziXktY5o99yfLF6IRMGH2eeu-wXUvO3ztfE922CvJsBw8rxAKj8o1vIpn26H7g3AwW6iZ3Y9hyfE_2at-EA_GDgwG0CT5tg5TfYE4XIO-n42aF6zUVjot5PN3yp1lzefNsKv7tBtL6uBSga6T0rFn5ZrREz0mD9_SaGfvgKbbHceQxliH9kojK09WDJDBmP0SUD1-bU-5daJMBVh9xmo%3D) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21fb7cf8c963493195a294389a65cd44&_e=HtZpm8X1m2bJeSJC43vEXpU9-_qh2eCj2WkSxZD6v_IoFRnh0pQmpKOn-40g_1mHlyz3kYj6M91DOQvlY3NaCbBUyEDo8NHTRmYfad3539UGTfRItDbiE7Pg08zRvQ-RHTPRKRaebSvwb-ZiacbK21h7m14OBn4Y-7jR2sgxGA13w6IeXusQci14tukrPw1_se2U78-Ucv4SbTm0WQwhp6yziXktY5o99yfLF6IRMGH2eeu-wXUvO3ztfE922CvJsBw8rxAKj8o1vIpn26H7g_zmIIDMZO5HzHhXKnowNEO5EUTw-p8u0ViYHfE0atimledNoDY0-R-F1AGPFcKnqrlvv6jM_Z7omM_UDgbM-jHLx1jU8TMa0MRT1-UrclORZtzC6I21edp0kqKZ1pq-27ACKdoxPY0wMZ27NEsuZQI%3D)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=21fb7cf8c963493195a294389a65cd44&_e=HtZpm8X1m2bJeSJC43vEXpU9-_qh2eCj2WkSxZD6v_IoFRnh0pQmpKOn-40g_1mHlyz3kYj6M91DOQvlY3NaCbBUyEDo8NHTRmYfad3539UGTfRItDbiE7Pg08zRvQ-RHTPRKRaebSvwb-ZiacbK21h7m14OBn4Y-7jR2sgxGA13w6IeXusQci14tukrPw1_se2U78-Ucv4SbTm0WQwhp6yziXktY5o99yfLF6IRMGH2eeu-wXUvO3ztfE922CvJsBw8rxAKj8o1vIpn26H7g55SFqyQNI0gaj2WJkDhdo7Kzpvm25GuFYMv96MFUX7TN3a3yD043i-qcKdxyCwHcQTY5-5bj-oDhAvrboZP0486tST1lAYIpYyzeaxYQVbDqu8m1Bd0_pw2LzbdxSIDkFwDnCMi3tNnzq-svYQx0MM%3D)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Truth:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is running a campaign of telling the truth to the American people

|
---
| | | **Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is running a campaign of telling the truth to the American people
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=truth_2_06_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
“Trust the experts! It’s settled science!”
This is what we were told by the pharmaceutical industry, government bureaucrats and the media when the COVID vaccines were introduced.
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s immediate response: “‘Trust the experts’ is not science and there is no such thing as ‘settled science.’” He went on to speak out against the lack of proper testing for COVID vaccines. When he exposed that the vaccines are exempt from pre-licensing safety testing – they don’t have to be tested, and many of them are not – the powers that be went after him with a vengeance.
He didn’t back down. He took on these powerful groups not because he’s “anti-vax” but because he is a crusader for truth. He fought for transparency. Get the facts out there and let the American people decide.
Because of this stance, his biggest critic and mudslinger became Dr. Anthony Fauci of the NIAID. This is the same Dr. Fauci who, during a congressional hearing a couple of weeks ago, admitted that the 6-foot social distancing mandate that led to lockdowns and the destruction of our economy “just sort of appeared” and had no basis in science. Fauci is also the man who funded the bioweapons research that caused the COVID pandemic. He despises RFK Jr. for exposing the truth about this dangerous, illegal research as well as Dr. Fauci’s role in the cover up.
RFK Jr. stood up for the American people. He called out Fauci’s illegal gain-of-function research and sought to hold him and his accomplices accountable for their actions.
As a result, Dr. Fauci and his accomplices in the NIH, CDC, and Big Pharma have called RFK Jr. an “anti-vaxxer.” Nothing could be further from the truth.
RFK Jr. believes in vaccines – safe, properly-tested vaccines. He’s used his vast knowledge of medical research and medical testing, along with his favorable public profile and his bully pulpit, to speak truth to power. The American people deserve to have all the facts.
BUT he is not running on vaccines. The only time he talks about vaccines is when someone asks him about it. He is running a campaign of _telling the truth to the American people, including truths that they don’t want to hear_.
He will continue this in the White House.
This is why his favorability rating is the highest among all candidates and his campaign has built the fastest growing populist coalition of left, right, and center. By transparency! Help RFK Jr. bring transparency to our government and our lives.
[Join Team Kennedy and its campaign of truth with your gift of $10, $25 or what you can afford. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=truth_2_06_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=2)
[CONTRIBUTE $10 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=10&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=truth_2_06_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=3)
[CONTRIBUTE $25 >>](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?amount=25&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=truth_2_06_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=4)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT >> ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=truth_2_06_24_email_1rs_1_nd&n=5)
America needs a President not afraid to speak the truth. That President is Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
Team Kennedy

body:

**OFFICIAL POLL FROM PRESIDENT TRUMP** Friend, please don’t break my heart by answering question #1 wrong.
It’s the easiest question!
**I just want to know...**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Can I ask you a question?
body:
Our country’s in a real mess.

| |
---
| | | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu5907rh0r2pbcq9oi55sr54ipov889fkful8rs8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob6c9h2bs)
---

Friend,

I need to ask you a question.

Our country's in a real mess.

_And the question is, who 's going to fix it?_

With Donald Trump, Republicans have lost almost every competitive election. We lost the Senate. We lost the House. We lost the White House. We lost in 2018, in 2020, and in 2022.

The worst kept secret in politics is how badly the Democrats want to run against Trump. They know Trump is the only Republican in the country who Biden can defeat.

**But when you put me up against Joe Biden, I defeat Biden handily. **

We have a world on fire and a country in chaos. You can't fix the mess if you don't win the election. A Trump nomination is a Biden win and a Kamala Harris presidency.

**[So I'm asking, do you want to stay stuck in the past or move into a better future?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z56ln2oqq688e6jmudemhk3hmj3203dg0kiuiaog_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob6c9h2bs "So I’m asking, do you want to stay stuck in the past or move into a better future?") **

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zprp49vbm87a2f0qf199s93br1ucnsedbqp5855o_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob6c9h2bs)
---
| | [SUPPORT A NEW GENERATIONAL LEADER](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjgo515mmu8407fm8khgov9g8k2t32grbndadjgg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob6c9h2bs)
---

70% of Americans don't want a Trump-Biden rematch.

They don't want temper tantrums.

_They want normalcy. _

They don't want vengeance.

_They want sanity. _

And when you look at Trump, you're seeing him throw temper tantrum after temper tantrum when he doesn't get his way.

You're seeing him say he'll bar anyone from the MAGA camp who supports me.

You're seeing him focus on vengeance instead of talking about the out-of-control spending and inflation, or about how we were going to get kids reading again, or about securing the border and stopping the lawlessness, or about the wars that are happening around us.

Instead, all he does is talk about himself.

That's a problem, Friend!

Because this isn't about Donald Trump -- this is about where we go in America.

**America deserves better!**

We deserve a new direction under new conservative leadership.

We deserve a president who will focus on the needs of our people, not on themselves.

We deserve a president who will rebuild our economy, close our border, and stand up to our enemies.

**_And most importantly, we deserve a president who will stop our self-loathing, end the division and fear, and make America strong and proud!_**

**Our campaign is the last best hope of stopping another Trump-Biden nightmare. I am committed to the fight, but I cannot do it alone.**

**[Will you chip in a donation today?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ziusi2nlapc1bb4javmd1n0rfq26s9aa2ogj6p6o_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob6c9h2bs "Will you chip in a donation today?")**

Thank you for everything.

Let's do this!
---

My very best,
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zinl6qbfpot123mva9gcdu48h29oldistrie9cf8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob6c9h2bs)
---
Nikki Haley

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhq9gh931rho7pqofvo2u4ukggmrv8pl6uclarm0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob6c9h2bs)
---
| | | | |
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zan35b0l0cdaltpt4dq04bp6jqa013ghjnakdu30_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob6c9h2bs "NikkiHaley_Merch")
---
| | [GET YOUR HAT NOW](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4acjf82h2i6j4ve16je69ovf9jesaa23fb0q81o_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob6c9h2bs "Claim Your Mug")
---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z637qg71094ptqr4jvsdv7c37aq2oig780idg6mo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob6c9h2bs "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6hcklnggg0jru9g7sgj335d0rgvusibafb0ts90_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob6c9h2bs "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

---
| | [DONATE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z440kbkirn0o865vjm34o6slj7mhmaeh3um9l7ho_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob6c9h2bs "DONATE")
---

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: This bill is an utter betrayal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
It’s dead on arrival, Friend.

| | |
---

---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqsehrjqd2771jbk3u9ue0lsc39t63nr074d21go_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob1c1h2bs)
---
Friend, Chuck Schumer has kept his so-called “border deal” under wraps for weeks – and now we know why. **_[**_The bill he and the open-borders left have created is an utter betrayal of all Americans._**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkjh56okhm2ssvfvbp2ppip2o5sombqv8g7j0ap0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob1c1h2bs)_**_**_**
I need you to stand with me in sending a message to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer: **[**We The People will not accept this!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4vpa6c765qf0p15gg91mtns8u5782l47pm10i6g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob1c1h2bs)******
---
[ **SEND A MESSAGE TO SCHUMER & BIDEN**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhu836lt8n09alt1r69r2v2gitv3rhpfvr6kffso_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob1c1h2bs)**
---
Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to allow 5,000 unvetted foreign nationals PER DAY to enter through the southern border. That’s 150,000 per month. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free HEALTHCARE. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free CELL PHONES. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free HOTEL ROOMS. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free FLIGHTS. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free FOOD STAMPS. Chuck Schumer & Joe Biden want to give them free LEGAL REPRESENTATION. **_[And Chuck Schumer& Joe Biden want to give the American people the Bill.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkcgfheted91151lblv9o445jot20sspl4ectq58_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob1c1h2bs)_**_** **_[**_THIS ABSOLUTELY WILL NOT STAND!_**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhoae8rsn40cmgel9phu1nlkd8gr8rq2qfa7edi0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob1c1h2bs)_**_**_** Here’s my threefold promise to you: 1\. If and when this bill makes its way to the House of Representatives, it will be DEAD ON ARRIVAL. 2\. I, along with House Republicans, will do everything in our power to force Biden and the Open-Border Democrats to the negotiating table – including but not limited to **_[**_IMPEACHING SEC. MAYORKAS._**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z32a569pupiu1h1u6mpd698it3ff24m5npjrj0t8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob1c1h2bs)_**_**_ ** 3\. We will refuse to settle for anything less than a FULLY SECURE Southern Border. Friend, if we don’t defend and grow the GOP House majority this November, we’ll be forced to go along with at least two more years of this lawless insanity. I need your help to build the warchest we need to END the Left’s open-borders agenda and send Biden and Schumer a LOUD and CLEAR message.
---
[ **SEND A MESSAGE <> GROW THE MAJORITY**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z38spdkce94d434aunoadm3hds7oetopdnh8th8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob1c1h2bs)**
---
We can’t do this without your help, Friend. Sincerely,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3vtsn9p30geh9j4ic7knmo3p11i8q1g0npb1bmg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm4ob1c1h2bs)
---
Speaker Mike Johnson

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nuestro=20PAC?=
subject: Nuestro PAC Appoints Roberto Nava as Political Director Ahead of 2024 General Election
body:
Roberto Nava- New Political Director for Nuestro PAC | |
---
| | |
#### Nuestro PAC Appoints Roberto Nava as Political Director Ahead of 2024 General Election
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| February 6, 2024 Washington, DC- Nuestro PAC, a political action committee dedicated to mobilizing Latino voters in support of progressive Democratic candidates, is pleased to announce the appointment of Roberto Nava as its new Political Director. This strategic move comes as the PAC gears up for the crucial 2024 general election, with a focused mission to empower and rally Latinos in key races across the nation. Roberto Nava, the son of an immigrant father from Peru and a Puerto Rican mother, brings a unique blend of cultural understanding and political experience to Nuestro PAC. His upbringing in Puerto Rico fostered a deep personal connection to the Latino community.
---
|
---
| As Political Director, Nava will be responsible for overseeing the strategic planning and execution of campaigns aimed at increasing Latino voter turnout and support for progressive Democrats in Texas, California and other states. “ _I am very excited about Roberto joining our team. His experience in Congress and his role reaching out to Latinos in the President's campaign are exactly what Nuestro PAC needs. Roberto brings a fresh burst of energy and new ideas that will be pivotal in our efforts to elect progressive Democrats across the country_.” - Chuck Rocha Nuestro PAC remains committed to its mission of ensuring that the voices of Latino Americans are heard loud and clear in the political arena. With Roberto, the PAC is poised to make a substantial impact in the upcoming elections, furthering its goal of progressive representation and advocacy for Latino communities across the United States. For more information, please contact: info@nuestropac.com
---

| A note from Russell...
The people of New Hampshire are ready for a change in our representation in Congress, whether it's rising energy costs, the broken southern border, or a lack of support for our men and women in law enforcement. New Hampshire families know that our current leadership in Washington is failing us and have forgotten the 'Live Free or Die' values that we all pride ourselves on in New Hampshire. We need a fresh voice who has the business and elected experience to change the status quo. United, we can defeat Chris Pappas and bring real change to Washington.
Thank you.
-Russell

name: Pastor Paul Castelli
subject: My big brother is the right man
body:
Hello Patriot!

__I 'm Pastor Paul Castelli__ _._Pastor of Crosspoint Church in Florida_. _

I love my Big Brother.

Christian Castelli is an example of selfless service.

Christian served our country in uniform as a Special Forces soldier and Green Beret.

God, Country and Family are not simply words for Christian, but priorities he holds dear and promises to always protect.

Christian Castelli took an oath to protect and defend the Constitution. I assure you it's an oath Christian will never break.

America faces real challenges here at home and abroad, and there is no better qualified candidate in this race to represent the citizens, families, and communities of the 6th Congressional District of North Carolina.

Christian Castelli is an America First Patriot.

As your congressman, Christian Castelli will:
* Close and Secure our Border
* Eliminate Inflation and Joe Biden's Failed Policies
* Cut Spending and Waste
* Defend Freedom and the U.S. Constitution. Always.

**The election is less than a month away._Early Voting begins Feb. 15 and Election Day is March 5._ Please vote for Christian Castelli for Congress.**

**Christian is working day and night. Help Christian finish the mission strong. Consider a contribution of $500, $250, $100, $50, $35 or whatever you can afford TODAY!**

[****](https://secure.winred.com/committee-to-elect-christian-castelli/donate-today)

Paul Castelli
Lead Pastor, Crosspoint Church of Florida
Volunteer Deputy Sheriff

This email was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** from **info@castellifornc.com**.
If you do not wish to receive further messages from us, [ please click here to unsubscribe](https://emailtracking-cm.aristotle.com/frmEmailUnsubscribe.aspx?databaseId=b33a3810-9cbf-4584-a3d2-01672886537a&activityID=3d698d9d-f179-4d8b-a08a-b6f2a7aabe22).

name: Andrew Wynne (FCA)
subject: ready for another crime wave? 😰
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
Here’s where the chaos at the border leads...

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8u9a1vdpnp1k2m5gqrbve61hp67cuf1omjinsho_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm6o32c1h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, If you think what’s happening at our southern border is bad... _**just wait until you see what comes next.**_**_ Why do I say that? **Because chaos at the border leads to chaos in our community.**** Illegal immigrants who smuggle fentanyl into our country bring with them a criminal mindset that needs to be stopped. **_When law and order breaks down at our southern border, maintaining it in the rest of our country is more important than ever._**
_**
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zejd3amsr9i5da9rc2ft1a66ib0pm2io1gqdliq8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm6o32c1h2bs)
---
[SECURE THE BORDER](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjtj5e98m0p676onc3uogu9q716kev50m478r570_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm6o32c1h2bs)
---
Every level in our justice system has a role to play:
* **District Attorneys** must bring charges, quickly prosecute offenders, and instruct federal immigration officials to deport those convicted of dangerous crimes. **
* **Judges** must deny bail to dangerous criminals with no ties to the community or who are in the country illegally.**
* **And judicial officials at every level** must step up to the plate and demand accountability.**

**_[ Unfortunately, many of these positions have been filled with Soros-funded radicals who think their job is to advance a far-left agenda, NOT maintain the rule of law.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3ood3ihbfg726uvmmebnir40u58qi941gq6pffo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm6o32c1h2bs)_**_** Fellow Patriot, I’m urgently reaching out to you to join our movement. The crisis is upon us — and we need every conservative who supports law and order on our team. **_[Fair Courts America](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc0ko6d3c4i5ooft0i8vbtp96mpmok56vetl4p90_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm6o32c1h2bs)_ supports the men and women who serve as judges and district attorneys who answer the call to protect our communities, especially when the Biden Administration refuses to enforce the border. We help strong judicial leaders win — and help stop radical candidates from infiltrating our justice system.**
_ **
---
[I WANT TO HELP](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq1atj5p929jsr1t31tdl0o2g2b22od7fa7eo0d0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm6o32c1h2bs)
---
But tracking all of these local races across the country is a massive undertaking — which is why there has not yet been a concerted effort to fight back against the network of George Soros’s dark money influence... _until now.__ **We’re taking Soros on, head-to-head, but we can't do it without the support of patriots like you.**** He has already funneled $40 MILLION dollars into his judicial takeover... if we hope to keep up with that, we NEED your help. **_[Will you donate to help us help our embattled judges and prosecutors before the NEXT crime wave hits?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi9lrfcqgu9ltb6pt9o48qit4vdb10ovvh1sultg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm6o32c1h2bs)_**
_**

[ **CONTRIBUTE $15**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsnsdtcp0o23r48i9mh1cr3e6i89tgqn79pfkphg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm6o32c1h2bs)**

[ **CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf8qkmnsmiss0e8216o44vp4u4m3ii8at5sglg4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9gm6o32c1h2bs)**

name: Andrew Wynne (FCA)
subject: what comes after the border crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
Here’s where the chaos at the border leads...

| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683827%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O8EweEVxEc9zUGneTetKPw&sysid=1)
---
Fellow Patriot, If you think what’s happening at our southern border is bad... _**just wait until you see what comes next.**_ Why do I say that? **Because chaos at the border leads to chaos in our community.** Illegal immigrants who smuggle fentanyl into our country bring with them a criminal mindset that needs to be stopped. **_When law and order breaks down at our southern border, maintaining it in the rest of our country is more important than ever._**

---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683828%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p9EWkigX3le3nwMyBs4uSA&sysid=1)
---
[SECURE THE BORDER](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683829%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EC9fYTT2Y56V0XMO6IQ%2big&sysid=1)
---
Every level in our justice system has a role to play:
* **District Attorneys** must bring charges, quickly prosecute offenders, and instruct federal immigration officials to deport those convicted of dangerous crimes.
* **Judges** must deny bail to dangerous criminals with no ties to the community or who are in the country illegally.
* **And judicial officials at every level** must step up to the plate and demand accountability.

**_[ Unfortunately, many of these positions have been filled with Soros-funded radicals who think their job is to advance a far-left agenda, NOT maintain the rule of law.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683820%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iunT%2fAPop0vjYuPiN4RAcw&sysid=1)_** Fellow Patriot, I’m urgently reaching out to you to join our movement. The crisis is upon us -- and we need every conservative who supports law and order on our team. **_[Fair Courts America](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683828%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=p9EWkigX3le3nwMyBs4uSA&sysid=1)_ supports the men and women who serve as judges and district attorneys who answer the call to protect our communities, especially when the Biden Administration refuses to enforce the border. We help strong judicial leaders win -- and help stop radical candidates from infiltrating our justice system.**

---
[I WANT TO HELP](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683821%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S5J76hC90NiZ13OcP6jnaQ&sysid=1)
---
But tracking all of these local races across the country is a massive undertaking -- which is why there has not yet been a concerted effort to fight back against the network of George Soros’s dark money influence... _until now._ **We’re taking Soros on, head-to-head, but we can't do it without the support of patriots like you.** He has already funneled $40 MILLION dollars into his judicial takeover... if we hope to keep up with that, we NEED your help. **_[Will you donate to help us help our embattled judges and prosecutors before the NEXT crime wave hits?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683822%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Sz41YppPJhVtGwW2KAQ4qw&sysid=1)_**

---
| | [ **CONTRIBUTE $10**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683823%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PuXkuCBeOVPx1XN2NLA8RQ&sysid=1)
---
[ **CONTRIBUTE $15**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683824%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Y6aahpQueDdbYQ8JekAJvw&sysid=1)
---
[ **CONTRIBUTE $25**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683835%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4fA4Ki6JYGSOoLGgLUhwog&sysid=1)
---
[ **CONTRIBUTE $50**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683836%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0GGe1uUxTP9vyhhBVVnCDA&sysid=1)
---
[ **CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683837%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4Wq7PuvPmCW5WWaNx7qFJA&sysid=1)
---
Thank you,
---
Andrew Wynne Executive Director | Fair Courts America

body:
we didn’t think we had to say that, but...

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78486008/453535150/-312956818?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTE2OWUxNC1mOWM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4J4Cqx8IBw6Nkdw5TG6f6slf5duncISRhHm96dp28R8=&emci=1068ec93-ccbf-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=81169e14-f9c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172) Are you on other political email lists, team? If you are, you’ve probably seen dozens of gimmicky emails saying that if you don’t donate _right now_ our entire way of life will come to an end. Too many other politicians and organizations use scare tactics and pathetic entreaties to convince you to donate. We aren’t going to do that. **At NextGen, we treat our supporters with a little more respect than that. ** So instead of scaring you into getting out your wallet, we want to inspire you to take action. Instead of guilt trips and lies about 15X donation matches, we want to provide value and information to you in a world where misinformation runs rampant. But here’s the truth: Just like every other politician and organization out there, we do rely on your contributions to make a difference. NextGen is working hard to empower the youth vote to take a stand at the polls in November and fight for progress. But we’re not going to scare you or guilt trip you into making a donation. We’re going to tell you the truth and ask nicely. **[So team, if you’re able, will you chip in right now to help us continue the fight to empower the youth vote in America?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78486009/453535151/-1231267993?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS85OTMyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MTE2OWUxNC1mOWM0LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4J4Cqx8IBw6Nkdw5TG6f6slf5duncISRhHm96dp28R8=&emci=1068ec93-ccbf-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=81169e14-f9c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=6787172)**

The Senate Majority is Up to You

Friend,

We're at a difficult spot in this primary fundraising push... [**And I need your help.**](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=78b88c8af491484cb4da25edd112079f&_e=2P-3FgdNB-lfXJ2x_BOpRPwVTuy7MgwHI2QYDE7xpK4HfUC5Px_c7MiYAaVOPBKL-cHStjbvd6jlrH6JfcE9lI_VnKz8mdsSfCCtGmw-j_5ygBN07X5qwQoUFvFQBjfzR2a6v2-MDbi4YzXq_pYPqS0DUX-3QTpmTzwGOIrNmuC9YZqIE92nRrO4A6QI_ZbM1ydU9nni3iaGAjQjUMLAHHnwhhZQQqzEWBj5Hz6D2PDxmaiyVZLWxvSM70C3gELO67rduyGDnRzWl3V0fo3IzNtzXVL07A6Rlx2-KC9Y6jmfm_VY3ruExYRd82tUXC0c_meBLfTfpL9BV6beUQ0sMw%3D%3D)

Indiana deserves honesty.

Indiana deserves an America First Fighter in the Senate.

[**_You could have double the impact on the future of Indiana and America if you choose to pitch in here._**](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=78b88c8af491484cb4da25edd112079f&_e=2P-3FgdNB-lfXJ2x_BOpRPwVTuy7MgwHI2QYDE7xpK4HfUC5Px_c7MiYAaVOPBKL-cHStjbvd6jlrH6JfcE9lI_VnKz8mdsSfCCtGmw-j_5ygBN07X5qwQoUFvFQBjfzR2a6v2-MDbi4YzXq_pYPqS0DUX-3QTpmTzwGOIrNmuChu2KzAaaHaJz_hNsQVeF2c-XOKDNqiZ7zlPAi5kHYAdi_UKgm_FvZVuzpWd6aIEOWDlDNuS-khPCM0LZZ_Kxcd0U8T_xeneMfm95gutB0e84AAV6VMd3kIvhxnUNVaj7VVoPwa4KlaUe3ww8GSmTT2iyt2hZ2daq-waaMFKWc8g%3D%3D)

clean_body: The Senate Majority is Up to You | Friend, We're at a difficult spot in this primary fundraising push... The Senate Majority hangs in the balance this November, and we need all hands on deck to be prepared. At the same time, I have a lifelong Democrat voter running against me in this primary. A candidate who is backed by George Soros in his run against me. Indiana deserves better. Indiana deserves honesty. Indiana deserves an America First Fighter in the Senate. So, my team just told me that we have been authorized to that come in the door A Senate Majority controlled by the Far Left could lead to the further desecration of conservative ideals and America First leadership we have fought so hard for. So, needless to say, we have a lot of work to do, and we need all your support to get it done. The most important part of all of this is | We need you today! | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2024 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

body:
Do you feel prepared for potential collapse of the Economic and Health Systems?

https://1776foreverfree.com?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID
1776 Newsletter - December 2022

** Elections Are Over, Covid Scam Mandates Have Subsided, So Where Do We Go From Here?
------------------------------------------------------------
Do you find yourself lost and wondering how to get involved and make an impact on a local, State and National level? There are currently no campaigns that need your participation, no mandates to mask up, vax up and rob you of your parental and medical freedoms to fight against. Corrupt Government and Big Pharma would love for you to believe that there is nothing to fight for right now. Everything has gone back to "normal", and you are supposed to forget the past two years where you lost income and unconstitutional mandates kept you shackled. Now is the time to unite and educate yourself! 1776 Forever Free is bound and determined to educate everyone who is willing to listen. Open your eyes to the agenda of the far left, prepare yourself for the fight on the horizon. We buried our heads in the sand long enough, believing that the government had our best interests in mind. We see now that our passivism only led to loss of our freedoms and our God Given Rights.

** The far left and main stream media want to sexualize our children, emasculate our men, change our history books and remove all resemblance of morality.
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.dropbox.com/s/8whglps0fm94psr/cordie%20and%20alex.mov?dl=0&mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID

Watch our very own Dr. Cordie Williams as he exposes the corruption in our local schools. Sebastian Gorka is a fighting patriot willing to stick his neck out for our children. Get in the fight with us! Go to your local school boards and demand the removal of all sexually explicit and immoral books in your children's curriculum and libraries.

If not YOU, WHO? If not NOW, WHEN? YOU were made for such a time as this!!

God Bless You and Semper Fi,
Dr. Cordie Williams
USMC Veteran
Founder of 1776 Forever Free

https://www.dropbox.com/s/kruqrgyv1tely3l/IMG_0656.MOV?dl=0&mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID

New Videos On How To Run A Successful Campaign by Dr. Cordie Williams (Former US Senate Candidate for California):

The left have been organized and heavily funded when it comes to campaigning for their candidates. They are united in their efforts. It is high time we catch up and become the political party that takes back our State and our Nation. How can this be accomplished? Well for starters we need to kick Campaign Management companies to the curb, many are extorters and liars. Save your time and money and gain a new perspective on how to get in the mud, get dirty and fight like a marine.

** Free Shipping on $50+ Merch Orders!
------------------------------------------------------------

Check out our 1776 Forever Free trucker hat that features a Permacurv® visor and our Organic cotton tote - two staples that can be used year round!
https://www.shop1776foreverfree.com/product-page/1776-forever-free-trucker-cap?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID

https://www.shop1776foreverfree.com/product-page/1776-large-organic-tote-bag?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID

SHOP 1776 MERCH (https://www.shop1776foreverfree.com/?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID)

** California Corrupts The Minds Of Our Youth As We Stand Idly By!
------------------------------------------------------------

Dr. Cordie Williams and Shawn Ferosh unpack the evil that is consuming our children's minds and blocking Christian values in our society today.
https://rumble.com/v20jnwi-satanic-public-education-corrupting-the-minds-of-american-youth-american-fi.html?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID

**
Justice For COVID Tyranny
------------------------------------------------------------
After Tuesday November 7th's special runoff election ended with Democratic incumbent Raphael Warnock maintaining a 1+ Dem seat majority in the senate, post-midterms, the U.S. government, lawmakers at Capitol Hill, and mainstream media pundits trudge along with "business as usual".

Late Tuesday night, December 6th, bipartisan leadership in both houses agreed on a $858 billion military policy bill that would terminate the Pentagon’s mandate that troops receive the COVID-19 vaccine, much to the dismay of the Biden Administration.

In the inevitable rollback process, will it be business as usual? Or will the millions of impacted lives, the billions of dollars of lost income, the permanent damage to personal health, the unnecessary death of loved ones, be accounted for?
https://rumble.com/v20jlxu-justice-for-covid-tyranny-unalienable-right-dr.-cordie-williams-and-shawn-f.html?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID
Watch Here >> (https://rumble.com/v1nem86-california-declares-war-on-the-medical-profession.-cordie-williams-with-seb.html?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID)
https://1776foreverfree.com/volunteer-application/?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID

We need passionate people who are looking to make a difference.
1. Do you have an extra hour or two a week available?
2. Are you organized, or willing to learn?
3. Are you ready to use your God-given skills to help 1776?

We would love to have you on our volunteer team!

Volunteer Application (https://1776foreverfree.com/volunteer-application/?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID)
We need to start a conversation where the other side is not "Made wrong," but where a conversation starts that bridges the gap between what they think they know from fake news to what the constitution really says.

**
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Idea?! A Constitution Video Series
------------------------------------------------------------
These powerful videos would include an interview with Doug Gibbs about pertinent matters of the day, and at the end of each video you would have take-home nuggets where you could start discipling to other people about the constitution.

** We are trying to raise $10,000 to do a 3 part video series involving training candidates.
------------------------------------------------------------
As a non-profit, we are incredibly grateful for all of the donations that have come in. YOU make what we do possible. This video series has been on our hearts for some time now, and we believe we can make this happen with your help!

Donate Here >> (https://1776foreverfree.com/donate/?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID)
Coalition
Several others and I, after God gave me the vision and direction have formed a Coalition to accomplish (2) objectives:
1. To take down the RINO's, DM me on IG or email me at cordie@cordie4senate.com (mailto:cordie@cordie4senate.com) , to get more on that objective. (We have to be somewhat hush-hush as the forces of evil are never ending in their pursuit to ruin me, and this Republic.
2. Support Candidates with Money, Fundraising people to hold events, provide a social media following for them, Church connections so they have a stage to reach the masses. We feel that candidates that have leverage are candidates that win. Grassroots organizations like the California Tea Party Caucus and the CRA, "The California Republican Assembly," should be stepping up to lead California. Well, they are, but they need you and I. Get involved and become a CRA member and inquire about how you can help 1776 with the Coalition.

CRA Membership Info (https://cragop.org/join-cra/?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID)

** OUR SPONSORS
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.mypillow.com?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID
https://athleticism.com?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID

https://uncletonysitaliancuisine.com?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID

https://healthfromwithinca.com?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID

http://www.discoverbeautyfromwithin.com?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID

1776 Forever Free is a 501c3 and does not endorse any candidate!
Any interviews conducted is solely educational.

============================================================

Follow our social media to stay informed of the latest videos, news & events!

** JOIN Dr Cordie Lee Williams 1776 Freedom Fighters Telegram Group (http://t.me/DrCordie?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** Dr. Cordie's Website (https://drcordiewilliams.com/?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** 1776 Forever Free Website (https://1776foreverfree.com?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** Follow Dr. Cordie on Twitter (https://twitter.com/drcordiew?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** Dr. Cordie's Instagram (http://instagram.com/drcordiewilliams?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** @1776foreverfree (https://www.instagram.com/1776foreverfree/?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** YouTube (https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCB9oE15xobnPR06qbF2x89A?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** 1776 Forever Free Facebook Page (https://www.facebook.com/1776ForeverFree?mc_cid=b3bd5e46f8&mc_eid=UNIQID)
** General Contact Email (mailto:info@1776foreverfree.com)
* 1776 Forever Free is a nonprofit community organization supporting all Americans’ Constitutional Rights *

MISSION:
1776 Forever Free is a 501(c)3 which focuses on actively educating Americans of their Constitutional Rights, regardless of political party, gender, race, religion, or creed. This is a movement to empower our fellow Patriots to recognize societal issues, inspire others, and most importantly, take action. We need you Patriots, here and abroad, to bring Freedom back to our world for future generations.
EIN #85-4110665 State of California

Copyright © 2024 Dr. Cordie Williams 4 Senate, All rights reserved.
You are receiving this email because you signed up or donated to Dr. Cordie Williams 4 Senate.

Our mailing address is:
Dr. Cordie Williams 4 Senate
1818 Marron Rd Ste 103
103
Carlsbad, CA 92008-1188
USA
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://cordie4senate.us11.list-manage.com/profile?u=e5d6d5e535e64d56a3dbe6a1d&id=c3437b51a0&e=3c92f5cc01&c=b3bd5e46f8)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://cordie4senate.us11.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e5d6d5e535e64d56a3dbe6a1d&id=c3437b51a0&t=b&e=3c92f5cc01&c=b3bd5e46f8)
.

**_Biden administration proposes to close loophole on background checks_**

Friend, America is in the midst of a gun violence epidemic. There have already been more than 30 mass shootings in 2024 _alone_. Our children and communities are living in fear of gun assailants and violence every day. **But it doesn't have to be this way.**
There are simple gun safety reforms that _we know_ will curb gun violence and make our communities safer. The vast majority of Americans support basic reforms like expanded background checks.
Gun safety legislation shouldn't be a partisan issue. It's about protecting communities and preventing senseless deaths. But the far-right gun lobby is spending MILLIONS each year to stop commonsense legislation from becoming the law of the land. And each year, the cycle of mass shootings and violence continues.

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c897c21a8d4b30b5a486db58072ea7&_e=qD5CNOtASpw-ZFWjt4TGsrhGSRUzsetpUaXblX1Bqeh4hX0OYaZkPYOYMVzCQWJ_BN4aRGMWEyysIZ4gRhad2HosBvJ5kQIGpJhe4ZJ8kvsHIWXJZlilXgHnS9DFkCMOM1_4Ib7RwEaoD0HX2V0nztyFcecu_wNriFU_QfcL2ThIV6DhEUq66m0TA-DT7_HG7vaVDwSBhfX3_Qza5vuSAQCTESVs0hctwK5UMGTHTn7XtnrEftTuILWwr4O0F248WqUw-VeXH402c1ns15RAaEn1naO1Hqt73Rbl6nWtdtthKAvaysD7agQbasO7duobwN-HlV5OlxrT3E32Ety25AEdTwZfVQ7jlBD62QMyCge5lDVtd1u0lcaWlQt72rLHANpAqWSMf43vjVBe8mXFDA%3D%3D)
---
| | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c897c21a8d4b30b5a486db58072ea7&_e=qD5CNOtASpw-ZFWjt4TGsrhGSRUzsetpUaXblX1Bqeh4hX0OYaZkPYOYMVzCQWJ_BN4aRGMWEyysIZ4gRhad2HosBvJ5kQIGpJhe4ZJ8kvsHIWXJZlilXgHnS9DFkCMOM1_4Ib7RwEaoD0HX2V0nztyFcecu_wNriFU_QfcL2ThIV6DhEUq66m0TA-DT7_HG7vaVDwSBhfX3_Qza5vuSAQCTESVs0hctwK5UMGTHTn7XtnrEftTuILWwr4O0F248bGjmrGHWs__OYA8w4PhL9xfqvewB_8437k8Ga_yQoTHCLAfLquAyEsOxssJiupOppwkaEklg6HxBhxlT-Lq04JizkcN-PFCky6gesc9KNW37oNdE84gAKaiN1hZheApxtCcRiV5Ra3OXSmZnArh_2Q%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c897c21a8d4b30b5a486db58072ea7&_e=qD5CNOtASpw-ZFWjt4TGsrhGSRUzsetpUaXblX1Bqeh4hX0OYaZkPYOYMVzCQWJ_BN4aRGMWEyysIZ4gRhad2HosBvJ5kQIGpJhe4ZJ8kvsHIWXJZlilXgHnS9DFkCMOM1_4Ib7RwEaoD0HX2V0nztyFcecu_wNriFU_QfcL2ThIV6DhEUq66m0TA-DT7_HG7vaVDwSBhfX3_Qza5vuSAQCTESVs0hctwK5UMGTHTn7XtnrEftTuILWwr4O0F248EczbAIlqHO1j-dXnHVLqPmTk45YkzFm811q_b-gpttBR0LJ4UQCFNmPbw0JOq4oHGvhh_M5i29oiGm0Az00BI6oygWWlqWGb_T4bIKWr20Ltu0zXF5HYAXG4SBOFfIo2rYtSA7zoa1MJHDNYs_4i0g%3D%3D)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Becky Wagner
subject: Don’t let this hero dad go to prison
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15511f0e6c984b1cb1d4d99e4dd15b7b&_e=Ty8TqDZ6ec5bH0o1ot699ncjdvkkNQtI-5Yk9Nv3UNnRPIlKVJ3U0woWqXOtZhgQcoYMrE86S8prGdgDWgCw0lwjY2r5R5VPJRjUJP_4N77-cUbi9NiWfMbqb8MEf6fnvMzvbE406vI4hkKPwqnhNdNHV3Zlg7cSug1vcBOgilm1PBsLbC33qUSYzDaEh0IMJp_cZgozoApYUjUX61gV0Mzl-r_s7rUcZ0lSiaA9erwZ8tB6a1JxrqvF7-guBXwCC9rMOZaiChgxU-a7g_v_-OGYZDz7Vv6r3DCOe9-LeUnI6Mbxtez42c_qERfB7drsLG7c-xq_8Ij4oRR-Xhu9Chjdji1W12AhgLKiBKXGfz0%3D)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15511f0e6c984b1cb1d4d99e4dd15b7b&_e=Ty8TqDZ6ec5bH0o1ot699ncjdvkkNQtI-5Yk9Nv3UNnRPIlKVJ3U0woWqXOtZhgQcoYMrE86S8prGdgDWgCw0lwjY2r5R5VPJRjUJP_4N77-cUbi9NiWfMbqb8MEf6fnvMzvbE406vI4hkKPwqnhNdNHV3Zlg7cSug1vcBOgilm1PBsLbC33qUSYzDaEh0IMZGtdkqVBacNmUyfYFlJ9dYbVO3Wg1voOjlEcAWl9KaJNI3SM-EndtIS-DMtFbWj8OyQQ6vDq4YbwzwYPRVZ0xAOGVxHHtHQZ2qYQp-B_rpHAjM_PVUbu5a6net6iLJtkfvqT_nGDiZTTUDck47iTSlwn4Ae_wQ19HhOl0FcAxRk%3D)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15511f0e6c984b1cb1d4d99e4dd15b7b&_e=Ty8TqDZ6ec5bH0o1ot699ncjdvkkNQtI-5Yk9Nv3UNnRPIlKVJ3U0woWqXOtZhgQcoYMrE86S8prGdgDWgCw0lwjY2r5R5VPJRjUJP_4N77-cUbi9NiWfMbqb8MEf6fnvMzvbE406vI4hkKPwqnhNdNHV3Zlg7cSug1vcBOgilm1PBsLbC33qUSYzDaEh0IMjVD9JD99hOiMBC-W0ppQXC218iIfb5-f9vY4vKW8YmFwFHADWWtROJQa6vIfmpN9u3vOFPmU4PXrUD5CJ0bbjmhlO63iKQX7QRJwRTIoVweZQYIf-DoPGDn8oXnGkBpS4wJWaE7H4ihbzJ4etYa_02-u99h-5yJuismm1LxyTNY%3D)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15511f0e6c984b1cb1d4d99e4dd15b7b&_e=Ty8TqDZ6ec5bH0o1ot699ncjdvkkNQtI-5Yk9Nv3UNnRPIlKVJ3U0woWqXOtZhgQcoYMrE86S8prGdgDWgCw0lwjY2r5R5VPJRjUJP_4N77-cUbi9NiWfMbqb8MEf6fnvMzvbE406vI4hkKPwqnhNdNHV3Zlg7cSug1vcBOgilm1PBsLbC33qUSYzDaEh0IMRDRo6HRCIGrFyKAmxgS9V_i2HmGYQHiVPx4HOiwi_TEUUzoRJwk2c7fQx03vdAI-QZG1m7KGCoCBFP1dVEPFPN6NRQM54CSlUo9WD79SW7qk3XEJwOSrfdYmNYr7lvFWHx8XS1EuumcjApsIf2JGYaAtbpMGUSrNuUSqekZEdz4%3D)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15511f0e6c984b1cb1d4d99e4dd15b7b&_e=Ty8TqDZ6ec5bH0o1ot699ncjdvkkNQtI-5Yk9Nv3UNnRPIlKVJ3U0woWqXOtZhgQcoYMrE86S8prGdgDWgCw0lwjY2r5R5VPJRjUJP_4N77-cUbi9NiWfMbqb8MEf6fnvMzvbE406vI4hkKPwqnhNdNHV3Zlg7cSug1vcBOgilm1PBsLbC33qUSYzDaEh0IMnYgjdnO2r5s43ifGN61j2vZwyjDiEsJLn4fijsGQ2LCAza5MTEneAkZLSB5Kj0Y1cDVUYmrOaNBHLGOipMhScT-GNSqVMCV9ZXmMDj-xzAP9h3EyP-vnH1Py6mx0cO-PMF7e2d2pNtfyr7PGRGwnvRPWdHTf56lQ0RnZHt8VNQk%3D)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=15511f0e6c984b1cb1d4d99e4dd15b7b&_e=Ty8TqDZ6ec5bH0o1ot699ncjdvkkNQtI-5Yk9Nv3UNnRPIlKVJ3U0woWqXOtZhgQcoYMrE86S8prGdgDWgCw0lwjY2r5R5VPJRjUJP_4N77-cUbi9NiWfMbqb8MEf6fnvMzvbE406vI4hkKPwqnhNdNHV3Zlg7cSug1vcBOgilm1PBsLbC33qUSYzDaEh0IMRiOodPM3noFbZd-40xjsnUmwypjd92jOT5-Qe1XMgf3CrC1c7rJ-RprvAKYdn-7EYkZiw-37nK9Iu1gdqD9hKNdJSmnBHouaSAsWd_SWQnvV1fcHvPAul60rrVcpz7ePKdXnJz82097HVmQRe14NMzSiiKobz_m7sYfNjZbm1Xs%3D) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_

name: Debbie Mucarsel-Powell
subject: Friend, thank you 🩷
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
do you have a moment?
| | |
---
Friend,
**I wanted to reach out personally to thank you for supporting my campaign.**
As I reflect on the past year, I keep coming back to this incredible team. Making the decision to run for Senate wasn't an easy one. But from day one, you have had my back every single time that I've needed you. _And I am so incredibly grateful for that._
The opportunity to serve the people of Florida is a privilege in and of itself. I am honored and humbled that you believe in the strength of our campaign. And together, we're building a winning movement to retire Rick Scott.
The enthusiasm and energy behind our campaign is simply electric. Floridians are done with the extremism, the partisanship, the hatred, and the lies from Rick Scott. They're ready for real leadership who will fight to protect opportunities, bring communities together, and uplift every single family across our great state. **This campaign has what it takes to win. I feel it in my bones.**
None of this would have been possible without early supporters like you stepping up, chipping in, and believing in a better future, and better leadership, for Florida. So, from the bottom of my heart, thank you.
I know that you've already done so much to support my campaign. **[But if you're able to chip in $5 or any amount today, it would mean the world to me. Grassroots investments from people like you are truly our most powerful tool in this fight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78490300/453548791/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk761-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjNhNDY4MzUtZmNjNC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zU4feW1CqeW3U7Dtsjjk3CHQZssCShtx4s857eaG31o=)**
Thank you again for being a part of this team. I'll be in touch with more updates soon.

With gratitude,

Debbie
|
* * *
| | | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78490301/453548794/-31196584?refcode=jtk761-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjNhNDY4MzUtZmNjNC1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zU4feW1CqeW3U7Dtsjjk3CHQZssCShtx4s857eaG31o=)
---
Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is a Floridian, South American immigrant, mother, and former Congresswoman. She’s dedicated her life to uplifting working families, ending gun violence, and fighting for her community. Now, she’s running to defeat Republican Senator Rick Scott and win a better, brighter future for Florida.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7CGTHFDMeUWW_Wz2yFDujA2?unsubscribedata=z53v0zyNqjH7b2CfasbhT8jfayMO5NNzmJFeb%2F%2BpIWtax%2BcNmXMiBYS%2FOW%2Bl2%2BEc3sYOh1eV69MZDcb6TvegnXux5xZO7xnUpGDY5TuhDMiXS0%2F%2Bort%2BojnvCFUplOGUF7HM3x7PyiitfiXBnxXHPAbvngTD6j23OHqp09prsg6GMBd0SFEDMDhYVj%2FDDxwOqw2RU1EuSgmGVxkS3AeP9jwhJ35xoLp5IyucUdeBC1pBVF8vfNgUitD5zZEdwFfwMuRdWXgS3omdBu1ggDdItWLhfCLJ8Ovy6PKwixM6LtIJzscWEK051LLMOqKF4oCKk%2FYSPxtpk%2FzchNXkg7dwFckLOVInTsJUiNZt5nC5FNcCUnf9buD2sIgoycZePpjItqqJUyFuWa5vZne76Ef6ERNi%2FRpu7No5ilcO%2ByEj2hCB7www3sNBccOtaTUg3Vis) from Debbie's email list.

body:

---
| [Do you support Ruben Gallego in his run for Senate in Arizona?
_Click here to let us know before midnight tonight._](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78491954/453554047/230815393?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240206_2_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxY2U2MzUyLWZlYzQtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9F1jkFOTiWIWYf-PdHoZ1qnrK1qqYq0Xl1MW9KmBHqo=)
---

Peter – now that we’re officially in 2024, all eyes are on battleground states like Arizona where key Senate seats will be in play.

But here’s the twist: Arizona isn’t your normal race. Senator Kyrsten Sinema betrayed the Democratic party and is now a registered Independent. Because of this, Democrat Ruben Gallego stepped up to the plate and announced his candidacy for this seat.

_**This creates a 3-way race between Sinema, Gallego, and MAGA Republican Kari Lake.**_

Democrat Ruben Gallego serves in the House and has been a proven progressive leader, fighting for affordable health care, raising the minimum wage, and restoring abortion rights nationwide.

Meanwhile, Kyrsten Sinema votes with Republicans on key issues. At a time where there’s a 50/50 split in the Senate, we cannot let her continue to block progressive legislation!

_[With all this in mind, we’re asking 5,000 supporters to let us know where they stand on this race today>> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78491956/453554049/230815393?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240206_2_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxY2U2MzUyLWZlYzQtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9F1jkFOTiWIWYf-PdHoZ1qnrK1qqYq0Xl1MW9KmBHqo=)_

body:

Team, what is it that might convince you that making a contribution to Elissa's campaign for Senate will help Democrats not only hold the Senate but secure the White House?
What if we told you that Michigan was just rated a TOSS UP by election experts?
What if we told you that those same experts claim that for Democrats "the math looks very rough for the party at the moment?"
And what if we told you that Elissa currently has four formidable Republican opponents, and we need to be prepared to face any one of them in the general election?
Our plan comes down to this: Democrats will have a VERY tough time defending the Senate majority if we don't win in Michigan.

subject: what everyone is missing about the border crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
Here’s where the chaos at the border leads...| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a6b98a36163e4325ac3c3e06f9fa441a&_e=hqQyt0pNIKjHSR7XOKKDxZslh_ym1XvKM0vtoOu1_Tj1l2y2TPdmp_M0hqqxq7FjOz472EsXEFerkFozHYoDhz-oz0726BvVtK3CoxNR-e6ADY_o-ntZaPHHEYBXGmbwRFWA6yslnf_MJEOnugT3M9CKg0wQ01FKAZkV0OXOgCSYqdSQbAXrDepbKYq5VMeHYV7LAj7DIgNmM3ODLfR7DZxWQWIQWH_shMdj0qlfZ63bstr6FuFIt-Tt9NnuRYCoPNS-7-AWLfHfT_otIlSMYIAjgN5y2odKIFMul_RfgG6eobi-ubMfsX-CT0ZIE8i48NwSTf1PaYo3uLsAHYI5vyLudVGyv8A0PL696M0F3rZ2jcxOQvoGrqGXommT4-7fetRujO1YekECD_i7I7uYPg%3D%3D)
---
Peter, If you think what’s happening at our southern border is bad... _**just wait until you see what comes next.**_ Why do I say that? **Because chaos at the border leads to chaos in our community.** Illegal immigrants who smuggle fentanyl into our country bring with them a criminal mindset that needs to be stopped. **_When law and order breaks down at our southern border, maintaining it in the rest of our country is more important than ever._**

---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a6b98a36163e4325ac3c3e06f9fa441a&_e=hqQyt0pNIKjHSR7XOKKDxZslh_ym1XvKM0vtoOu1_Tj1l2y2TPdmp_M0hqqxq7FjOz472EsXEFerkFozHYoDhz-oz0726BvVtK3CoxNR-e6ADY_o-ntZaPHHEYBXGmbwRFWA6yslnf_MJEOnugT3M9CKg0wQ01FKAZkV0OXOgCSYqdSQbAXrDepbKYq5VMeHYV7LAj7DIgNmM3ODLfR7DZxWQWIQWH_shMdj0qlfZ62XKAJgnwlF6fPnQBY9kuw8HrJ-ZEx9MRbmJNaZEJldGNIicClq6f7-r1KXmv7lBk5XsTTGNFTIuaUOomn9Q8_EvqxOYLhr-G7162Ja8atuax4-vjJs0I0XEY74icLiJDUuoAmWR5VihXNYYhgeUYhzhsQRQ9bFhDc7fHLnG0A6Iw%3D%3D)
---
[SECURE THE BORDER](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a6b98a36163e4325ac3c3e06f9fa441a&_e=hqQyt0pNIKjHSR7XOKKDxZslh_ym1XvKM0vtoOu1_Tj1l2y2TPdmp_M0hqqxq7FjOz472EsXEFerkFozHYoDhz-oz0726BvVtK3CoxNR-e6ADY_o-ntZaPHHEYBXGmbwRFWA6yslnf_MJEOnugT3M9CKg0wQ01FKAZkV0OXOgCSYqdSQbAXrDepbKYq5VMeHYV7LAj7DIgNmM3ODLfR7DZxWQWIQWH_shMdj0qlfZ62P-I5E4rwaX_lzvmza7vZDgEbe3iwbDU3lmcBvVY5xgLOpa2i1dPKBDr-G7LHD1ZZK_7gUQXMFkp0P52VDnHK69P4vnOnynd3jlj6j3dBUoFchB8x2gogmvdTAs_8emVGng8DHRfAua-K_e7YPjXbGKaZ29D4izbE038Y2w2wCTw%3D%3D)
---
Every level in our justice system has a role to play:
* **District Attorneys** must bring charges, quickly prosecute offenders, and instruct federal immigration officials to deport those convicted of dangerous crimes.
* **Judges** must deny bail to dangerous criminals with no ties to the community or who are in the country illegally.
* **And judicial officials at every level** must step up to the plate and demand accountability.

**_[ Unfortunately, many of these positions have been filled with Soros-funded radicals who think their job is to advance a far-left agenda, NOT maintain the rule of law.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a6b98a36163e4325ac3c3e06f9fa441a&_e=hqQyt0pNIKjHSR7XOKKDxZslh_ym1XvKM0vtoOu1_Tj1l2y2TPdmp_M0hqqxq7FjOz472EsXEFerkFozHYoDhz-oz0726BvVtK3CoxNR-e6ADY_o-ntZaPHHEYBXGmbwRFWA6yslnf_MJEOnugT3M9CKg0wQ01FKAZkV0OXOgCSYqdSQbAXrDepbKYq5VMeHYV7LAj7DIgNmM3ODLfR7DZxWQWIQWH_shMdj0qlfZ60m0c6Z4bcjKGM8pWM-5JwXvFOUT0u7H1na0UAO_NLnYInBdmoKuax55kvt6MIUmXHjHQIQwRG9ggXTb2nSDa-N2p2CFrlm1GRcNSFcB6Z99zHjaYZcjzhd2t7Gta-9qM-sdmtRJJQPKXAtzHccQSDNTnE8aZ9kQUFkcr45Wny_nw%3D%3D)_** Peter, I’m urgently reaching out to you to join our movement. The crisis is upon us — and we need every conservative who supports law and order on our team. **_[Fair Courts America](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a6b98a36163e4325ac3c3e06f9fa441a&_e=hqQyt0pNIKjHSR7XOKKDxZslh_ym1XvKM0vtoOu1_Tj1l2y2TPdmp_M0hqqxq7FjOz472EsXEFerkFozHYoDhz-oz0726BvVtK3CoxNR-e6ADY_o-ntZaPHHEYBXGmbwRFWA6yslnf_MJEOnugT3M9CKg0wQ01FKAZkV0OXOgCSYqdSQbAXrDepbKYq5VMeHYV7LAj7DIgNmM3ODLfR7DZxWQWIQWH_shMdj0qlfZ63GnAAt7S0aAISUkFhyXUBpgBY-HoIG2gkzqiNnVlcMPlj3VFfh76rbPBhlWuINR7ziEXmN76h3T1FyXPEVy-09YYLcuhDa2jugDN4jDnL-xrU8fwvPdo6aDIkKfq_lREbxn7mB3_0sFuWe6hnyY_igOlYO-VhwI_HbLs5bYBae6A%3D%3D)_ supports the men and women who serve as judges and district attorneys who answer the call to protect our communities, especially when the Biden Administration refuses to enforce the border. We help strong judicial leaders win — and help stop radical candidates from infiltrating our justice system.**

---
[I WANT TO HELP](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a6b98a36163e4325ac3c3e06f9fa441a&_e=hqQyt0pNIKjHSR7XOKKDxZslh_ym1XvKM0vtoOu1_Tj1l2y2TPdmp_M0hqqxq7FjOz472EsXEFerkFozHYoDhz-oz0726BvVtK3CoxNR-e6ADY_o-ntZaPHHEYBXGmbwRFWA6yslnf_MJEOnugT3M9CKg0wQ01FKAZkV0OXOgCSYqdSQbAXrDepbKYq5VMeHYV7LAj7DIgNmM3ODLfR7DZxWQWIQWH_shMdj0qlfZ61RvuwZdh44kCDHdn23grkYXYnUUuiD3aZu8RgM5IA_iIPVsIiOD93FrlaRxEaCQ9wiSMjOuIMH8Tthef6m-7ilD0lJMMkeOcXWtoPmqZHv8643G2H-WqxGUcsNP-RpzcUv44AKCMHriFz7sZaRYBgaJSF-h1t_YdksxAUK5ozZSg%3D%3D)

But tracking all of these local races across the country is a massive undertaking — which is why there has not yet been a concerted effort to fight back against the network of George Soros’s dark money influence... _until now._ **We’re taking Soros on, head-to-head, but we can't do it without the support of patriots like you.** He has already funneled $40 MILLION dollars into his judicial takeover... if we hope to keep up with that, we NEED your help. **_[Will you donate to help us help our embattled judges and prosecutors before the NEXT crime wave hits?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=a6b98a36163e4325ac3c3e06f9fa441a&_e=hqQyt0pNIKjHSR7XOKKDxZslh_ym1XvKM0vtoOu1_Tj1l2y2TPdmp_M0hqqxq7FjOz472EsXEFerkFozHYoDhz-oz0726BvVtK3CoxNR-e6ADY_o-ntZaPHHEYBXGmbwRFWA6yslnf_MJEOnugT3M9CKg0wQ01FKAZkV0OXOgCSYqdSQbAXrDepbKYq5VMeHYV7LAj7DIgNmM3ODLfR7DZxWQWIQWH_shMdj0qlfZ623DDInRviIC-buA-Wb0W6dxNzj9Op8mV4DphzKhHzrUdradBm4dGTey0B2LO1Y16AP1JU2clfmop-bsMuYIhnyYhakhtKWAcBFio_BwDBlgs71dgOXMl4IpSxdmNKP9MAi5P-WR2Jnot5hFZ_KCrKxvGanxB9w9FzLjQaEAH1Ymw%3D%3D)_**

Because chaos at the border leads to chaos in our community. Illegal immigrants who smuggle fentanyl into our country bring with them a criminal mindset that needs to be stopped. When law and order breaks down at our southern border, maintaining it in the rest of our country is more important than ever. Every level in our justice system has a role to play: District Attorneys must bring charges, quickly prosecute offenders, and instruct federal immigration officials to deport those convicted of dangerous crimes. Judges must deny bail to dangerous criminals with no ties to the community or who are in the country illegally. And judicial officials at every level must step up to the plate and demand accountability. Peter, I’m urgently reaching out to you to join our movement. The crisis is upon us — and we need every conservative who supports law and order on our team. supports the men and women who serve as judges and district attorneys who answer the call to protect our communities, especially when the Biden Administration refuses to enforce the border. We help strong judicial leaders win — and help stop radical candidates from infiltrating our justice system. But tracking all of these local races across the country is a massive undertaking — which is why there has not yet been a concerted effort to fight back against the network of George Soros’s dark money influence... until now. We’re taking Soros on, head-to-head, but we can't do it without the support of patriots like you. He has already funneled $40 MILLION dollars into his judicial takeover... if we hope to keep up with that, we NEED your help. ** | | Thank you, Andrew WynneExecutive Director | Fair Courts America | | | | | | | | Paid for by Fair Courts America | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Brigid Godfrey
subject: Legislation updates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Friends-
As we’re approaching the crossover period of the legislative session we wanted to update you on the progress of some of our legislation. Next week, the House and Senate will go through crossover where they'll consider the legislation that has been passed through the other chamber these last few weeks. This is the next step for legislation on its journey to the Governor’s desk!
Prescription Drug Affordability legislation, HB570 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=bil&val=hb570] , has advanced out of committee! The Senate legislation, SB274 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=bil&val=sb274] , should be going before committee today. This is a bipartisan solution to bring down the high cost of prescription medication.
Paid Family and Medical Leave has advanced in both the House and Senate! Both HB737 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=bil&val=hb737] and SB373 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=bil&val=sb373] have advanced in committee and will be moving on to appropriations committees in both chambers. No one should have to chose between a paycheck and caring for themselves or a loved one.
Legislation to ban hidden fees has also advanced. Legislation to address all hidden fees, HB1320 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=bil&val=hb1320] , advanced last week as well as specific legislation regarding ticket fees, HB277 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=bil&val=hb277] . Senate hidden fee legislation, SB388 [https://lis.virginia.gov/cgi-bin/legp604.exe?ses=241&typ=bil&val=sb388] , was also passed last week and works with HB1320 to ban all hidden fees. Virginians deserve to keep more of what they earn rather than lose money to unforeseen fees.
We’re so excited to follow the progress of this legislation during the rest of the session and we look forward to seeing all of these on Governor Youngkin's desk!
Brigid Godfrey
Deputy Director

[****](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=93df96a0cc79424fa82a0dc53ce9b549&_e=qZTe4Np-0IrJ0KZuNuzQSlIghz9gNmsMnvDTMtIoa54uBSOcI8RP1G_NT1YqjgKVUXGmUKHVxQjhyKy2LR8bUulRyazMgTWRC3fPbQegjo5dCkBeacPQaGlgUMl1zuTon7L-OSW2wMPzNrVkcrg1odELCR4Xgn56tYXayIhl7EBvUMXlSrRHv1KWEfbdS2UzL7fecriAmisXvxe_eaI-8kOhlJwr4sSC2ZknZKKZQRLCZ5ojel0ZqZIX2pWDlMFKaVDCTdpRdsgcK9c3YIqiHNpbcy7sJmHiJCPQwqeYU9NPQN5Eq4CxjJX_tVWa1moN)[********](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=93df96a0cc79424fa82a0dc53ce9b549&_e=qZTe4Np-0IrJ0KZuNuzQSl8TWAO81d9Qm8PdhfjVZX41mKl_nx5ij11A2qLJOnwhPqyTUelJFUingGuDP_ilZh7hz7q9YP1D2UToh9rdOgBw30SK1cEKGZzE8LvnBJY6nmRJzj_3oyVEEXataV7qGHypnhJpabhM_RTmNU7izq1L9QinaLYHOPnCr7WLjH29pmUxOqyCTQqHijn4igES9OIpkoe5bujc8Ql4GtYDNIsMjZREdeSRL8QfbRQwDlhj)**' WE NEED ACTUAL ACTION, NOT JUST PRESS CONFERENCES FROM POLITICIANS' (**[**WTRF**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=93df96a0cc79424fa82a0dc53ce9b549&_e=qZTe4Np-0IrJ0KZuNuzQSlIghz9gNmsMnvDTMtIoa54uBSOcI8RP1G_NT1YqjgKVUXGmUKHVxQjhyKy2LR8bUulRyazMgTWRC3fPbQegjo5dCkBeacPQaGlgUMl1zuTon7L-OSW2wMPzNrVkcrg1oUQEeFpz41FVRQ688JMfpiPsZUrp7_E9A6-N_Wq-OC0s7ftx1RxOrpfJWCR1yRNHjS-PwD7Ygt5ryX83k49HwI1Ye2xcxJbmAddFvHmuf4kpT3n-DpdTOtU5LMBLKMO8o1DfBigfyAIh5hdRhHPwtm2OSjpju4tQTU5cXRnFMSPl)**)** \--Saturday will have marked one year since the East Palestine train derailment, and the White House announced that President Biden will visit the village for the first time at some point in February. Republican Senator JD Vance has been making regular visits to East Palestine since the derailment, and criticized the President for not doing the same. He calls this trip "too little, too late." "A press conference by the President of the United States is not what the people of East Palestine need. What they need is a government that is actually paying attention to them and trying to help them solve the problems that were caused by this terrible explosion. So we need actual action, not just press conferences from politicians..."
