- Senator JD Vance holds a press conference in East Palestine and shares an update on Railway Safety Act. [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=93df96a0cc79424fa82a0dc53ce9b549&_e=qZTe4Np-0IrJ0KZuNuzQSq11T9ulf2ciG6ArLf0HE3WGH_yx4IsDINQUcZRbvEaVhdWvNOLZW1xn7sD-ihV3HfUiy5ZGJ3ucSVQtGicFkTomNs2gbUW7gy-tFMcjeBqHsbebwT07nQwpTAncMJIbFeu9h5W_lA84DyQclHzMSCRIFonht2PcD1bQDjTBdIJnFTYZv0lRptV5EbALUhqbx0I2moY-QonaV7GuSDGnqaA%3D)

[Watch News 5 Cleveland here.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=93df96a0cc79424fa82a0dc53ce9b549&_e=qZTe4Np-0IrJ0KZuNuzQSq11T9ulf2ciG6ArLf0HE3WGH_yx4IsDINQUcZRbvEaVhdWvNOLZW1xn7sD-ihV3HRpPi7LTWCFcVarOzPaLca29DpXWSW_CibkgEmKKmI--I72XyuQ_jgHBz6kXjMSBxlP-1zHMAuL8htkN_aimroWtcbZT2spo7vjP04TN_SSnqh6ci5DAzrCgvAtePwDx2197SuaO_ba8fPUBaIyjoJw%3D) [****](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=93df96a0cc79424fa82a0dc53ce9b549&_e=qZTe4Np-0IrJ0KZuNuzQSvWtFIRwM2KIijT4nkDezrfYVeTCBUhzqqnk46O8MQBvWazw1IB-h2pcAdzRJrwq28gRII9WVqUrj4qu7w7c2nqSj6ESi02pyCquH1cj7HDJA4CwDTo5h2wGCOxdZ93TgZA0urLz-SYjQUAGPNqxZEAwvZ6I-edySyGvk3_aohQqbG7utcVnH09APWWajEQbNTylo4e7mWUUIb_DT16xBJcwcScCnuxgUvak5WjXEyPp1tI5xUrZIHb23ofal4HciX-C5kK9-_KY4lzqgtnlTBM%3D)**' THESE FIGURES SHOW THE RAILROAD INDUSTRY'S SAFETY STANDARDS ARE GETTING WORSE' **([The New York Times](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=93df96a0cc79424fa82a0dc53ce9b549&_e=qZTe4Np-0IrJ0KZuNuzQSvWtFIRwM2KIijT4nkDezrfYVeTCBUhzqqnk46O8MQBvWazw1IB-h2pcAdzRJrwq28gRII9WVqUrj4qu7w7c2nqSj6ESi02pyCquH1cj7HDJA4CwDTo5h2wGCOxdZ93TgYN_z1ugeEjMRfo1V9a6dD651XQpHYuTpZShmGkihmBzaAEG6B1-na9rPWzG8YI2H-HJDU4r9c6Hw2n2rzS2scUOBa1rLLXdw6oDG6J3DwlPjE19nTaCLprA72GZIGKUJ6uffbG0jyToLIwH2efvmDI%3D)) -- After a freight train carrying hazardous chemicals derailed a year ago in East Palestine, Ohio, forcing the evacuation of hundreds of residents and upending life in the town for months, the rail industry pledged to work to become safer, and members of Congress vowed to pass legislation to prevent similar disasters. No bill was passed. And accidents went up. "These figures show the railroad industry's safety standards are getting worse," said Senator J.D. Vance, Republican of Ohio and a co-sponsor of the bill. "We can reverse the trend by passing the Railway Safety Act immediately." [Read _The New York Times ' _article here.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=93df96a0cc79424fa82a0dc53ce9b549&_e=qZTe4Np-0IrJ0KZuNuzQSvWtFIRwM2KIijT4nkDezrfYVeTCBUhzqqnk46O8MQBvWazw1IB-h2pcAdzRJrwq28gRII9WVqUrj4qu7w7c2nqSj6ESi02pyCquH1cj7HDJA4CwDTo5h2wGCOxdZ93TgbDpNUidhGWlDwhRfbY6v545ZbTzu6-_wpR0kpuWmPte_UnLc6tVEB2fLTy1dNdg1vY9wOFzHmCaBZLU_NJrMtPynnLfhQnZRFXfo8wAkooJSa_moQsqmugR2XCXL9BQweL6NWhWqNhV6dcj4SGONc0%3D) [****](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=93df96a0cc79424fa82a0dc53ce9b549&_e=qZTe4Np-0IrJ0KZuNuzQSjdN4HA6Pl4EBfyb5Ovzrm27m3m6MnV49hO3yLaRF0aiv3BLj40qDunon1xYk-euAxJuRJHqJCcgoyQ3UI3ioqnWFwodLvkuU1kSnuDJuohTUOM8xNh20BDaauhShUVNgdhQc4oeMUTcPoIUrm0zmfyd57Eom-CvNa2ZpEqIhS5N5Xyd8ssZpnHL5dkxzsN04GLXqMEBJ9sOE-IdcfZbIcxzR_HyR9utEJDU_4sR1B2GBkqu3fUbLV3l6Y6gAVK3YMJhdvUWHDvskLl2-2mEHatn-1ZgiwSvJOzpo5ToRg8QZt9rzt5eQw8g_6ELp7zEwsUzVAC9y3CZmgCXsbkwdzA%3D)**' THIS IS EXACTLY THE TYPE OF PROGRAM MY FAMILY WOULD HAVE BENEFITTED FROM IF I WAS GROWING UP IN OHIO TODAY' **([Cleveland.com](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=93df96a0cc79424fa82a0dc53ce9b549&_e=qZTe4Np-0IrJ0KZuNuzQSjdN4HA6Pl4EBfyb5Ovzrm27m3m6MnV49hO3yLaRF0aiv3BLj40qDunon1xYk-euAxJuRJHqJCcgoyQ3UI3ioqnWFwodLvkuU1kSnuDJuohTUOM8xNh20BDaauhShUVNgdhQc4oeMUTcPoIUrm0zmfyd57Eom-CvNa2ZpEqIhS5NR9wK_xhc1Iwl9UO6_-PUC2e5WiACICjbR-7ELMLaIo88eXS8_CvBfNLNHwUU4NmllMFuuWcPB2uqDr8yJqqzrPgL7CG4uLhV-KbualonSCDbdjKt55839zRh10Uk50o0pHHGgYZdt2760zMsy_AAM7nq08RK89QzcXpK_Sb7oWE%3D)) -- U.S. Sen. JD Vance has cosponsored bipartisan legislation that would provide $7 billion to continue a program that's enabled 22.5 million low-income households, including more than 1.1 million in Ohio, to access free or discounted internet service. "This is exactly the type of program my family would have benefited from if I was growing up in Ohio today," said a statement from Vance, a Cincinnati Republican. "We must ensure low-income families all across Ohio, from our bustling cities to the most rural parts of Appalachia, aren't cut off from the online banking, schooling, and connectivity services they need." JD Vance (R-Ohio) and Rep. Kevin Hern (R-Okla.) urged Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) on Wednesday to move forward on a bill that provides aid for Israel without offsetting funding elsewhere. "For months, Senate leadership has attempted to trade Ukraine aid for a bill that would secure America's border," the lawmakers said in a statement. "If news reports are in any way accurate, that border negotiation is a complete policy failure. It's time to address the issues that unite Republicans, not divide them." "We commend the Speaker for standing firm against this bad border deal, and urge him to put a clean, un-offset Israel bill on the floor of the House immediately," they continued. "Let's put an end to House and Senate Democrats' political games on Israel." [Read _The Hill 's _article here.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=93df96a0cc79424fa82a0dc53ce9b549&_e=qZTe4Np-0IrJ0KZuNuzQSnmA9N3nCS8fRiwMIsBvRGC7zvI-p1dQ0_uXEm7rcRefoA9OtxeePGkyLNtu6if9JtYT1sIWh5fFczC8obJIulcdJYpOZFQGk02qX1W_ahCKPApyRzm3v5E8RL4dUlMoPWaLUWAl_RWCJuPwzVjgzG9H-uqevKZ_BgkTWRgqQCXmmjkGQTZ0mVng1h2lCZLhm-Js4bbOTNP6F1byRMc4I5_y3gfgxJbcDWj-1hyzF0WjjofZJ9Ry0SaVRc6dEYllLAVzfStN3K47ZMBSTbomty4%3D) [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=93df96a0cc79424fa82a0dc53ce9b549&_e=qZTe4Np-0IrJ0KZuNuzQSgRsl6LX5iTKb09x6O3KxdMUmxXwLYDD9gybbHb9qCHqXKEUW22OQ1VN-jmofZi_LNTnPmloka6iSW9vytFpnkI9RRDNB0ufJ-rJxPSkIDRZJttFqHwHz3AV1kM-J2ZBTxqx3z_EwJBiNiL38O4U8wrQh7EZ11FzSIN7z7sYo8lTEdelLMtq0h6wZJASth2HcJ_J_i2pxZUd8JWNpMrolbuJoxSBGEW8WqfhXBhfgs5To0gK1w8NeeKx0K1d2NrJAQ%3D%3D)**' EVERY AMERICAN DESERVES A FULL EXPLANATION FROM BOEING AND THE FAA ON WHAT'S GONE WRONG' **([Fox Business](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=93df96a0cc79424fa82a0dc53ce9b549&_e=qZTe4Np-0IrJ0KZuNuzQSgRsl6LX5iTKb09x6O3KxdMUmxXwLYDD9gybbHb9qCHqXKEUW22OQ1VN-jmofZi_LNTnPmloka6iSW9vytFpnkI9RRDNB0ufJ-rJxPSkIDRZF9PPWsIJxZTQIQxjsEnjR79Gd_I5bzfbD64FfuKKceBeiD3brrlJ824Sl5N3AFnWAQAzmpO_NDD2cLLZKtAgFO4Pxj-zntWrcSiFrbODNKRYu_EjfgEKID1XpuacH6sxGtg2Z8Wd8xmTRJCanGI2EA%3D%3D)) -- Federal regulators have launched investigations, Boeing's stock price has nosedived, and now, a U.S. senator is calling for hearings after the latest 737 MAX 9 mishap. Sen. JD Vance, R-Ohio, on Tuesday called for a Senate Commerce Committee hearing to evaluate the safety of Boeing's 737 MAX aircraft after the plug door blew off a jet in midair over the weekend. The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) has already grounded all 171 Boeing 737 MAX 9 planes worldwide pending safety inspections. "The FAA has assured me the 737 MAX is safe - last week's near catastrophe calls that determination into question," Vance said in a statement Tuesday. "Pilots have filed safety complaints on these aircraft, many of which had just rolled off the production line, at a rate which is unbecoming of American aviation. My own family has flown on 737 MAX aircraft multiple times in the past year. Every American deserves a full explanation from Boeing and the FAA on what's gone wrong and on the steps that are being taken to ensure another incident does not occur in the future." [Read _Fox Business ' _article here.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=93df96a0cc79424fa82a0dc53ce9b549&_e=qZTe4Np-0IrJ0KZuNuzQSgRsl6LX5iTKb09x6O3KxdMUmxXwLYDD9gybbHb9qCHqXKEUW22OQ1VN-jmofZi_LNTnPmloka6iSW9vytFpnkI9RRDNB0ufJ-rJxPSkIDRZDNSzuhaw71WtGXvCm3BDht8iipmmCu3YTpMgDuEuiIiSePDpnSvB0E9I05ugrkwTTXR3l01EkJWJLiUzyKR6_h7ZkFdt26w02KE1Mvj5surgxZS7YjEcPvQtBeLtPihIsrsqgrYbZbiTT3pJ1lAC8A%3D%3D)

clean_body: | Senator Vance has started the new year off strong with pushes for real policy. See what he's been up to! ' WE NEED ACTUAL ACTION, NOT JUST PRESS CONFERENCES FROM POLITICIANS' () \--Saturday will have marked one year since the East Palestine train derailment, and the White House announced that President Biden will visit the village for the first time at some point in February. Republican Senator JD Vance has been making regular visits to East Palestine since the derailment, and criticized the President for not doing the same. He calls this trip "too little, too late." "A press conference by the President of the United States is not what the people of East Palestine need. What they need is a government that is actually paying attention to them and trying to help them solve the problems that were caused by this terrible explosion. So we need actual action, not just press conferences from politicians..." ' SOMETIMES THE MOST IMPORTANT THING IS TO ACTUALLY APPLY PRESSURE, FORCE PEOPLE TO VOTE ON IT AND GET IT OVER THE HILL' () - Senator JD Vance holds a press conference in East Palestine and shares an update on Railway Safety Act. ' THESE FIGURES SHOW THE RAILROAD INDUSTRY'S SAFETY STANDARDS ARE GETTING WORSE' () -- After a freight train carrying hazardous chemicals derailed a year ago in East Palestine, Ohio, forcing the evacuation of hundreds of residents and upending life in the town for months, the rail industry pledged to work to become safer, and members of Congress vowed to pass legislation to prevent similar disasters. No bill was passed. And accidents went up. "These figures show the railroad industry's safety standards are getting worse," said Senator J.D. Vance, Republican of Ohio and a co-sponsor of the bill. "We can reverse the trend by passing the Railway Safety Act immediately." ' THIS IS EXACTLY THE TYPE OF PROGRAM MY FAMILY WOULD HAVE BENEFITTED FROM IF I WAS GROWING UP IN OHIO TODAY' () -- U.S. Sen. JD Vance has cosponsored bipartisan legislation that would provide $7 billion to continue a program that's enabled 22.5 million low-income households, including more than 1.1 million in Ohio, to access free or discounted internet service. "This is exactly the type of program my family would have benefited from if I was growing up in Ohio today," said a statement from Vance, a Cincinnati Republican. "We must ensure low-income families all across Ohio, from our bustling cities to the most rural parts of Appalachia, aren't cut off from the online banking, schooling, and connectivity services they need." ' BIDEN COULD SOLVE THE BORDER CRISIS TOMORROW IF HE WANTED TO. HE JUST REFUSES TO ENFORCE THE LAWS OF HIS OWN COUNTRY. THAT'S DISGRACEFUL STUFF' () - Senator Vance joined America Reports to discuss the border crisis. ' IF JOE BIDEN REFUSES TO TAKE ACTION, LET THE STATES GET THE JOB DONE' () -- Senator JD Vance, R-Ohio, has introduced a bill that would give border states a legal path to defend their territory, the State Border Security Act. It would prevent federal agents from dismantling barbed wire or other fencing erected by states within 25 miles of the U.S.-Mexico border. According to Vance, the legislation counteracts a Supreme Court decision that allowed the Biden Administration to continue dismantling border barriers built by Texas. "The Supreme Court gave Joe Biden a green light to cut down barriers put in place by the State of Texas," Vance said. "My bill would codify the right of every state along the U.S.-Mexico border to defend its own territory. If Joe Biden refuses to take action, let the states get the job done." ****' THE STATE BORDER SECURITY ACT WOULD CODIFY THE RIGHT OF EVERY STATE ALONG THE U.S.-MEXICO BORDER TO DEFEND ITS OWN TERRITORY' () -- U.S. Sen. JD Vance, a Cincinnati Republican, on Thursday introduced legislation called the "State Border Security Act" that he said would "codify the right of every state along the U.S.-Mexico border to defend its own territory." Vance joins Fox News' Laura Ingram to discuss Biden's failures. ' CLAIMS OF RADICAL TRANSPARENCY AND TRACKING OF U.S. WEAPONS IN UKRAINE ARE SIMPLY NOT ACCURATE' () -- Sen. JD Vance, R-Ohio, is sending a memo to GOP colleagues ahead of a closed-door meeting on Ukraine, warning lawmakers about the latest Department of Defense (DOD) report that he said detailed the "shortcomings in monitoring U.S. aid to Ukraine." "Claims of radical transparency and tracking of U.S. weapons in Ukraine are simply not accurate," Vance wrote in the memo. "Assertions that 'there is no evidence of illicit transfer of EEUM defense articles provided to Ukraine' sidestep the reality that an accurate, up-to-date inventory of U.S.- supplied weapons in Ukraine - which the DOD IG report demonstrates that the U.S. does not have - is necessary to determine whether weapons have fallen into the wrong hands." ' THIS IS A BORDER FIG LEAF SO THAT WE CAN SEND ANOTHER $61 BILLION TO UKRAINE' () - Senator Vance joins Fox News' Laura Ingram discuss Biden's border package disguised as additional Ukraine funding. ' LET'S PUT AN END TO HOUSE AND SENATE DEMOCRATS' POLITICAL GAMES ON ISRAEL' () -- Sen. JD Vance (R-Ohio) and Rep. Kevin Hern (R-Okla.) urged Speaker Mike Johnson (R-La.) on Wednesday to move forward on a bill that provides aid for Israel without offsetting funding elsewhere. "For months, Senate leadership has attempted to trade Ukraine aid for a bill that would secure America's border," the lawmakers said in a statement. "If news reports are in any way accurate, that border negotiation is a complete policy failure. It's time to address the issues that unite Republicans, not divide them." "We commend the Speaker for standing firm against this bad border deal, and urge him to put a clean, un-offset Israel bill on the floor of the House immediately," they continued. "Let's put an end to House and Senate Democrats' political games on Israel." ' EVERY AMERICAN DESERVES A FULL EXPLANATION FROM BOEING AND THE FAA ON WHAT'S GONE WRONG' () -- Federal regulators have launched investigations, Boeing's stock price has nosedived, and now, a U.S. senator is calling for hearings after the latest 737 MAX 9 mishap. Sen. JD Vance, R-Ohio, on Tuesday called for a Senate Commerce Committee hearing to evaluate the safety of Boeing's 737 MAX aircraft after the plug door blew off a jet in midair over the weekend. The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) has already grounded all 171 Boeing 737 MAX 9 planes worldwide pending safety inspections. "The FAA has assured me the 737 MAX is safe - last week's near catastrophe calls that determination into question," Vance said in a statement Tuesday. "Pilots have filed safety complaints on these aircraft, many of which had just rolled off the production line, at a rate which is unbecoming of American aviation. My own family has flown on 737 MAX aircraft multiple times in the past year. Every American deserves a full explanation from Boeing and the FAA on what's gone wrong and on the steps that are being taken to ensure another incident does not occur in the future." Please join me at 5:30 pm on February 15th at 80 Main Banquet Hall in Lockport and help kick off our 2024 campaign for State Senate.
It is my great honor to seek another term representing the folks of Senate District 62 in Albany. One thing is very clear, New Yorkers have had enough of a downstate radical activist dominated legislature that finds new ways to divide and destroy our state every day.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kevin=20Dellicker?=
subject: Dellicker Campaign Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KEVIN DELLICKER FOR CONGRESS
body:
Money, Airpower, and Squirrels |
---
| | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=42c6a777f9&e=1090c5c412)
---
|
---
| Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Last month, I wrote about the charity events my campaign sponsored during the holiday season. Instead of organizing fundraisers for my campaign, we organized fundraisers for local organizations that help our neighbors: homeless veterans, women with unplanned pregnancies, men with addictions. We delivered truckloads of supplies and thousands of dollars in cash donations to charities across the district.

The decision to focus on charity over fundraising events was risky, especially since my political opponents already were telling people I couldn’t raise enough money to win. But then on Wednesday, the Federal Election Commission published the latest campaign finance reports. I didn’t lose ground. In fact, my campaign raised more money than all my primary opponents combined.

We’ve been quietly building an army of grassroots contributors to counter the influence of big-money donors that dominate establishment politics. Our campaign received thousands of small contributions from ordinary Americans who want to see me defeat Susan Wild. It shows the strength of our grassroots appeal and demonstrates what having a little faith can accomplish.

On Friday, I took a break from campaigning to fulfill my obligations as a military reservist and Air Force squadron commander. My airmen and I had a busy weekend. Being a part of a worldwide team that delivers combat airpower to protect U.S. interests abroad is a sobering responsibility. I wish every American could witness the professionalism and resolve exhibited by my airmen in action. Let's give them the clarity of mission and the tools they need to do their jobs.

Serving in the U.S. military for 28 years is one of the greatest privileges in my life. When I get to Congress, I’ll apply that experience to secure our borders, rebuild our military, and defend our nation. There is no higher priority for a Member of Congress than to keep us safe and prevent unnecessary wars.

Finally, while I was at the military base on Saturday, I missed my friend John’s annual squirrel barbecue in New Tripoli. Each year, he and his friends go squirrel hunting in the morning and then cook them for dinner in the afternoon. Now that may seem strange to people who aren’t from New Tripoli, but it’s perfectly normal around here. The truth is, my family has been hunting squirrels for years, the meat is delicious, and John’s cookouts are the best.

John sent me a picture of a petition he was circulating at his place to get me on the ballot. I’m not sure if the Department of State accepts petitions with squirrel guts on the paper, but we are about to find out.

Thank you, John. And thank you to all the patriotic Americans who are circulating petitions, knocking on doors, making donations, and working so hard to change things in Washington.

**Keep America Free.**

_Kevin Dellicker is a Republican from Heidelberg Township, Lehigh County, running for U.S. House of Representatives in Pa.’s 7th District. He is a 28-year military veteran, technology company owner, husband and father. He’s not a career politician. He’s a proven leader with the experience and courage to Keep America Free. Learn more at[www.dellickerforcongress.com](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=165fd50c90&e=1090c5c412)._

| Our volunteer team has been all over the place this week- gun shows and wrestling matches, political events and farmer's markets. I truly appreciate all the help from everybody circulating positions and organizing volunteers.

Last week, I was able to meet some Vietnam Veterans in Nesquehoning, a women's bowling league in Allentown and GOP activists at Hopps at the Paddock. I attended a community meeting at East Side Borough in White Haven and visited a wrestling match in Catasauqua. If you would like to help with petitions or volunteer, please email [michelle@dellickerforcongress.com](mailto:michelle@dellickerforcongress.com).

|

|

|

|

|

| This week we lost an American hero. Toby Keith inspired a generation of Americans to love their country and fight for its values. I saw him twice at the Allentown Fair and once in Afghanistan, where I took this picture. He and his band would fly on military aircraft to remote outposts across the combat zone, sometimes ducking rocket fire. I remember the first time I heard "American Soldier" as my wife cried in my arms, and my kids and my dad all singing, "Beer for My Horses." We will miss you, Toby Keith. Thank you and God Bless.

clean_body: Money, Airpower, and Squirrels | | | | | Dear Friends and Neighbors, Last month, I wrote about the charity events my campaign sponsored during the holiday season. Instead of organizing fundraisers for my campaign, we organized fundraisers for local organizations that help our neighbors: homeless veterans, women with unplanned pregnancies, men with addictions. We delivered truckloads of supplies and thousands of dollars in cash donations to charities across the district. The decision to focus on charity over fundraising events was risky, especially since my political opponents already were telling people I couldn’t raise enough money to win. But then on Wednesday, the Federal Election Commission published the latest campaign finance reports. I didn’t lose ground. In fact, my campaign raised more money than all my primary opponents combined. We’ve been quietly building an army of grassroots contributors to counter the influence of big-money donors that dominate establishment politics. Our campaign received thousands of small contributions from ordinary Americans who want to see me defeat Susan Wild. It shows the strength of our grassroots appeal and demonstrates what having a little faith can accomplish. On Friday, I took a break from campaigning to fulfill my obligations as a military reservist and Air Force squadron commander. My airmen and I had a busy weekend. Being a part of a worldwide team that delivers combat airpower to protect U.S. interests abroad is a sobering responsibility. I wish every American could witness the professionalism and resolve exhibited by my airmen in action. Let's give them the clarity of mission and the tools they need to do their jobs. Serving in the U.S. military for 28 years is one of the greatest privileges in my life. When I get to Congress, I’ll apply that experience to secure our borders, rebuild our military, and defend our nation. There is no higher priority for a Member of Congress than to keep us safe and prevent unnecessary wars. Finally, while I was at the military base on Saturday, I missed my friend John’s annual squirrel barbecue in New Tripoli. Each year, he and his friends go squirrel hunting in the morning and then cook them for dinner in the afternoon. Now that may seem strange to people who aren’t from New Tripoli, but it’s perfectly normal around here. The truth is, my family has been hunting squirrels for years, the meat is delicious, and John’s cookouts are the best. John sent me a picture of a petition he was circulating at his place to get me on the ballot. I’m not sure if the Department of State accepts petitions with squirrel guts on the paper, but we are about to find out. Thank you, John. And thank you to all the patriotic Americans who are circulating petitions, knocking on doors, making donations, and working so hard to change things in Washington. Keep America Free. name: Bob Lorinser
subject: I will not sacrifice who I am
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/TOP.png]
Dirty money means dirty politics
For obvious reasons, we don't hear it from candidates enough, but it needs to be said. The control of Big Money over politics—and the corporatocracy of our nation—is deeply concerning.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
I am proud that my campaign is 100% grassroots-funded, fueled by people pitching in what they can. I reject corporate PAC money, so we rely on the generosity of thousands of individuals like you to stay competitive. Thank you.
FUND OUR GRASSROOTS EFFORT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
Corporate dominance has had a negative impact on small businesses and farms, with only a few giant companies controlling a significant share of almost every industry. While our GDP has tripled over the past few generations, small businesses have decreased by half.
This trend is alarming and extends to politics. Trust in our Supreme Court and Congress is eroding. Representation has shifted from the interests of the people to the priorities of corporate donors, lobbyists, political parties, and special interests.
This disconnect leaves many Americans disillusioned and disengaged from the political process.
So, as a candidate for Congress in Michigan's 1st District, I refuse to be influenced by political power brokering or compromise my principles for campaign finances. I will not be corrupted by this process, and I will not play to this trend.
Our recent fundraising successes are a testament to this commitment, and we have built a robust and competitive campaign that is truly for everyday people.
Friend, my motivation to run for office is not about the lure of prestige; I'm committed to addressing every issue with honesty, integrity, and a focus on problem-solving.
I'm driven by a genuine desire to serve the people of the greatest district in the greatest country in the world because we need reform.
First, we must continue propelling our campaign forward, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] overturn Citizens United, and again prioritize hardworking families, not Big Money. It's not too late to restore the dignity our democracy deserves, and that's why I'm in this fight.
Thank you,
Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
CONTRIBUTE TO REFORM [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Or, send a check to
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

body:
And ‘We’re Not Being Told The Truth Here’: Sparks Fly As Nancy Mace Spars With Martha MacCallum Over Senate Border Bill

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683965%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FE9eHQ7g6QNXTDxJyXO%2btA&sysid=1 ‘Threatens National Security’: Even Some Democrats Are Balking At Biden’s Latest Energy Decision

Several House Democrats crossed the aisle on Monday to join Republicans in expressing concern about the Biden administration’s pause on approving new liquefied natural gas (LNG) export terminals.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683965%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FE9eHQ7g6QNXTDxJyXO%2btA&sysid=1

Republican Rep. Nancy Mace of South Carolina clashed with Fox News host Martha MacCallum on Monday over a foreign aid and border security package, claiming that proponents of the bill are being dishonest.

The Nevada Supreme Court hosted a one-time course that teaches judges how to incorporate pronoun usage and an awareness of gender identity into the courtroom, according to training materials obtained by the Daily Caller News Foundation.

Read more EXCLUSIVE: Nevada Supreme Court Hosted Training On LGBT, Transgender Issues For Judges The Nevada Supreme Court hosted a one-time course that teaches judges how to incorporate pronoun usage and an awareness of gender identity into the courtroom, according to training materials obtained by the Daily Caller News Foundation. name: Jocelyn Frye, National Partnership
subject: Invest in women and families
body:
The issues we champion will be a huge focus in 2024 – reproductive rights, paid family leave, affordable health care, and more. | | | Dear Peter, **At the National Partnership for Women & Families, we are committed to improving the lives of women and families** by creating a just and equitable society in which all women and families can live with dignity, respect, and security and where every person has the opportunity to achieve their potential, and no person is held back by discrimination or bias.** The issues we champion will be a huge focus in 2024 – reproductive rights, paid family leave, and affordable health care. We’ll organize and advocate for policies that make your life more fair. **But we need your help.** ** **[To strengthen the support from our grassroots donors, can we count on you to step up and donate to the National Partnership today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78496308/453565396/-454660641?am=20&contactdata=WtRyv8ZtXpqJz7rJkFeVj3eCCt7GYBrI66B5RYRJvWW49IRv247P0br3EdzXZlVwhYUgZEKRlpSf8+IadqSTvrkabU6tM5Bs+zbbWTcgpMDua9mVg8uoNF/g8r/wfSDU4UiZw0gi9U0kdwX86eOjwMLNynLF4sT+XEs7E0vYY/s=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OUFdGL05QV0YvMS8xMDA5MjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjU0ODA0Y2YtMDFjNS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2r-Am_rOzKEOWLmiVQvXdVSWBjxGx_cN0a3DP5XHEcQ=&emci=34acc509-39c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=f54804cf-01c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=278067) ****

**👇READ BERNIE SANDERS’ MESSAGE ABOUT _CITIZENS UNITED_!👇** | []() | [We’re launching an urgent campaign to end _Citizens United_. But we need $4,200 by midnight tomorrow to get it off the ground! Please, chip in $7 now »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36925?t=7&akid=20731%2E4449941%2EqGfvBk)

**Look, we NEED you to remember these 3 things:**
**#1:** Corporations are not people and **shouldn’t sway our elections.**

**#2:** Without fair and free elections, _our democracy is DOOMED!_

**#3:** Democratic heroes like **Joe Biden, Rep. Raskin, and Sen. Warren** are calling on loyal Democrats like YOU to take action.
[**If you’re all in like we are, chip in $7 before midnight tomorrow to help us fund our work to END the influence of the _Citizens United_ ruling and the corruption it created »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36925?t=8&akid=20731%2E4449941%2EqGfvBk)

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: It started as a dream
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | Fellow American, [](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=d49b3a85d3a9440d9725ce956b770bbd&_e=sgx7wUo0sqfcNOT8qOD7Axd52KVv3WmJGdEbKEHOKSo86R9Nq_LuDYWJ3ZDqKPIlGNonRtB36ZAG0EuUIllHpGswo2gs5IRexS56Z90CgnqwiCctPmnZBtEBNkaOfLJTB_qAWY63CAI8bf7XD0wjj1U1SxclRZQAXXX1CLx3S9MdiwXH4Tj73LkDX4jk7qF7lEzbJjFdPocfOiwwhKMhc-ICBbZ3uDgVHgbTDyz1mAi2noyQcnFze8NxHfFDZcMv4_nLK35bqVAj052PLgXmLar4b2ePBH6F0jom9GqBvkpraX_gvJmak3gFsB54ctxfPx5ZumQ9w7Jr1WeWglKMAJA0dw-bj_6SF0DazU4tx4PHpjT7cOU02ukbdpVJyzmpDbpZv4uyv_bYxD9ksPLi2A%3D%3D) Every small business started as a dream, much like the one my wife Rocky and I had when we founded our company. Small businesses are not just the backbone of our economy; they’re the embodiment of American ingenuity and determination. _It’s no wonder that they’re under attack fro the inept Biden Administration._ Instead of helping our small businesses thrive, Democrats want to strangle them in favor of woke corporations. It’s all a part of the radical Left’s mission to demolish The American Dream. I know what it takes to run a business, and I’m going to bring that same mentality to Washington to help other entrepreneurs. **[**Will you join me today to bring a small business BOOM to America?**](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=d49b3a85d3a9440d9725ce956b770bbd&_e=sgx7wUo0sqfcNOT8qOD7Axd52KVv3WmJGdEbKEHOKSo86R9Nq_LuDYWJ3ZDqKPIlty2BhHTepqRjtfWDBsT0Bi_WUSPnaz39LwJdeE-jzg3XjWoCvkpK1Yr-0TP-HIPbtX56cMF7Zal8vWbF8YHYFKJU4NVKC0bN6eUyEarwxevR6qWTOox67TcmDJIzG7c42PZou9MW7sJ1GSakUCMsmtgsaIbPTdoafP1VZlVrNaKaCpvknG1kv2bsm-Qt-YMBVwbQxHITOU8oaT4Rqd4PEfOYwH6VUXB3_IPcFP40itmSft8QFunVDV4C05QFVWL_imxa0vRpoIkO0Xtrp82jkYuCZd1yYKp9F_0T0j48i2bfwG-JFEzn6TGifWPuTEyFvrkHLQmVJ3zBY0aEgYjxZQ%3D%3D)**
---
[ **STAND WITH SMALL ****BUSINESSES**](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=d49b3a85d3a9440d9725ce956b770bbd&_e=sgx7wUo0sqfcNOT8qOD7Axd52KVv3WmJGdEbKEHOKSo86R9Nq_LuDYWJ3ZDqKPIlty2BhHTepqRjtfWDBsT0Bi_WUSPnaz39LwJdeE-jzg3XjWoCvkpK1Yr-0TP-HIPbtX56cMF7Zal8vWbF8YHYFKJU4NVKC0bN6eUyEarwxevR6qWTOox67TcmDJIzG7c42PZou9MW7sJ1GSakUCMsmtgsaIbPTdoafP1VZlVrNaLLDQrS07a-1tv6l4TxZXt96b3k_qNryrUmfsRkJY9dijgzZMayWPoX4DEkbxCKfCqsIwWX7Hrjn0Hf5a4okZbLPVel0SSuR0wD0Ozc1HlRR2iOoERHlrYduDmLbb8NfOfXHVm2Rwf5WYR49NaWhgqC0JLvexJzj96Q_lInhC4w2g%3D%3D)
---
Today, entrepreneurs face too much red tape and too many barriers to growth. Overbearing regulations, excessive taxes, and out of control inflation are bringing down businesses that should be succeeding. In Washington, I won’t rest until our economy is fixed and our small businesses can thrive, but I can’t get there without your help. **[Let’s help our small businesses succeed and take back our economy for the American people. clean_body: | | | Fellow American, Every small business started as a dream, much like the one my wife Rocky and I had when we founded our company. Small businesses are not just the backbone of our economy; they’re the embodiment of American ingenuity and determination. It’s no wonder that they’re under attack fro the inept Biden Administration. Instead of helping our small businesses thrive, Democrats want to strangle them in favor of woke corporations. It’s all a part of the radical Left’s mission to demolish The American Dream. I know what it takes to run a business, and I’m going to bring that same mentality to Washington to help other entrepreneurs. Today, entrepreneurs face too much red tape and too many barriers to growth. Overbearing regulations, excessive taxes, and out of control inflation are bringing down businesses that should be succeeding. In Washington, I won’t rest until our economy is fixed and our small businesses can thrive, but I can’t get there without your help. Thank you, Pat Harrigan | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: National Alerts
subject: Feds New Digital Currency Gives IRS Agents Access To Your Accounts. Steps You Can Take Now
body:
| | |
---
# Is Biden Replacing the Dollar With a Government Controlled _Digital Coin_? 220 Banks Officially Using His FedNow Digital Money System.
* * *
**"there is a fourth function of (Digital) money: as a means of social control."** -William Michael Cunningham Economist & Author
* * *
My Fellow American, **There is a growing movement to do away with paper money.** The _government wants to_ implement a centralized digital currency that allows them to _monitor all your financial transactions_. Senate Bill 3571 describes these as "FED accounts", and it’s only a matter of time until this sinister plan is implemented. Our Representatives have this to say about Biden's Digital Money. Majority Whip Tom Emmer said Digital Money (CBDCs) _**"strips Americans of their right to financial privacy" and is "a dangerous surveillance tool."**_**** Congressman Byron Donalds says, "**_CBDCs pose a clear threat to Americans’ financial independence."_** With this program, the government can track everything you do. Every single purchase, transaction, and dollar that comes in and leaves your account. Congress, the Feds, and the IRS can see your transactions. Congressman Mike Flood says, **_"The Chinese Communist Party’s move to use government-run digital currency to impose further control on its people and its economy is a cautionary tale that America must avoid."_** Congressman Barry Loudermilk says, _"The Federal Reserve’s push to develop a central bank digital currency**would allow the Fed to track an individual’s transactions indefinitely.** "_ **Get your Free[Protection Guide](http://email.myamericanpatriot.org/c/eJxckc1unTAQhZ9m2IHMGOzLgkUbh2yaLtqqzS4y2Bin-EfGNCFPX3F100W333w6mqMjXVztfPTAPwPiYtUGiEA_AaL5-edl_4bvj7mkX82lvH9xX8h5xTtAzEfU_9RbSqWdtOtJuShUP7aXiXWF7mtOODac8a5Yeqxn1o3tXNOO8LHVfEY1EdIRxce5rtvC9kiwIUhY3SKnXYUM-UVSTTt2aVFP0BB3SKeTnaSPMicbchWSKdZ-yTlu158GwMGZygWvs0yHCasyKeyxmoIDHMzyhmV7anTYs3seU_itE1DxsIQtA7ITxn0EKn6k3cUb2cKeJg1UCK1uaJIuSms8UDHosWxLbD5k-35VrSkfg79Bp5XdHVBxF3z9ERF81j4DFX5ayzw80O_H233-Bcie_WoVUPEfvA5FRXgVTwN9ekhF6lV8tetqN8ahIeYc4qz6NwAA__8QxZYB) here.** With these FED accounts the government has total control over your life. They can turn your bank account on or off at will.

What’s more, they can greatly curtail how you spend your money. For example:
* if you’re overweight, the government will simply restrict your ability to buy certain items.
* Need ammo? You won’t be able to get it.
* Any business deemed non-essential will be shut down.
* Any individual who goes against the party line will be frozen out of the system.

**You simply won’t be able to get access to your hard-earned money.** As you can imagine this will have a dramatic effect on the lives of ordinary Americans. Especially freedom-loving Americans who dare to speak out against left-wing ideology.

Don’t believe in climate change or vaccines?

Bye, bye bank account. And this isn’t some conspiracy. name: Claudia Tenney
subject: Very few live to tell this tale
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia Tenney for Congress
body:
Even fewer do it twice

| |
---
| | | | | | | | [
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkik1fagrbgvonksoijk9nqhl4hj99anaghs06vg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9im8ob6cth2bs)
---

**Friend.**

My name is Claudia Tenney. I'm a single mother from upstate New York.

I took on Biden, Hillary, their billionaire donors & their political machine- and I won.

**The polls had already closed on election night, but ballots kept coming in._And they kept on counting. _**

So I took on Hillary Clinton's personal attorney in court & was declared the winner two months later by just 109 votes.

**Very few people humiliate the Bidens & Clintons like I did, and live to tell the tale.

_Even fewer people do it twice._**_ _

They have millions lined up to make an example out of me & end my re-election campaign before it sees the light of day.

I'm really hoping you won't let that happen. Can I count on you to stand with me through the thick of it all as we take on the radical left? | | [**CHIP IN $20**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3nmbh5rr0jpveh5u2ujei445n5nbdma4ra53vvo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9im8ob6cth2bs)| [**CHIP IN $30**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znvrk20ulkqjvrrgcoghhbci3srjbgub3881c48o_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9im8ob6cth2bs)

---|---
[**CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqdfjho4g8bkr4k308brsrsqj2ket0066apggce0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9im8ob6cth2bs)
---
We narrowly defeated them last time- there isn't a more competitive race in America than this one.

**_[So I'm humbly asking for your support today to deliver the Democrat machine another humiliating defeat.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9vp7iffkui5gbrmhvjtcr9frm04v3aq55cfegk0_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9im8ob6cth2bs "So I’m humbly asking for your support today to deliver the Democrat machine another humiliating defeat.")_**

We've done it before & with your support today we will do it again!

Thank you,
Claudia Tenney (R - NY)

|

name: Steve Garvey
subject: Remember the 70’s?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
| |
---
| | [](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ccbe3cfe432d4564a4e1504baebeb445&_e=ZmMjqBPqr4VOaw4NLtksAnPPvuSKcwpb2I0WgWvquH96kHB4w3bW_7ERZ2jfZuPPCuocGZriiNo9ii5PhdcaSDkT0JJUCL8hPUztW5Q_w_vEAWKgSga1qd82BvmbiA347h1zuSSkAVj9H21YPTY6BmJ3gX4Ac5IyyffueifDq8iBFsxN_2w3qK7h0nXBYYCDd6_2aEyI1se5euaOdQSDyt5GFXqY6wg9BOrezW9xQ2lIbBr_bViGFEYYnup9XGorQXFW2IdW2tEjNGgmO0CkMpDcYhe6PGwvH3b3tYOvgUfdSkcWImhsHRgF_RU84Jmd-riuZysrbfmmjj_hScYEK_0HhLZbEdvT4_myzmVF8STeE2vtJFn2OIG44BGOVfL0IEJKqf2BBrGU15uNX4gQaA%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you.
---
| | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you.
---
| [](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ccbe3cfe432d4564a4e1504baebeb445&_e=ZmMjqBPqr4VOaw4NLtksAnPPvuSKcwpb2I0WgWvquH96kHB4w3bW_7ERZ2jfZuPPCuocGZriiNo9ii5PhdcaSDkT0JJUCL8hPUztW5Q_w_vEAWKgSga1qd82BvmbiA347h1zuSSkAVj9H21YPTY6BmJ3gX4Ac5IyyffueifDq8iBFsxN_2w3qK7h0nXBYYCDd6_2aEyI1se5euaOdQSDyt5GFXqY6wg9BOrezW9xQ2lJT5SbkEd--hPm4-hAOgUBBiaIusPDk9YyF_Xu0EfmNwhQzGR9DAHh9YNMJ7nOMAGFJrAoMNp5SZBn2Yxs5xqayW18UUhCGDZAsH033t22tNR-820plBgn0ZWlvHIQ0YyLivoUR-xmMUkpK3j2T0B-CdCMUsE0GLDXit0UE0BLdA%3D%3D)
---
| | **Today,[I'm asking you to help me defeat the radical Adam Schiff for a seat in the United States Senate.](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ccbe3cfe432d4564a4e1504baebeb445&_e=ZmMjqBPqr4VOaw4NLtksAnPPvuSKcwpb2I0WgWvquH96kHB4w3bW_7ERZ2jfZuPPCuocGZriiNo9ii5PhdcaSDkT0JJUCL8hPUztW5Q_w_vEAWKgSga1qd82BvmbiA347h1zuSSkAVj9H21YPTY6BmJ3gX4Ac5IyyffueifDq8iBFsxN_2w3qK7h0nXBYYCDd6_2aEyI1se5euaOdQSDyt5GFXqY6wg9BOrezW9xQ2ljt5PgwRr4ngMdNiH2tzP87Ynx-2SThavMzt7D0V_JnbxP6lCoCFZrFcCNQmLDa0Zf5qIa80AmoDy545QFpOuPja2fa1CCEgmRRqa_3bY0Y5-qzCsZA4zk_POVjc0-UhciDQCfV1GmAEKTjGF8BPmmRbwariOzHOgToW1ykW8LsA%3D%3D)** Today, I'm asking you to help me start a Republican Comeback Rally that folks will be talking about for generations to come. Because when you think about it, those 'good-ol' days of the 1970s weren't as good as we tend to first remember. Baseball was just a welcome distraction from the gloom and malaise that had settled on our country thanks to one failed Democrat policy after another. I'm running for the United States Senate because 2024 America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: \- Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. **_Remember?_** \- Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. **_Remember?_** \- Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. **_Remember??_** Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, "It's deja vu all over again." There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they _welcome_ the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And I wouldn't blame you if you said, "Steve, I'm afraid America's best days are behind us." But listen, here's something I also want you to remember... **_We Republicans_ ****pulled our country out of that 1970 's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan.** **We put classic conservative values at the heart of everything we did.** **And America became a shining city upon a hill once more.** _**We can do that again**_**.** **It starts by stunning the Democrats with a Senate win in California.** **But there 's no way I can pull it off without you.** **That 's why I'm asking you to rush in your $35 donation today** I'm sorry for the urgency but _the primary is in less than three months_ and here's where things stand... In March, I need to be one of the top 2 vote-getters to get to the November general election. Adam Schiff will probably take the #1 spot. And polls have me hot on his heels for the #2 spot. Once we're passed the primary, I know with your help, I can beat him in November. Why? First... I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. Second... you know I'm not a career politician. But I do have the one thing a Republican needs to get elected in California... ...name recognition. I'm no Schwarzenegger and I'd certainly never dare compare myself to President Reagan. But California voters know me. And Adam Schiff and the Democrats are shaking in their boots seeing how quickly I rose in the polls after entering the race. As I'm writing you this email, there are just a few percentage points separating us. We've got a shot -\- a very real shot -- of landing smack behind Schiff in the primary so we can go on to beat him in the general election. But there are just three months left until the primary. And the giant Democrat political machine is going to use every second of that time trying to bury me and our common sense message. **[**When you rush back your _Garvey for Senate_ campaign contribution of $35 or more...**](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ccbe3cfe432d4564a4e1504baebeb445&_e=ZmMjqBPqr4VOaw4NLtksAnPPvuSKcwpb2I0WgWvquH96kHB4w3bW_7ERZ2jfZuPPCuocGZriiNo9ii5PhdcaSDkT0JJUCL8hPUztW5Q_w_vEAWKgSga1qd82BvmbiA347h1zuSSkAVj9H21YPTY6BmJ3gX4Ac5IyyffueifDq8iBFsxN_2w3qK7h0nXBYYCDd6_2aEyI1se5euaOdQSDyt5GFXqY6wg9BOrezW9xQ2nJYibAuJODem7hvn5GimPvc2lsVM16kWbjEJdrsu4LwymFqHv4p_SOomAKIAHnCXtAa_T5dWyAfRMutuzX-nTJPj7l1M6ZkcSATqdYbPlxh1mObhxW4HV1oMMIZevfMAwRyRD5p8AS6ngJVSGAhgSPmU-_T_iZPm5U81-o1UWIKA%3D%3D)** ...you're helping fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: _You don 't have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free. _ This race is the toughest in the nation. But they say the hardest thing to do in sports is hit a 95-mph fastball. And you know I've done that plenty of times. Now I'm ready to do the hardest thing in American politics -\- win in California as a common sense Republican. But I can't do it without you. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. It all depends on you! You can do nothing and continue to suffer the agony of defeat. Or you can **[**step up to the plate with me and take a swing for the thrill of victory**](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ccbe3cfe432d4564a4e1504baebeb445&_e=ZmMjqBPqr4VOaw4NLtksAnPPvuSKcwpb2I0WgWvquH96kHB4w3bW_7ERZ2jfZuPPCuocGZriiNo9ii5PhdcaSDkT0JJUCL8hPUztW5Q_w_vEAWKgSga1qd82BvmbiA347h1zuSSkAVj9H21YPTY6BmJ3gX4Ac5IyyffueifDq8iBFsxN_2w3qK7h0nXBYYCDd6_2aEyI1se5euaOdQSDyt5GFXqY6wg9BOrezW9xQ2lbvCOieyV6niHd4n6IzILyRCuhawRjW9Q3roUQIBizcnwf9vxhLxnxbugO-7GoBYtYia54-0Xmiw9bZd0AABz_z1c5XENEN2hw74KRqoSpowznS7zggbIbuHGDpwtm4E-_PzPKzr_yf9U59avB333LyLaauue5Hw_0kwXGrp7DBg%3D%3D)**. Please join me. Because when we win in California, we're winning for all of America. Thank you and God Bless,
---
| | [](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ccbe3cfe432d4564a4e1504baebeb445&_e=ZmMjqBPqr4VOaw4NLtksAnPPvuSKcwpb2I0WgWvquH96kHB4w3bW_7ERZ2jfZuPPCuocGZriiNo9ii5PhdcaSDkT0JJUCL8hPUztW5Q_w_vEAWKgSga1qd82BvmbiA347h1zuSSkAVj9H21YPTY6BmJ3gX4Ac5IyyffueifDq8iBFsxN_2w3qK7h0nXBYYCDd6_2aEyI1se5euaOdQSDyt5GFXqY6wg9BOrezW9xQ2kudEHscX-mDXABoTJnCQJwe6bXvrms-w0Zher1XrbEDhukH81RxTrlGCXGuwkOsBmH3JABV5Ijv57bWqdpCSCw_-43bx-mC1npgL8RaasDCQzvYCen4vrmRSTmbdPDoqM6Zb6ST-mPehPCHAvVD8ePxqH4CgqZO_HVIhRVcUooeQ%3D%3D)
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate
---
| [](http://links.eaglecoalition.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ccbe3cfe432d4564a4e1504baebeb445&_e=ZmMjqBPqr4VOaw4NLtksAnPPvuSKcwpb2I0WgWvquH96kHB4w3bW_7ERZ2jfZuPPCuocGZriiNo9ii5PhdcaSDkT0JJUCL8hPUztW5Q_w_vEAWKgSga1qd82BvmbiA347h1zuSSkAVj9H21YPTY6BmJ3gX4Ac5IyyffueifDq8iBFsxN_2w3qK7h0nXBYYCDd6_2aEyI1se5euaOdQSDyt5GFXqY6wg9BOrezW9xQ2kAw80xoZUOPgBlCvbpkvyJ_UGHPqNc_5OJcXorOAUMF4sB4h9Na4ROSa4Xf6J0MC9m2RiG6hGnEGdR916hynoxndQmsuSd6rmiSTknGgRDHZIJEWGDGvTUCKR3Lhg-Gb_rl1_L2NviB-wLuMXuXdSqhAj5woIIXiMLvnAyIVtl6g%3D%3D)
---

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, If you opened this email because you remember my playing days with the Dodgers and the Padres, thank you. | | Having you and all of America's baseball fans cheering for me and Davey Lopes, Bill Russell, Ron Cey and the rest of the guys as we battled Reggie Jackson, Thurman Munson and the Yankees... ...well, as they say, "Those were the days." But this email isn't about baseball. In fact, it's a email I never thought I'd be writing to you. | | | Today, Today, I'm asking you to help me start a Republican Comeback Rally that folks will be talking about for generations to come. Because when you think about it, those 'good-ol' days of the 1970s weren't as good as we tend to first remember. Baseball was just a welcome distraction from the gloom and malaise that had settled on our country thanks to one failed Democrat policy after another. I'm running for the United States Senate because 2024 America is starting to look a lot like 1970s America. You remember what it was like: \- Not only were gas prices sky high, Carter's rationing meant we could only buy gas on even or odd days depending on our license plate numbers. Remember? \- Eleven Israeli athletes were slaughtered at the Olympic Village in Munich by terrorists. Remember? \- Fifty-two Americans were held hostage for 444 days by terrorists in Iran. Remember?? Democrat policies had brought America to its knees. And now, as Yogi Berra used to say, "It's deja vu all over again." There's fear of walking down the street because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. The cost of living is exploding and for the first time causing more people to leave California. Joe Biden, Adam Schiff and the rest of the Democrats don't care one bit that Americans are having a hard time. I'd go even further to say they welcome the misery so they can keep folks down and dependent. And I wouldn't blame you if you said, "Steve, I'm afraid America's best days are behind us." But listen, here's something I also want you to remember... We Republicans pulled our country out of that 1970 's Democratic malaise by electing Ronald Reagan. We put classic conservative values at the heart of everything we did. And America became a shining city upon a hill once more. We can do that again. It starts by stunning the Democrats with a Senate win in California. But there 's no way I can pull it off without you. That 's why I'm asking you to rush in your $35 donation today I'm sorry for the urgency but the primary is in less than three months and here's where things stand... In March, I need to be one of the top 2 vote-getters to get to the November general election. Adam Schiff will probably take the #1 spot. And polls have me hot on his heels for the #2 spot. Once we're passed the primary, I know with your help, I can beat him in November. Why? First... I've lived and worked in California for over 50 years, and I can tell you -\- voters here have had it with the Democrats like I've never seen before. They are hungry for change, and if you and I work together to reach voters in every neighborhood, on every beach, in every corner of California... I know we can turn this historic opportunity into a Republican win. Second... you know I'm not a career politician. But I do have the one thing a Republican needs to get elected in California... ...name recognition. I'm no Schwarzenegger and I'd certainly never dare compare myself to President Reagan. But California voters know me. And Adam Schiff and the Democrats are shaking in their boots seeing how quickly I rose in the polls after entering the race. As I'm writing you this email, there are just a few percentage points separating us. We've got a shot -\- a very real shot -- of landing smack behind Schiff in the primary so we can go on to beat him in the general election. But there are just three months left until the primary. And the giant Democrat political machine is going to use every second of that time trying to bury me and our common sense message. ...you're helping fund ads, appearances, events, fliers, door knockers, EVERYTHING that blankets California with the message: You don 't have to accept failed Democrat policies that make all of us less safe, less prosperous, and less free. This race is the toughest in the nation. But they say the hardest thing to do in sports is hit a 95-mph fastball. And you know I've done that plenty of times. Now I'm ready to do the hardest thing in American politics -\- win in California as a common sense Republican. But I can't do it without you. I'm fighting for the soul of the state I love -- but make no mistake -- I'm not just taking the field for Californians. When we win here... when we rip this seat out the hands of the radical Adam Schiff... ...we start the nationwide Republican Comeback Rally our country desperately needs. It all depends on you! You can do nothing and continue to suffer the agony of defeat. Or you can . Please join me. Because when we win in California, we're winning for all of America. Thank you and God Bless, | | Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | P.S. It's the bottom of the 9th and Republicans desperately need a homerun. We simply can't let another election slip through our fingers while Democrats go on destroying our country. With your help, I know we can beat Adam Schiff in California and start the Republican Comeback Rally America needs. But the primary is in just three months. Thank you! -Steve | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails ****_ |

| | Congrats, Peter! You are one of The Collective PAC’s most loyal supporters so we wanted to personally reach out to you with our most important survey of the year.

I’ll be hand-reviewing responses all week — if I have any questions, I’ll follow up.

[Will you click here and take our short survey now? It takes just 1 minute of your time and would mean so much to us. ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmx1G84qBFAg2F1xj4Dg9I0eSGSuXn82t07kA2t1X22nrPnyZafeveWH4OS6KBs0Rhb_99el7iwy_KQl6h1ztPJzYWZZeTkttGGtarpa7oFJ64c2zrDuKyAhE5Mb7nzV28FFxqCbWcWvU8GYgwiX6FmlRqcQ0TciaNQ5DSs9PVxmBwDpmHkrkdbQsSY-sTxJafyVuehfLuvHpaFKIBMMRzNaQmQUp3IKkQj7x28kyPdcqKe5xkI3THcKoDcMyTH2KCcqon-2vkNs-A0r_IlSrql9XeaBYfYgmMoMOZXdO2YVRDiO_iDEmujb7hU08rmpcJFFT7rd5Z_l9SmgoWfCmpC/43m/slTwwxLvRayCmtkGBWseCA/h1/H8TVpG60zwd_3z6ULE87v7IY6-Kj9q-p0Rk_1cQJKuQ) | | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmx1G84qBFAg2F1xj4Dg9I0eSGSuXn82t07kA2t1X22nrPnyZafeveWH4OS6KBs0Rhb_99el7iwy_KQl6h1ztPJzYWZZeTkttGGtarpa7oFJ64c2zrDuKyAhE5Mb7nzV28FFxqCbWcWvU8GYgwiX6FmsqcOhvxqx4Dmu8IwZDrFdgbJjoqBQNgZuCWdcmd38GOrPJeqcUjG3WNotKIXlDFU0nQdJL4UugEzsOPkDHoxLrT5uLmBpJFUpDsBJejPVlLi40oNEq-aBvdbBMHqahFpHX6Om0o4ZtUsqHHjq2OxNpu4XwowI-wQmvBJN3ze0Vpd7JDaf71jbWDFwY3Nt_9I/43m/slTwwxLvRayCmtkGBWseCA/h2/Jbi5JGScxjAc2uOAq-vj7Xga4_-wSE2nbLo5cP8V1_Q)

Here at The Collective PAC, we’re working harder than ever to fight back in 2024, because our democracy is at stake. But without important feedback from supporters like you, we won’t be prepared for Election Day.

— Quentin James
Co-founder of The Collective PAC

* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLiuag_ITPKB6kMOPIOHlAOf6Sgop-9WORaTK2vvZi1c8kTF-pJl6DjBfmFAEWYwGGkPtVJHKBfNrLFPAI9Dz0Rf9H-2cyhAwUZZ1icjMo9JIheRGtX64HZINIJP78qPV3Gn9RRQIs8YVCZP-2QAW31crc3TUeX1hteZCE7zBCFZqJZCKqVeZeyfiLtmoBysw4PnHOMT4FUiR8XMiShnEJ0Eh8OBTWT92xMHCZsxBK6eP2_LGeU8I6jZvTXKsu1Yc7xXNsl3ydOvAw3K_p5X4IzMBwnh_yrPbpMMMUWMleQeMcrdyRo2RV2TVoA8-qMxsz4/43m/slTwwxLvRayCmtkGBWseCA/h3/ywLGb0pQY0HLBYleewl9JvLqVn_2tNS-bctaWNaUqhA) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Fwd: Urge Lawmakers to Amend this Major Threat on Land Use
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
| Dear Peter, I wanted to make sure that you saw my email from last week. Oregon’s land use system is once again under threat—the governor’s Housing Production bill (SB 1537) allows cities a one-time urban growth boundary (UGB) expansion by at least 75 or 150 acres, much more than is needed to provide more affordable housing. We expect SB 1537 to have a hearing this week. [**Please write your legislators today and ask them to amend SB 1537 to remove the provision that allows for large UGB expansions.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78503096/453583508/195494879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE5MDE3OWM5LTA4YzUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FOulfswUR7ko4kfzmvh9NW1qPqmbETQRRqxmBcn4QmQ=&emci=4a75d1dc-79c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=190179c9-08c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=2107230) We can meet the housing needs of Oregonians and protect our iconic land use system. Thank you for taking action to defend the protections that make Oregon so special. Sincerely, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78503097/453583509/2036014996?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE5MDE3OWM5LTA4YzUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FOulfswUR7ko4kfzmvh9NW1qPqmbETQRRqxmBcn4QmQ=&emci=4a75d1dc-79c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=190179c9-08c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=2107230) | | Dear Peter, Unfortunately, I write to you with another Major Threat to our land use system. While we support many elements of the governor's Housing Production bill (SB 1537), including needed infrastructure funding and climate-smart housing incentives, this bill still contains core problematic issues. In its current form SB 1537 allows cities a one-time expansion of their urban growth boundaries (UGBs) by at least 75 or 150 acres. **[That’s why we need your help in contacting your lawmakers today asking them to amend SB 1537 to remove the provision that allows large UGB expansions.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78503098/453583510/2036014996?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE5MDE3OWM5LTA4YzUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FOulfswUR7ko4kfzmvh9NW1qPqmbETQRRqxmBcn4QmQ=&emci=4a75d1dc-79c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=190179c9-08c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=2107230)** Overriding land use and environmental laws will not produce the housing Oregonians need, where they need it, and with the urgency needed. In fact, sidestepping land use laws to expand UGBs to build primarily private-sector, high-end housing will undermine our efforts to build the housing most Oregonians need - for those of middle and lower incomes. We expect SB 1537 to have a hearing next week, the first week of the 2024 Short Session. Right now is our best opportunity to get this bill amended so it is no longer a Major Threat to a Healthy Oregon. **[Please ask your lawmakers to amend SB 1537 to remove the large UGB expansion provision.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78503099/453583511/2036014996?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE5MDE3OWM5LTA4YzUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FOulfswUR7ko4kfzmvh9NW1qPqmbETQRRqxmBcn4QmQ=&emci=4a75d1dc-79c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=190179c9-08c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=2107230)** Here’s why your lawmakers needs to hear from you: Spending limited infrastructure dollars goes further and faster inside UGBs––where we have over ten thousand acres of vacant land designated for residential use––to produce more houses than spending those dollars on new land, added at the edge. Residential lands inside UGBs are often closer to existing infrastructure or have some infrastructure in place, but need just a bit more. This means less cost and less time to get more homes on the ground than through a UGB expansion. Building at the edge puts more people farther away from the services, stores, and jobs they need. This is bad for climate leading to more driving, while also making living at the edge much less affordable. Building at the edge also increases climate change and wildfire risks to lives, livelihoods, and homes.

Building at the edge exacerbates inequality and racial and economic injustice. Housing policies should open up existing neighborhoods to those who have been racially redlined and economically excluded from areas of opportunity: those of lower incomes, people of color, Black people, indigenous people, and those on fixed incomes. We can and must take meaningful actions to deliver the climate-friendly housing Oregonians need, where they need it, and quickly. Thankfully, we have a Governor and State Legislature poised to take historic action to pass transformative housing production legislation in 2024. We need to ensure the actions taken today are building the Oregon we want for today and the future. **[Please let your lawmakers know that they should amend this Major Threat - SB 1537 - to remove the large UGB expansion provision.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78503103/453583512/2036014996?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjE5MDE3OWM5LTA4YzUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=FOulfswUR7ko4kfzmvh9NW1qPqmbETQRRqxmBcn4QmQ=&emci=4a75d1dc-79c4-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=190179c9-08c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=2107230)** And then they should pass this bill. Thank you,

Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV

| |
---|---|---

name: KARI LAKE
subject: THE DEEP STATE IS REAL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate
body:
The game was rigged from the start.

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=b23c7c240b074d44a10380dcd7bea9af&_e=NE5oVlk-Fjv-wD28hYbmSkNF2z9YN742fqLXamyYgcVuz2HwG93AbIdh-z1pFR82JLyNX74j2cXYIFn65LmrcAaKAWGNEhB6s8ZU8HnnOterKJCBj1KEmEI36AtMyQz658fTzedr3CIr_1ECUdz919F9PO_PCZs99lwAqZTH3I4pI32ywPUjXYDvfHATzcEM3t7UbzTNpePMgYt4vlZVROGcTG5Kn-ENo6RRQvpkphExcHyba1klkC4r9B2qojoGhZjTdtow9g-Fh9ntSVbhYHIFIWqyAvmDO54NEO5ROTQCBhqNZOjMaSCFpiIYRnbYqtUv9ZHaoVHRacKQmj-ZECj3579mGaobAX7fyb2uqSozfBKmwMmt07Sf3L0mNjWnvl2as45dlgwVrlPFvCbn6rfBCAxKIjyaREs2MLD9cVM%3D)
---
**THE DEEP STATE IS REAL.**

The game was rigged from the start. For decades, the people 'Out East' have been choosing our elected officials, giving them their stamp of approval, and calling them 'the people's choice.'

You haven't heard about it because nobody has been willing to come clean until now. They didn't want me to run, tried to interfere, and offered the deal of a lifetime to keep me out. **Well, they 're going to have to kill me to stop me.**

**You deserve to know the truth. Here 's what it's like to be bribed by agents of the deep state >>>**

JD: Is there a number at which...

KL: I can be bought?

JD: Not be bought...

KL: That's what it's about...

JD: You can take a pause for a couple of years and go right back to what you're doing.

KL: No. Ten million? Twenty million? No. A billion? **No. This isn 't about money. It's about our country. **

KL: So, what's going on? I'm assuming this is about our friend.

JD: This is back east. **There are very powerful people that want to keep you out.**

KL: I know they do.

JD: But they're willing to put their money where their mouth is, in a big way. So, this conversation never happened.

KL: This is crazy, though. They should want me. I'm a great candidate; people love me. **These people are corrupt.**

JD: Well, maybe you're right. I'll get myself in trouble. If you say no, that's fine, it's your choice, don't tell people.

KL: You know what it is? The people don't get to choose their elected officials unless they're pre-approved by the swamp, and the swamp doesn't approve of me. **You know what? I think you should go public with this.**

JD: No, no, no, no, no, I'll turn the key in my car, and *BOOOM* You know what? I wish you'd just give me a counteroffer.

KL: **I CAN 'T BE BOUGHT!**

If this transcript proves one thing, it's that 'The Folks Out East' think everyone and everything can be bought. They really didn't expect me to care more about this country than I do my own pockets.

The corporate puppeteers and their suited-up lackeys didn't want me to run.

Now that I've exposed them for who they are, there's no telling what comes next.

No matter what happens, we have an election in November, and we've got to win.

The only people I can count on are people like YOU. YOU are the reason I turned down their corrupt offer, and YOU make this country worth fighting for.

**If you can give $25, $50, or anything you can spare to help my campaign WIN in Arizona, I 'd be eternally grateful for your support.

If you can give $100, $250, or more... I can rest easy knowing we have dedicated grassroots patriots willing to do EVERYTHING required to Take Back Arizona. This would make a HUGE difference, and I will never forget your support.

Together, we'll beat the deep state and prove that you don't have to be a pawn to win in America. The people's voice will always triumph over evil. Please contribute and mail it to my office, and let's win TOGETHER in 2024.**

| [**DONATE HERE** ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=b23c7c240b074d44a10380dcd7bea9af&_e=NE5oVlk-Fjv-wD28hYbmSkNF2z9YN742fqLXamyYgcVuz2HwG93AbIdh-z1pFR82JLyNX74j2cXYIFn65LmrcAaKAWGNEhB6s8ZU8HnnOterKJCBj1KEmEI36AtMyQz658fTzedr3CIr_1ECUdz919F9PO_PCZs99lwAqZTH3I4pI32ywPUjXYDvfHATzcEM3t7UbzTNpePMgYt4vlZVROGcTG5Kn-ENo6RRQvpkphExcHyba1klkC4r9B2qojoG2doMLyn9_3zbl5mN7dGtrJjpMwM9onGsrH1-XItgC5Sukj5M24N0OtKWMyI-cI8RQgvf9fDhJtwKzIjeqyp1cCWlWDjjz41jrmSiLdAIh53yqniM8wIqme-KoMrV48xghggf2DnfnYVzx5MK1IWMkPQbritEhpChFpmc03gFv0Y%3D)
---

God Bless,

Kari Lake

Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate

---

If you'd like to donate by mail, **[click here](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=b23c7c240b074d44a10380dcd7bea9af&_e=NE5oVlk-Fjv-wD28hYbmSgVwiT7U8lX7CGRFlRJvNlovk0Fc7dzQxuY0cGXOggD6t6DpLcX_I1g57b7E35gZNNPrv2sd0fiAXSwKPZ6M67cMJ8zHU_720uzCQGgWZMWyiuMuHzh6dvFiEh4Ukj8XGDKStmR8NjV62OYuI71M-s9P0eDW8YtBFMJzVTXbmQUR54-sH_OyJnnk8k5_emSY4kg8BsePu8Dk2OMP44E6J0TNGPq9m5X38R4EYtyfoXpEZAQ3lhuejSI3bnPHNtQwbw%3D%3D)**.
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Don't want to receive our emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](https://click.historyoftheday.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_s=b23c7c240b074d44a10380dcd7bea9af&_t=_Ev-RfNcbpR3qSbgkHgV7m0_Au8DhzTaXKPg2CTq9wUXBVI7YFhG6lx8sf7loPI9mBuJXvalhOVg3r4j-qMZ6-xU-iV-0ECLGP5RljGVyfQ%3D)

[ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=b23c7c240b074d44a10380dcd7bea9af&_e=NE5oVlk-Fjv-wD28hYbmSi7ErKe3EAYu7mb23Y76Nz7bsrRtZ307WMd9Ncq53NjS1-jTfu1o9FqOWehSXrp_IQ0700YLt6iljtTafjCWK-U_1HL9z3gaN1CiK_EDsXwLS0K3dmMw33J7Pzre7jHx-gxTXzuVsGV3kI7LELCtHf09tMxzvmmc4y-AZUFgVA3ktE32nFdM-CYKBJyxR764pSWbrTiHNQ71w1-0xzL7XbcWTC6zSQv7QFtJSSKVfSDD)

[ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=b23c7c240b074d44a10380dcd7bea9af&_e=NE5oVlk-Fjv-wD28hYbmSi7ErKe3EAYu7mb23Y76Nz7bsrRtZ307WMd9Ncq53NjS1-jTfu1o9FqOWehSXrp_IQ0700YLt6iljtTafjCWK-WOo4jpUvx6IjWsE2L0IBmhnT1ml1tYH85UmgWNNIOm9rVTUQHavRQVSNdEBLkee8ZPWgW3I7ikUSgVqzCi_f6f4Bwym3t7VfUAr6w2ISx70mbYxMpJ8PQpu3pEUzOX3fpGP3z3dtoUBTVgSvrKWTCV)

name: Restore our Nation
subject: What is the Great Reset?
body:
This initiative is not merely about economic reform.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VjgJFj_q3B3BSUQIXJs7SA~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
| | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VjgJFj_q3B3BSUQIXJs7SA~~/AARclAA~~~) Dear Fellow American,

A few years ago, members of the world's elite met at the annual World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, and launched the Great Reset initiative.

What is their plan, and what does it mean for America?

In short, they aim to transform the world economy. As Klaus Schwab--the founder and executive director of the Forum--wrote, "We need a 'Great Reset' of capitalism." If successful, their plan would also have the effect of destroying our American way of life.

This initiative is not merely about economic reform. It is an attempt to impose global rule by so-called experts.

Some social media companies are censoring our efforts to promote a seminar we hosted on the Hillsdale campus that explored the topic of the Great Reset. Fortunately, we are able to communicate directly with you.

In this seminar, we consider the idea of the Great Reset and its implications for America. But that's not all. We also delve into pro-freedom alternatives to this tyrannical plan.

**Sign up now using the secure link below, and we 'll send the Great Reset seminar lectures--absolutely free--directly to your inbox.**

[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/the-great-reset-cca/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/VjgJFj_q3B3BSUQIXJs7SA~~/AARclAA~~~)

Don't miss this opportunity to learn lessons that are essential to the defense of American liberty.

Use the link above to receive your Great Reset video series today.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| |
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wS8FFsCKWDyjQLEyOFUP6w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnpPBOP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmW-81rCZUxOVG1SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/KGu9lEaTVly9F0ow0dZWTw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnpPBOP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplvvNawmVMTlRtUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

subject: Drew Went Viral On Fox News! 📢
body:
Updates & events from the campaign trail. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drewfornevada/drew-went-viral-on-fox-news?e=fc26432468)
---
| [ ](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=39831f343f&e=fc26432468)
---
|

|
## [PRIORITIES](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=484fdd3a79&e=fc26432468) | [VOLUNTEER](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=9ae1d0bb42&e=fc26432468) | [MEDIA |](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=b5269618bd&e=fc26432468) [CONTRIBUTE](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=1bff4383ec&e=fc26432468)
---
| | | | [](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=ea5be80a5b&e=fc26432468)

[](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=24686a21ab&e=fc26432468)

[](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=c443acf96e&e=fc26432468)
---
[](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=9a78584f1d&e=fc26432468)
---
| | |
---
| Peter -
---
| All eyes will be on Nevada this week as our Republican Presidential Caucus is taking place from 5-7:30 pm this **Thursday, February 8th**. If you need help figuring out your caucus location, [click ](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=bc53b42060&e=fc26432468)[here](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=33e9b73309&e=fc26432468).

You can caucus for President Trump _AND_ help our campaign. We are **actively seeking volunteers** to assist us on Thursday evening at multiple caucus locations within CD-3. If you are interested in volunteering, please [email Linnea](mailto:linnea@drewfornevada.com?subject=I'd%20like%20to%20volunteer!).

Your involvement will be instrumental in ensuring that we _tell as many caucus attendees as possible about our campaign rooted in individual liberty and limited government_. Our amazing volunteers** ** have been the driving force behind our campaign, and I'm so grateful for each and every person who has contributed their time, energy, and passion.

Finally, **Fox News featured my latest column** and **_it went VIRAL_** \-- and for good reason. I caught the Biden administration cutting Medicare Advantage benefits, which makes healthcare worse for our seniors and increases costs for taxpayers. Make sure to scroll down to read the entire article!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=86d843538b&e=fc26432468)
---
| | [](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=4dd709a2bd&e=fc26432468)

---
| PS - If you know someone who would be interested in learning more about my campaign to flip this crucial U.S. House seat, please [forward them this email](https://us14.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=7e8205df75&e=fc26432468).

As always, thank you for your [continued support of our campaign!](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=bb862ee540&e=fc26432468) No matter the amount -- whether it's $5, $55, or $500 -- every dollar makes a difference!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
# _**On the Campaign Trail**_
Drew and Sarah had a great time at the **inaugural meeting for Siena Patriots** , a dedicated group of volunteers and leaders helping to elect great conservative candidates in Nevada. Many of the attendees spent their weekend **collecting signatures to put a voter ID initiative on the ballot** in November.
---
|
---
Drew speaking to Siena Patriots
| Drew attended the **Trump Rally in Las Vegas** where he and a team of volunteers handed out literature, met constituents, and showed support for President Trump. **Drew[endorsed President Trump](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=a5531e896d&e=fc26432468)** and will be caucusing for him on Thursday.
---
|
---
Drew meeting supporters at the Trump Rally
| Drew celebrated **National School Choice Week** by attending the Vegas School Choice Fair. Drew supports school choice because **every child, no matter their income, race, or zip code deserves a quality education!**
---
|
---
Celebrating National School Choice Week
| Drew attended the **Healthcare Financial Management Association's Western Region Symposium** and met with healthcare leaders to discuss issues facing providers, health plans, and patients.
---
|
---
Drew at the opening reception for the Healthcare Financial Management Association
| Drew was a special guest at the **Total Product Expo** , a trade show featuring vapes, cigars, and other products held at the Las Vegas Convention Center. While there, Drew was interviewed about [his articles](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=aa23c379e0&e=fc26432468) explaining how the federal government's failed policies towards vaping needlessly kills Americans.
---
|
---
Drew interviewed at the Total Product Expo
|
---
|
---
|
# _**In the Media**_
---
| [ ](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=1681d52040&e=fc26432468)

| Fox News featured Drew's latest column **exposing the Biden Administration's plan to cut Medicare Advantage benefits and harm high-quality health care for seniors,** while increasing costs for taxpayers.

# _YOU Can Help Us Defeat Susie Lee!_
Want to help Drew and make sure Republicans maintain control of the House of Representatives? We need your help! This race is going to be tight, and **having supporters like you step up and lend a hand is vital!**

Here are the **_TOP 3_ ways _YOU_ can get involved:**

1. **Donate: **Simply chipping in a few dollars to support our efforts is incredibly helpful. Whether it's $3 or $3,000, every donation makes a _huge_ difference! Just $18 buys coffee and donuts for volunteers! **You can contribute to the campaign [HERE](https://DrewForNevada.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=faca3bfedb5031bc3491ebbc8&id=3c635f7f1e&e=fc26432468)**.

name: Col. Mike Waltz (Ret.)
subject: What are your core values?
body:
It’s a question that every person should ask themselves. | | | _**What are your core values?**_ It’s a question that every person should ask themselves as we begin this new year.

In Congress, too many politicians are driven by greed and power.

_But that will never be me._

I served our country as a Green Beret, and _the same values I held every day fighting for our freedom abroad I still hold in Washington D.C. every day._

I’m going tell your about which values are most important to me, and I hope you’ll take a moment to reflect on the values YOU bring to the ballot box when you vote.

**So, let’s start with one of the most important virtues you need in leadership:_sacrifice_. **

Serving as a Green Beret, I had to put my own needs and impulses to the side for the good of our country.

I spent many birthdays, holidays, and celebrations away from my family on the other side of the world.

_It was tough, but I wouldn’t trade it for anything._

Too many politicians today have never sacrificed anything.

They’re motivated by self interest, not the interests of our country.

**Let me be clear: I will always put service to my country and my constituents over my own personal gain.**

**[I’m on a mission to bring more leaders to Washington who put service over self, but I need your help. Can you pitch in now and help us win for real leaders?](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=5aa588c5787b4c14b415633f068798ef&_e=IDROdxPmWc9IN2DQaaWVrFVLdM28Kaljmpz_Ir3SBb3hUTf8-Rtre3K1M8O_w4_IEmmwTRuYrCTk_dlLikwuy6ZERBhHASt5Bksj_FKo100hCy1kQDaHG8kVI_6YeeT8PrbCn8V92pOGIyz_febJI573cnfjTbP7vMPA6ZiPqPtTC4flD8E023JhgYIhh85KZ4YSWfAzdOjQsMnvCCyMlTszqHyzG6xgzbytxaH_rc8iEc8eyndRC_v6lNZ34z_yo3CqYyQzz66rwPgu_OBL4msfNFAIrc56XyCHTSbU3Tzghh12QAH0mYCeiilBFw9vYbDO77euRKDjpH_9e7yetVkEWIVjCAMNtrGOQvvHx8zlWnU3xejyGQiDBXlaccD5)**
