name: Judicial Watch NewsLink
subject: Judicial Watch Sues for Records on Alleged Cover-Up of Biden Classified Materials at Penn Biden Center
body: Background on report of concern in Biden White House over report of special counsel on Biden's handling of his papers [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66907&L=31305&F=T&&hash=4fdb2b3548c34645abf4d7918aa003fa43fed6e515afd3bfc52afcb19f4bd49a] Biden’s Team Is Worried About Special Counsel’s Report on His Mishandling of Classified Docs [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66907&L=31305&F=T&&hash=4fdb2b3548c34645abf4d7918aa003fa43fed6e515afd3bfc52afcb19f4bd49a] Source: PJ Media [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66907&L=31305&F=T&&hash=4fdb2b3548c34645abf4d7918aa003fa43fed6e515afd3bfc52afcb19f4bd49a] Biden's team is still really nervous about special counsel Robert Hur's forthcoming report, which could come this week, because, according to a report from Axios, "they believe Hur's report will include embarrassing details — possibly with photos — on how Biden stored documents." [13x13x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66907&L=31305&F=T&&hash=4fdb2b3548c34645abf4d7918aa003fa43fed6e515afd3bfc52afcb19f4bd49a] READ MORE [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66907&L=31305&F=T&&hash=4fdb2b3548c34645abf4d7918aa003fa43fed6e515afd3bfc52afcb19f4bd49a] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66907&L=31313&F=T&&hash=f4ec6243c9fcce7c5ea3b4213308d9803e067a2285ccd7624337b17e652a5fdc] 2023-07-06 State Supreme Court Lets University of Delaware Keep Biden Senate Records Hidden From The Public [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66907&L=31313&F=T&&hash=f4ec6243c9fcce7c5ea3b4213308d9803e067a2285ccd7624337b17e652a5fdc] Source: Judicial Watch [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66907&L=31313&F=T&&hash=f4ec6243c9fcce7c5ea3b4213308d9803e067a2285ccd7624337b17e652a5fdc] The Delaware Supreme Court sided with the University of Delaware, denying the release of President Joe Biden’s Senate records in a lawsuit brought by the Daily Caller News Foundation and Judicial Watch. “The public has a significant interest in these documents,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton told the DCNF. “If the Delaware courts are going to protect Biden from having to produce them or the secret deal that keeps them away from the American people, then Congress should get involved.” [13x13x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66907&L=31313&F=T&&hash=f4ec6243c9fcce7c5ea3b4213308d9803e067a2285ccd7624337b17e652a5fdc] READ MORE [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66907&L=31313&F=T&&hash=f4ec6243c9fcce7c5ea3b4213308d9803e067a2285ccd7624337b17e652a5fdc] [180x150x2] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66907&L=31194&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tY2xhc3NpZmllZC1tYXRlcmlhbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3NsaW5rJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=e86b2cfef1f0a10a6e3aee6893b49a1aabca78082baff50bad51212a5d909606] 2024-01-23 Judicial Watch Sues for Records on Alleged Cover-Up of Biden Classified Materials at Penn Biden Center [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66907&L=31194&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tY2xhc3NpZmllZC1tYXRlcmlhbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3NsaW5rJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=e86b2cfef1f0a10a6e3aee6893b49a1aabca78082baff50bad51212a5d909606] Source: Judicial Watch [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66907&L=31194&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW4tY2xhc3NpZmllZC1tYXRlcmlhbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPW5ld3NsaW5rJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=e86b2cfef1f0a10a6e3aee6893b49a1aabca78082baff50bad51212a5d909606] Judicial Watch filed a FOIA lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Defense for documents regarding a key Biden staffer allegedly involved in the handling of Joe Biden’s materials housed at Penn Biden Center. “While the Biden administration was scheming to jail former President Trump over a document dispute, Biden operatives were desperately trying to cover up Biden’s own and more significant document scandal,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “And the cover-up continues with yet another Biden agency hiding records in violation of law.” [13x13x1] clean_body: Background on report of concern in Biden White House over report of special counsel on Biden's handling of his papers [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [] Biden’s Team Is Worried About Special Counsel’s Report on His Mishandling of Classified Docs [] Source: PJ Media [] Biden's team is still really nervous about special counsel Robert Hur's forthcoming report, which could come this week, because, according to a report from Axios, "they believe Hur's report will include embarrassing details — possibly with photos — on how Biden stored documents." [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] [] 2023-07-06 State Supreme Court Lets University of Delaware Keep Biden Senate Records Hidden From The Public [] Source: Judicial Watch [] The Delaware Supreme Court sided with the University of Delaware, denying the release of President Joe Biden’s Senate records in a lawsuit brought by the Daily Caller News Foundation and Judicial Watch. “The public has a significant interest in these documents,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton told the DCNF. “If the Delaware courts are going to protect Biden from having to produce them or the secret deal that keeps them away from the American people, then Congress should get involved.” [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x2] [] 2024-01-23 Judicial Watch Sues for Records on Alleged Cover-Up of Biden Classified Materials at Penn Biden Center [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch filed a FOIA lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Defense for documents regarding a key Biden staffer allegedly involved in the handling of Joe Biden’s materials housed at Penn Biden Center. “While the Biden administration was scheming to jail former President Trump over a document dispute, Biden operatives were desperately trying to cover up Biden’s own and more significant document scandal,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “And the cover-up continues with yet another Biden agency hiding records in violation of law.” [13x13x1] [] READ MORE [] [180x150x3] [] 2024-01-10 Records Show Joe Biden Used Email Alias in Correspondence which Included Hunter Biden and James Biden [] Source: Judicial Watch [] Judicial Watch received 426 pages of records in a FOIA lawsuit from the National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) that show then-Vice President Joe Biden’s use of an email alias to correspond with family members, including son Hunter and brother James. name: Lucas Tyree Kunce
subject: It’s time to take back Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat for real working people.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We’re going to defeat Josh Hawley and put everyday people in charge of our country. Please let me explain how we got here.
#
I’m so proud of the campaign we’ve built together, Peter.
From launching this campaign last year on January 6 to calling out Josh Hawley on cable news to breaking Missouri fundraising records quarter after quarter, your support has helped us put a national spotlight on this U.S. Senate race.
**And now, multiple polls are showing that we’re in a neck-and-neck race with Josh Hawley — the GOP’s most unpopular U.S. Senator running in 2024.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43366?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF)
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to add your first donation of any amount toward my campaign to defeat Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. **But first, please let me share a little more about how we got here.**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43366?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF)**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43366?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF)
I grew up in mid-Missouri. And like so many other Americans, my family lived paycheck-to-paycheck. So when my little sister was born with a heart condition, the medical bills bankrupted us. Maxed-out credit cards and no money left, times had never been tougher.
But we weren’t alone — our community took care of us. When my parents had to take my sister to the hospital in St. Louis, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes and brought more meals by the house than we could ever hope to eat. **That’s the Missouri I grew up in.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43366?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF)
Their support helped send me to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they had done for me and my family growing up. Got deployed to Iraq and Afghanistan. Later the Pentagon. I was on the Joint Staff negotiating arms control agreements with NATO and Russia.
When I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, one of the hardest things was seeing what was happening back in my old neighborhood. It was a community picked for parts — the local corner store boarded up, my first family house bulldozed to the ground. **Here’s all that’s left of it:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43366?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF)
While all of us were risking our lives building up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians like Josh Hawley let our country waste away. They spent trillions on bailouts, tax breaks, and subsidies for the industries that stripped our communities for parts — like Wall Street, Big Pharma, and Big Oil — and then told us they can’t figure out how to invest even a fraction of that into building up our own country and investing in our own people.
**I saw what was happening — and I was ready to fight back.**
So in my final year of active duty, I worked to upend the corporate defense monopolies that leave our country less safe. I also joined an organization that fights corporate monopolies — we took on defense contractors, Big Pharma, Big Tech, Big Ag, Wall Street. The people buying off our politicians and leaving the rest of us behind.
**And now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to replace Josh Hawley and fundamentally change who has power in our country** — so everyday people call the shots, not massive corporations or corrupt politicians. I want to abolish corporate PACs, expose lobbyists writing our laws, criminalize war profiteering, ban insider trading among members of Congress, and enact a Marshall Plan for the Midwest — a massive investment and job creation program that will rebuild our forgotten communities and get us off fossil fuels once and for all.
I want to codify Roe v. Wade, secure voting rights, and ban anti-union “Right-to-Work” scams forever. I want to put working people in charge of our country. But I need your help to get it done.
**Without a single cent of corporate PAC money, we’re building the people-powered movement that’s going to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat — and I need you on our team.[Please add a donation of any amount right now so we can continue building this movement and finally give power back to everyday, working people.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43366?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43367?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43367?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43366?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF)
---
I’m not just running to make a point — **this is a race we can win.**
**Josh Hawley is vulnerable.** In 2018, he won his seat with only 51% of the vote — and after he exposed himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6th, he became the least popular Republican Senator up for re-election in 2024.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43366?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF)
Since Hawley was elected, Missourians have broken with him and taken back their power at the ballot box by voting to raise the minimum wage, expand Medicaid through the Affordable Care Act, and legalize cannabis.
And if we’re able to communicate to voters early in this race that our campaign is about taking this U.S. Senate seat back for real Missourians, we have a real shot at defeating Josh Hawley.
**But I need you on this team to get it done, Peter.** GOP insiders and even Hawley’s own campaign have already started attacking me — and over the coming months, they’re bound to get even more vicious. That’s why we need to start preparing right now to fight back and deliver our positive message to voters.
**[Will you chip in anything you can right now so we can keep building this record-breaking grassroots movement and stay prepared for the fight ahead? I don’t take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say anything makes a big difference to our campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43366?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43367?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=12&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43367?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=13&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43367?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=14&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43367?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=15&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43367?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=16&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43367?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=17&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/43366?refcode=em20240206-4761&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=18&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF)
---
Together, we can take back power from corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley and finally put real, everyday people in charge of our country.
Thanks for helping us get it done,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240206-4761-footer&t=19&refcode2=4761_614464_mZ1uOF&akid=4761%2E614464%2EmZ1uOF)**

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to add your first donation of any amount toward my campaign to defeat Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. But first, please let me share a little more about how we got here. I grew up in mid-Missouri. And like so many other Americans, my family lived paycheck-to-paycheck. So when my little sister was born with a heart condition, the medical bills bankrupted us. Maxed-out credit cards and no money left, times had never been tougher. But we weren’t alone — our community took care of us. When my parents had to take my sister to the hospital in St. Louis, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes and brought more meals by the house than we could ever hope to eat. That’s the Missouri I grew up in. Their support helped send me to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they had done for me and my family growing up. Got deployed to Iraq and Afghanistan. Later the Pentagon. I was on the Joint Staff negotiating arms control agreements with NATO and Russia. When I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, one of the hardest things was seeing what was happening back in my old neighborhood. It was a community picked for parts — the local corner store boarded up, my first family house bulldozed to the ground. Here’s all that’s left of it: While all of us were risking our lives building up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians like Josh Hawley let our country waste away. They spent trillions on bailouts, tax breaks, and subsidies for the industries that stripped our communities for parts — like Wall Street, Big Pharma, and Big Oil — and then told us they can’t figure out how to invest even a fraction of that into building up our own country and investing in our own people. I saw what was happening — and I was ready to fight back. So in my final year of active duty, I worked to upend the corporate defense monopolies that leave our country less safe. I also joined an organization that fights corporate monopolies — we took on defense contractors, Big Pharma, Big Tech, Big Ag, Wall Street. The people buying off our politicians and leaving the rest of us behind. And now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to replace Josh Hawley and fundamentally change who has power in our country — so everyday people call the shots, not massive corporations or corrupt politicians. I want to abolish corporate PACs, expose lobbyists writing our laws, criminalize war profiteering, ban insider trading among members of Congress, and enact a Marshall Plan for the Midwest — a massive investment and job creation program that will rebuild our forgotten communities and get us off fossil fuels once and for all. I want to codify Roe v. Wade, secure voting rights, and ban anti-union “Right-to-Work” scams forever. I want to put working people in charge of our country. But I need your help to get it done. Without a single cent of corporate PAC money, we’re building the people-powered movement that’s going to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat — and I need you on our team. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: I’m not just running to make a point — this is a race we can win. Josh Hawley is vulnerable. In 2018, he won his seat with only 51% of the vote — and after he exposed himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6th, he became the least popular Republican Senator up for re-election in 2024. Since Hawley was elected, Missourians have broken with him and taken back their power at the ballot box by voting to raise the minimum wage, expand Medicaid through the Affordable Care Act, and legalize cannabis. And if we’re able to communicate to voters early in this race that our campaign is about taking this U.S. Senate seat back for real Missourians, we have a real shot at defeating Josh Hawley. But I need you on this team to get it done, Peter. GOP insiders and even Hawley’s own campaign have already started attacking me — and over the coming months, they’re bound to get even more vicious. That’s why we need to start preparing right now to fight back and deliver our positive message to voters. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Together, we can take back power from corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley and finally put real, everyday people in charge of our country. Thanks for helping us get it done, Lucas Kunce | | Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

clean_body: | = Friend, We are exactly one month – four more Tuesdays – before our critical Election Day to decide who should continue Adam Schiff’s productive legacy in Congress. With ballots having been mailed out across our district, our race is officially on. As you’re well-aware, we have a top-two primary system in California, which means every vote being cast right now has a major impact on our ability to make it to November in this crowded race. Our campaign has been fortunate to earn the support of a large swath of public servants and notable organizations, but with ballots in the hands of voters, we have to ramp-up our most important direct outreach between now and the March 5 election. = | **= We are closer than ever to electing the first progressive woman to represent CA-30, and people like YOU are making this possible. But every remaining undecided voter can make a difference between our being on the November ballot or watching from home. That will take significant effort and resources, and as the candidate who’s pledged to never take a dime from corporate PACs, that means we have to work harder than special-interest funded candidates to reach voters. = We’re stronger because of you. name: Sean Feucht
subject: WATCH: A powerful scene from Lahaina
body:
Maui gathers to seek God after the fires ravaged Lahaina| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=454beb69f1b442b9bc3f1f6bfdf06ebb&_e=rns3qGQYbqzc946L88XgLl2uSPQb9l35W6j8ASXgWtHXX-g4HVEXS3HktPN04ca2BTzRPBzEeu_izB3E1_t3Bp0sgOJuyG6U7frUTwb6Gsx80LYhtVeV6uC1uuheeCTxaYH8wuIdTfZOlwJSbWvhUhPEKkokpHxElJzD81jf4iBkvjoVa4IkAKOncc-89saVSWb3qd5paYWWV8if1QJZgFNMLiwce1vLT1DPqq5zNmk2wsRtJr6Et_GJkX5oIscGpgHn3rc1SzTN8POBD0So13kkbzibhOwxmeuW5dY43tcq2PIJ1AcsRaxphJAyTkTl)
---
Dear Friend,
---
The 24-hour media cycle; a tragedy can seize the heart of a nation, then disappear from the collective conscience as quickly as it arrived. This is Lahaina.

Last year, devastating fires ravaged the community of Lahaina, situated on the Hawaiian island of Maui. The smoke hadn't cleared before the media moved on from the tragedy. The day before we held our first Kingdom to the Capitol stop of the year in Honolulu (more on that later!), we gathered on Maui to pray and worship with Believers still hurting. It was a powerful time of pain and hope, but through it all one thing was clear— God has not forgotten Lahaina.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=454beb69f1b442b9bc3f1f6bfdf06ebb&_e=rns3qGQYbqzc946L88XgLl2uSPQb9l35W6j8ASXgWtHXX-g4HVEXS3HktPN04ca2BTzRPBzEeu_izB3E1_t3Bp0sgOJuyG6U7frUTwb6Gsx80LYhtVeV6uC1uuheeCTxaYH8wuIdTfZOlwJSbWvhUhPEKkokpHxElJzD81jf4iDaZEjqHBDibRiVhmJJ5vGvCxsF4LwuI2TGGTwWj605u0mg2w_FSp7N3TZiDz2ZxKQy0LeBeWa5JSAYBg6nv5fe5a5Cmg0fyaZ97kSUehrBrlQi6yNx9fPI9G0lYLUin3tMWe1Z4zcXumvyOOpQXSai)
---
Till All Hear,
---
---
Sean

name: Kat Cammack
subject: House Floor To-Do List:

| Friend
I've gone head to head with failed Secretary of Homeland Security, Alejandro Mayorkas, many times...
...so I'm thrilled to report that House Republicans will be voting to IMPEACH MAYORKAS on the House floor TODAY.
Alejandro Mayorkas swore an oath to protect and defend the American people - but all he has done is endanger them by fanning the flames of the border crisis.

* He refuses to uphold immigration laws,

* He repeatedly exceeds his authority,

* He risks public safety,

* He has made false statements to Congress

* He has obstructed congressional oversight

* And he has thwarted the construction of the U.S.- Mexico border wall.

Do you stand with House Republicans as we seek to IMPEACH this failed Secretary of Homeland Security?
[If you do, please take a moment to sign the petition to make it clear to Congress that the American People want to IMPEACH MAYORKAS.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001pJmFns-kcUIyqvUhFd7P2di4cWHMF0Hb32sUPmeqRV0uYBPl2_UGVoGqw6T3-rT67B38EOO1P8eAklEP6I-gA6zBTEt3qpOvtnlCQAbySXVDzhaENjVBC-XL7foiQPcP7R96cJca59nTvHZx4SPgGoEgHs95zwNPkn75zOX2p7pLskSWKfgMfe1gqv2mCOhObVS57BLZnGSkXu8cI8ghaXyNNhgbbUPiNVlPiZ13xqmA1GWRUq-ihTKJC6YtUz3-LONYQH4UOVwJJo53qNpAlXhI22oa21j5v3WwEihOE9eKDD5Sy1GnZA==&c=6ySR-sCGq0-3El7XfB0y6E9eZZkqDxxza0ooid7F1sgqBlLjsxFrHA==&ch=qqzihCGXQA-PGAgiSbjSf-Lo9md8bs7RO5ILpNnKqWNlfaeQqS2-RQ==)

body:
Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?

| |
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c91b4da5112b4d82ab86360191d726f7&_e=yqDD4Q6obOxntIgOVaEfYgFByemuV2CEpa5u7xfzBXaQaoP5M2O-KQ83ZyssnNgz1BEP_O5q8cYWqEwaKPJfFggwxDJjvFhkIHyXZTVh8f_0vVOe3p6osv6WJT8E8srt0_tJ_tSE1-WnzlF-lR01fShmjz-6G9DmFCdi2y3nAPTikqu18oMelJrXEQRIaHj0McasqsRsiv6hd3RsdiK8s725XXHab12dJKAqnrc0RdIQJcG-3ww0QxucqjrZSaO0dJSHEEttvJKm4Mbi8tv3zDARe4FXdA-_iclPUuXsbW44AhFWrzf41PSPic6Qoa6WATzgf8HoVArZZHDNPSkEw0eGN_2eb82FIITROS_6J3zF-VqhQbWst3dsYw-UgSw_ceXHv5cyxVpzsBUb2P6P_w%3D%3D)
---
| | Friend, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c91b4da5112b4d82ab86360191d726f7&_e=yqDD4Q6obOxntIgOVaEfYgFByemuV2CEpa5u7xfzBXaQaoP5M2O-KQ83ZyssnNgz1BEP_O5q8cYWqEwaKPJfFggwxDJjvFhkIHyXZTVh8f_0vVOe3p6osv6WJT8E8srt0_tJ_tSE1-WnzlF-lR01fShmjz-6G9DmFCdi2y3nAPTikqu18oMelJrXEQRIaHj0McasqsRsiv6hd3RsdiK8s725XXHab12dJKAqnrc0RdLT1XtTVNzIdpw5eDSnLNE1PNhgzGBfZDurZJ8SzO80zN87T1MFiQPgshzIJZn0IQenV6JbLwRHIMjE7zAOHWLMoYRXGBxD7kcT4mXM6Nehx-w3HGmRnCj3f1FeYNXFWItkSy3ERdSYSeZz9ussCpkpU4vOvprTy4nLdSifvbW1_w%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c91b4da5112b4d82ab86360191d726f7&_e=yqDD4Q6obOxntIgOVaEfYgFByemuV2CEpa5u7xfzBXaQaoP5M2O-KQ83ZyssnNgz1BEP_O5q8cYWqEwaKPJfFggwxDJjvFhkIHyXZTVh8f_0vVOe3p6osv6WJT8E8srt0_tJ_tSE1-WnzlF-lR01fShmjz-6G9DmFCdi2y3nAPTikqu18oMelJrXEQRIaHj0McasqsRsiv6hd3RsdiK8s725XXHab12dJKAqnrc0RdK0uPCrlSoj3ogw_n2fiD41C5pX6eQGYQ5Axf4OznOgOTZr6pJLU1fHN9rcYixFdqJSkrnZm0HSOHDKHTCOYNoRD7yRrw2eAcILyNEbuiJON125McPzNQBVMJ_nW9LhC1pwE4ikYQ_ce4P5qJBOnN95tPo52MORPu6tSeLfoBVULQ%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c91b4da5112b4d82ab86360191d726f7&_e=yqDD4Q6obOxntIgOVaEfYgFByemuV2CEpa5u7xfzBXaQaoP5M2O-KQ83ZyssnNgz1BEP_O5q8cYWqEwaKPJfFggwxDJjvFhkIHyXZTVh8f_0vVOe3p6osv6WJT8E8srt0_tJ_tSE1-WnzlF-lR01fShmjz-6G9DmFCdi2y3nAPTikqu18oMelJrXEQRIaHj0McasqsRsiv6hd3RsdiK8s725XXHab12dJKAqnrc0RdI1BN9X9P1WPCym5P6P0tyzyRtKy2BPCGVHRnSN7jjSlC0kgU8ZflnzrNJDDK04dWydJqWW7kl7us8v9IgCL3rAiX1NjDQIdUDRe314dQB_yp0imnWLQJbX1rhC2aUufau0Hcyyzbh9VPSXfqcgoZ5Hw-nEorlfEoP6gfxBmDGNJA%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=c91b4da5112b4d82ab86360191d726f7&_e=yqDD4Q6obOxntIgOVaEfYgFByemuV2CEpa5u7xfzBXaQaoP5M2O-KQ83ZyssnNgz1BEP_O5q8cYWqEwaKPJfFggwxDJjvFhkIHyXZTVh8f_0vVOe3p6osv6WJT8E8srt0_tJ_tSE1-WnzlF-lR01fShmjz-6G9DmFCdi2y3nAPTikqu18oMelJrXEQRIaHj0McasqsRsiv6hd3RsdiK8s725XXHab12dJKAqnrc0RdJTxUIm0_pxlChh0XKgPxgdhTj3xIvNCvqYkcwO3IZpgqIvCU2ycRypIHmQQ1pWnF2n4LI8Q2D053ecf_evbzaa1lGkdxr_joz3jvSH9E0ItxrpCTl7hcDKPvp-nGpq8lsaF0KJ_XdcpzN4AzJTl4Zxvhic59siiSwwSEvvcIZfAg%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

clean_body: Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th? | | | | | | Friend, That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE 9070 Irvine Center Drive, Suite 150 Irvine, CA 92618 | | | Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Censure. Expel. Deport.
body:
Help Censure Ilhan Omar
| | | [ ](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a12a556cc6bf4b3195ed2cb51f9508cc&_e=tC_syycR0hzqJeo2cZEjvIOQdJzlecTNBr4_ER2FFF46OqJdjeEfd1lMNC7xUpn1rs-OErbP7Si5P2C_PxjzWLY32xEA2rerLZD206EO0c-eH2faE-o9D9Vq_fPz8s17Wr8wpT19cUO4tPihjYpku3MPmqlwJnKnCN6UszzD-2f571h7F5BHtTlpSTMrNUtkbT8paQkB6dxT3EL8nKkgO4Hk_Ka1yuLXwED76215o3ojfIs0dL0-gEtGdy0PXu9aRZkk3gj4tgcLYmZffCWHXJ6T2fSjDyvxvaxbeLAJZjsuv_n1LetZfOp2GHnNa36GgbEZ9K5vEUHTxjjkzikXpQ%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American, **I just introduced a censure resolution against Ilhan Omar.** She was caught on video acting as a foreign agent putting the interests of the country she fled - Somalia - ahead of America. **Her actions are treasonous and she must be held accountable.** I took an oath to defend America against all enemies and I will not stop until we rip out, root and stem, those destroying America from within. [**If you agree with me, add your name to the "Censure Ilhan Omar" petition right now.**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a12a556cc6bf4b3195ed2cb51f9508cc&_e=tC_syycR0hzqJeo2cZEjvIOQdJzlecTNBr4_ER2FFF46OqJdjeEfd1lMNC7xUpn1rs-OErbP7Si5P2C_PxjzWLY32xEA2rerLZD206EO0c-eH2faE-o9D9Vq_fPz8s17Wr8wpT19cUO4tPihjYpku3MPmqlwJnKnCN6UszzD-2dNM-lCSmKO_EBqRqh86mMIoP5eGrE9A1VnJTTx-5qUoC3vkXWo_1ErXAW5MxoeOusYKX8A91EefvpAnPeCw3Y_2Spe8WNZC1jKc2Q36ttSV-D7amfYHubDhlDKw6wXQGrO5xHJmniQFM0HsCAk9v7lYDoY8VRnNgJZJz-anMROTw%3D%3D) Ilhan Omar embodies the biggest threat America faces: Migrant hordes invading our country with no real desire to assimilate or embrace what it means to be an American. She has no allegiance to America. She hates America, hates our culture, and hates the values that made us the envy of the world. "Immigrants" like Ilhan Omar weaponize Americas's generosity against us and spit in our faces. People who abuse our system like Ilhan put America Last because they remain more loyal to the violent, corrupt, war-torn countries they fled than to our nation that took them in. _These are not immigrants who love America and come here for a better life. They 're invaders attempting to overthrow our country!_ America deserves better leaders than Ilhan Omar and with your support I can hold her accountable. [**Will you add your name demanding the House of Representatives hold Ilhan Omar accountable?**](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a12a556cc6bf4b3195ed2cb51f9508cc&_e=tC_syycR0hzqJeo2cZEjvIOQdJzlecTNBr4_ER2FFF46OqJdjeEfd1lMNC7xUpn1rs-OErbP7Si5P2C_PxjzWLY32xEA2rerLZD206EO0c-eH2faE-o9D9Vq_fPz8s17Wr8wpT19cUO4tPihjYpku3MPmqlwJnKnCN6UszzD-2er3k1E99h8rx1DhJSASrdU3N4vU-6Eh2Wbs7Q1BKFWPBOJ5q9pmXRlv6qoEMQABXZHEgqwcpjrJ66SqJHWZ-LcbuqChwh3__7h0D4xoFa_Nc001Nbq7bBssvbWwynOtqelcOHoJMmLZ6XWjtsKokIzSvRoZyPbwLYnkG67ietylw%3D%3D)
| [ ](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a12a556cc6bf4b3195ed2cb51f9508cc&_e=tC_syycR0hzqJeo2cZEjvIOQdJzlecTNBr4_ER2FFF46OqJdjeEfd1lMNC7xUpn1rs-OErbP7Si5P2C_PxjzWLY32xEA2rerLZD206EO0c-eH2faE-o9D9Vq_fPz8s17Wr8wpT19cUO4tPihjYpku3MPmqlwJnKnCN6UszzD-2eiCGGnMB2vf4T0-FzLPmBuhQCV7YZn87k-gt8-PhwRFWuwaJu17fqLPNf22-NYVhhC4Y0JGLP7RjObfei0P5w2o-kMpkoCmwwCAjxLzCIOwpkjkMO-H2hc0651kuJAWvhprDwEjDRIQmYZx9ztwHH6QCwnujzn5hWFzyfOMfERng%3D%3D)

| [ **CESURE ILHAN OMAR - SIGN NOW** ](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a12a556cc6bf4b3195ed2cb51f9508cc&_e=tC_syycR0hzqJeo2cZEjvIOQdJzlecTNBr4_ER2FFF46OqJdjeEfd1lMNC7xUpn1rs-OErbP7Si5P2C_PxjzWLY32xEA2rerLZD206EO0c-eH2faE-o9D9Vq_fPz8s17Wr8wpT19cUO4tPihjYpku3MPmqlwJnKnCN6UszzD-2cVb4ygsH7-IVLoZ24F3CeH8h8fdMiT9ziR89xrf-xOK9GdBhZwtgD2INJJuH9HMRkn7MxsxuOllw56ti9KTf2KXqI0Ljc3sYICSkaxRwbxnZrN5jPWKFDw7YbCdmq0h0NYG6MfSO6bp7_gFQq3P1_AS6grhdFC5TrufU8UVGUOhA%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,**** it is people like Ilhan Omar whom George Washington was trying to warn us of in his farewell address, cautioning Americans to "guard against the imposters of pretended patriotism." It's an insult to our Founding Fathers and absolutely disgraceful that we have a foreign agent holding office in the United States. But here we are thanks to Democrats like Ilhan Omar. And I'm afraid that if patriots like you don't step up and show your support, it will only incentivize other foreign agents like her to pursue a seat in Congress. **We can 't waste any time; our country needs leaders who will fight to make America better, not extort it for foreign interest.** I need you to immediately show your support to help me fight back and Censure Ilhan Omar. **Help me take back our country and Save America.** **[Sign Now >>>](http://links.gopmembership.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=a12a556cc6bf4b3195ed2cb51f9508cc&_e=tC_syycR0hzqJeo2cZEjvIOQdJzlecTNBr4_ER2FFF46OqJdjeEfd1lMNC7xUpn1rs-OErbP7Si5P2C_PxjzWLY32xEA2rerLZD206EO0c-eH2faE-o9D9Vq_fPz8s17Wr8wpT19cUO4tPihjYpku3MPmqlwJnKnCN6UszzD-2cDfR9VJDuNlbAljc_tQRg4bgVqwiXdYcl3_2OuxmxNv-2f4tPwC0pWLhvkaRSjDPYrV7yl5yuHvtEAWDWwtHJpwaJRHq6tacKtEb0pIcA4wtWeLV9xZP8hAiwjw2ynkyMXCjl1iJ__jMPbxY2P-bmCBwMtE6Jy12TCERzFR6O-Mg%3D%3D)** _Talk Soon,_ Marjorie Taylor Greene

clean_body: Help Censure Ilhan Omar | | | Fellow American, I just introduced a censure resolution against Ilhan Omar. She was caught on video acting as a foreign agent putting the interests of the country she fled - Somalia - ahead of America. Her actions are treasonous and she must be held accountable. I took an oath to defend America against all enemies and I will not stop until we rip out, root and stem, those destroying America from within. Ilhan Omar embodies the biggest threat America faces: Migrant hordes invading our country with no real desire to assimilate or embrace what it means to be an American. She has no allegiance to America. She hates America, hates our culture, and hates the values that made us the envy of the world. "Immigrants" like Ilhan Omar weaponize Americas's generosity against us and spit in our faces. People who abuse our system like Ilhan put America Last because they remain more loyal to the violent, corrupt, war-torn countries they fled than to our nation that took them in. These are not immigrants who love America and come here for a better life. They 're invaders attempting to overthrow our country! America deserves better leaders than Ilhan Omar and with your support I can hold her accountable. | | Fellow American,** it is people like Ilhan Omar whom George Washington was trying to warn us of in his farewell address, cautioning Americans to "guard against the imposters of pretended patriotism." It's an insult to our Founding Fathers and absolutely disgraceful that we have a foreign agent holding office in the United States. But here we are thanks to Democrats like Ilhan Omar. And I'm afraid that if patriots like you don't step up and show your support, it will only incentivize other foreign agents like her to pursue a seat in Congress. We can 't waste any time; our country needs leaders who will fight to make America better, not extort it for foreign interest. I need you to immediately show your support to help me fight back and Censure Ilhan Omar. Help me take back our country and Save America. ** Talk Soon, Marjorie Taylor Greene | |

subject: Several of our opponent’s supposed endorsers say they haven’t made any endorsement

body:
The latest sign of a culture of intimidation coming from our opponent’s campaign.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78508069/453595606/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGRkMTZmNi0wZGM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x-gRGamNRS8veiOyxLRZKWDnIkATz3U0KQy2jXPd4Yc=&emci=145b5838-09c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=90dd16f6-0dc5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Our opponent's campaign recently released a list of endorsements. **_Now, several of those who supposedly endorsed her campaign are saying that they did no such thing – with one saying "I have no idea how I [ended up there]."_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78508070/453595613/-1197072038?refcode=2024-02-06-monmouth&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=90dd16f6-0dc5-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGRkMTZmNi0wZGM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=x-gRGamNRS8veiOyxLRZKWDnIkATz3U0KQy2jXPd4Yc=) These lack of endorsements, or rather, un-endorsements, are the latest sign of a culture of intimidation coming from our opponent's campaign. Tammy Murphy and her team have threatened college students, smeared people who have endorsed Congressman Kim, and now are either assuming endorsements they have not yet earned - or worse - straight up falsifying them to help pressure others and desperately create an air of inevitability that does not exist and the people of New Jersey do not want. Congressman Kim stepped up to meet this challenge because we can't replace a corrupt Senator by anointing the next. This is yet again, politics at its worst and New Jersey voters deserve better. **There are still over 100 days left until this election is over, and we know our opponent will use every lever of power she has to let the political elite decide this election instead of voters.** [**It's clear that our opponent will do anything to win this race, and we have to be prepared to fight back against whatever she'll throw at us. clean_body: The latest sign of a culture of intimidation coming from our opponent’s campaign. | | | | Our opponent's campaign recently released a list of endorsements. Now, several of those who supposedly endorsed her campaign are saying that they did no such thing – with one saying "I have no idea how I [ended up there]." = These lack of endorsements, or rather, un-endorsements, are the latest sign of a culture of intimidation coming from our opponent's campaign. Tammy Murphy and her team have threatened college students, smeared people who have endorsed Congressman Kim, and now are either assuming endorsements they have not yet earned - or worse - straight up falsifying them to help pressure others and desperately create an air of inevitability that does not exist and the people of New Jersey do not want. Congressman Kim stepped up to meet this challenge because we can't replace a corrupt Senator by anointing the next. This is yet again, politics at its worst and New Jersey voters deserve better. There are still over 100 days left until this election is over, and we know our opponent will use every lever of power she has to let the political elite decide this election instead of voters. = Let's win this, Katey Sabo Team Andy Kim | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . subject: Sign: Demand Trump’s criminal trial in D.C. start ASAP!
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Add your name: No more delays in Trump’s criminal trial! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9c05d4f7-fbbb-42bf-9f0a-74a0fcbc7204/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T15b1b564-e4da-40c1-a3fa-126835601549/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump's criminal trial in D.C. was set to start on March 4 – but delays involving higher courts deciding on Trump's claims of "total immunity" led to Judge Chutkan to remove that date. **But now the Federal appeals court has rejected Trump's immunity claim. And NOW is the time to start the trial ASAP.** [**Add your name: No more delays in Trump's criminal trial!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Teea6171a-3fc6-45aa-8217-483a5adb6ba4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Trump and his lawyers have been doing whatever they can to delay his trials and run out the clock. They are hoping that Trump wins the election and can pardon himself or simply ignore the justice system altogether. Thankfully, multiple courts have decided Trump does NOT have immunity from the crimes he committed while in office – so we need his trial to happen ASAP! **No more delays – Trump is a clear and present threat to our democracy and our way of life, and he cannot escape punishment for his crimes.[Add your name: No delays in Trump's criminal trial!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0cea073e-7076-4d0c-b38f-95dcf4d743fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

name: Dr. K.S. and Vijaya Krishnamoorthi
subject: Our son, Raja
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
[_**Hi, Peter! We’re Raja’s parents, Dr. K.S. and Vijaya Krishnamoorthi -- and we’re reaching out to tell you why we’re so proud of our son. We’d love it if you would read this whole email -- but if you’re short on time, will you chip in $14 to help us reach 507 grassroots donations for Raja before midnight? It would mean the world to him to have your support. >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78510720/453601823/-1810142050?refcode=20240206_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTEyOTkyYy0xMWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyd-eaJeUDEJCOtm9owl-DkKXSLkeBk6TTPbZsD4QDA=) Peter, our family comes from humble beginnings. We faced economic hardship when we first immigrated to the United States. But we worked hard to achieve the American Dream. And as parents, we couldn’t be more proud of Raja for helping others do the same. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78510723/453601826/-1810142050?refcode=20240206_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTEyOTkyYy0xMWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyd-eaJeUDEJCOtm9owl-DkKXSLkeBk6TTPbZsD4QDA=) _Us with Raja in Washington!_
---
[_**Peter, our son has never taken anything for granted. Raja knows what it’s like to struggle. It’s why he works so hard to make sure every American has a shot to defy the odds just like he did. We know this in our hearts: Raja is exactly who we need in Congress. That’s why we’re stepping in for him today. So please, can we count on you to chip in just $14 before midnight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78510727/453601830/-1810142050?refcode=20240206_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTEyOTkyYy0xMWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyd-eaJeUDEJCOtm9owl-DkKXSLkeBk6TTPbZsD4QDA=)
Peter \-- we’ll be frank with you.
Never in our wildest dreams did we think Raja would become a Congressman.
But we know that this extraordinary job comes with many challenges.
Between fighting against those who threaten our democracy to ensuring that people aren’t left behind by unfair systems, our son is doing so much for each and every one of us.
[_**So now, we’re doing what parents do: We’re stepping in and helping our son. We know it would mean the world to Raja to see 507 grassroots supporters step up in this moment. What do you say, Peter: Can you help Raja and chip in $14 before midnight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78510731/453601834/-1810142050?refcode=20240206_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTEyOTkyYy0xMWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyd-eaJeUDEJCOtm9owl-DkKXSLkeBk6TTPbZsD4QDA=)
****[Chip in $14 immediately>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78510735/453601838/-1810142050?refcode=20240206_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTEyOTkyYy0xMWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyd-eaJeUDEJCOtm9owl-DkKXSLkeBk6TTPbZsD4QDA=)****

****[Chip in $50 immediately>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78510745/453601848/-1810142050?refcode=20240206_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTEyOTkyYy0xMWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyd-eaJeUDEJCOtm9owl-DkKXSLkeBk6TTPbZsD4QDA=)****
****[Chip in $100 immediately>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78510748/453601851/-1810142050?refcode=20240206_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTEyOTkyYy0xMWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyd-eaJeUDEJCOtm9owl-DkKXSLkeBk6TTPbZsD4QDA=)****
****[Or chip in another amount>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78510753/453601855/-1810142050?refcode=20240206_em_fr_b1_raja_30_rs&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTEyOTkyYy0xMWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyd-eaJeUDEJCOtm9owl-DkKXSLkeBk6TTPbZsD4QDA=)****
From the bottom of our hearts, thank you. Dr. K.S. and Vijaya Krishnamoorthi | Raja represents Illinois in Congress. The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day. Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy. But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja. He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong. Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress? | [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78510757/453601860/-1810142050?refcode=footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTEyOTkyYy0xMWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyd-eaJeUDEJCOtm9owl-DkKXSLkeBk6TTPbZsD4QDA=)

name: Steve Scalise
subject: One to watch
disclaimer_text:
PAID FOR BY
KEVIN LINCOLN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Kevin Lincoln is a Marine Corps veteran and a principled, conservative blue-city mayor, and he's running to FLIP CA-09. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=1afe1c7535d5448aa1f8010667bfa65f&_t=vWN13kojB9_gdOOICxxrlDg-aaiycmucNKNq-CBZUrcXeMbMG2E4k5nbPc8KlJxkN7CDe0Pr5Rurh7Kj1OY3xkB-ix4gSuaZ7LUrmwTfBRs%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=1afe1c7535d5448aa1f8010667bfa65f&_t=vWN13kojB9_gdOOICxxrlDg-aaiycmucNKNq-CBZUrcXeMbMG2E4k5nbPc8KlJxkN7CDe0Pr5Rurh7Kj1OY3xkB-ix4gSuaZ7LUrmwTfBRs%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=1afe1c7535d5448aa1f8010667bfa65f&_e=KClGsLi1gSHQXw1k3KX50ziKkGqIXRD9kqBeBVgJlMsB3ENOqCL147jpaG-mf8md9ysrKxr9yBz7_OACIT9zi0jYFW7PVKTQRTZblZ_13H8Keb4Z7OGXUuZu8IuQYJVfDU5kPEzHc2B5cUV4U1xnaCo155ShWy3C8loA6h9bZdRqWELPP3ihfxX01h7I3F2fCtA6goGwk4KNfNA9z1mAGxgRrnAY2NCEs6TssZ6w7wHD6lqWJ2F-1eRB9-2yim7_hsANKVKskQ0-uYZpfli2Rfj6VgcoXtMRvOvAkajtZAhktuhlX0egYuThA4VdvPXW114c3bc5OLW2n-NCyfbyfjaU4TXIeKubadKLnTb6X1fxdS7eiLDFaFEjvTFFhLl_Ruh3UxeyI0Pzqdn_zOVbpUu8k8z3feTEOXym4YDoJ94%3D)
---
Peter,

This race is one to watch.

**Kevin Lincoln** is a Marine Corps veteran and principled conservative who has figured out how to __win__ in a left-leaning city – serving as Mayor of Stockton, California.

Now, Kevin is running for Congress in California’s targeted 9th District and needs our help to secure victory.

**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

body:
Here’s where the chaos at the border leads...

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zao4cvui7krgcl67ulb6h2rna8ea1dnbtgah9pn8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9im6o72cdh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, If you think what’s happening at our southern border is bad... _**just wait until you see what comes next.**_**_ Why do I say that? **Because chaos at the border leads to chaos in our community.**** Illegal immigrants who smuggle fentanyl into our country bring with them a criminal mindset that needs to be stopped. **_When law and order breaks down at our southern border, maintaining it in the rest of our country is more important than ever._**
_**
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsqhhqjn2030070qlmmr8nt8nr185uebpc8b6pdg_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9im6o72cdh2bs)
---

---
Every level in our justice system has a role to play:
* **District Attorneys** must bring charges, quickly prosecute offenders, and instruct federal immigration officials to deport those convicted of dangerous crimes. **
* **Judges** must deny bail to dangerous criminals with no ties to the community or who are in the country illegally.**
* **And judicial officials at every level** must step up to the plate and demand accountability.**

**_[ Unfortunately, many of these positions have been filled with Soros-funded radicals who think their job is to advance a far-left agenda, NOT maintain the rule of law.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvfk4fdqs9fujir341s8af1u469gd9os1kib0mgo_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9im6o72cdh2bs)_**_** Fellow Patriot, I’m urgently reaching out to you to join our movement. The crisis is upon us — and we need every conservative who supports law and order on our team. **_[Fair Courts America](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zad0436f4qvn4cdrm8elg99u64jdae67a7a1rv20_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9im6o72cdh2bs)_ supports the men and women who serve as judges and district attorneys who answer the call to protect our communities, especially when the Biden Administration refuses to enforce the border. We help strong judicial leaders win — and help stop radical candidates from infiltrating our justice system.**
_ **
---
[I WANT TO HELP](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zbcevli8kmpmpetvr7br10mha0t2jbvk6oes9im8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9im6o72cdh2bs)
---
But tracking all of these local races across the country is a massive undertaking — which is why there has not yet been a concerted effort to fight back against the network of George Soros’s dark money influence... _until now.__ **We’re taking Soros on, head-to-head, but we can't do it without the support of patriots like you.**** He has already funneled $40 MILLION dollars into his judicial takeover... if we hope to keep up with that, we NEED your help. **_[Will you donate to help us help our embattled judges and prosecutors before the NEXT crime wave hits?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr4nu6lg9rudjv5v12ob0cb9h6v9ud81cmku1p50_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9im6o72cdh2bs)_**

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Teichert=20for=20Senate?=
subject: ICYMI: Teichert Joins Fox to Discuss U.S. Strikes Against the Iranian-Aligned Groups
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | |
---
**ICYMI: Teichert Joins Fox to Discuss U.S. Strikes Against the Iranian-Aligned Groups**
BALTIMORE, Md. – In case you missed it, retired Brigadier General and U.S. Senate candidate John Teichert joined [Fox and Friends](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=4e922757fa&e=1b1fb1ad9f) on Sunday to lend his expertise on last week’s retaliatory strikes against Iranian-Aligned Groups.
[WATCH](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=e49f0b4474&e=1b1fb1ad9f):
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=16dfa26cba&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
General Teichert determined that the U.S.-led strikes in the Middle East were weak and late, affirming that **“It is far more difficult to regain deterrence in the mind of an adversary than it is to retain it.”**
Amid a confusing and deficient defensive strategy, Teichert addressed the Biden Administration’s admitted fear of starting a wider war saying, **“We see a wider war already–not because of American strength, but American weakness.”**
Teichert has been critical of the Biden Administration’s lack of deterrence against Iranian-aligned terrorist organizations since October 7th stating that **“if we would have done this [retaliate] after the first attack against American positions, instead of the 170th attack, then we would actually be credible in our deterrent posture.”** He continues by saying, **“And now, we’re playing catch up after weakness for the last four months, or really the last three years.”**
The American response this weekend follows a string of deadly drone attacks over the last few weeks that killed three American service members and injured several more.

|

Friend,

I need to ask you a question.

Our country's in a real mess.

_And the question is, who 's going to fix it?_

With Donald Trump, Republicans have lost almost every competitive election. We lost the Senate. We lost the House. We lost the White House. We lost in 2018, in 2020, and in 2022.

The worst kept secret in politics is how badly the Democrats want to run against Trump. They know Trump is the only Republican in the country who Biden can defeat.

**But when you put me up against Joe Biden, I defeat Biden handily. **

We have a world on fire and a country in chaos. You can't fix the mess if you don't win the election. A Trump nomination is a Biden win and a Kamala Harris presidency.

70% of Americans don't want a Trump-Biden rematch.

They don't want temper tantrums.

_They want normalcy. _

They don't want vengeance.

_They want sanity. _

And when you look at Trump, you're seeing him throw temper tantrum after temper tantrum when he doesn't get his way.

You're seeing him say he'll bar anyone from the MAGA camp who supports me.

You're seeing him focus on vengeance instead of talking about the out-of-control spending and inflation, or about how we were going to get kids reading again, or about securing the border and stopping the lawlessness, or about the wars that are happening around us.

Instead, all he does is talk about himself.

That's a problem, Friend!

Because this isn't about Donald Trump -- this is about where we go in America.

**America deserves better!**

We deserve a new direction under new conservative leadership.

We deserve a president who will focus on the needs of our people, not on themselves.

We deserve a president who will rebuild our economy, close our border, and stand up to our enemies.

**_And most importantly, we deserve a president who will stop our self-loathing, end the division and fear, and make America strong and proud!_**

**Our campaign is the last best hope of stopping another Trump-Biden nightmare. I am committed to the fight, but I cannot do it alone.**

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: Our country’s in a real mess. | | | | | | Friend, I need to ask you a question. Our country's in a real mess. And the question is, who 's going to fix it? With Donald Trump, Republicans have lost almost every competitive election. We lost the Senate. We lost the House. We lost the White House. We lost in 2018, in 2020, and in 2022. The worst kept secret in politics is how badly the Democrats want to run against Trump. They know Trump is the only Republican in the country who Biden can defeat. But when you put me up against Joe Biden, I defeat Biden handily. We have a world on fire and a country in chaos. You can't fix the mess if you don't win the election. A Trump nomination is a Biden win and a Kamala Harris presidency. "So I’m asking, do you want to stay stuck in the past or move into a better future?" | | | 70% of Americans don't want a Trump-Biden rematch. They don't want temper tantrums. They want normalcy. They don't want vengeance. They want sanity. And when you look at Trump, you're seeing him throw temper tantrum after temper tantrum when he doesn't get his way. You're seeing him say he'll bar anyone from the MAGA camp who supports me. You're seeing him focus on vengeance instead of talking about the out-of-control spending and inflation, or about how we were going to get kids reading again, or about securing the border and stopping the lawlessness, or about the wars that are happening around us. Instead, all he does is talk about himself. That's a problem, Friend! Because this isn't about Donald Trump -- this is about where we go in America. America deserves better! We deserve a new direction under new conservative leadership. We deserve a president who will focus on the needs of our people, not on themselves. We deserve a president who will rebuild our economy, close our border, and stand up to our enemies. And most importantly, we deserve a president who will stop our self-loathing, end the division and fear, and make America strong and proud! Our campaign is the last best hope of stopping another Trump-Biden nightmare. I am committed to the fight, but I cannot do it alone. "Will you chip in a donation today?" Thank you for everything. Let's do this! My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. clean_body: Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to make a donation to Adam Frisch’s campaign for Congress today? Hello, Is there ANYTHING we can say to convince you to make a donation to Adam Frisch’s campaign for Congress today? What if we told you that, in 2022, Adam Frisch lost to Lauren Boebert by just 546 votes? What if we told you that, with help from grassroots donors like you, we scared Lauren Boebert so much that she left the district to avoid losing to Adam? And what if we told you that this is a must-win, critical seat – but that this race just got a lot harder without Boebert to run against? If Adam Frisch is going to win this seat and prevent Lauren Boebert from being replaced with another extremist, we need to raise $50,000 before our next fundraising deadline – and right now, we are still very short. = Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = There is too much at stake in this election to come up short in November. name: Americans for a Secure Border
subject: Fire Mayorkas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB FOR PA
body:
it's up to us

|
---
Dear Fellow American,

We are at a crossroads today. We have to make a choice very soon! Here it is...

**[Are you for preserving America or destroying America?](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c3759d5b8f1247759b2d22902e59566b&_e=iDElb3Qfme2Vosq-j5rWNufhXNJ162kadNA1UUUghrDos5q3tZQlJSOtnrpzNtW2_UBrHzIrJMMNIp4GDG0pP6dbL4dLhNuEjDmHDXrrZr4le5xKVFSrEwIuJDqVJm_WvbAGQZVzbLecyy6GCoCl-v4gTKOneKXrMC9S-YdewQMZQMQWzkarnxIbKsZ9WMzwYd7qpGfmUdmgYGmaaC2H_jeH1LXbaT2zW3VwIG0n1J8Uk-BTj4IvmAlgAK_SC11K-bF68HkwPErYNRZGEN8GwYthUEWlpjp7z3DENt7ihp3PtIde94pPkVRyFE_u7e5ZM0xPh188C6V6PI2b_nkN-Zl_ggR9gX3NXO2ve6RRlF4PFKPJ1vlPUgG9PESrbV6VwP-gvfPyPkhN-9ydnzx4yw%3D%3D)**
**[Should DHS Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas RESIGN?](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c3759d5b8f1247759b2d22902e59566b&_e=iDElb3Qfme2Vosq-j5rWNufhXNJ162kadNA1UUUghrDos5q3tZQlJSOtnrpzNtW2_UBrHzIrJMMNIp4GDG0pP6dbL4dLhNuEjDmHDXrrZr4le5xKVFSrEwIuJDqVJm_WvbAGQZVzbLecyy6GCoCl-v4gTKOneKXrMC9S-YdewQMZQMQWzkarnxIbKsZ9WMzwYd7qpGfmUdmgYGmaaC2H_jeH1LXbaT2zW3VwIG0n1J_0xmNt91gvNcjeLjezGKvD9NqG9dzqqZT4q8uWdM7V6Kj3-zgEohLCdEQxeF616XG0NLvh8WrIY9e6louBgPOxtZQh2pci_gbZBZLzYM2rhc23TR1PikWME-rezuN8ctjYqHXM5pyplmC6zRLItZczjXP8E9mUT1SM1IWWIjoMrw%3D%3D)**
**[Should we FIRE Mayorkas?](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c3759d5b8f1247759b2d22902e59566b&_e=iDElb3Qfme2Vosq-j5rWNufhXNJ162kadNA1UUUghrDos5q3tZQlJSOtnrpzNtW2_UBrHzIrJMMNIp4GDG0pP6dbL4dLhNuEjDmHDXrrZr4le5xKVFSrEwIuJDqVJm_WvbAGQZVzbLecyy6GCoCl-v4gTKOneKXrMC9S-YdewQMZQMQWzkarnxIbKsZ9WMzwYd7qpGfmUdmgYGmaaC2H_jeH1LXbaT2zW3VwIG0n1J83NAiyXzYwvKesSxZT--eBxlYWu-wThdxIz_6RNA5UfdHAvFO_OdvrDPXBZD-pev_9PJGjVVH_2qIiCQ26cElRIrfh1xZM3F7JNi-xA36HY2f4sja3HiktFn1OBPCPL9SaDdKQacIbPGnJGXudK1hwxA1cx0SKKbS0-WfIU1L7Ig%3D%3D)**

Choosing to **KEEP** Mayorkas in power is:

* Choosing to see American infrastructure be overwhelmed by the **THOUSANDS** of migrants flooding into the US.
* Choosing to see American schoolchildren be set to the side as migrants **TAKE OVER** their schools.
* Choosing to put American citizens at risk by allowing **CRIMINALS** to flood in absolutely unchecked.

However, making the choice to **[FIRE MAYORKAS](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c3759d5b8f1247759b2d22902e59566b&_e=iDElb3Qfme2Vosq-j5rWNufhXNJ162kadNA1UUUghrDos5q3tZQlJSOtnrpzNtW2_UBrHzIrJMMNIp4GDG0pP6dbL4dLhNuEjDmHDXrrZr4le5xKVFSrEwIuJDqVJm_WvbAGQZVzbLecyy6GCoCl-v4gTKOneKXrMC9S-YdewQMZQMQWzkarnxIbKsZ9WMzwOLHpr8NaAlwMY57HwukUf_0LhTBHZshxCdrrHi2jCH0FRVEZbDoZeZLtBaXYwFGNQhQ7_RvhUVHOQdBkGDTNIFbZAoyiAtpfERYcIPswRZ4DUcHIRqZ5xGnlbfcAKC14O7oa6BDaO7vWQ9yJ-CMjwblIpVmagpGCbDd63vUdATflajJNWDX0Xt7RJRfo63aZYCOhnMxx1ZNTd2N223tpHw%3D%3D)** will show that you want to preserve America. You will be prioritizing actual American citizens over **ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS!!!**

| [ **SIGN THE PETITION** ](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c3759d5b8f1247759b2d22902e59566b&_e=iDElb3Qfme2Vosq-j5rWNufhXNJ162kadNA1UUUghrDos5q3tZQlJSOtnrpzNtW2_UBrHzIrJMMNIp4GDG0pP6dbL4dLhNuEjDmHDXrrZr4le5xKVFSrEwIuJDqVJm_WvbAGQZVzbLecyy6GCoCl-v4gTKOneKXrMC9S-YdewQMZQMQWzkarnxIbKsZ9WMzwYd7qpGfmUdmgYGmaaC2H_jeH1LXbaT2zW3VwIG0n1J9lekuFlnyAdhYeckc_BQj1rGPYXUzbURRpQugZYDpvUBmmymebfaD6X1dvUpzYhBcud97nGTgHlyP7a5qFirzHvv9DKcoMgArS3FetUN6G3PD2IbMawXaR7iaXFj7NYJ_muQcxOUvcNsEoUqIK_SypRXt77DqtzTf2btpHz4KVLA%3D%3D)
---

America is in a fragile position; it is on the brink of **CHAOS**. These migrant numbers cannot be **SUSTAINED**. American citizens have had enough issues pushed to the side in order to put migrants' needs front and center.

**[This is the moment YOU have to choose where YOU STAND. name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Wanna know a secret?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
We’re going to let you in on a secret, something the top executives of the gun lobby don’t want you to know.
They’re afraid right now.
Yes, really. They’re terrified.
That’s because the gun lobby is the weakest it has ever been. Longtime NRA CEO Wayne LaPierre resigned in disgrace at the beginning of this month, just as he began his corruption trial for using millions of dollars of NRA money to fund lavish personal expenses.
Let us be clear: Wayne LaPierre and other top gun lobby executives care about gun industry profits above all else. Their fear-mongering and promotion of a radical “guns everywhere” agenda have come at the expense of public safety.
It’s deplorable.
It’s an election year, which means the gun lobby could be prepared at any moment to stage a comeback and flood money into races across the country. We need to be prepared to fight back.
[**Will you make a contribution of $3 or any amount you can afford to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us end the gun lobby’s stranglehold on our politics once and for all?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb24.CYoP11&refcode=em240206-1-30&t=1&akid=7609%2E3935704%2Ezxd3mQ)

name: John Padora
subject: Lauren Boebert, you’re fired!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
Her district has decided they’ve been embarrassed for far too long. She’s losing in her home turf and that’s why she’s jumping into ours as a last-ditch attempt. But we see right through her game, and CO-04 deserves a representative who doesn’t think of them as a plan B.

Friend,

Every American needs to know it's never been more urgent than it is now to get things right in this election.

**The truth is:_Under Donald Trump, Republicans lost in 2018, 2020, and 2022. _**

Fast forward to 2024... we are at risk of losing **AGAIN** if Trump becomes the Republican nominee.

_**Why?**_

For starters, seventy percent of Americans **DO NOT** want another Trump-Biden rematch.

**But the larger issue is that Trump isn't talking about how to save our country because he is consumed by investigations and grievances!**

Instead of focusing his campaign on how to best serve the American people and defeat Biden in 2024, he spends his time on court cases and chaos.

_**I 'm tired of losing and you should be, too.**_ It's time for a new generation to step up, lead us into the future, and save the country we all love from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism.

Every recent poll shows that when I go head-to-head against Biden, we win in a landslide. **It 's not even close. **

_That means no recounts, no lawsuits, and no doubts._ It means no more Chuck Schumer leading the Senate. No more endless votes for House Speaker because we'll have a huge House majority. We'll term limit the do-nothing Washington politicians. We'll rebuild our economy and secure our border. And make no mistake, we will restore our national pride.

I am the candidate who will fight for you every day, who will make this country proud, who will secure our future, and who will _**WIN**_ on Election Day.

**[If you're tired of losing, then put your trust in a new generation. And, if you want to win - _not just for our party, but for our country_ - then put your trust in me.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5c5b77767d5a422c8bc4ed04c9e933bc&_e=eP_lbszk7SMvY1hAekkWjz_bHoZw4tbScCKxuW4MDqoYyAJtY3ebi2wiQEDwpqwAg8_8NkQlbEsnu8M-6enG3oR4c4Kd1h90SxTO_mW-5SXLmuQWx5sCQ4Q4gcrzeZAJFKxCG9cTSe_3EJcjhbkt5vGlfU4ozziJ9zmJ2_9rNxXlYlFhb0dD1gshSIO4etNd7VAhZJDkevsvPHdG1soRPSWPa6bSJeixaEwiTEL9pYB9JeirzynFtKbkcfuqdWrsK8s42CTXITGTONzxUsaUmXp7kFjW4z_2uwu3m4ChUeGBj6ksxVnEVEjw5FVe6k0fsjeQvjcQVEmsawxG--jcfuvpGf5wztell1Ve3_Igdus%3D)**
