Now, with the South Carolina Primary quickly approaching, it is going to take all hands on deck to finish this race **STRONG**.

We can't waste a single moment. Not when the future of our country is on the line.

**[So will you please step up with a generous donation to help fuel this critical stretch of my campaign?](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5c5b77767d5a422c8bc4ed04c9e933bc&_e=eP_lbszk7SMvY1hAekkWjz_bHoZw4tbScCKxuW4MDqoYyAJtY3ebi2wiQEDwpqwAg8_8NkQlbEsnu8M-6enG3oR4c4Kd1h90SxTO_mW-5SXLmuQWx5sCQ4Q4gcrzeZAJFKxCG9cTSe_3EJcjhbkt5vGlfU4ozziJ9zmJ2_9rNxXlYlFhb0dD1gshSIO4etNd7VAhZJDkevsvPHdG1soRPevaMy3gGhIrZMUBapvodh-oA_XB25AEG6rTo_1lGn8XXTLu52QPSFPDebBciJIF4usUbgXlD-VIPLWpU6JZzzQodfbuyoCB9OfMsLZurfgGt5SJm7tqr4bGSfzZ2GZqOuv8FLFF_wOgdT4c19KifKM%3D)**

clean_body: Every American needs to know it’s never been more urgent than it is now to get things right in this election. | | | | | Friend, Every American needs to know it's never been more urgent than it is now to get things right in this election. The truth is:Under Donald Trump, Republicans lost in 2018, 2020, and 2022. Fast forward to 2024... we are at risk of losing AGAIN if Trump becomes the Republican nominee. Why? For starters, seventy percent of Americans DO NOT want another Trump-Biden rematch. But the larger issue is that Trump isn't talking about how to save our country because he is consumed by investigations and grievances! Instead of focusing his campaign on how to best serve the American people and defeat Biden in 2024, he spends his time on court cases and chaos. | I 'm tired of losing and you should be, too. It's time for a new generation to step up, lead us into the future, and save the country we all love from the downward spiral of socialism and defeatism. Every recent poll shows that when I go head-to-head against Biden, we win in a landslide. It 's not even close. That means no recounts, no lawsuits, and no doubts. It means no more Chuck Schumer leading the Senate. No more endless votes for House Speaker because we'll have a huge House majority. We'll term limit the do-nothing Washington politicians. We'll rebuild our economy and secure our border. And make no mistake, we will restore our national pride. I am the candidate who will fight for you every day, who will make this country proud, who will secure our future, and who will WIN on Election Day. Now, with the South Carolina Primary quickly approaching, it is going to take all hands on deck to finish this race STRONG. We can't waste a single moment. Not when the future of our country is on the line. I look forward to having you by my side. Let 's win this! My very best, Nikki R. name: Team Qasim
subject: Do you know what today is?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY QASIM FOR CONGRESS]
body:
[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/9?t=1001&akid=35159%2E120265%2EKFjyIq ]Qasim for Congress

Friend: Today we are six weeks out from Election Day! In just six
weeks, the voters of Illinois’ 11th District will get the chance to go out
to the polls and vote for who they want to represent them.

To mark the occasion, we wanted to tell you the six major differences
between Qasim and Bill Foster.

1. Qasim supports a ceasefire in Gaza (as do 80% of Democrats). Bill
Foster does not.
2. Qasim takes the climate crisis seriously, and will increase taxes on
oil companies’ profits, among other things. Bill Foster – despite
being a scientist – is funded by Big Oil and supports fracking.
3. Qasim supports establishing universal healthcare. Bill Foster voted to
weaken the Affordable Care Act – twice.
4. Qasim is a civil rights lawyer who has spent his career fighting to
expand human rights and defend survivors of domestic and sexual
violence. Bill Foster co-sponsored a bill to weaken the Americans with
Disabilities Act.
5. Qasim supports addiction treatment over punishment and wants to hold
Big Pharma executives accountable for the opioid crisis. Bill Foster
takes money from the enablers of the opioid crisis including Walgreens
and Pfizer.
6. Qasim supports a $17 minimum wage, mandated paid leave, and protecting
workers’ rights. Bill Foster voted with Republicans in support of
Trump’s banking deregulation bill.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5450?t=1002&akid=35159%2E120265%2EKFjyIq ]Can you make a contribution to support Qasim’s commonsense,
people–first policies?

DONATE

Thanks for all of your support,
– Team Qasim

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1003&akid=35159%2E120265%2EKFjyIq
Update Your Information: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/signup/update-your-info/
Unsubscribe: https://act.qasimforcongress.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=35159%2E120265%2EKFjyIq

name: BobCasey.com
subject: Can’t afford to take our foot off the gas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1915%2E552475%2Ei7flTq)
Peter, February is a short month, but our monthly fundraising goal isn’t any smaller.
In fact, as the race picks up, so do our goals – because it’s the only way to compete with the wall of GOP cash headed our way.
**That’s why your support is more important than ever.** It’s going to take more folks than usual chipping in whatever you can to help us stay on track, re-elect Bob Casey, and defend our Senate majority.
[**So what do you say? Can Bob Casey count on you to step up today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240206-1?recurring=1&refcode=em2020206-1&refcode2=1915_552475_i7flTq&akid=1915%2E552475%2Ei7flTq)
Unlike David McCormick, our mega-millionaire opponent who’s backed by GOP billionaires, this campaign relies on people like you, Peter, donating what you can when it matters most. With a recent poll showing this Senate race tightening, **we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas.**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240206-1?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em2020206-1-el&refcode2=1915_552475_i7flTq&akid=1915%2E552475%2Ei7flTq) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240206-1?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em2020206-1-el&refcode2=1915_552475_i7flTq&akid=1915%2E552475%2Ei7flTq) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240206-1?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em2020206-1-el&refcode2=1915_552475_i7flTq&akid=1915%2E552475%2Ei7flTq) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240206-1?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em2020206-1-el&refcode2=1915_552475_i7flTq&akid=1915%2E552475%2Ei7flTq) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240206-1?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em2020206-1-el&refcode2=1915_552475_i7flTq&akid=1915%2E552475%2Ei7flTq) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240206-1?recurring=1&refcode=em2020206-1&refcode2=1915_552475_i7flTq&akid=1915%2E552475%2Ei7flTq)

| | ** "It's my pleasure to express my support for Nancy in her congressional campaign," said Governor Dunleavy. "Nancy's exceptional commitment and conservative values resonate with our state and we've achieved much for Alaska together. I'm confident Nancy will stand up against federal overreach in Congress and safeguard Alaskan values. Her candidacy represents my preferred choice to advance our state’s interests."**

Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) argued at a press conference Wednesday that former President Trump was able to drive the number of migrants crossing the border to just more than 500 people a day “without this stinking pile of crap bill.” He accused Republicans negotiating the legislation of only wanting to..." **[Cruz Leads Senate Effort to Shut Down Furnace Rule:](http://trk.tedcruz.-LAXAwddWzejz5GwqqQA)** "U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz, a Republican from Texas, is looking to help HVAC contractors and push back against the U.S. Department of Energy’s (DOE) final rule on gas furnace efficiency standards. Under a rule recently issued by the DOE, newly manufactured indoor residential gas furnaces will have to be at least 95% efficient starting in late 2028. The rule will effectively ban the sale of non-condensing gas furnaces and, according to the American Gas Association (AGA), will affect 55% of U.S. households. DOE’s own data shows that 30% of senior-only households, 26% of low-income..." ** **[Cruz Questions Taxpayer-Funded Television Service Over ‘Diversity’ Fund That Excludes White People:](http://trk.tedcruz.-CFqg_DzHpOxnibEwQCAMw)** "Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) is pressing a taxpayer-funded television service over the existence of a “diversity” fund that appears to discriminate against white filmmakers and violate the Civil Rights Act, according to a letter obtained by The Daily Wire. On Thursday, Cruz questioned the Independent Television Service (ITVS), a congressionally chartered production service funded by taxpayers, over its Diversity Development Fund, a research and development scholarship of up to $35,000 that is available exclusively..." ** **[Cruz: Biden ‘Deployed Attack Dogs’ Against Parental Rights Groups:](http://trk.tedcruz.__wkA29-GEGD7ozA4A)** "Conservatives in Congress condemned the Biden administration in the wake of the revelation that a high-ranking Department of Education official met with the Southern Poverty Law Center one year before the SPLC added parental rights groups, including Moms for Liberty, to its “hate map” that includes conservatives along with KKK groups. “Moms for Liberty and the whole parental rights movement is a force to be reckoned with. These patriotic parents turned Virginia red, and the Left is terrified that they will help take our country back in 2024..." ** **[Cruz: Border Crisis ‘Not Caused’ Biden Incompetence — ‘Deliberate Outcome They Want’:](http://trk.tedcruz._QaYWOYn_LQ)** "On Sunday’s broadcast of “Life, Liberty & Levin” on Fox News, Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) dismissed claims that the border crisis was a product of President Joe Biden being “incompetent,” as many have suggested. Instead, Cruz argued the situation was intentional and was driving the increase in illegal immigration. “It is a catastrophe on every level,” Cruz said. “It is a humanitarian disaster. It is a public health disaster. It is a public safety disaster. It’s a national security disaster. And you’re also right that this is deliberate..." **

body:
This could be one of the single most important legal cases in American history.

| |

---
| | | **GET READY:** President Trump's Supreme Court Case Begins This Thursday!

This could be one of the single most important legal cases in American history. These nine justices will make the final decision whether or not Trump will be REMOVED from the 2024 ballot.

The stakes don't get any higher than this. That's why we set a goal of adding 1,000,000 names to our _**[nationwide petition to keep President Trump on the ballot](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zruk8d2ou50vq96i6kankenspdvbvmc4tqdimol8_rp22sh2s8i6eo37c9hm0ob4c5h2bs "nationwide petition to keep President Trump on the ballot")**_ before oral arguments begin in less than 48 hours.
**NATIONWIDE HOUSE GOP PETITION: **
_Keep President Trump on the 2024 ballot!_

name: New knees
subject: What protein does to osteoarthritis in seniors
body:

Breakthrough new research proves
how you can grow back cartilage in your bone joints.

Modern medicine has been treating

treatment wears off, you're right back to agonizing pain…

This is why big pharma HATES
studies like these and why you haven't heard about it…

It turns out, all you need is to
eat more of this protein in the right proportion to restore your
joints and bones.

Studies even show people notice a
difference within 7 days…

So if you want brand new
knees…

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: A disgusting betrayal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REPUBLICAN ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT, A PROJECT OF DEFENDING DEMOCRACY TOGETHER
body:
Republicans have decided to kill the bill and leave Americans—and our allies—out to dry so Biden doesn’t get a legislative win.
|
---
Friend,

Funding for Ukraine is still up in the air. Republican Senators initially tried to strike a deal with Democrats on a bipartisan bill that would secure our border and help our allies in Ukraine—addressing issues both sides say they care about. Instead, grotesquely cynical partisanship won. name: End Unconditional Aid via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Bernie's amendment would block military funding for Israel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Both the House and Senate will vote this week on bills to send Israel
funding for Netanyahu’s brutal war in Gaza that’s already killed 27,000
people. But Bernie is trying to stop it.

Bernie immediately offered an amendment in the Senate to end U.S.
complicity in the war on the Palestinian people by removing $10 billion in
weapons funding from the bill.

Bernie has been calling for an end to unconditional aid to Israel for
weeks — and this is a critical moment to join him and tell Congress NO
more funding for the bombing of civilians in Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14385?source=email-20240206&t=1011&akid=5301%2E5885482%2EKiRzNt ]Stand with Bernie: Add your name to urge members of Congress to block
billions more in funding support for the bombing of innocent Palestinians.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14385?source=email-20240206&t=1012&akid=5301%2E5885482%2EKiRzNt ][IMG]

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14385?source=email-20240206&t=1013&akid=5301%2E5885482%2EKiRzNt ]ADD YOUR NAME

Over 27,000 Palestinians have now been killed by Israel’s war in Gaza.
Pro-peace progressives like Bernie, Barbara Lee, and Rashida Tlaib have
been calling for a ceasefire, while much of the political establishment is
pushing for more funding for Israeli bombs.

Bernie has been saying NO MORE funding for war. He pursued a legislative
measure that would’ve forced the Senate to vote on a State Department
investigation into Israeli human rights abuses — which would then force a
vote on finally conditioning any aid sent to Israel. Now, as Congress
comes together to try again to pass unconditional aid to Israel, Bernie’s
still fighting.

This vote in the Senate is tomorrow, and we need to build support for the
moral choice for Palestinians.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/14385?source=email-20240206&t=1014&akid=5301%2E5885482%2EKiRzNt ]Add your name: The U.S. cannot keep sending billions to Israel as
Netanyahu continues the relentless bombing campaign in Gaza. Stand with
Bernie and demand Congress say NO to billions of dollars in aid to Israel.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Trust the experts? Settled science?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
He didn’t back down. He took on these powerful groups not because he’s “anti-vax” but because he is a crusader for truth.

|
---
| | | **Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is running a campaign of telling the truth to the American people
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=truth_2_06_24_r2_unopens_nd1&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
“Trust the experts! It’s settled science!”
This is what we were told by the pharmaceutical industry, government bureaucrats and the media when the COVID vaccines were introduced.
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s immediate response: “‘Trust the experts’ is not science and there is no such thing as ‘settled science.’” He went on to speak out against the lack of proper testing for COVID vaccines. When he exposed that the vaccines are exempt from pre-licensing safety testing – they don’t have to be tested, and many of them are not – the powers that be went after him with a vengeance.
He didn’t back down. He took on these powerful groups not because he’s “anti-vax” but because he is a crusader for truth. He fought for transparency. Get the facts out there and let the American people decide.
Because of this stance, his biggest critic and mudslinger became Dr. Anthony Fauci of the NIAID. This is the same Dr. Fauci who, during a congressional hearing a couple of weeks ago, admitted that the 6-foot social distancing mandate that led to lockdowns and the destruction of our economy “just sort of appeared” and had no basis in science. Fauci is also the man who funded the bioweapons research that caused the COVID pandemic. He despises RFK Jr. for exposing the truth about this dangerous, illegal research as well as Dr. Fauci’s role in the cover up.
RFK Jr. stood up for the American people. He called out Fauci’s illegal gain-of-function research and sought to hold him and his accomplices accountable for their actions.
As a result, Dr. Fauci and his accomplices in the NIH, CDC, and Big Pharma have called RFK Jr. an “anti-vaxxer.” Nothing could be further from the truth.
RFK Jr. believes in vaccines – safe, properly-tested vaccines. He’s used his vast knowledge of medical research and medical testing, along with his favorable public profile and his bully pulpit, to speak truth to power. The American people deserve to have all the facts.
BUT he is not running on vaccines. The only time he talks about vaccines is when someone asks him about it. He is running a campaign of _telling the truth to the American people, including truths that they don’t want to hear_.
He will continue this in the White House.
This is why his favorability rating is the highest among all candidates and his campaign has built the fastest growing populist coalition of left, right, and center. By transparency! Help RFK Jr. bring transparency to our government and our lives.

clean_body: He didn’t back down. He took on these powerful groups not because he’s “anti-vax” but because he is a crusader for truth. | | | | Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is running a campaign of telling the truth to the American people | Dear Peter, “Trust the experts! It’s settled science!” This is what we were told by the pharmaceutical industry, government bureaucrats and the media when the COVID vaccines were introduced. Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.’s immediate response: “‘Trust the experts’ is not science and there is no such thing as ‘settled science.’” He went on to speak out against the lack of proper testing for COVID vaccines. When he exposed that the vaccines are exempt from pre-licensing safety testing – they don’t have to be tested, and many of them are not – the powers that be went after him with a vengeance. He didn’t back down. He took on these powerful groups not because he’s “anti-vax” but because he is a crusader for truth. He fought for transparency. Get the facts out there and let the American people decide. Because of this stance, his biggest critic and mudslinger became Dr. Anthony Fauci of the NIAID. This is the same Dr. Fauci who, during a congressional hearing a couple of weeks ago, admitted that the 6-foot social distancing mandate that led to lockdowns and the destruction of our economy “just sort of appeared” and had no basis in science. Fauci is also the man who funded the bioweapons research that caused the COVID pandemic. He despises RFK Jr. for exposing the truth about this dangerous, illegal research as well as Dr. Fauci’s role in the cover up. RFK Jr. stood up for the American people. He called out Fauci’s illegal gain-of-function research and sought to hold him and his accomplices accountable for their actions. As a result, Dr. Fauci and his accomplices in the NIH, CDC, and Big Pharma have called RFK Jr. an “anti-vaxxer.” Nothing could be further from the truth. RFK Jr. believes in vaccines – safe, properly-tested vaccines. He’s used his vast knowledge of medical research and medical testing, along with his favorable public profile and his bully pulpit, to speak truth to power. The American people deserve to have all the facts. BUT he is not running on vaccines. The only time he talks about vaccines is when someone asks him about it. He is running a campaign of telling the truth to the American people, including truths that they don’t want to hear. He will continue this in the White House. This is why his favorability rating is the highest among all candidates and his campaign has built the fastest growing populist coalition of left, right, and center. By transparency! Help RFK Jr. bring transparency to our government and our lives. America needs a President not afraid to speak the truth. That President is Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. Team Kennedy | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

clean_body: | | Dear friends, Last week, I joined 262 colleagues in a crucial effort to reverse the Alliance for Hippocratic Medicine v. FDA decision, which threatens to restrict access to mifepristone — a crucial medication for safe abortions and various health conditions. = | = Friend, I am committed to preserving, protecting, and advancing the reproductive rights of women in Connecticut and across the U.S. But this decision could have far-reaching consequences, limiting access to safe abortion care for millions of women and impacting individuals managing conditions like hyperglycemia. We must pass federal abortion protections to ensure equal access for all Americans. Reproductive rights for all are too important. The Dobbs decision was only the beginning, and these partisan attacks on abortion care will only continue. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Trump’s handpicked candidate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by End Citizens United-Nonfederal
body:
My potential opponent was just at Mar-a-Lago
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20691%2E4449941%2EKgNebf)
---
Listen, I just got some alarming news, and I had to share it with you right away:

**Donald Trump's handpicked candidate, Bernie Moreno (R), just held a huge fundraiser at Mar-a-Lago, and we need your urgent support to fight back.**

Here's why: Experts at CNN are calling me one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection. Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their megadonor friends are spending MILLIONS to defeat me – and now, I'm worried their spending spree is working. **The latest polls show this race is neck and neck.**

If we let Moreno and Trump outraise and outspend us, we could lose this race and our Senate majority. **That's why my team and I set a rapid-response goal to raise $100,000 by midnight so we can fight back against the GOP's spending and win.**

[**So please, I'm counting on you: Will you split $7 or more between me and Fight for Reform to help reach this goal so we can fight back against whatever Trump's allies throw our way and protect Ohio's critical Senate seat and elect other pro-democracy Democrats across the country?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36935?t=7&akid=20691%2E4449941%2EKgNebf) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Sherrod Brown will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/36936?t=8&akid=20691%2E4449941%2EKgNebf)

#
---
Team — politics is about so much more than just any single person. It’s about _all of us_ working together to create the kind of country we want to live in. The kind of values we want our laws to represent. The kind of world that we want our children to grow up in. **And together — that’s exactly what we’ve done.** Not only did you come together to elect Governor Gretchen Whitmer in 2018 and reelect her in 2022, but you also gave Michigan Democrats **full control** of the state House and Senate so that we could improve the lives of Michiganders across the state. **[If you’re ready to continue this journey with us of making Michigan a better place to live and raise a family, please consider chipping in to Fight Like Hell PAC.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78518630/453625196/1229052807?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240206_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGFhNjFkZjItMWRjNS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KNuG8it21zfJZc6UGwRXwu_xRflKoYlZdBx9JK_8SYk=)** | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78518631/453625197/1229052807?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240206_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGFhNjFkZjItMWRjNS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KNuG8it21zfJZc6UGwRXwu_xRflKoYlZdBx9JK_8SYk=)

People often ask if small donations really make a difference. And the answer to that question is a resounding **yes.**
Taken together, small-dollar contributions from thousands of people add up to something big.
They allow us to spread our message far and wide so that we can bring more people into this fight. And **they send a signal to extremist Republicans and whoever else is watching that the strength of our movement is only growing as we get closer to Election Day.**
We couldn’t be more grateful for all the support you’ve shown Fight Like Hell PAC, now let’s keep it going!
**[It would mean the world to Governor Whitmer if you could make a financial contribution today to help us continue this fight in 2024 and beyond.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78518632/453625198/1229052807?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240206_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGFhNjFkZjItMWRjNS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KNuG8it21zfJZc6UGwRXwu_xRflKoYlZdBx9JK_8SYk=)**

name: COURIER
subject: How the mainstream media got Trump elected
body:
The New York Times makes big bucks from parroting Trump.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78518889/453626290/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTRlNjM2NTgtMWZjNS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jGrxQH4akBzX2xVngD5Lc71XlfTi6Eu8L1RGHlfGnTE=&emci=c5d91a52-1fc5-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=54e63658-1fc5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
_The New York Times_ is widely regarded as one of the most respected newspapers in America. **So it’s fair to wonder, are they on the verge of making the same mistakes covering Donald Trump in 2024 as they did in 2016 and 2020?**
Well, read some of their recent headlines for yourself, Peter:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78518890/453626291/-593472309?refcode=20240206_EM_NYT/Courier&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTRlNjM2NTgtMWZjNS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jGrxQH4akBzX2xVngD5Lc71XlfTi6Eu8L1RGHlfGnTE=)
An article outlining how Trump can use his many criminal trials to his advantage, a breaking news update on a childish name Trump calls one of his opponents, and a fluff piece about Trump’s surge with Republican college graduates... 🙄
Peter, let’s be clear: _The New York Times_ has to cover Trump. He’s all but locked up the Republican nomination.
**But there is a difference between covering Trump truthfully and normalizing him. The truth is that Trump is an aspiring dictator facing 92 criminal charges and promising revenge on his political rivals if he wins re-election. He’s lawless, dangerous, and anti-democratic. **
At COURIER, we believe the New York Times and other mainstream media outlets have to speak that truth to their massive audiences. It’s not enough to rely on an outdated “both sides” model of coverage that prioritizes profits and the “horse race” over what’s right for our democracy.
**[The good news is that we’re fighting back against the mainstream media’s efforts to normalize Trump with fearless, fact-based coverage of the 2024 election in 10 battleground states across the country. If you’re ready to support honest, good journalism that won’t water down the truth, can you chip in $10 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78518891/453626292/-593472309?refcode=20240206_EM_NYT/Courier&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTRlNjM2NTgtMWZjNS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jGrxQH4akBzX2xVngD5Lc71XlfTi6Eu8L1RGHlfGnTE=)**
Now, compare our headline coverage of Trump:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78518892/453626293/-593472309?refcode=20240206_EM_NYT/Courier&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTRlNjM2NTgtMWZjNS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jGrxQH4akBzX2xVngD5Lc71XlfTi6Eu8L1RGHlfGnTE=)
It’s clear, Peter, that we’re unafraid to tell the truth about Donald Trump and the danger his campaign represents to American democracy. Our innovative model takes that fearless journalism and publishes it in the online spaces where right-wing propaganda thrives.
**[But this work takes resources, Firstname, and we rely on the generous support of people like you to help fund our efforts. clean_body: The New York Times makes big bucks from parroting Trump. Peter, The New York Times is widely regarded as one of the most respected newspapers in America. So it’s fair to wonder, are they on the verge of making the same mistakes covering Donald Trump in 2024 as they did in 2016 and 2020? Well, read some of their recent headlines for yourself, Peter: = An article outlining how Trump can use his many criminal trials to his advantage, a breaking news update on a childish name Trump calls one of his opponents, and a fluff piece about Trump’s surge with Republican college graduates... 🙄 Peter, let’s be clear: The New York Times has to cover Trump. He’s all but locked up the Republican nomination. But there is a difference between covering Trump truthfully and normalizing him. The truth is that Trump is an aspiring dictator facing 92 criminal charges and promising revenge on his political rivals if he wins re-election. He’s lawless, dangerous, and anti-democratic. At COURIER, we believe the New York Times and other mainstream media outlets have to speak that truth to their massive audiences. It’s not enough to rely on an outdated “both sides” model of coverage that prioritizes profits and the “horse race” over what’s right for our democracy. = Now, compare our headline coverage of Trump: = It’s clear, Peter, that we’re unafraid to tell the truth about Donald Trump and the danger his campaign represents to American democracy. Our innovative model takes that fearless journalism and publishes it in the online spaces where right-wing propaganda thrives. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thanks for your support, The COURIER Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Straight to the point
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I don’t like to let others do the talking for me, but this gets directly to the heart of the choice voters have this year.
#

Peter — going to keep this short.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb24.Oewwi1&refcode=em240206-1-120&t=1&akid=1930%2E734936%2EaV_hRu)
I don’t like to let others do the talking for me, but this gets directly to the heart of the choice voters have this year.
I’m sick and tired of politicians forcing their way into doctors offices. I’m ready to fight these bans in the Senate and make Roe the law of the land.
But I won’t get there without your support.
[**Please: Make a donation to my campaign and help me fight to expand safe and legal access to abortion for anyone who needs it.](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2327?c0=ruben-em-feb24.-zvZm_&refcode=em240206-1-120&t=2&akid=1930%2E734936%2EaV_hRu)**
[CHIP IN](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb24.Oewwi1&refcode=em240206-1-120&t=3&akid=1930%2E734936%2EaV_hRu)
Thanks,
Ruben

body:
I want to give a huge THANK YOU to this extraordinary community!

A proud Arizonan and lifelong Democrat, Conor O'Callaghan is running to represent Arizona's 1st Congressional District and unseat MAGA Republican David Schweikert. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://action.conorforaz.com/p/pKfVwCqeNUy4NM7F4Jx-eQ2?unsubscribedata=e4I5LoVQ4PeY0MftABq1EOUzSTs82%2Fz1xc%2BiZEU0jp5srm9uSQw4OwQwdcjMJcnpokS%2F7cs7yxWmfPyyZZo7r22zhgNDYwroavbLPBWN3AJcJAaNV0GE%2FLb2CFjYRdG25sa%2Bk7%2F%2FrVduZA%2B7Mvqob%2BFUHAUbyJm4fy7GhYLoDE1B6QofrQpYJsYnpNgjV26TFPDzbqt5D4nMeyBgjffjr2Ep2G7NeJxZbL4a%2BSc9%2FHGOUwo0eOxUccwcMrWx9HJEyzmZ7VZ40TTbQ0Wc9ksXZdS%2BA92G5GEHxZ8w1kh9yZndRJNauhIbOXj45PcFgmMvEs03VWnDCgqJRQtdS0qP73OLDyS0%2BZsYoJkuHM2BCIv9S3ye0AR8OKSqpisIP%2Fbv7Wr6gHzFoyxmnsFZ228U3tg5i8MA8ReHwHmFJ1KIlZXYV1qE8lrMI5MJ1elO0gS2)

Hey Peter, it's Conor. I want to give a huge **THANK YOU** to this extraordinary community!
I'm beyond grateful for every opportunity I've had over the past few weeks to speak with you about my vision for a better future for AZ-01. | | **Volunteers supercharge elections.** And this is a year where we cannot take any chances. Our volunteers help us research races and filing deadlines and mobilize activists around big statewide ballot initiatives, and all of our victories large and small are won because of folks like you giving a little of your time. clean_body: | | | | Volunteers supercharge elections. And this is a year where we cannot take any chances. Our volunteers help us research races and filing deadlines and mobilize activists around big statewide ballot initiatives, and all of our victories large and small are won because of folks like you giving a little of your time. We're kicking off campaigns to elect hundreds of local candidates across battleground states like Michigan and Georgia and we're breaking Republican supermajorities in places like Virginia. And each one of these races and initiatives is building momentum and bringing out the voters we need to keep Trump out of the White House. We're counting on you! Thanks, Movement Labs | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Rapid Resist Action. Contributions to Rapid Resist Action, a 501(c)(4), are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. |

name: Andrew Wynne (FCA)
subject: what everyone is missing about the border crisis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Courts America |
body:
Here’s where the chaos at the border leads...

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3dc91e1cd5f94eb3ba9b0a701ecaef51&_e=pwqbnXTVqsD-ADPQrhRmsYJwpK_nciQ2HCauOq6dgJC2-YICOGpbHGOW0CtD1-0DnG3ojvDPlk0T8O1jh8i10qmTiytX751Ux6L1aITXlZNxWQoDRou-eBeE4go0ltK6NIUyUJOXlxWGDMfF9ymE2vthL7Z01o_7wQA0Md0TAYFNZEd1ElB7usi2OpGhuScwKHrREuuurrszpQ6vqjaLz3Jk2Id0T_sCCuXhLLxEkh_Q7POyFnTU2_dMhhssWCRwzwYW2gJ3fQSDrIIhOaALdYhisAzfBOYMSBSHZ5EcZDmNygfS3k-lEfIML6LRlUr-E6vIQaKr1PZ4rVqIll3r-ugS8SYqlYBojDfxKTCm_Dw4V1Ri5ddOnUNjmQqPOTImDp9LKYxE2eEjW87kQS-0j2bxdyTEWbWm5cnVx04wuJs%3D)
---
Fellow Patriot, If you think what’s happening at our southern border is bad... _**just wait until you see what comes next.**_ Why do I say that? **Because chaos at the border leads to chaos in our community.** Illegal immigrants who smuggle fentanyl into our country bring with them a criminal mindset that needs to be stopped. **_When law and order breaks down at our southern border, maintaining it in the rest of our country is more important than ever._**

---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3dc91e1cd5f94eb3ba9b0a701ecaef51&_e=pwqbnXTVqsD-ADPQrhRmsYJwpK_nciQ2HCauOq6dgJC2-YICOGpbHGOW0CtD1-0DnG3ojvDPlk0T8O1jh8i10qmTiytX751Ux6L1aITXlZNxWQoDRou-eBeE4go0ltK6NIUyUJOXlxWGDMfF9ymE2vthL7Z01o_7wQA0Md0TAYFNZEd1ElB7usi2OpGhuScwKHrREuuurrszpQ6vqjaLz3Jk2Id0T_sCCuXhLLxEkh_Q7POyFnTU2_dMhhssWCRwu3lErFkMpOoiP9qpZjCLFR2eL_0H0Q6TWshPqoQjEEXOuLgXUJwHGr5v-mHlIkYDhH1CYdICRwq_7iIP15ATRjMphazbvBuxE13ngwg5XHLTjaBi7OQfx8E2BeAwM2CZQtXVMv6GLYv4onYxwDo8JIW5IMX0ob4BTbzkuhra0lc%3D)
---
[SECURE THE BORDER](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3dc91e1cd5f94eb3ba9b0a701ecaef51&_e=pwqbnXTVqsD-ADPQrhRmsYJwpK_nciQ2HCauOq6dgJC2-YICOGpbHGOW0CtD1-0DnG3ojvDPlk0T8O1jh8i10qmTiytX751Ux6L1aITXlZNxWQoDRou-eBeE4go0ltK6NIUyUJOXlxWGDMfF9ymE2vthL7Z01o_7wQA0Md0TAYFNZEd1ElB7usi2OpGhuScwKHrREuuurrszpQ6vqjaLz3Jk2Id0T_sCCuXhLLxEkh_Q7POyFnTU2_dMhhssWCRwoKnkSGEp4Pf4IWVz820XXBO3T6XAzvKhDnRRcZEGclqLIryn9o2iwY9WWcPUynyW9Rp1TW7B8a29bM68w7G4ry6ywB8NfYyY-8R1el4vXZBqZ3g8jttxTzonAingKXTZkC42EM9CgiqbhTvGQEm2GXC1pl0WxGFeCIfgO49NpNA%3D)
---
Every level in our justice system has a role to play:
* **District Attorneys** must bring charges, quickly prosecute offenders, and instruct federal immigration officials to deport those convicted of dangerous crimes.
* **Judges** must deny bail to dangerous criminals with no ties to the community or who are in the country illegally.
* **And judicial officials at every level** must step up to the plate and demand accountability.

**_[ Unfortunately, many of these positions have been filled with Soros-funded radicals who think their job is to advance a far-left agenda, NOT maintain the rule of law.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3dc91e1cd5f94eb3ba9b0a701ecaef51&_e=pwqbnXTVqsD-ADPQrhRmsYJwpK_nciQ2HCauOq6dgJC2-YICOGpbHGOW0CtD1-0DnG3ojvDPlk0T8O1jh8i10qmTiytX751Ux6L1aITXlZNxWQoDRou-eBeE4go0ltK6NIUyUJOXlxWGDMfF9ymE2vthL7Z01o_7wQA0Md0TAYFNZEd1ElB7usi2OpGhuScwKHrREuuurrszpQ6vqjaLz3Jk2Id0T_sCCuXhLLxEkh_Q7POyFnTU2_dMhhssWCRwV3a4WKek1lbKnuVr5n7sZ2yE2D39_PjLZuYc3f1Sv0FPya3i2nsQ6nR-Cv_Khntuscmh5G54DndTSNSR-0BxSLiNr7D_2-z08t3f42tVY6LFnFSzwNHbMs72V-ct2ZdGmazptVYdIYW-jhspigAKoVWXEGsAO2lsyix9cO_mlvE%3D)_** Fellow Patriot, I’m urgently reaching out to you to join our movement. The crisis is upon us — and we need every conservative who supports law and order on our team. **_[Fair Courts America](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3dc91e1cd5f94eb3ba9b0a701ecaef51&_e=pwqbnXTVqsD-ADPQrhRmsYJwpK_nciQ2HCauOq6dgJC2-YICOGpbHGOW0CtD1-0DnG3ojvDPlk0T8O1jh8i10qmTiytX751Ux6L1aITXlZNxWQoDRou-eBeE4go0ltK6NIUyUJOXlxWGDMfF9ymE2vthL7Z01o_7wQA0Md0TAYFNZEd1ElB7usi2OpGhuScwKHrREuuurrszpQ6vqjaLz3Jk2Id0T_sCCuXhLLxEkh_Q7POyFnTU2_dMhhssWCRw4nhMK_rePdB8jPJTc1ZScXzHh92Rgp_xsu9gjnvo-1Cqw-AqUwBN77B6BBGoyJpcRS_8ZBYNuQH1iN6i3qtY1sOKHQllEwdDHIZN_rdi_VAYI38LwPCoMjnQlbbE5yhtda86UQVsnoENeMzA_jZXkVzvqgESHKtJntau8ChoAd8%3D)_ supports the men and women who serve as judges and district attorneys who answer the call to protect our communities, especially when the Biden Administration refuses to enforce the border. We help strong judicial leaders win — and help stop radical candidates from infiltrating our justice system.**

---
[I WANT TO HELP](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3dc91e1cd5f94eb3ba9b0a701ecaef51&_e=pwqbnXTVqsD-ADPQrhRmsYJwpK_nciQ2HCauOq6dgJC2-YICOGpbHGOW0CtD1-0DnG3ojvDPlk0T8O1jh8i10qmTiytX751Ux6L1aITXlZNxWQoDRou-eBeE4go0ltK6NIUyUJOXlxWGDMfF9ymE2vthL7Z01o_7wQA0Md0TAYFNZEd1ElB7usi2OpGhuScwKHrREuuurrszpQ6vqjaLz3Jk2Id0T_sCCuXhLLxEkh_Q7POyFnTU2_dMhhssWCRwS7Y2GYNXphZxZ0xC4DMrdi11mcB3BT5opDH2xbEYMcAC9fR4RYS60L4pZ9aWvxjDaIxb6uyeZeUllPwi-c5ixROPpVdvTIYmmm0z2bbqhiimRyengw6_-JX0ZaE1aS07TswSXYumGbzfjKnpGsoDxk7SMrx-i0e1s9bF031gdmI%3D)
---
But tracking all of these local races across the country is a massive undertaking — which is why there has not yet been a concerted effort to fight back against the network of George Soros’s dark money influence... _until now._ **We’re taking Soros on, head-to-head, but we can't do it without the support of patriots like you.** He has already funneled $40 MILLION dollars into his judicial takeover... if we hope to keep up with that, we NEED your help. **_[Will you donate to help us help our embattled judges and prosecutors before the NEXT crime wave hits?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3dc91e1cd5f94eb3ba9b0a701ecaef51&_e=pwqbnXTVqsD-ADPQrhRmsYJwpK_nciQ2HCauOq6dgJC2-YICOGpbHGOW0CtD1-0DnG3ojvDPlk0T8O1jh8i10qmTiytX751Ux6L1aITXlZNxWQoDRou-eBeE4go0ltK6NIUyUJOXlxWGDMfF9ymE2vthL7Z01o_7wQA0Md0TAYFNZEd1ElB7usi2OpGhuScwKHrREuuurrszpQ6vqjaLz3Jk2Id0T_sCCuXhLLxEkh_Q7POyFnTU2_dMhhssWCRw82kD4B7jJ47Y0t846gvB6S1Q7W-QKavEtnKtMTdbEocL3xHVed-Xax9xDrLhuXxL7crbtKkEnk6AsIMRUgDvMATHUkhvt82gwjrNrHHBkJLgsHaKMmIdsr2-KeZxoN89yqrJlvh1hqOEw1BASSH3Jbvtx4hig1XztMWARm05pcQ%3D)_**

clean_body: Here’s where the chaos at the border leads... | | | Fellow Patriot, If you think what’s happening at our southern border is bad... just wait until you see what comes next. Why do I say that? Because chaos at the border leads to chaos in our community. Illegal immigrants who smuggle fentanyl into our country bring with them a criminal mindset that needs to be stopped. When law and order breaks down at our southern border, maintaining it in the rest of our country is more important than ever. Every level in our justice system has a role to play: District Attorneys must bring charges, quickly prosecute offenders, and instruct federal immigration officials to deport those convicted of dangerous crimes. Judges must deny bail to dangerous criminals with no ties to the community or who are in the country illegally. And judicial officials at every level must step up to the plate and demand accountability. Fellow Patriot, I’m urgently reaching out to you to join our movement. The crisis is upon us — and we need every conservative who supports law and order on our team. supports the men and women who serve as judges and district attorneys who answer the call to protect our communities, especially when the Biden Administration refuses to enforce the border. We help strong judicial leaders win — and help stop radical candidates from infiltrating our justice system. But tracking all of these local races across the country is a massive undertaking — which is why there has not yet been a concerted effort to fight back against the network of George Soros’s dark money influence... until now. We’re taking Soros on, head-to-head, but we can't do it without the support of patriots like you. He has already funneled $40 MILLION dollars into his judicial takeover... if we hope to keep up with that, we NEED your help. ** | | Thank you, Andrew WynneExecutive Director | Fair Courts America | | | | | | | | Paid for by Fair Courts America | | | | | Defend the Constitution PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: VoteVets.org
subject: Chamberlain — Johnson
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
Trump, Mike Johnson, and the MAGA-right are betraying our allies and partners around the world.
#
Derek, what’s happening in the Republican Party right now is nothing short of betrayal.
We don’t use that word lightly.
Trump, Mike Johnson, and the MAGA-right are betraying our allies and partners around the world. The warriors of Ukraine who face down Putin’s forces every day, the people of Ukraine who are subject to bombardment and annihilation without us — they need our help most urgently and most acutely.
And Trump, Johnson, and the MAGA-right want to abandon them.
They are appeasing Russia in a way far worse than even Neville Chamberlain did with Germany before the Second World War. Chamberlain believed he was pursuing peace by appeasing Hitler. Trump and the MAGA-right _**know_** they are giving Putin the upper hand.
There is a chance — a small chance, but a chance — that we can pressure the Republicans who still back Ukraine to come to the table and pass additional support.
It is critical that we do. Because the cost of abandoning Ukraine and allowing Russia to win is far greater than what it will take to get Ukraine the resources they need.
**[Please, add your name and show that Ukraine still has support in the United States. They need our help, and we will do whatever we must to get it to them.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/240206_vv_em_ukraine/?source=em240206-1-30?refcode2=24879.3013755.lRDY5t&akid=24879%2E3013755%2ElRDY5t)

We don’t use that word lightly. Trump, Mike Johnson, and the MAGA-right are betraying our allies and partners around the world. The warriors of Ukraine who face down Putin’s forces every day, the people of Ukraine who are subject to bombardment and annihilation without us — they need our help most urgently and most acutely. And Trump, Johnson, and the MAGA-right want to abandon them. They are appeasing Russia in a way far worse than even Neville Chamberlain did with Germany before the Second World War. Chamberlain believed he was pursuing peace by appeasing Hitler. Trump and the MAGA-right know they are giving Putin the upper hand. There is a chance — a small chance, but a chance — that we can pressure the Republicans who still back Ukraine to come to the table and pass additional support. It is critical that we do. Because the cost of abandoning Ukraine and allowing Russia to win is far greater than what it will take to get Ukraine the resources they need. ** | This is critically important. Please join us. Thank you, The team at VoteVets PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.

name: Eric, Team Fetterman
subject: How you can make an impact
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
#
Hi Derek, it’s Eric, John’s Senior Advisor.
I know you don’t hear from me often, but as I looked over our fundraising for this year, I knew I had to reach out. Let me start with this:
✅Online fundraising is the main way we support John’s work in the Senate.
✅Sometimes fundraising slows down, but we can make up for it with a big surge in individual donations from emails like this one.
✅Even though chipping in $5 or $10 doesn’t feel like much, you’ll be joined by folks from all across PA and the country -- **together, you’ll make a big impact.**
**[So, with that said, I have to ask: will you chip in ANY amount today to power John’s work in DC? We’re 100% grassroots-funded, so your support really matters.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240206-1?refcode=em20240206-1-8782&refcode2=8782_434096_dJpTwQ&akid=8782%2E434096%2EdJpTwQ)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20240206-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240206-8782&refcode2=8782_434096_dJpTwQ&akid=8782%2E434096%2EdJpTwQ)**
Thank you so much for being on this team 💙
– Eric, Senior Advisor
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20240206-8782-footer&t=1&refcode2=8782_434096_dJpTwQ&akid=8782%2E434096%2EdJpTwQ)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8782%2E434096%2EdJpTwQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8782%2E434096%2EdJpTwQ)

body:
Islamophobia and anti-Arab racism puts people’s lives in danger. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTv3c-ea7G3UtK03wNI0Ge-4C3D3M1sbtYuFo1cLhVAzJqhzeB3dlFpc4Mn5bQmdOIyZRj065vf5mvvBSD0eI0GgdkE5Smv8eu874YWF3RTpG6GmaJB5rjY08Aw1SNT6S8XZe1ExSydQ-6qrk1Ey15sa17VauBjdMJI-mI8sHBFPiEyXm8RKJwlidaV9im3AvbF7an88AAt03TmJcUGryzOYT3B-jJpTdqeGtuGl7ni5iKLEjsSGVHcsnZy0cWSFH-Xsn6bhqgj7o3FnD6mom9E5dvXe9uJQdlVrUVLUOfVOVY/43m/y6Qnyy-2Qyat7TDfngJq_w/h0/iDKoxb1cY5ZGOt58AAWfyO5sUw0j1vt2fOASNk2GJxI)
---
Friend, The _Wall Street Journal_ just published a dangerous, racist article targeting one of our most diverse cities, Dearborn, Michigan. Our families are already grieving for their loved ones impacted by the Israeli military’s genocide in Gaza. They should not be simultaneously subjected to attacks in the media. The opinion piece is titled: “Welcome to Dearborn, America’s Jihad Capital.” It targets our neighbors based on their faith and ethnicity and their advocacy for a ceasefire which is what the majority of Americans want right now. All of this while they mourn the nearly 30,000 Palestinians killed amidst the continued bombings in the region. **The blatant Islamophobia and anti-Arab racism espoused in the**** _Wall Street Journal_****puts people’s lives in danger.** In my district, mothers have reached out to me scared to send their children to school and some business owners are opening their doors with caution. This weekend, a 23-year old Palestinian American was stabbed in the chest in a hate crime—by a man who attacked a group of young Muslim Americans who had a “Free Palestine” flag on their car. At a time when many of our communities are mourning the genocide happening in Gaza and grieving their loved ones, they’re also endangered by hate in the United States. No one should have to endure racist targeting by our country’s media outlets. So I’m lifting up a petition from local organizations to the _Wall Street Journal_ ’s editors. clean_body: Islamophobia and anti-Arab racism puts people’s lives in danger. | | | Friend, The Wall Street Journal just published a dangerous, racist article targeting one of our most diverse cities, Dearborn, Michigan. Our families are already grieving for their loved ones impacted by the Israeli military’s genocide in Gaza. They should not be simultaneously subjected to attacks in the media. The opinion piece is titled: “Welcome to Dearborn, America’s Jihad Capital.” It targets our neighbors based on their faith and ethnicity and their advocacy for a ceasefire which is what the majority of Americans want right now. All of this while they mourn the nearly 30,000 Palestinians killed amidst the continued bombings in the region. The blatant Islamophobia and anti-Arab racism espoused in the Wall Street Journalputs people’s lives in danger. In my district, mothers have reached out to me scared to send their children to school and some business owners are opening their doors with caution. This weekend, a 23-year old Palestinian American was stabbed in the chest in a hate crime—by a man who attacked a group of young Muslim Americans who had a “Free Palestine” flag on their car. At a time when many of our communities are mourning the genocide happening in Gaza and grieving their loved ones, they’re also endangered by hate in the United States. No one should have to endure racist targeting by our country’s media outlets. So I’m lifting up a petition from local organizations to the Wall Street Journal ’s editors. | The article targeting our Dearborn families follows another dangerous Wall Street Journal article from January 31, titled “Chicago votes for Hamas,” after Chicago’s city council and mayor voted to pass a resolution calling for a ceasefire. That one was written by the newspaper’s own editorial board, rather than an outside contributor—which really shows us where the Wall Street Journal stands. To characterize the movement for a ceasefire as a movement for anything other than peace and coexistence is incredibly dangerous and inaccurate. It adds to the painful dehumanization and hateful rhetoric that’s already spreading, and it puts families in more danger. Dearborn’s mayor just announced an increase in security at places of worship and other areas around the city, saying there’s been a rise in “Islamophobic rhetoric online targeting the city” directly because of the Wall Street Journal piece. Another opinion piece from this weekend in the New York Times refers to Middle East countries as insects and uses other genocidal terms like “parasites,” dehumanizing Arab people and justifying mass murder. The fact that the Wall Street Journaland the New York Timeswould platform this type of hate and racism is shameful—and it incites violence within the U.S. and abroad. Across the country, Arab Americans, both of Muslim and Christian faith, are already experiencing a frightening rise in violent hate crimes. Our large American Muslim communities across the country of diverse ethnic backgrounds are living in fear. Media outlets need to know that contributing to this hate is unacceptable. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Peter,

As you know, leaders come from every place and every background imaginable. Is there a rising star in your community? Now is your chance to celebrate her on a national level!

Every year, EMILYs List recognizes a woman currently serving in a state or local office with our **Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award**. This award highlights a leader with a promising career in public service, and honors her for showing the same dedication, determination, and commitment as our award's namesake.

[**We want to hear from you, Peter! Nominate a woman serving at the state or local level in your community for a 2024 Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78521012/453633634/1574083470?sourceid=1052817&refcode=WTENEN08_20240206_RisingStarNoms1_ND_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDVjNzUyNy0yM2M1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUECACnNIEIu9gYq6ud3gC896522zn2BoG9kWymMMjQ=&emci=ad822221-23c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=045c7527-23c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=5177934)

The recipient of the 2024 Rising Star Award will not only be honored at our annual We Are EMILY event this spring, but will also know that the millions-strong EMILYs List community sees her work and has her back!

Past recipients have included former Georgia state Rep. **Bee Nguyen** , Rep. **Ayanna Pressley (MA-07)** , Harris County, Texas Judge **Lina Hidalgo** , and Rep. **Emilia Sykes (OH-13)**. These women have made a huge difference in their cities, states, and our country.

We are so excited to find and honor our next Rising Star, but first, we need your help to find her!**Nominate a Democratic pro-choice woman serving in public office for this year's Gabrielle Giffords Rising Star Award:**
[NOMINATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78521013/453633635/1574083470?sourceid=1052817&refcode=WTENEN08_20240206_RisingStarNoms1_ND_v1s3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDVjNzUyNy0yM2M1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RUECACnNIEIu9gYq6ud3gC896522zn2BoG9kWymMMjQ=&emci=ad822221-23c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=045c7527-23c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=5177934)

Sarah Curmi (she/her/hers)

name: George Whitesides
subject: Ballots are out!
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78521073/453633929/-46109959?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGJlOTI5Ni0yM2M1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K4dTJgEaTpEKsuKPR0Io-RbVzEYSl336lDPIOLFgbxs=)
Peter, this marks an important milestone in our people-powered campaign to defeat MAGA Mike Garcia here in CA-27:

**Ballots for our March 5th primary election are hitting mailboxes across the district.** Voters in the Antelope, San Fernando, and Santa Clarita Valleys now have the power to move us forward to facing off with Garcia in November.

While ballots are out now, that doesn’t mean that our voter outreach stops. It only increases from here – we need to keep our billboards, yard signs, door knocking, and other outreach programs running full steam ahead these next critical weeks before Election Day.

**[With political experts and Democratic leadership rating CA-27 as a must-win for control of the House majority, can I count on you to chip in $3 to help us reach undecided voters?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78521074/453633930/-46109959?refcode=em-2.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGJlOTI5Ni0yM2M1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K4dTJgEaTpEKsuKPR0Io-RbVzEYSl336lDPIOLFgbxs=)**
| ****[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78521075/453633931/-46109959?refcode=em-2.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGJlOTI5Ni0yM2M1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K4dTJgEaTpEKsuKPR0Io-RbVzEYSl336lDPIOLFgbxs=)****
---

Here’s why this matters: Increasing our name recognition ahead of our primary sets us up for the success we need.

Here in California, we have a top-two primary system. The top two vote receivers – regardless of political party – will qualify for the November election.

This is our first test against Mike Garcia, and we must have a strong showing. With every voter I meet on the campaign trail, it’s clear that our community deserves better leadership – and I’m dedicated to delivering that leadership in Congress.

We’re increasing our voter outreach in these last few weeks before Election Day in order to reach every undecided voter we can with our message. But that takes a lot of time, effort, and unfortunately money.

**[Your $3 donation today will directly help boost our operations ahead of the primary. Will you chip in any amount you can afford today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78521076/453633932/-46109959?refcode=em-2.6.24-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGJlOTI5Ni0yM2M1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K4dTJgEaTpEKsuKPR0Io-RbVzEYSl336lDPIOLFgbxs=)**

clean_body: | = Peter, this marks an important milestone in our people-powered campaign to defeat MAGA Mike Garcia here in CA-27: Ballots for our March 5th primary election are hitting mailboxes across the district. Voters in the Antelope, San Fernando, and Santa Clarita Valleys now have the power to move us forward to facing off with Garcia in November. While ballots are out now, that doesn’t mean that our voter outreach stops. It only increases from here – we need to keep our billboards, yard signs, door knocking, and other outreach programs running full steam ahead these next critical weeks before Election Day. = | **= Here’s why this matters: Increasing our name recognition ahead of our primary sets us up for the success we need. Here in California, we have a top-two primary system. The top two vote receivers – regardless of political party – will qualify for the November election. This is our first test against Mike Garcia, and we must have a strong showing. With every voter I meet on the campaign trail, it’s clear that our community deserves better leadership – and I’m dedicated to delivering that leadership in Congress. We’re increasing our voter outreach in these last few weeks before Election Day in order to reach every undecided voter we can with our message. But that takes a lot of time, effort, and unfortunately money. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . subject: Three things I wanted to tell you

body:
Congratulations

Friend,

Three things:

1\. I wanted to thank you for being one of my father's most loyal supporters from your location. Your continued support is essential to the success of the Make America Great Again movement.

2\. Our deadline is tonight, and it's your last opportunity to complete the **[REPUBLICAN PARTY AREA ASSESSMENT](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AkBQXN9WSxP340E00i_tQg~~/AARclAA~~~)** before it expires. The assessment is broken up into five different sections and takes about ten minutes to complete.

3\. Participating in the assessment is the most important thing you can do right now to help my father defeat Joe Biden and ensure America First conservatives find ourselves back in the Senate Majority next year.

Donald Trump Jr.

name: Katie Porter with Beyond the Whiteboard
subject: The mental health crisis among young people
body:
One in five teens suffer from a diagnosable mental health disorder.
| |

# [The mental health crisis among young people](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2052568&post_id=141434799&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxNDM0Nzk5LCJpYXQiOjE3MDcyNDcxNTQsImV4cCI6MTcwOTgzOTE1NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNTI1NjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.c0o4502XHIEwVOiinTwBN94i9k9WxjUc_oqBc7X2EDk)
### One in five teens suffer from a diagnosable mental health disorder.
| | [Katie Porter](https://substack.com/redirect/8f5f0adb-3804-4cdb-bb4e-531d9f7878cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| Feb 6
---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8f5f0adb-3804-4cdb-bb4e-531d9f7878cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2052568&post_id=141434799&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxNDM0Nzk5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTcwNzI0NzE1NCwiZXhwIjoxNzA5ODM5MTU0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjA1MjU2OCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.GFXmPRDgWzslUfxbYmy5mJTDeNJd4jQN-b0pqBtwqP8&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2052568&post_id=141434799&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxNDM0Nzk5LCJpYXQiOjE3MDcyNDcxNTQsImV4cCI6MTcwOTgzOTE1NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNTI1NjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.c0o4502XHIEwVOiinTwBN94i9k9WxjUc_oqBc7X2EDk&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2052568&post_id=141434799&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTQxNDM0Nzk5LCJpYXQiOjE3MDcyNDcxNTQsImV4cCI6MTcwOTgzOTE1NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNTI1NjgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.c0o4502XHIEwVOiinTwBN94i9k9WxjUc_oqBc7X2EDk)
---
| | [](https://substack..z8XazPGqkW_eXFVWXc4V9KUIPW4FZY85TBSUxAU9OCA?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/katieporteroc/p/the-mental-health-crisis-among-young?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store)
---
As a mom of two teenagers and one tween, I'm acutely aware of the mental health crisis affecting kids, teens, and young people all across the country.
Recent studies show that about [one in five](https://substack.com/redirect/d38aaa07-d2eb-42a3-add2-918b45c9ed12?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) teens between age twelve and eighteen suffer from at least one diagnosable mental health disorder.
**Among those 18 to 26, just[15%](https://substack.com/redirect/c210d46c-dceb-4233-bc6a-300ef420af87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) said their mental health was excellent**. That is a steep decline from both 2013 and 2003, when just over half of young adults said the same.
Here in Orange County, we're lucky to have world class mental health services at the Children's Hospital of Orange County. I've toured it and spoken with leaders there about how to address the crisis--which is going to take a variety of approaches--from investing in schools to cracking down on Big Insurance. Here's what I'm pushing for:
1. **Train new mental health specialists:** A [2020 study](https://substack.com/redirect/aa662949-06ae-4897-9987-c8dfab6eb8d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) found there are just 5.4 child psychologists for every 100,000 kids under the age of 18. We can pass legislation to incentivize the training and recruitment of new mental health professionals.
2. **Invest in school psychologists so kids can access free care at school:** The National Association of School Psychologists recommends [at least one](https://substack.com/redirect/1baa1c35-4a04-4401-834d-739a6ac9dd86?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) school psych for every 500 students. Current estimates show there's one school psych for every 1,211 students. My daughter has used free mental health services at school, and I've seen how school psychologists are able to free up school counselors' time to address learning needs.
3. **Address gaps in care:** Right now the options for mental health care tend to be full hospitalization or once a week (or once a month) therapy. Particularly with concerns about school attendance and the need to address family issues, many kids need in-between options, such as intensive outpatient care. Without these alternatives we'll keep seeing an increase in mental health issues. We need to force insurance companies to cover the full continuum of care, which brings me to my next point.
4. **Hold insurance companies accountable for covering mental health care:** Big insurance companies have set ridiculous rules for what they'll cover, with some only covering one session a month. Many insurance plans have few or even no psychiatrists who are seeing new patients within a geographic area. My bill to enforce mental health parity was signed into law and will require data collection on whether insurance plans are delivering the promised care options.
5. **Address mental health related school absences:** A [recent survey](https://substack.com/redirect/be0d627a-c534-42f6-b8ab-f1a8a9f66a8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) found that more than half of parents have let their kids skip school to take a mental health day. But oftentimes that doesn't solve the fundamental problem and leads to missed learning opportunities. Instead, more schools should create mental health spaces, where kids and teens can learn coping skills.
6. **Support for every community:** A [2022 survey](https://substack.com/redirect/37fea757-a1a7-4245-85b2-17bf7da0a628?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) found that parents making less than $40,000 a year were more likely than those in higher-income households to say they're very worried about their kids suffering from mental health issues. As we address this crisis, we must make sure adequate resources make it to schools and communities that often get left behind.

I've introduced the Student Mental Health Rights Act to improve compliance with existing federal law and expand the toolkit for well-being in schools. Unfortunately, mental health is one of the issues where I really feel the generational gap of Washington. The average US Senator is 64 years old, and 75 out of 100 of them are men. The teen mental health crisis is not something they're paying attention to, whereas I'm seeing it directly in my community and kids' public schools.
**Congress can and should invest in the mental health of young people.** And I won't let powerful corporations off the hook. Social media companies and health insurance companies all play a role here, and I'll always hold them to account.
Onward,
Katie Porter

Congress can and should invest in the mental health of young people.** And I won't let powerful corporations off the hook. Social media companies and health insurance companies all play a role here, and I'll always hold them to account. Onward, Katie Porter | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Katie Porter Katie Porter for Senate, PO Box 5176 Irvine, CA 92616, Email us: info@katieporter.com ? ?

clean_body: | = We’re coming to you with breaking news, team: Last quarter’s fundraising reports just went live, and it shows that we outraised David Schweikert! Despite Schweikert’s backing from corporations and special interests, our community-focused campaign clearly resonated. Marlene is proud that nearly 90% of our contributions come from Arizonans, and nearly half of those donations are from the district. = | **= Thanks to your help, we’ve built the momentum we need to kick 2024 off right. David Schweikert has proven time and time again that he’ll put politics over people. He received huge donations from far-right GOP allies, special interest groups, corporate PAC money, and others. Marlene is doing things differently. Individual, small-dollar contributions from Arizonans make up the bulk of our fundraising because these are the people Marlene is running to represent – not party bosses or corporations. It’s long past time for AZ-01 to have a community leader representing them in Congress. Friends, As I reflect on Black History Month, I wanted to send you a personal note. This time is dedicated to acknowledging and celebrating the countless contributions that Black Americans have made to our state and nation throughout history. Black trailblazers have set an example of what it means to never tire in the mission for justice and equity. And you can bet that in my role as Congressman, I'll work to combat injustice wherever I see it. For example: Voter suppression laws are purposefully designed to impede Black and Brown folks from voting. This must change. I will continue fighting for voting protections and accurate education in our schools this month and every month. Today and every day, let’s acknowledge the achievements and perseverance of Black Americans and recommit ourselves to the fight for equal opportunity. \- Jared

clean_body: Emails like these are an important aspect of our strategy to keep in touch with our supporters. If you want to receive fewer emails, click If you want to unsubscribe, click | = Friends, As I reflect on Black History Month, I wanted to send you a personal note. This time is dedicated to acknowledging and celebrating the countless contributions that Black Americans have made to our state and nation throughout history. Black trailblazers have set an example of what it means to never tire in the mission for justice and equity. And you can bet that in my role as Congressman, I'll work to combat injustice wherever I see it. For example: Voter suppression laws are purposefully designed to impede Black and Brown folks from voting. This must change. I will continue fighting for voting protections and accurate education in our schools this month and every month. Today and every day, let’s acknowledge the achievements and perseverance of Black Americans and recommit ourselves to the fight for equal opportunity. \- Jared | | Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P.O. Box 8784, Coral Springs, FL 33065 www.jaredforflorida.com/ = = to receive fewer emails. Click here to .

I know that he's the right candidate to take on Joe Biden and the Left as we head into the most important election of our lifetimes.

name: Susan Wild
subject: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
This month is Black History Month, an opportunity to celebrate the many contributions and achievements of Black Americans throughout our nation’s history, history that is being made every day.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78523194/453641434/-1109429436?refcode=BLU_EM_SWC_2024-02-06_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzhjOTRhNi0yOGM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mUFIi7oas-Gk9QqNFaXcie47tuUIitB6TmmJXG7eV3s=)
---
| Peter,

This month is Black History Month, an opportunity to celebrate the many contributions and achievements of Black Americans throughout our nation’s history, history that is being made every day.

As we uplift the Black community, we must also grapple with the inequity and systemic racism that persists in our country to this very day. I know while we’ve made great progress throughout the years, there is still more to be done.

I am committed to fighting inequality every day in Congress. I was proud to support the Justice in Policing Act and the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. While Republicans throughout the country attempt to roll back voting rights and enact discriminatory voter ID laws, I’m committed to expanding and protecting voting rights to protect Americans’ rights at the ballot box, especially communities of color who are being hit the hardest by these laws.

Additionally, I acknowledge the disproportionate impact of challenges like climate justice, education inequity, and escalating healthcare costs on Black communities every day. Rest assured, I will continue working towards achieving real equality every day.

As an elected official who represents the hardworking people of Pennsylvania’s 7th District and Americans throughout the country in Congress, I am committed to finding new solutions to support our Black communities. **I hope you’ll join me and take a moment to[ _read more about Black History Month_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78523195/453641435/-1818105654?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzhjOTRhNi0yOGM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mUFIi7oas-Gk9QqNFaXcie47tuUIitB6TmmJXG7eV3s=&emci=1b2cb39b-04c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=cc8c94a6-28c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=5543981), or [_consider a donation to the NAACP._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78523196/453641436/-1890789315?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzhjOTRhNi0yOGM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mUFIi7oas-Gk9QqNFaXcie47tuUIitB6TmmJXG7eV3s=&emci=1b2cb39b-04c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=cc8c94a6-28c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=5543981)**

In solidarity,
Susan

name: Ritchie
subject: I’m not giving up, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
but I can’t do this alone.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78524145/453644681/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODRmM2I0Zi0yYWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X0Fwy3nzLePAoNCknvPukqcCy5d1TQl6XoIyChiYgbs=)
---
Peter, I may sound like a broken record when I tell you that I’m different from most politicians, but I really mean it.

When it comes to poverty or inequality, food insecurity or housing, mental health or LGBTQ+ rights, I don’t _just_ think about policy — I think about my own experiences. **For me, Peter, policy _is_ personal. It always has been.**

I am a Black, Afro-Latino, LGBTQ+ American. I’m a product of public housing. I don't come from a political family. I am open about my own experiences with depression. I don't have fancy degrees.

**What I _do_ have is lived experience, and I am lucky to bring my viewpoint to Congress, where my unique perspective motivates much of what I do.**

Peter, I vow to never give up on these fights so that more folks like me can have a seat at the table — _but I can’t do this alone._

[Can you chip in $3 to help fuel my campaign in our election year? We’ve got a lot of work to do, and we need to raise $7,000 this month from emails like this one. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78524146/453644689/-866719404?amount=3&amounts=3,10,25&refcode=RTFC_20240206_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODRmM2I0Zi0yYWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X0Fwy3nzLePAoNCknvPukqcCy5d1TQl6XoIyChiYgbs=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78524153/453644709/-866719404?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20240206_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODRmM2I0Zi0yYWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X0Fwy3nzLePAoNCknvPukqcCy5d1TQl6XoIyChiYgbs=)
