www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: but I can’t do this alone. | = Peter, I may sound like a broken record when I tell you that I’m different from most politicians, but I really mean it. When it comes to poverty or inequality, food insecurity or housing, mental health or LGBTQ+ rights, I don’t just think about policy — I think about my own experiences. For me, Peter, policy is personal. It always has been. I am a Black, Afro-Latino, LGBTQ+ American. I’m a product of public housing. I don't come from a political family. I am open about my own experiences with depression. I don't have fancy degrees. What I do have is lived experience, and I am lucky to bring my viewpoint to Congress, where my unique perspective motivates much of what I do. Peter, I vow to never give up on these fights so that more folks like me can have a seat at the table — but I can’t do this alone. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thanks, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

name: Gwen S. Moore
subject: Honoring our heroes during Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:
My Sisters and Brothers,

Black History Month is when we reflect and celebrate the numerous accomplishments African Americans have and continue making from sea to shining sea.

Unfortunately, many of these achievements have been overlooked, which is why Black History Month is so important. This month (and every day for me), we must educate and remind ourselves of how the Black community has enhanced our nation.

We must hold up the heroes who paved the way in creating a more equal America. From John Lewis to Dr. King to Rosa Parks and countless others who stood shoulder to shoulder in the face of injustice so we could be a more just country.

We’ve come a long way, but we still have a long road ahead of us.

Together, #WeRepresent!

Gwen
Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District
Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act
100% Pro-Choice
100% Democracy Defender

About Gwen: The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92.

clean_body: My Sisters and Brothers, Black History Month is when we reflect and celebrate the numerous accomplishments African Americans have and continue making from sea to shining sea. Unfortunately, many of these achievements have been overlooked, which is why Black History Month is so important. This month (and every day for me), we must educate and remind ourselves of how the Black community has enhanced our nation. We must hold up the heroes who paved the way in creating a more equal America. From John Lewis to Dr. King to Rosa Parks and countless others who stood shoulder to shoulder in the face of injustice so we could be a more just country. We’ve come a long way, but we still have a long road ahead of us. Together, #WeRepresent! Gwen Proudly representing Wisconsin's 4th Congressional District Proud Co-Leader of the Violence Against Women Act 100% Pro-Choice 100% Democracy Defender About Gwen: The first African-American woman in Wisconsin history to serve in the U.S. House of Representatives, Congresswoman Gwen Moore, took her official oath of office on January 4, 2005. She served in the Wisconsin State Senate from 1993-2004. Before her election to the Senate, Congresswoman Moore served two consecutive terms in the Wisconsin State Assembly from 1989-92. name: =?utf-8?Q?State=20Representative=20Ryan=20Chamberlin?=
subject: Weekly Update from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/official-newsletter-12678725?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **WEEKLY UPDATE FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
| My fellow Floridians,

It is hard to believe that February is here! The first month of 2024 flew by. My work in the Florida House has kept me busy, and I am excited for what the next few weeks have in store for our state. Last week, I had the pleasure of meeting with several fellow legislators, stakeholders, and constituents, having important conversations and discussing legislative priorities for the legislative session. We got a lot done for Floridians! As your State Representative, District 24 can count on me to always put people over politics in Tallahassee.

Thank you for reading this weekly recap of some of the great things happening in our Capital City. I truly appreciate your continued trust and support!
---
|
---
| | | | | | [](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=147dd0d440&e=d1c1b9864f) | [Follow Rep. Chamberlin on Facebook](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=0bcc6bf0e0&e=d1c1b9864f)
---|---
| | **Around the Capitol**
---
|
---
| I had the pleasure of meeting with Executive Director of Marion County Senior Services Jennifer Martinez to discuss legislative priorities, services offered, and how I can best serve our Marion County senior citizens in the Florida House. It is a privilege to be a champion for their needs!
---
|
---
| It was great to meet with the Florida Thoroughbred Breeders at the Capitol. We had the opportunity to talk about ongoing member projects and the services the organization provides to the district. I appreciate the good work they do in our state and their involvement in the legislative process.
---
|
---
| I had the honor of welcoming Christine Dobkowski, the Mayor of Belleview, to Tallahassee. It was great to spend some time discussing appropriations and several important projects happening in Belleview. I am grateful for her willingness to take time out of her busy schedule to sit down with me.
---
|
---
| I enjoyed meeting with students from UCF to learn more about the issues important to them. It is always a pleasure to speak to our state's young people and talk to them about the legislative process. I am honored to have the opportunity to invest in the lives of the next generation of Florida's leaders.
---
| | **Committee Meetings & Legislative Update**
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| Last week, I joined my colleagues in several committee meetings to discuss important legislation for our state. We are making great progress!

**Week 4 Committee Meetings:**
* Judiciary Committee
* Education Quality Subcommittee
* Civil Justice Subcommittee
* Regulatory Reform & Economic Development Subcommittee
* Select Committee on Health Innovation

**I also had the privilege of presenting the following bills in committee:**
* Presented [HB 1371 - Property Tax System Study](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=ed5d2b04af&e=d1c1b9864f) in Ways & Means Committee
* Presented [HB 995 - Civil Actions Involving Assisted Living Facilities](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=315c7ec1c2&e=d1c1b9864f) and [HB 1415 - Peer Support for First Responders](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=ded6d901b4&e=d1c1b9864f) in Civil Justice Subcommittee
* Presented [HB 1313 - Clinical Laboratory Personnel](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=fdad1b7e53&e=d1c1b9864f) in Healthcare Regulation Subcommittee

---
| | **In the District**
---
|
---
---
| While I am in Tallahassee for the legislative session, my district aide Haylee is able to step in for me and attend events in the district. On Wednesday morning, Haylee attended the SunTran 25th Anniversary Celebration in Ocala. SunTran has come a long way since 1999 and has been a major part of the community by providing transportation to those in need. Our constituents are able to use SunTran to go to work, job interviews, school, and so much more. Our community is truly grateful to the team that made SunTran happen!
---
|
---
---
| On Thursday evening, Haylee attended the Belleview CEP launch event in support of the Ocala Metro Chamber and Economic Partnership starting a chamber in Belleview. The Director, Joe Reichel, held a launch event to bring business owners as well as community leaders together to network and hear about the new and exciting things the chamber will bring to Belleview.
---
|
---
| | I am working hard for you and your family in Tallahassee! Thank you for electing me to serve you. It is the highest honor to represent you in the Florida Legislature.

I look forward to keeping you updated on my work during the 2024 Legislative Session. As always, if I may be of any assistance, please do not hesitate to contact my office by **[clicking here](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=e09493248a&e=d1c1b9864f "https://www.myfloridahouse.gov/Sections/Representatives/contactmember.aspx?MemberId=4901&SessionId=103&utm_source=Ryan+Chamberlin+for+State+Representative&utm_campaign=ae0a433299-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_12_08_05_14_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-7ddd94a0de-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D")**.

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | | | | | [](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=f99e2e265f&e=d1c1b9864f) | [Follow Rep. Chamberlin on Facebook](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=16825f2363&e=d1c1b9864f)
---|---
| | _Copyright © 2024 State Representative Ryan Chamberlin, All rights reserved._
State Representative Ryan Chamberlin

**Our mailing address is:**
1101 The Capitol
402 South Monroe Street
Tallahassee, FL 32399-1300

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=f11da9b21c) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://voteryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=f11da9b21c).

---

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Border Security Survey -- please respond
body:
I need to know what you think

The Democrats just want the illegal votes and Mitch McConnell is rubber stamping it. Friend, this bill that the Senate came up with has a $118.28 BILLION price tag and doesn’t even remotely resemble a plan to secure our border. **This current border crisis isn’t something we can’t throw a wad of cash at and fix.** Not when Secretary Mayorkas has completely failed to uphold his oath of office and protect our homeland. Congress needs to get its priorities straight. That’s why I’m leading the charge to Impeach Secretary Mayorkas this week, not empower him with a legalized invasion of 1.8 million per year with amnesty while funding the defense of other country’s borders. But there is more that needs to be done to secure our border. **That’s why I want to know. What do you think we should do about the Border Crisis?**
* Should any border security bill focus on deporting those who entered our country illegally?
* Should we finish Trump’s wall?
* Do we need to Impeach Mayorkas?
* Does Texas have a right to protect its border when Joe Biden refuses to?
* Do you think the Democrats have ripped our border wide open so they can get the illegal votes?

| [ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkEFr9CAQQH-NuRnMmOjuIYcPltz2O5SFHkXjJGuJGkbD0n9fUii99vyGN2_m_W7uNmwhrf9txLFSNVTMy0ZrYl25y-SRDAjouQAulOkaP_YavFQNjp0WGgYpoG-e4zJ0cFWgYRDO49UO0PneqcVdsBtmp5swnh4BQoEAKYbWDRIuswbUSuF1UawXdkOqpa1PJNwPt4XZpoo2tnOOzTY-a90Lk_8YTAymgvNB2L5CIvTnBIMpWvrIFJCvhJiQL5n4nNNKWMqJ62p8TmbPuzVIxhVePs-Tf9JOs5yOGk2dmbw93h78Fyk6N1JIK5O3Sgc2NPr9FbYtFKVZL9Zow_bdWv_yy68AAAD__1EaehQ)

**[Can I count on your immediate response? >>](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyMkEFr9CAQQH-NuRnMmOjuIYcPltz2O5SFHkXjJGuJGkbD0n9fUii99vyGN2_m_W7uNmwhrf9txLFSNVTMy0ZrYl25y-SRDAjouQAulOkaP_YavFQNjp0WGgYpoG-e4zJ0cFWgYRDO49UO0PneqcVdsBtmp5swnh4BQoEAKYbWDRIuswbUSuF1UawXdkOqpa1PJNwPt4XZpoo2tnOOzTY-a90Lk_8YTAymgvNB2L5CIvTnBIMpWvrIFJCvhJiQL5n4nNNKWMqJ62p8TmbPuzVIxhVePs-Tf9JOs5yOGk2dmbw93h78Fyk6N1JIK5O3Sgc2NPr9FbYtFKVZL9Zow_bdWv_yy68AAAD__1EaehQ)** Talk Soon, Marjorie Taylor Greene

name: Tom Suozzi
subject: $69 per minute
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
We need to fight back

| **In the 5 minutes it takes for you to read this email, National Republicans will spend $347 to defeat me.**

I know this sounds unbelievable, but let me explain: Peter. About two weeks ago, National Republican Super PACs announced they’d spend $2.3 million against me, which comes out to $100,000 every day from the day they started to Election Day. That means they’re spending _**$4,167 per hour, and $69 per minute.**_

So, if it takes you 5 minutes to read this email,**they’ll spend $347 in that time!**

**But that’s not all–National Republicans are funneling $2.6 million _more_ into the NY-03 in these final weeks!**

This is certainly a lot of money, but I’m not afraid of them. **Because this grassroots movement has come through for me time and time again, and I know I can count on you!**

Friend, President Joe Biden is waging a war on American energy production.

Governor Abbott is fighting to stop the federal government's war on American energy and keep Texas a global energy leader. Can we count on you to help him FIGHT BACK against President Biden's anti-energy policies?

Texas is a pro-energy state - indeed, we are THE #1 energy state in the nation. But since President Biden took office, he has pushed an anti-energy agenda that threatens to weaken our state's energy agenda.

**The men and women who work in the energy industry help power our lives, and they are vital to our booming Texas economy. Governor Abbott won 't stand idly by as the Biden Administration pushes strict regulations that jeopardize affordable energy prices and the livelihoods of hardworking Texans. **

By joining Governor Abbott today and **[voicing your support](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7555aa08cff84fe1a69a944fad326639&_e=4_yq__DLV6yla_yH3yl6RuB0o_HNv--dunohvzgUe5gYmcQd1OZKdhmZnJmuSaJH6STraUI_K0WDF8aw5tT9DJILpazOB69EY2TqAaDlStkeNZcP_tQHACoKdU_ojiGh1d9b2gKbygQN46PMDcIjBbxy6J4JufEoCbIURzDxU3_4MOIZNQjSzp-91H-EkLC4cEriFxgeUtGaeIKyXaB43HuETvcPSOoygy25ZBDn0Of5ijEEFrB9ooRwYmMo2V4BrGrOwWe1eJvT4vThRyzdBgW6fbTl8SUgtOLSWHTIFJ-U38eRaTAb1aVeoKU8-dEYM6xTISzoitoBdx0vMFxDpA%3D%3D)** to protect Texas' energy industry from Biden's overreach, you will play a pivotal role in keeping our state the #1 energy producer for years to come!

Under the Biden Administration, the Southern Border has been a disaster. The crisis unfolded is something that our nation has never experienced. We are losing our country and allowing anyone to enter.

body:
The DASH Act is vital given Oregon's record-low vacancy rates and housing challenges for the workforce.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78526203/453651842/-1911326668?refcode=AU_VAH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240206_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmRiNzMyNy0zMGM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJ88lNBJLTz2wv9qgbQ8nIQONT_nOCFNUATL0kq1Wf8=&emci=6f512f21-30c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=e6db7327-30c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=9636579)

Peter – Did you know Val introduced the “Decent, Affordable, Safe Housing for All (DASH) Act” with Congressman Salud Carbajal (CA-24)? **The DASH Act offers a groundbreaking solution to Oregon's housing crisis.** It prioritizes affordability and accessibility to combat homelessness and address housing affordability nationwide. Key provisions include:
* Enhancing middle- and low-income housing access
* Ensuring access to Housing Choice Vouchers for the homeless or at-risk
* Reforming zoning regulations to promote affordable housing construction

**[Peter, sign your name today if you support the DASH Act by clicking on this link>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78526204/453651843/1903702939?refcode=AU_VAH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240206_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmRiNzMyNy0zMGM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJ88lNBJLTz2wv9qgbQ8nIQONT_nOCFNUATL0kq1Wf8=&emci=6f512f21-30c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=e6db7327-30c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=9636579)** Val can’t emphasize enough the importance of taking proactive measures to prevent homelessness and combat rising housing costs. The bill introduces innovative tax policies to stimulate investment in homeownership and provide rent support for low-income families. Endorsed by organizations like the Council of Large Public Housing Authorities, Enterprise Community Partners, the Network for Oregon Affordable Housing, and others, the DASH Act aims to build three million additional homes in the U.S. over the next decade. [Sign your name today in support of the DASH Act, which prioritizes affordability and accessibility to address Oregon's housing crisis and ensure decent, affordable, and safe housing for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78526205/453651844/1903702939?refcode=AU_VAH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240206_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmRiNzMyNy0zMGM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJ88lNBJLTz2wv9qgbQ8nIQONT_nOCFNUATL0kq1Wf8=&emci=6f512f21-30c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=e6db7327-30c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=9636579) | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78526206/453651845/1903702939?refcode=AU_VAH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20240206_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmRiNzMyNy0zMGM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJ88lNBJLTz2wv9qgbQ8nIQONT_nOCFNUATL0kq1Wf8=&emci=6f512f21-30c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=e6db7327-30c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=9636579)

body:
CNN ranks Jacky Rosen as one of the most vulnerable incumbent senators in the country.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78526360/453652503/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODFmZmM5Yy0zMGM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QMkcHV7L0TvYvYabomO9g_CTd3qpOeUCjGlQbhpFIaQ=&emci=fa07e7c1-2fc5-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=881ffc9c-30c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=7731215)

| | I want to tell you a bit about my good friend Nevada Senator Jacky Rosen, and [**why****it's so important****to support her re-election campaign****, which could be the difference between holding the Senate or having Mitch McConnell as Majority Leader again.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78526361/453652504/562906663?refcode=2024-02-06-rosen&recurring=&amount=17&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=881ffc9c-30c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODFmZmM5Yy0zMGM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QMkcHV7L0TvYvYabomO9g_CTd3qpOeUCjGlQbhpFIaQ=) In 2018, Senator Jacky Rosen was the only Democratic challenger in the country to unseat an incumbent Republican senator. Throughout her first term, she's worked hard, away from the cameras, to protect reproductive rights, boost rural STEM education, and deliver smart, bipartisan solutions to improve tourism and commerce, among other issues. **Jacky is a fearless leader and ally I can count on in the fights to make health care more affordable, fight corruption, and crack down on corporate greed, and we need her in the Senate so we can keep making progress. She is facing a tough re-election campaign.** In 2022,**** Nevada was one of the closest Senate races in the country, and 2024 will be no different. Here are some key facts about the state of her race:
* _CNN_ ranks Jacky Rosen as one of the most vulnerable incumbent senators in the country.

* Jacky's right-wing opponent was handpicked by Mitch McConnell, and a shady MAGA billionaire mega-donor is pouring $2 million into his campaign to attack Jacky and buy this seat.

* Polling shows Jacky neck and neck with her extremist opponent, and I know the best way she can get back on track to win is with your grassroots energy and support.

Nevada is key to winning in November – at the House, Senate, and Presidential levels. So, we're going to build the biggest grassroots movement in Nevada history and deliver for progressive Democrats up and down the ballot. clean_body: CNN ranks Jacky Rosen as one of the most vulnerable incumbent senators in the country. | | | | I want to tell you a bit about my good friend Nevada Senator Jacky Rosen, and = In 2018, Senator Jacky Rosen was the only Democratic challenger in the country to unseat an incumbent Republican senator. Throughout her first term, she's worked hard, away from the cameras, to protect reproductive rights, boost rural STEM education, and deliver smart, bipartisan solutions to improve tourism and commerce, among other issues. Jacky is a fearless leader and ally I can count on in the fights to make health care more affordable, fight corruption, and crack down on corporate greed, and we need her in the Senate so we can keep making progress. She is facing a tough re-election campaign. In 2022,** Nevada was one of the closest Senate races in the country, and 2024 will be no different. Here are some key facts about the state of her race: CNN ranks Jacky Rosen as one of the most vulnerable incumbent senators in the country. Jacky's right-wing opponent was handpicked by Mitch McConnell, and a shady MAGA billionaire mega-donor is pouring $2 million into his campaign to attack Jacky and buy this seat. Polling shows Jacky neck and neck with her extremist opponent, and I know the best way she can get back on track to win is with your grassroots energy and support. Nevada is key to winning in November – at the House, Senate, and Presidential levels. So, we're going to build the biggest grassroots movement in Nevada history and deliver for progressive Democrats up and down the ballot. = = Onward! name: Becky Wagner
subject: My police officer husband is facing ten years in prison
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJx80MGKgzAQxvGniTdlHGPSHjy0qL20ZSmFHkNixjaQWImRff3Fsnvd659h-PE9LuqinXfT86oDNSkmFaekjFWevB0VAvIcMAehysw2XKKtREZNKUFizXcI2avhpeDGGGHJkNnrWlZy5IA1t4jS1rvMNdsfQBAIXIIsLBkL5R7qsiTajcA4aE8xLUV6UaR5Nd4NekqkQzG8Q-abV0rzwqoDw55hv9CwRir0RPadtguG_QfMsB80jlJoIyTZTVTXdkRW9WsKanmvcSBWtcf2lN-6K0Ox5UDWrYFVbXf5LYMOs3bPiVXtH10d25M6d-e2V4_DqVS37qq-Dvn9ds9iY-dv571bhGQcnkE7_3Gn_xf9CQAA__9VKXaX)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJx80MGKgzAQxvGniTdlHGPSHjy0qL20ZSmFHkNixjaQWImRff3Fsnvd659h-PE9LuqinXfT86oDNSkmFaekjFWevB0VAvIcMAehysw2XKKtREZNKUFizXcI2avhpeDGGGHJkNnrWlZy5IA1t4jS1rvMNdsfQBAIXIIsLBkL5R7qsiTajcA4aE8xLUV6UaR5Nd4NekqkQzG8Q-abV0rzwqoDw55hv9CwRir0RPadtguG_QfMsB80jlJoIyTZTVTXdkRW9WsKanmvcSBWtcf2lN-6K0Ox5UDWrYFVbXf5LYMOs3bPiVXtH10d25M6d-e2V4_DqVS37qq-Dvn9ds9iY-dv571bhGQcnkE7_3Gn_xf9CQAA__9VKXaX)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJx80MGKgzAQxvGniTdlHGPSHjy0qL20ZSmFHkNixjaQWImRff3Fsnvd659h-PE9LuqinXfT86oDNSkmFaekjFWevB0VAvIcMAehysw2XKKtREZNKUFizXcI2avhpeDGGGHJkNnrWlZy5IA1t4jS1rvMNdsfQBAIXIIsLBkL5R7qsiTajcA4aE8xLUV6UaR5Nd4NekqkQzG8Q-abV0rzwqoDw55hv9CwRir0RPadtguG_QfMsB80jlJoIyTZTVTXdkRW9WsKanmvcSBWtcf2lN-6K0Ox5UDWrYFVbXf5LYMOs3bPiVXtH10d25M6d-e2V4_DqVS37qq-Dvn9ds9iY-dv571bhGQcnkE7_3Gn_xf9CQAA__9VKXaX)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJx80MGKgzAQxvGniTdlHGPSHjy0qL20ZSmFHkNixjaQWImRff3Fsnvd659h-PE9LuqinXfT86oDNSkmFaekjFWevB0VAvIcMAehysw2XKKtREZNKUFizXcI2avhpeDGGGHJkNnrWlZy5IA1t4jS1rvMNdsfQBAIXIIsLBkL5R7qsiTajcA4aE8xLUV6UaR5Nd4NekqkQzG8Q-abV0rzwqoDw55hv9CwRir0RPadtguG_QfMsB80jlJoIyTZTVTXdkRW9WsKanmvcSBWtcf2lN-6K0Ox5UDWrYFVbXf5LYMOs3bPiVXtH10d25M6d-e2V4_DqVS37qq-Dvn9ds9iY-dv571bhGQcnkE7_3Gn_xf9CQAA__9VKXaX)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJx80MGKgzAQxvGniTdlHGPSHjy0qL20ZSmFHkNixjaQWImRff3Fsnvd659h-PE9LuqinXfT86oDNSkmFaekjFWevB0VAvIcMAehysw2XKKtREZNKUFizXcI2avhpeDGGGHJkNnrWlZy5IA1t4jS1rvMNdsfQBAIXIIsLBkL5R7qsiTajcA4aE8xLUV6UaR5Nd4NekqkQzG8Q-abV0rzwqoDw55hv9CwRir0RPadtguG_QfMsB80jlJoIyTZTVTXdkRW9WsKanmvcSBWtcf2lN-6K0Ox5UDWrYFVbXf5LYMOs3bPiVXtH10d25M6d-e2V4_DqVS37qq-Dvn9ds9iY-dv571bhGQcnkE7_3Gn_xf9CQAA__9VKXaX)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJx80MGKgzAQxvGniTdlHGPSHjy0qL20ZSmFHkNixjaQWImRff3Fsnvd659h-PE9LuqinXfT86oDNSkmFaekjFWevB0VAvIcMAehysw2XKKtREZNKUFizXcI2avhpeDGGGHJkNnrWlZy5IA1t4jS1rvMNdsfQBAIXIIsLBkL5R7qsiTajcA4aE8xLUV6UaR5Nd4NekqkQzG8Q-abV0rzwqoDw55hv9CwRir0RPadtguG_QfMsB80jlJoIyTZTVTXdkRW9WsKanmvcSBWtcf2lN-6K0Ox5UDWrYFVbXf5LYMOs3bPiVXtH10d25M6d-e2V4_DqVS37qq-Dvn9ds9iY-dv571bhGQcnkE7_3Gn_xf9CQAA__9VKXaX) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

The Republican Team
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJx8kLuK6zAURb9G7mKOjl52oSJg3OW2txSSdRwL5AeyzDB_PyRVimHqtdgL9v-He_iU0_b851eytVRXtupCdJlynB0CyhvgDbTjTbTSYBS6IcsNGFSyQ2gWK40wPacOaMbAueJaaN-jiYoUGa-aZF87gKARpAHTRgoReA-Kc6JuBibBZyr1bOtChY4r5DT5rZJf22lfm2yXWo-TiTvDkeG4H3W_6u8yw_HaziucU0mBXr4YAxPD4FP-vt3fGYaamBji8ZVyTqc2DJWE5-pTfveK_UCfoP590U8AAAD__21qaeI)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJx8zzFuxCAQQNHTQLfWMGDABUUad5s2JcJmvEYCx8KTRLl9lNTR9l9P-m_3eE-lluPxmhoF7hz7wXHJsVLNW0RAcwO8gY1K5mAcZm0lBeXA4Wg8gtzDNG6gwHljl9Wunkbw3mk9ZRq9dl7LEn4dQLAIxoEbMi0Z1ASjUkR-A2EgVep8DbxTp_NjqWVNB1Nqw_reZA0783kJ_SJwFjj_Wwmcz14-0_o97Nyq7CGfX6XWclknDDxaKvVP4-efPwEAAP__FMlWbA)_

body:
And ‘We Are Listening To What You Need’: Mayorkas Sells New Border Bill In Email To Homeland Security Staffers

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c683983%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TRmJqcUsqdnssXoMbIeYTA&sysid=1 MSNBC Legal Analyst ‘Increasingly Panicked’ Trump Will Get Off As His Immunity Appeal Drags On

MSNBC legal analyst Lisa Rubin on Friday voiced apprehension regarding the potential delay in reaching a verdict for former President Donald Trump’s presidential immunity appeal in time for the upcoming election.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Eigel=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Big Wins & Incredible Grassroots Supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eigel for Missouri, Thomas Hughes, Treasurer_
body:
Eigel files bill to CRACK DOWN on illegals - Freedom Caucus rally & IP reform progress | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billeigel/big-wins-incredible-grassroots-supporters?e=c00a6982d2)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| | **Victory! IP Reform Advances! **
* * *
Did you know that initiative petitions have been filed take away your Second Amendment rights and enshrine abortion-on-demand into our constitution?

If you've been reading these updates, you likely know how crucial passing initiative petition (IP) reform is to defending Missouri's pro-life laws, gun rights, and freedom in general.

Citizens can file initiative petitions with the Secretary of State and put constitutional amendments on the ballot if enough signatures are collected. Once on the ballot, these amendments only require 50% plus one vote to be approved. In recent years, woke out-of-state special interests have used the IP process to add liberal amendments to our constitution that the legislature cannot even tweak without proposing another constitutional amendment. Oftentimes, these initiative petitions are misleading, contain multiple subjects (which is against the constitution in the first place), and confuse voters. For example, the recreational marijuana amendment that was added to our constitution in 2022 was forty pages long.

All of these liberal amendments passed under the current standard despite being voted down in almost every county. A few big cities overpowered the rest of the state.

The Missouri Freedom Caucus' IP reform proposal is what's known as concurrent majority ratification (CMR). In addition to the current standard of a simple majority, CMR would also require an amendment to be approved in half of the legislative districts. This ensures that rural voices are heard. Changes to our state's most foundational document should require broad support from across the whole state.

Fixing this broken process is more important than ever before because pro-abortion forces are collecting signatures for their amendment to enshrine abortion into our constitution. Out-of-state dark money groups are spending millions of dollars to deceive Missourians into signing their petition and voting to enshrine abortion into our constitution. Not only that, but initiative petitions targeting gun rights have been proposed as well.

__**I will not stand idly by as leftists attempt to destroy Missouri's pro-life laws.**__

Because Senate Leadership did not move IP reform forward in the first three weeks of the legislative session, the Freedom Caucus took to the Senate floor to filibuster some gubernatorial appointments. After we filibustered for several days and a few overnights, this tactic applied sufficient pressure to our leadership and forced them to act.

Thanks to the actions of the Freedom Caucus, IP reform was fast-tracked and made tremendous progress last week. It was referred to committee, heard in committee, voted out of committee, pulled out of committee, and we have promises from leadership to debate IP reform on the Senate floor this week.

This is a major step in the right direction and I look forward to providing you updates as things progress.
---
|
---
---
| | **Hundreds Rally at the Missouri Capitol in Support of Freedom Caucus' Efforts**
* * *
Humbled by the number of people that showed up to support the Missouri Freedom Caucus. Senate Leadership likes to say that the grassroots just “don’t understand” what’s really going on. That couldn’t be further from the truth. The people are paying attention and are SICK of “business as usual.” It’s time for a reckoning.
---
| [ ](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=c7d7d33a17&e=c00a6982d2 "Bill Eigel's FIERY Address at the Missouri Freedom Caucus Rally")
---
My speech to the hundreds of grassroots activists at the MO Capitol last Tuesday.
| | **_Tides Are Turning_ : Central Committees and Republican Groups Around the State __Condemn Senate Leadership__**
* * *
_**Republicans Central Committees**_
1. St. Charles County
2. Vernon County
3. Saline County
4. Wright County
5. Camden County
6. Clay County
7. Franklin County
8. Perry County
9. Cass County

11. Grundy County
12. Osage County

_**Others Republican Groups**_
1. “We the People” of Johnson County
2. Pleasant Hill MO Republicans Club
3. SCCPA - St. Charles County Parents Association
4. Conservatives of Henry County
5. Missouri Right to Life

Listen [here](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=6ba636829f&e=c00a6982d2) as republican leaders from across the state weighed into The Nick Reed Show.
---
| [ ](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=388ece1cdf&e=c00a6982d2 "Bill Eigel Joins OAN to Discuss Expulsion from Senate")
---
I joined OAN to discuss expulsion from the Senate and threats against the Freedom Caucus.
| [ ](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=5616dc75c4&e=c00a6982d2 "Absolute Truth with Emerald Robinson - Bill Eigel Interview")
---
I joined Absolute Truth with Emerald Robinson to discuss Missouri's RINO problem and the Freedom Caucus.
| | **SHUT. DOWN. THE BORDER❗**
* * *
Red states must join together to stop the invasion. The federal government is failing us; we cannot just sit back and allow our country to be destroyed. Every red state needs to send their national guardsmen to defend the border. We MUST act.

Joe Biden has allowed an invasion at the southern border. We can no longer rely on the federal government to protect us. The states must get tough on illegal immigration. EVERY state is a BORDER state and we’re feeling the impacts of it every day in Missouri.

My message to those here illegally: enjoy it while it lasts, because the moment my hand comes off the Bible at the inauguration, we’re taking action to deport illegals out-of-here and restore law and order in Missouri.

This is why I am championing efforts to crack down on illegal immigration in Missouri RIGHT NOW!

Senate Bill 1372 would:
\- Make it a crime to enter the state illegally
\- Require law enforcement to detain illegals and transport them back to a port of entry
\- Prohibit any state funding for the purpose of providing services to illegals
\- Prohibits enrollment by illegals in taxpayer funded state universities

The fiscal cost of illegals is $1,000 per household in Missouri, meaning it costs us $2.4 billion every year just to sustain services and capacities for those breaking the law. For perspective, the value of every personal property tax bill is $1.7 billion.
---
| [Stand with Bill Eigel](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=f32a5f217c&e=c00a6982d2 "Stand with Bill Eigel")
---
|
---

If you want to be a part of this historic effort to elect a bold conservative leader as Governor of Missouri, you can sign up to volunteer [here](https://billeigel.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=00ef1c295ae4331d7c1e52945&id=5d41042327&e=c00a6982d2). We are looking for volunteers to make phone calls, display yard signs, help in the campaign office, host an event, walk in a parade, knock on doors, and donate. With your support, we will drain the swamp and Make Missouri Great Again!

DOWN. THE BORDER❗ Red states must join together to stop the invasion. The federal government is failing us; we cannot just sit back and allow our country to be destroyed. Every red state needs to send their national guardsmen to defend the border. We MUST act. Joe Biden has allowed an invasion at the southern border. We can no longer rely on the federal government to protect us. The states must get tough on illegal immigration. EVERY state is a BORDER state and we’re feeling the impacts of it every day in Missouri. My message to those here illegally: enjoy it while it lasts, because the moment my hand comes off the Bible at the inauguration, we’re taking action to deport illegals out-of-here and restore law and order in Missouri. This is why I am championing efforts to crack down on illegal immigration in Missouri RIGHT NOW! Senate Bill 1372 would: \- Make it a crime to enter the state illegally \- Require law enforcement to detain illegals and transport them back to a port of entry \- Prohibit any state funding for the purpose of providing services to illegals \- Prohibits enrollment by illegals in taxpayer funded state universities The fiscal cost of illegals is $1,000 per household in Missouri, meaning it costs us $2.4 billion every year just to sustain services and capacities for those breaking the law. For perspective, the value of every personal property tax bill is $1.7 billion. | "Stand with Bill Eigel" | | | Thank you for your support! If you want to be a part of this historic effort to elect a bold conservative leader as Governor of Missouri, you can sign up to volunteer . We are looking for volunteers to make phone calls, display yard signs, help in the campaign office, host an event, walk in a parade, knock on doors, and donate. With your support, we will drain the swamp and Make Missouri Great Again! | "Stand with Bill Eigel" | | | | | | | | | | | | billeigel.com | | Paid for by Eigel for Missouri, Thomas Hughes, Treasurer Our mailing address is: PO Box 331 Cottleville, MO 63338 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

Fellow conservative,

This race is one to watch.

**Kevin Lincoln** is a Marine Corps veteran and principled conservative who has figured out how to __win__ in a left-leaning city – serving as Mayor of Stockton, California.

Now, Kevin is running for Congress in California’s targeted 9th District and needs our help to secure victory.

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: A Nation of All Nations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

It’s vital that we understand Black history and our moral debt to the civil rights movement. Without remembering history, it’s impossible for us to understand our obligation to the future.

When my father came to the United States in the late 1960s, he did so only because the 1965 Immigration Act opened the doors for him. It’s because Civil Rights activists like Representative Jim Clyburn, the late Representative John Lewis, and Representative Eleanor Holmes Norton put their lives on the line so that Asian and Indian immigrants like my father could make lives for themselves in America. And it’s because of them that I now have the opportunity to serve in Congress.

WATCH: We must listen to and understand our history [https://www.tiktok.com/@rokhannausa/video/7329546547727813931?lang=en]

https://www.tiktok.com/@rokhannausa/video/7329546547727813931?lang=en [https://www.tiktok.com/@rokhannausa/video/7329546547727813931?lang=en]

The Civil Rights Movement didn’t just create a better country for Black Americans. It opened doors for every person of color in America, those whose roots go back centuries and those newly arrived. It set us on the path to be a composite nation – a nation of nations – that Frederick Douglass once envisioned, where people from every background could come together to write the American story.

We’ve made phenomenal strides through centuries of struggle, yet there is still so much more we must do. I believe we will do it, thanks to people like you who continue to show up, volunteer, and work for a more just and equitable future. Thank you for all you do.

Onward,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ngp-email-footer?refcode=20240206-black-history-month]

https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com] https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA [https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA] https://twitter.com/RoKhanna [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com]

Ro for Congress
P.O Box 3513
Santa Clara, CA 95051
United States

Paid for by Ro for Congress

name: Hannah Reid, Evergreen
subject: RSVP: EPA's Environmental and Climate Justice Community Change Grants
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:
Community-led futures start here
| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/339?t=2&akid=14061%2E53494%2EKm2F-7)
---
| | Friend, **Disadvantaged communities are on the frontlines of the climate crisis.** Despite historically contributing the least to climate change, these communities disproportionately bear the burden of its consequences.

One step in rectifying this injustice comes via the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA), which commits meaningful funds to the communities most adversely and disproportionately impacted by the climate crisis and environmental injustice.

**But what does tapping into IRA funding look like in practice for your community? ******
---
[](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5143?t=3&akid=14061%2E53494%2EKm2F-7)
---
Next week, I'll join **Representative Nanette Barragán** and experts from EPA, the Greenlining Institute, and the Environmental Protection Network to talk about **EPA's Environmental and Climate Justice Community Change Grants.******
---
[RSVP NOW](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5143?t=5&akid=14061%2E53494%2EKm2F-7)
---
We'll discuss how this program invests approximately $2 billion in projects in disadvantaged communities, how to apply for grants and get technical assistance, who is eligible, and more.

The promise of a clean energy transition and safer climate future hinges upon ensuring resources reach the people and places that need them the most.

**[**I hope to see you online next Monday, February 12 at 1 p.m. PT/4 p.m. ET.**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5143?t=6&akid=14061%2E53494%2EKm2F-7)******
---
[ **RSVP NOW**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/5143?t=8&akid=14061%2E53494%2EKm2F-7)**
---
Sincerely, Hannah Reid Outreach CoordinatorEvergreen Collaborative

name: David Horowitz
subject: Barack Obama’s revolution
body:
Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot, America is on the brink of destruction. I don’t say this to shock or scare you – I say it because it’s true. _What we see today didn’t happen overnight. It’s the result of a movement that began with the Communist revolution in Russia and has been 100 years in the making..._ **...and Barack Obama hit the accelerator button, fast tracking their agenda.** I’d know better than most. When I was a young man, I was one of the leaders of the movement destroying America today. 50 years ago, I was a Marxist revolutionary bent on bringing America as we know it to an end. I stood side by side with Huey Newton and the leaders of the Black Panthers. I edited _Ramparts_ – radical Left's largest magazine. I marched, wrote manifestos, and attacked America whenever and however I could. Then the Panthers murdered my friend, and the Left helped the Communists win the war in Vietnam. My eyes opened to the incredible destruction and evil my “comrades” made possible. So I left and never looked back. I cast my 1984 ballot for Ronald Reagan – then I started the David Horowitz Freedom Center to fight the Left and I’ve dedicated the last 40 years to exposing them. Why? Because I knew first-hand the threat our country was facing. I knew what was at stake and I knew if I didn’t tell the American people what I knew, we would lose our country forever. That’s why I spent 6 months writing** _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_** – and I want you to have your very own copy of it. **[So I’m asking you to stand with me and make a generous, tax-deductible donation of $35 or more to my Freedom Center. As a thank you, I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iPzoJIJBddPhtb3Vcdt3uQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnpUSuP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci9kZDMwZDdhMS0yOTI1LTRmZGEtOWY1Zi1hNWExZjA0OTg1NTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjA2X0JER19ESEZDX09CRTJfUkVOX1BBLVJPTlcDc3BjQgplusmowmV4xCoPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** When you think of “the enemy within” you may think of Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi or even Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez...and you wouldn’t be wrong. But make no mistake: **The real mastermind is Barack Obama.** Barack Obama laid the groundwork for everything we’ve seen since 2020 back in 2008. Barack Obama led the destruction of our cities, cozying up to Black Lives Matter radicals and siding with criminals over police upholding the rule of law. Barack Obama championed the castration of our military, making us a laughingstock on the world stage. And Barack Obama was the true architect behind the bogus Russian collusion witch hunt. The devastation and destruction we see today has been over a decade in the making – but most of the American people have no clue what we’re up against. **That’s why I wrote _The Enemy Within: How a Totalitarian Movement Is Destroying America_ to explain how communist and fascist Leftists infiltrated and overtook the Democrat Party...** ...how it has become a party of racism and hatred attacking the very foundations of our country... ... and how their ultimate goal is to create a one-party state – and cancel, deplatform and silence every last one of their political opponents by slandering them as “white supremacists” and worse. The reviews speak for themselves... “A Great Book” – Dinesh D’Souza “ _The Enemy Within_ is a book for all patriots who understand that our country is in a fight for its life.” – Mark Levin “David Horowitz does it again in a must-read for any American concerned about where we are headed as a nation.” Laura Ingraham I wrote _The Enemy Within_ because... I know if our country stands a chance, Americans must understand exactly how sinister and dangerous the new Democrat Party actually is. I was the enemy within — and I know in my bones what it will take to defeat them. We’ve reached the point in our history that will decide our future – and we either win these political battles or lose everything that makes us prosperous and free. **[That’s why I’ll send you a complimentary copy of The Enemy Within when you donate $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and give us the ammunition we need to expose the Left’s evil agenda to every American patriot.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iPzoJIJBddPhtb3Vcdt3uQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnpUSuP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci9kZDMwZDdhMS0yOTI1LTRmZGEtOWY1Zi1hNWExZjA0OTg1NTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjA2X0JER19ESEZDX09CRTJfUkVOX1BBLVJPTlcDc3BjQgplusmowmV4xCoPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** The Left is at war with America. They don’t simply disagree with us about how to make our country better – they want to destroy it to make way for their Marxist dystopia. Or in Obama’s own words “radically transform” America. **And they don’t care how much they have to lie, cheat or steal to achieve it.** So it’s up to patriots like you and me to expose the truth about the Left to our fellow Americans while we still can.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
David Horowitz
---
P.S. I know how we got to this point in our country, and I know how we get out. But the clock is ticking and our country is hanging by a thread. **[Please make a generous donation of $35 or more to the Freedom Center today and as a thank you, I’ll rush a complimentary copy of my book The Enemy Within to you.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/iPzoJIJBddPhtb3Vcdt3uQ~~/AARclAA~/RgRnpUSuP0SsaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9kYXZpZC1ob3Jvd2l0ei1mcmVlZG9tLWNlbnRlci9kZDMwZDdhMS0yOTI1LTRmZGEtOWY1Zi1hNWExZjA0OTg1NTA_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1CREctUkVOJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09RU0mdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjQwMjA2X0JER19ESEZDX09CRTJfUkVOX1BBLVJPTlcDc3BjQgplusmowmV4xCoPUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

clean_body: Peter, here’s what we DON’T want in November... We don’t want to let Republicans eke out a Senate majority by flipping Pennsylvania. We don’t want to let Bob’s mega-millionaire opponent get to Washington, where he would work to put Social Security and Medicare on the chopping block, give tax breaks to large corporations, and roll back abortion rights. We don’t want to look back to this time of the campaign and realize that we didn’t do enough to raise grassroots resources, which are the only way we can fight back against the millions upon millions that the GOP will funnel into the Commonwealth this year. Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue. We need your help to build the strongest campaign possible to re-elect Bob, so thank you for rising to the occasion. — Bob Casey HQ

subject: Peter, over 600,000 Americans lose their lives to cancer a year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Ensure everyone has access to the care and cancer screenings they need [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78529250/453662501/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzAxZGExNi0zYmM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s1OoJPum-RW5_6hsZ7JTilGcShfeB-_7cFNTBOWABk4=&emci=4ff6a848-46c2-ee11-b660-002248223197&emdi=bc01da16-3bc5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

This past Sunday was World Cancer Day, a day where the entire world united in the fight against the growing global cancer epidemic.

As a doctor, Kim knows all too well that many Americans put off going to the doctor's office to get cancer screenings because they're worried about cost, a life-changing diagnosis, or lack of access.

That's why, in the face of a growing global cancer epidemic that is claiming the lives of over **600,000 Americans** a year, Kim has made lowering the cost of healthcare a top priority of hers in Congress.

**In 2021, Kim introduced the Capping Costs for Consumers Act — a bill that would have reduced healthcare co-pays and deductibles for millions of families.** This bill would have encouraged more folks to get health care coverage and screenings, all while saving families in Washington's 8th District an average of $2,500 in out-of-pocket costs.

As we continue to face this growing epidemic, rising healthcare costs, and a Republican party working to cut Medicare and Social Security, Kim's work has never been more essential.

Kim will always fight in Congress to lower the cost of healthcare, but she needs to know you have her back. **[Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to help Kim keep WA-08 blue so she can continue her critical work for Washingtonians?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78529251/453662507/-348584626?refcode=em24_240206_wcdfr_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240206_wcdfr_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=bc01da16-3bc5-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYzAxZGExNi0zYmM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s1OoJPum-RW5_6hsZ7JTilGcShfeB-_7cFNTBOWABk4=)**

Thanks,

Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. clean_body: Ensure everyone has access to the care and cancer screenings they need Peter, This past Sunday was World Cancer Day, a day where the entire world united in the fight against the growing global cancer epidemic. As a doctor, Kim knows all too well that many Americans put off going to the doctor's office to get cancer screenings because they're worried about cost, a life-changing diagnosis, or lack of access. That's why, in the face of a growing global cancer epidemic that is claiming the lives of over 600,000 Americans a year, Kim has made lowering the cost of healthcare a top priority of hers in Congress. In 2021, Kim introduced the Capping Costs for Consumers Act — a bill that would have reduced healthcare co-pays and deductibles for millions of families. This bill would have encouraged more folks to get health care coverage and screenings, all while saving families in Washington's 8th District an average of $2,500 in out-of-pocket costs. As we continue to face this growing epidemic, rising healthcare costs, and a Republican party working to cut Medicare and Social Security, Kim's work has never been more essential. Kim will always fight in Congress to lower the cost of healthcare, but she needs to know you have her back. = Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat this November and take back the House. | = ** Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

clean_body: End of Discussion. | IMPEACH MAYORKAS NOW! | Fellow Patriot, Secretary Mayorkas is HORRIBLE at his job: securing the border. In fact, he’s not even just bad at his job — he REFUSES TO DO HIS JOB. The American people can not trust him with their safety. He must be fired immediately. We must IMPEACH MAYORKAS — One of the many reasons that I am calling for the impeachment of Mayorkas is his utter refusal to comply with immigration laws enacted in Congress. He is acting outside of the bounds of law and democracy, which is putting public safety at extreme risk. Even though we have every reason in the world to impeach Secretary Mayorkas, Republicans are under extreme duress from the Radical Left scheming to keep Biden’s border crisis buddy in office. House Republicans need immediate reinforcements to finish the job. If you support impeaching Mayorkas, please rush in any amount you can ASAP. House Republicans are counting on you to help get the job done and get us one step closer to a secure border. name: A'shanti Gholar, Emerge
subject: FWD: Black History Month: Help us empower Black women in politics
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America
body:
Peter, did you see Melissa’s email?
---
As we recognize Black History Month, I believe it’s equally important to think about Black futures, including the work we’re doing to make our legislatures look more like the communities they serve and achieve a democracy that works for all of us.
**That’s what Emerge’s Seated Together program is all about, and[I hope you’ll make a donation to support this impactful program today.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78529654/453663931/-1986725772?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1418-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4NzkxOGM5LTNiYzUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aXpbr69gr22NAqLRIjlPWqXij4PgR4B1g5GxCG1XC_U=)**
Seated Together is a one-of-a-kind, advanced candidate leadership program that focuses specifically on the unique challenges Black women face as they seek to deepen their impact and move up the political pipeline. Through training and practice, participants build a network and learn the skills they need to run for higher office – and win.
This is how we transform our democracy, and I’m proud to be a part of it. But programs like Seated Together, and everything Emerge does to elect bold Democratic women up and down the ballot, are powered by your grassroots support, Peter.
**[That’s why we’re asking you to take action and support this critical work with a donation to Emerge today. Will you please give now to help us build a truly inclusive democracy?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78529655/453663932/-1986725772?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1418-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4NzkxOGM5LTNiYzUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aXpbr69gr22NAqLRIjlPWqXij4PgR4B1g5GxCG1XC_U=)**
Thank you for being a part of our movement
A’shanti Gholar
President, Emerge
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78529656/453663933/1592359359?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1418-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4NzkxOGM5LTNiYzUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aXpbr69gr22NAqLRIjlPWqXij4PgR4B1g5GxCG1XC_U=)
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Melissa Watson Ward**
Date: Sun, Feb 04, 2024
Subject: Black History Month: Help us empower Black women in politics
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78529657/453663934/-1986725772?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1418-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4NzkxOGM5LTNiYzUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aXpbr69gr22NAqLRIjlPWqXij4PgR4B1g5GxCG1XC_U=)
---
Peter,

Melissa Watson Ward here, Deputy Affiliate Director at Emerge, reaching out to you during a critical moment for our democracy.

As we celebrate Black History Month, we are excited to share with you the impactful strides we're making through our Seated Together program. This initiative empowers trailblazing Black women in politics, providing them with the support and resources needed to rise to higher office.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78529658/453663935/-1657939537?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1418-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4NzkxOGM5LTNiYzUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aXpbr69gr22NAqLRIjlPWqXij4PgR4B1g5GxCG1XC_U=)
We're more committed than ever to empowering bold Democratic women to lead and to defeat the GOP's dangerous agenda in 2024 and beyond. **But we urgently need your support to help fuel this movement toward a more inclusive political landscape.**

Do you believe everyone deserves a seat at the table? **[Then make your commitment known with a gift of $25 or more right now so we can continue to empower Black women to deepen their impact and move up the political pipeline!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78529659/453663936/-1986725772?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1418-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4NzkxOGM5LTNiYzUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aXpbr69gr22NAqLRIjlPWqXij4PgR4B1g5GxCG1XC_U=)**

Thank you for considering this opportunity to be a part of a more equitable and representative democracy this Black History Month.

Melissa Watson Ward
Deputy Affiliate Director
Emerge
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78529660/453663937/-1657939537?amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1418-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg4NzkxOGM5LTNiYzUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aXpbr69gr22NAqLRIjlPWqXij4PgR4B1g5GxCG1XC_U=)

But programs like Seated Together, and everything Emerge does to elect bold Democratic women up and down the ballot, are powered by your grassroots support, Peter. = Thank you for being a part of our movement A’shanti Gholar President, Emerge = \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Melissa Watson Ward Date: Sun, Feb 04, 2024 Subject: Black History Month: Help us empower Black women in politics | | | = Peter, Melissa Watson Ward here, Deputy Affiliate Director at Emerge, reaching out to you during a critical moment for our democracy. As we celebrate Black History Month, we are excited to share with you the impactful strides we're making through our Seated Together program. This initiative empowers trailblazing Black women in politics, providing them with the support and resources needed to rise to higher office. = We're more committed than ever to empowering bold Democratic women to lead and to defeat the GOP's dangerous agenda in 2024 and beyond. But we urgently need your support to help fuel this movement toward a more inclusive political landscape. Do you believe everyone deserves a seat at the table? = Thank you for considering this opportunity to be a part of a more equitable and representative democracy this Black History Month. Melissa Watson Ward Deputy Affiliate Director Emerge = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is an important way for Emerge America to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. If you no longer want to hear from Emerge America, click here to off all our lists instantly. Questions or concerns? mailto:connect@emergeamerica.org Paid for by Emerge America This email was sent by Emerge America 4 Embarcadero Center Suite 1400 San Francisco, CA 94111 United States |

name: Tom Suozzi
subject: The special election is in just 7 days
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-suozzi [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-suozzi]
Team , a new poll just came out that shows the NY-03 special election within the margin of error!
We knew this race was going to come down to the wire, and new polling proves just that. With a race in the margin of error and enough undecided voters left to sway the election either way, we need to redouble our efforts to win!
With just 16 days until Election Day, we need all hands on deck to make sure we have the resources to keep our ads on TV, send out mailers, and sustain our voter contact operation all the way to the finish line.
Make a split donation right now -- with Seth Moulton -- to help us win this toss-up race. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-suozzi]
I know you know how much is at stake in this race. An affordability crisis, climate change, gun violence, the immigration crisis–we need solutions for all of these problems, and we need common-sense leaders who can come together to solve them.
But this poll shows how much work we have to do in just 16 days to get that done! Every dollar you give will directly help our critical voter outreach efforts. Please chip in now.
Thank you,
Tom Suozzi
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-suozzi]

body:
Voices from all across Central Washington

To read their full bio's visit [https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/advisoryboard](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/e8OrdC9lK/c?w=umO6dbtdJXkY2jGh5F-roSapV6kV8HokTkPsY52883k.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL2Fkdmlzb3J5Ym9hcmQiLCJyIjoiNGRjZTYzMzEtMDU4Yi00N2U0LWEwN2YtYWQyYjMzNWQwYTllIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0)

| |

| |

|

| |

|

| |

|

| | |

| | As we expand our services and programs across Central Washington, our costs rise. Your continued generous support will help turn Central Washington BLUE in just four short years. That is our plan! Our Goal is 100 New Recurring Donations in February. We are going to reach our target one donor at a time. You can be the first.
---

| | Ignorance Is Anything But Blisss
---
| | The poll numbers are providing a clear picture of what we in Central Washington already know: the majority of Americans are oblivious to politics, and this poses potentially the greatest threat to our democracy since the Civil War. "Disproportionate doom seems to be a new American affliction," writes Financial Times's John Burn-Murdoch ([FT paywalled](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/e8OrdC9lK/c?w=T1cYdqYtpRN6jMUlE6CIkvmvhqAFKAQcSanAenD4GKE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZnQuY29tL2NvbnRlbnQvOWM3OTMxYWEtNDk3My00NzVlLTk4NDEtZDdlYmQ1NGIwZjQ3IiwiciI6ImM3MDgwN2NhLThjYWEtNDgwYy1iZDgyLTQ3NjYyOTRiYThjZSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)). Those least tuned into politics are more likely to rate their economic situation significantly more dire despite all indications to the contrary, as suggested by a [TLP/ YouGov national polling](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/e8OrdC9lK/c?w=rDZ2sky-0cC1zb3xiqZ8Z5mJL4Nd_KmgzTG3QZoXnL4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9kM25rbDNwc3Z4eHBlOS5jbG91ZGZyb250Lm5ldC9kb2N1bWVudHMvVExQX3dhdmUyX2Nyb3NzdGFicy5wZGYiLCJyIjoiYzcwODA3Y2EtOGNhYS00ODBjLWJkODItNDc2NjI5NGJhOGNlIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0) reported by [John Halpin of the Liberal Patriot](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/e8OrdC9lK/c?w=z_yr-mhgfdcvHpUpOmdVV9NRJ1pxOiVHljL7xFbG8gU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGliZXJhbHBhdHJpb3QuY29tL3AvdHVuZWQtb3V0LXZvdGVycy1hcmUtdGhlLW1vc3QtbmVnYXRpdmU_IiwiciI6ImM3MDgwN2NhLThjYWEtNDgwYy1iZDgyLTQ3NjYyOTRiYThjZSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9). In Central Washington, we are blessed with diversity, with half our population being Latino and home to the Confederated Colville Tribes and the Yakama Nation. These historically disenfranchised groups, coupled with the fact that 80% of the district's residents have never heard a pro-democratic message, explain the shift in sentiment and voters moving to the far-right by double digits ([Split Ticket](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/e8OrdC9lK/c?w=_LwP9FolpSWNLJYEtx6GzkyRNsqS6b3TmBEueBZY7a8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zcGxpdC10aWNrZXQub3JnLzIwMjMvMTIvMDQvd2hhdC1kby1hZ2dyZWdhdGVkLWNyb3NzdGFicy10ZWxsLXVzLWFib3V0LTIwMjQvPyIsInIiOiJjNzA4MDdjYS04Y2FhLTQ4MGMtYmQ4Mi00NzY2Mjk0YmE4Y2UiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)). Feel the joy! Recognizing a problem is the first step to a solution. While we may not know all the reasons eligible voters are "tuned out," we have foundational understandings that provide clear paths of action. The vast majority of Central Washington residents have a household income half that of King County. Maslow's [hierarchy of needs](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/e8OrdC9lK/c?w=EpNWLcSJHpLIsqpgmJ8s1WVJa_CKfgbhXRTFyHyvloY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wc3ljbmV0LmFwYS5vcmcvcmVjb3JkLzE5NTUtMDIyMzMtMDAwIiwiciI6ImM3MDgwN2NhLThjYWEtNDgwYy1iZDgyLTQ3NjYyOTRiYThjZSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9) explains it well; addressing basic needs must precede pondering the fates of humanity, or the struggle will blind you from all else.In our digital world, where information is primarily delivered electronically and manipulated by algorithms, choices presented to us are exaggerations of our interests rather than a reflection of the world as it is.Political messaging, driven by money and polling, tends to focus on population-dense urban areas rather than Tonasket. Rural Americans United understands this and is strategizing to overcome these obstacles. Since last October, we've been broadcasting pro-democratic messages all across Central Washington, assembling a diverse group representing our community. We are all amazing, and together, we will get this done!

name: WisDems
subject: Wisconsin GOP Rep. compares women to animals in abortion ban debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
We need to defeat these deranged extremists at the ballot box
#
The Wisconsin GOP passed their 14-week abortion ban through the State Assembly on January 25th – but that’s not the wildest thing they did.
One GOP Representative literally **_compared women to animals during the floor debate.**_
GOP Rep. Joel Kitchens said that, because he was a veterinarian and did “thousands of ultrasounds on animals,” he understands “mammalian fetal development better than probably anyone.” And he thinks that gives him the right to dictate what women do with their own bodies.
**_We have to defeat these deranged extremists at the ballot box this November, team.[Chip in a split donation of $5 between WisDems and The Long Run right now to help us do it >>**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em240206-1-t1&t=1&akid=5190%2E196590%2ETQ3_Qm)_
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically evenly split between The Democratic Party of Wisconsin and The Long Run PAC_
[Express Donate: $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.swMvtB&refcode=em240206-1-t1&t=20&akid=5190%2E196590%2ETQ3_Qm)
[Express Donate: $23](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/3439?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.RM9Xj7&refcode=em240206-1-t1&t=21&akid=5190%2E196590%2ETQ3_Qm)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.zkrtZA&refcode=em240206-1-t1&t=22&akid=5190%2E196590%2ETQ3_Qm)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.B1zxC_&refcode=em240206-1-t1&t=23&akid=5190%2E196590%2ETQ3_Qm)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.jgEQ-M&refcode=em240206-1-t1&t=24&akid=5190%2E196590%2ETQ3_Qm)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em240206-1-t1&t=25&akid=5190%2E196590%2ETQ3_Qm)
We shouldn’t even have to say this, but women. aren’t. animals. Understanding “mammalian fetal development” doesn’t give you the authority to take away our right to choose.
But unless we show up to vote in record numbers this November, people like Rep. Kitchens will continue their disgusting attacks on reproductive rights.
**Let’s show these extremists that we’re done listening to their nonsense.[Rush a $5 split grassroots donation between WisDems and The Long Run to build a pro-choice wave in 2024 >>**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em240206-1-t1&t=26&akid=5190%2E196590%2ETQ3_Qm)
[CONTRIBUTE $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-dpw-split.dMkqlP&refcode=em240206-1-t1&t=27&akid=5190%2E196590%2ETQ3_Qm)
Thank you for standing with us.
_WisDems and The Long Run_

name: Josh Harder
subject: Donald Trump thinks he’s above the law
body:
He’s not.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78530193/453665548/-171021866?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGJjZGQ4ZjctM2VjNS1lZTExLWI2NjAtMDAyMjQ4MjIzMTk3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=OmqPSrr-u1KNqfhTQXKkeCxlW_etygHOnoXjkWxbujI=) | Peter, Today a three-judge panel ruled that Donald Trump **does not** have “Presidential immunity” and his trial on January 6th charges can move forward. This isn’t the end of the issue though - Trump’s team almost certainly is going to take this to the Supreme Court.
