clean_body: | Peter, Take a guess how much Mitch McConnell and his dark money super PACs raised to retake the Senate majority last year. $10 million? $50 million? Try $95 million. $95 million from shady conservative mega-donors who are willing to spend whatever it takes to flip the Senate red and ensure Republicans can force through their radical, anti-abortion agenda. $95 million to flood states like Ohio, Montana, Wisconsin, Michigan, and Nevada with attack ads. $95 million to hand Mitch McConnell the gavel and complete MAGA Republicans’ plan to gut Social Security, Medicare, and other essential programs that millions of Americans rely on. And that’s just the beginning. But there’s no need to panic. Mitch McConnell and his shady super PACs might have billionaires and mega-donors, but we have something they don’t: this grassroots team. We know we can overcome Mitch McConnell’s millions, re-elect Democratic incumbents, and protect our Democratic majority — just like we did in 2022 — but we have to prepare now. = | | | **= ** | **= ** | | **= ** | **= ** | | **= ** | **= ** Thanks for being someone we can count on, Peter. — Hirono HQ Friends of Mazie Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States

body:
Greg’s the kind of leader we need in Congress.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78530830/453667780/-1494636936?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.02.06_b1_tl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDJmMmZlYy00MmM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3x16I4-fyGekUKuKBwGGNopwwwbvB_qNodPVciA3H3k=)
---
Team, each and every day, Greg brings so much of himself to Congress.

**He brings a steadfast commitment to Southwest Ohio, an unshakeable devotion to working families, and an unwavering love for his family and faith.**

And he brings something else – something unique among members of Congress: **_Tattoos._** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78530831/453667781/-1494636936?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2024.02.06_b1_tl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDJmMmZlYy00MmM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3x16I4-fyGekUKuKBwGGNopwwwbvB_qNodPVciA3H3k=) Over the years, Greg has gotten tattoos that relate to different periods in his life. One of the tattoos on his shoulder tells you everything you need to know about the kind of leader Greg is.

The tattoo is from Micah 6:8, one of Greg’s favorite verses. It’s the only time someone directly asks God what is expected of him, and God answers: **_“Do justice, love mercy, walk humbly with God.”_** That’s how Greg has tried to approach the world. And it’s a constant reminder to pursue justice, lead with kindness, and remain humble in his leadership.

If we’re going to address the challenges we face head-on, we need more leaders like Greg — the kind of leader whose values guide him to fight for working families, defend women’s freedoms, and stand up against extremism.

name: Team Kennedy
subject: This is why they fear him:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will stand up for a healthier, happier America.

|
---
| | | **[Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will stand up for a healthier, happier America.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=healthier_2_06_24_email_1_1_nd&n=1)
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=healthier_2_06_24_email_1_1_nd&n=2)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. has spent his career as an untiring crusader for Americans to live a healthy, vigorous life. His fight for our medical and health freedom will lead to a less drug dependent life for all Americans.
In other words, a healthier, happier America.
**_Surprisingly, pharmaceutical drugs are the number three killer in the U.S. behind cancer and heart attacks._** This is a man-made problem. Why?
There is a long history of corruption in the pharmaceutical industry.
RFK Jr. has spent his career litigating and writing about this, which makes him the best presidential candidate to root out this deep-seated corruption – and that includes with Big Pharma’s ‘ _financial partners_ ’ in our government agencies.
His goal is a healthier America. Yet, this worthy endeavor has been attacked by the most powerful corporations and government players.
He never threw in the towel from the onslaught of targeted propaganda hurled at him for standing up for what’s right. He fought for you and never wavered. He never will. Your health was his priority then and will be when he is in the White House.
| |
---
[As President, RFK, Jr. will end pharmaceutical advertising on television. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=healthier_2_06_24_email_1_1_nd&n=3)
RFK Jr. has a history of taking on the most powerful institutions and organizations in the world and holding them accountable. Despite their deep pockets and unsavory tactics, he has stood strong, steadfastly seeking justice and exposing the deceitful tactics of Big Pharma and corrupt government agencies – especially the NIH and CDC.
For example, when he reached out to high-ranking public health officials, he learned very few had read the most important studies on vaccines. He was told to go talk to the pharmaceutical companies.
That’s when he learned the pharmaceutical industry was granted immunity from liability because, as the Supreme Court described in a ruling, vaccines are “unavoidably unsafe.”
He also exposed the corrupt financial relationship between Big Pharma and our country’s government agencies. Big Pharma pays half their budgets. In other words, the NIH, CDC, FDA, etc. do not work for us; they work for Big Pharma.
These entities fear him because he seeks the truth – truths they do not want you to hear.
They also fear him because, as President, he will end pharmaceutical advertising on television.
[Help RFK Jr. continue to expose the truth by joining Team Kennedy with your gift of $10, $20, $50, $100 – whatever you can afford. ](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=healthier_2_06_24_email_1_1_nd&n=4)

Your financial support will help get Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. into the White House, where he will be even more impactful in the fight for a healthier country. Where he’ll also take on corrupt health institutions around the world, including the World Health Organization.
We need a fighter who understands the science as well as the challenges of taking on the corruption and deceit in our healthcare and pharmaceutical industries.

clean_body: Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. will stand up for a healthier, happier America. | | | | | Dear Peter, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. has spent his career as an untiring crusader for Americans to live a healthy, vigorous life. His fight for our medical and health freedom will lead to a less drug dependent life for all Americans. In other words, a healthier, happier America. Surprisingly, pharmaceutical drugs are the number three killer in the U.S. behind cancer and heart attacks. This is a man-made problem. Why? There is a long history of corruption in the pharmaceutical industry. RFK Jr. has spent his career litigating and writing about this, which makes him the best presidential candidate to root out this deep-seated corruption – and that includes with Big Pharma’s ‘ financial partners ’ in our government agencies. His goal is a healthier America. Yet, this worthy endeavor has been attacked by the most powerful corporations and government players. He never threw in the towel from the onslaught of targeted propaganda hurled at him for standing up for what’s right. He fought for you and never wavered. He never will. Your health was his priority then and will be when he is in the White House. | | RFK Jr. has a history of taking on the most powerful institutions and organizations in the world and holding them accountable. Despite their deep pockets and unsavory tactics, he has stood strong, steadfastly seeking justice and exposing the deceitful tactics of Big Pharma and corrupt government agencies – especially the NIH and CDC. For example, when he reached out to high-ranking public health officials, he learned very few had read the most important studies on vaccines. He was told to go talk to the pharmaceutical companies. That’s when he learned the pharmaceutical industry was granted immunity from liability because, as the Supreme Court described in a ruling, vaccines are “unavoidably unsafe.” He also exposed the corrupt financial relationship between Big Pharma and our country’s government agencies. Big Pharma pays half their budgets. In other words, the NIH, CDC, FDA, etc. do not work for us; they work for Big Pharma. These entities fear him because he seeks the truth – truths they do not want you to hear. They also fear him because, as President, he will end pharmaceutical advertising on television. Your financial support will help get Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. into the White House, where he will be even more impactful in the fight for a healthier country. Where he’ll also take on corrupt health institutions around the world, including the World Health Organization. We need a fighter who understands the science as well as the challenges of taking on the corruption and deceit in our healthcare and pharmaceutical industries. Team Kennedy | to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! | | PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY Would you like help donating? Call: tel:8057289443 and you can get help from a campaign staffer.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Doritos, Oreos, and toilet paper
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
One way giant corporations pad their profits and leave us with the crumbs.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1915%2E4032634%2EiiDVk2)
---
Have you ever finished a bag of Doritos and thought, “Whoa — there should have been a lot more chips in here”? You were right. From Doritos to Oreos to toilet paper and beyond, big corporations have been cutting down on how much they put in a bag, in a box, or on a roll — without cutting their prices. In fact, they sometimes charge MORE. For less. It’s called “shrinkflation.” Corporate executives thought we wouldn’t notice, but they were wrong. We caught on. And we’re not buying their excuse that it’s all about inflation. Why? Because corporate profits have increased by a whopping 75% over the past few years, outrunning inflation by miles. Shrinkflation is just another way for giant corporations to pad their profits and leave us with the crumbs. Literally. It’s greed, pure and simple. We need to call it out — and we need to push back against corporate abuses of power. **In Washington, I’m working to combat price gouging, break up big monopolies that stifle competition and lead to higher prices, eliminate junk fees that can suck hundreds of dollars a month out of people’s pockets, and make our economy work for working people — not just CEOs who spend their days scheming about how to make more money by doing less.** [**To help fight for these bold plans and more, can you pitch in $28 or any amount to our re-election campaign? Let’s stay in the fight side by side.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1881?amount=28&t=8&akid=1915%2E4032634%2EiiDVk2)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1881?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=1915%2E4032634%2EiiDVk2)
---

---

---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1881?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1915%2E4032634%2EiiDVk2)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1881?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1915%2E4032634%2EiiDVk2)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1881?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=1915%2E4032634%2EiiDVk2)
---

---
I know in my bones that it’s possible to beat corporate interests and put our government on the side of families — because we’ve done it before. Big banks threw everything they had into the fight against the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau, but we created the little agency that could, and it has forced financial institutions to return over $17 billion to the people they cheated. Manufacturers tried to water down the law I wrote to make hearing aids more affordable, but we got the policy over the finish line, and Americans can now save thousands of dollars on hearing aids. Corporate lobbyists wanted their clients to keep getting away with paying $0 in federal income taxes, but we passed my plan for a minimum tax on massive corporate profits, and it’s helping fund our nation’s biggest-ever investment in fighting climate change. **We make real, systemic change by identifying what’s wrong, laying out plans to fix it, and pushing back against the powerful interests in our way.** [**And people like you power this movement. If it makes sense for you right now, please make a donation of any amount to keep fueling our fight.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/1881?t=14&akid=1915%2E4032634%2EiiDVk2) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |

body:

Team Rosen,

My faith has always been a core part of my values and my work in the Senate. I'm guided and motivated by the Jewish principle of "Tikkun Olam," which means to repair the world and leave it in a better place than how we found it.

It’s why I ran for office, becoming the first former synagogue president and third Jewish woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate. And it’s why I'm proudly fighting to bring positive change to communities in Nevada and across the country. **But right now, I need your help.**
National Republicans are doing everything in their power to flip my seat red: **Mitch McConnell handpicked my opponent to run against me, and he's being propped up by a shady GOP billionaire. Now, polling shows me neck and neck in a race that experts say could decide Senate control.**
I'm relying on your immediate grassroots support to defend this seat so I can keep up the fight for our shared values. That's why I'm humbly asking: [**Please, will you chip in $5 or more today to my campaign and Patty Murray to help me win in Nevada, defend the Senate, and continue this critical work? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78531419/453669956/-393630507?&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk212-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMjY3YzYyYi00NGM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tn8NigXukPo1rlqQkGzlLfiw9nsPOFPEOkdun688MhU=)

This year we have our sights set on an even bigger goal — that’s because the stakes of the 2024 election could not be higher. **_[So don’t wait — get your tickets now>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78531489/453670171/-1609412982?amount=24&refcode=ea.e77b274a-44c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.e77b274a-44c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3N2IyNzRhLTQ0YzUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gT2lYYLfVKxllpiBJRhMtP7iEt7gsjrZE5Tpm8_vMS0=)_**

Hearing directly from Jane and the Jane PAC endorsed candidates about activism, taking on big fossil fuel, and collective action inspired me and gave me hope for the brighter future we are building together, and I promise you don’t want to miss it. **_[So get your tickets now, and don’t forget to share this with your friends>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78531491/453670200/-1609412982?amount=24&refcode=ea.e77b274a-44c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&ms=ea.e77b274a-44c5-ee11-b660-002248223197&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3N2IyNzRhLTQ0YzUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gT2lYYLfVKxllpiBJRhMtP7iEt7gsjrZE5Tpm8_vMS0=)_**

Baron Vaughn

| | Friend, American democracy is in grave danger and our government is complicit.We have seen extreme corruption and disregard for ethics. A President incited an insurrection and has been indicted on dozens of federal charges, a Supreme Court that is facing multiple ethics scandals, and legislators who blatantly tried to overturn an election. Former President Trump has been indicted on _91 different counts_ in _4 different cases_ for interfering in our secure elections and preventing the proper investigations from taking place. Trump is a symptom, not the disease. Our election system and government is corrupt and flawed. We need to weed out corruption from the root across all levels of government. ECU//LAV Action Fund supports transparency and ethics laws that would keep criminals like this from running for office, but we need _your_ help to support our work. ___**[**You know how much of a danger that corruption in the White House poses to our democracy. If you care about American democracy, would you chip in $10 to help protect it?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78531768/453671086/444630146?refcode=2-6-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjZWI4ZWQ2LTQ1YzUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fQHZl26Z_XTnSUwQfgbgxwIz0_Y8sVAaG4qD1PgYTE0=)****** The Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ and set us back decades when it comes to reproductive rights. Our Supreme Court Justices are bought and paid for by conservative billionaires and Dark Money influences like Leonard Leo. We know that the Supreme Court needs ethics reforms and term limits to prevent corruption like that of Clarence Thomas to continue, and ECU//LAV Action Fund is working tirelessly to enact them._**[**We are counting on every single person to chip in $10 and help us in our plans to protect our precious democracy. We need ethics reform, term limits for Supreme Court Justices, and transparency laws for all politicians at every level of government. We are passionate about this, and we know you are too, which is why we need you with us. Can you chip in $10 to support us?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/78531769/453671087/444630146?refcode=2-6-24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkwOTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjZWI4ZWQ2LTQ1YzUtZWUxMS1iNjYwLTAwMjI0ODIyMzE5NyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fQHZl26Z_XTnSUwQfgbgxwIz0_Y8sVAaG4qD1PgYTE0=)****** Thank you,— Team ECU/LAV Action

name: Mark Warner
subject: Are there any serious Republican legislators left?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
the hypocrisy is truly shocking, Derek

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78531911/453671496/1003990091?refcode=mw_em_240206_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTc0OTk2NS00NmM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-bIFVRI5cexSPP6MYKPfFQTl4w27RD6ypmYCxjFJgU=)
Derek, I thought I was past the point of being surprised by some of the hypocrisy in Congress, but **the Republican exodus from this bipartisan border deal is truly shocking.** _Especially after they made the border their top political issue for months._ They asked for significant changes to immigration policy. Democrats came to the table and got a deal done – the most transformative border deal in decades, in fact. Yet, here we are. I know that the House is full of far-right members who are more than happy to cowtail to Trump’s wishes, just like I know that there are quality Republicans who refuse to hold back our country for the sake of remaining loyal to Trump. But the moral of the story is, we need more politicians in Congress who will focus on delivering real results for the American people on the issues that matter most to them. We can’t afford more leaders who are as nakedly hypocritical as the Republicans walking away from this truly bipartisan border agreement. **__[That’s why I’m asking: Will you support my work to bring more Democratic leaders to Congress who are laser-focused on addressing the issues that matter most to you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78531912/453671497/1003990091?refcode=mw_em_240206_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTc0OTk2NS00NmM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-bIFVRI5cexSPP6MYKPfFQTl4w27RD6ypmYCxjFJgU=)__** Thank you for standing with me, Mark Warner ********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78531913/453671498/1003990091?refcode=mw_em_240206_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTc0OTk2NS00NmM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E-bIFVRI5cexSPP6MYKPfFQTl4w27RD6ypmYCxjFJgU=)********

clean_body: the hypocrisy is truly shocking, Derek | | | = Derek, I thought I was past the point of being surprised by some of the hypocrisy in Congress, but the Republican exodus from this bipartisan border deal is truly shocking. Especially after they made the border their top political issue for months. They asked for significant changes to immigration policy. Democrats came to the table and got a deal done – the most transformative border deal in decades, in fact. Yet, here we are. I know that the House is full of far-right members who are more than happy to cowtail to Trump’s wishes, just like I know that there are quality Republicans who refuse to hold back our country for the sake of remaining loyal to Trump. But the moral of the story is, we need more politicians in Congress who will focus on delivering real results for the American people on the issues that matter most to them. We can’t afford more leaders who are as nakedly hypocritical as the Republicans walking away from this truly bipartisan border agreement. = Thank you for standing with me, Mark Warner ******=**** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

one month out, Peter!

Peter, we’re so close until our primary election – just one month out!

**That’s why our campaign is on overdrive to turn out every single Democratic voter in our district.** _Here’s what’s on our to-do list:_
* Pass our Mark Takano yard signs across the district 🪧
* Hire last minute canvassers to knock on doors 📖

name: Jim Banks (Sent from my iPhone)
subject: My message to President Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
body:
This is my message to Biden on our borders

|
---
Friend,

**This is my message to Biden on our borders:**

**Step 1:** Reinstate Trump-era policies and stop the catch-and-release by signing an executive order.

**Step 2:** Restart construction on the U.S. and Mexico border wall.

**Step 3:** Remove Secretary Mayorkas for his handling of our southern border and deport the 8 million illegal aliens you’ve allowed in.

Sounds simple, right?

The Biden Administration continues to blame Congress, but in reality, with a stroke of a pen, _**_he can stop this._**_

Instead of making our national security a priority, he colluded with foreign powers in the cartel-allies Mexican regime at the expense of Americans’ safety.
| [ **SECURE OUR BORDERS NOW** ](http://links.banksforsenate.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=795d8c70215a45bfadfa40be6c052a2a&_e=0s8TjPvy74uRpjMiP8ih1VJcX9-SIg8DWv9gn0E3xQbUiQ3-ofyuUr8c1dXRmI8s75uJG-UerIV7ucf6SiQqk54eQGNg4gjb5oqYilFV6snKXbt5z1Rb11ePfZMXyonq_yphFZSsoNd9n9Gw-CPOiSl3eLv16m7xsHEqhqKgrnkGModoXzjgr1z7FJMr2nfeNAWZMDWpPJ0oh4_DAGwuUpZMbIH4x07FnQMIXr9b3NdLxeUdl20_dr8xJMAH128r_QiPKvGoi40yHMDKjLoKOfJ6qfLDdNI-hL6BQ-moSaJ2GRReFPKn4xr49CfssQQF)

It’s time we put America First & lock down the border for good.

Jim Banks

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/78532485/453673502/1575385346?refcode=jtk4789-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiN2FiYzljMS00OWM1LWVlMTEtYjY2MC0wMDIyNDgyMjMxOTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R4XGIF1WJCF0oaezC4U3i3XVUnQG5-ZOpEu0kIn51PE=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 — and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. Friend, we’re 7 days away from the special election,** and although this is our first big test of 2024, our work doesn’t stop there. We’re off to the races all across the country, building the groundwork to take back the House majority. = We only need to win five more seats to take back The People’s House,**** and helping Tom in NY-03’s special election can get us one closer. I’m counting on your support. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Tom Suozzi and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Keep the faith, Hakeem | | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. We all know how big an issue abortion rights will be in the 2024 election.
Since the Dobbs decision, we’ve seen GOP-led states work to outdo one another to pass the most restrictive abortion laws in the country. Right here in Arizona, Republicans want to bring back abortion laws from 1864 that would ban nearly all abortions in our state. Absolutely not. name: Katie Porter
subject: Adam Schiff is running ads to boost our Republican opponent -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
This is self-serving, DC corruption at its worst.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=37356%2E3422442%2EssI_Jw)
We got some disappointing news last Thursday that I need to share:
1. **Adam Schiff is running TV ads to *boost* our Republican opponent, Steve Garvey.** Running an ad that highlights another candidate in a way that boosts their credibility with a certain sect of voters is a way politicians try to game the system to get an opponent they have the best chance of defeating.

Adam Schiff is doing this because he knows he will lose to us in November if we beat Steve Garvey and advance to the general election. That's what this brazenly cynical ad is about—furthering Adam’s own political career, boxing out qualified Democratic women candidates, and boosting a Republican candidate to do it. We need honest leadership, not political games.

2. A new USC poll released last week, conducted right after our first Senate candidate debate, **showed us completely tied with Steve Garvey for second place.** Even after Steve Garvey’s refusal to take a single solid policy position in the debate, we’re still in a dead heat.

Derek, to make it to the general election, we just need to place second in the primary, but this news shows we’re at real risk of coming in third. **[Is there anything you can give right now to help us ramp up our ads and reach the voters who will decide this race?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240206-2?refcode=em20240206-37356&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37356_3422442_ssI_Jw&akid=37356%2E3422442%2EssI_Jw)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240206-2?refcode=em20240206-37356&refcode2=37356_3422442_ssI_Jw&akid=37356%2E3422442%2EssI_Jw)
This is going to be an incredibly close race, and every dollar counts. Thanks a ton.
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em20240206-37356&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=37356_3422442_ssI_Jw&akid=37356%2E3422442%2EssI_Jw)**
---

Katie Porter for Senate

Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
